Friends,

It would take more than one email to tell you all of my goals for 2022.

But let’s start with this: _**Take Back the Senate Majority.**_

**Joe Biden needs to hear this: back off and stop this crazy federal overreach immediately.** | [**DONATE TO STOP JOE BIDEN** ](http://links.mikebraunsenate.com/u/click?_t=f3dfddd5a2ed4356955cd9c969d3b9e3&_m=8380f889f83949f0bb3fce016c40d422&_e=K4PqHA1dRSVUGk1rEslYUzeS_2T6zM4P-FaO2UVep-eP9ysHULhFyfrwimI4VZjNyaFUUa4e89zloA-yUQvJ-oEXwE1r55TxW4osFvyzutjdTNZjW4Egw_HbMGD3vtT7UJFt9AxXb2MCebyyT4ftzg9CO0fC6kTip49_zjU_DpnyArPVa2uT3JCgNKG3MFAlCOsIO0mJ3cMj6a5RX9SIJ-B_WS1YYOA4OB9urOoZ4hbzTsjWfAbHavsLs-2Ff8vsucR92-RkYn_SCO1r6iMZdV1vkXMlydHCPN6OZjaVMMjTZWLZBh5j1_u8qOvmuTXH1Mc52WgzEpHHw3sve1JOyQm_J_ImcuaPbc_ShNDu5k2ND1T2FzEmDHpMPDXURqZLNQGLMTwV_z8u39NTzk_6Tne2lbIA2oFtLJRydytpDLh8yah161FBPIPIz28TinhSmVAt7ijuDYxnUpMl6TIJFRNlEjNi87KCumQnz1kQvMapGuDUq2D7flzmF-HwWOLD)

We **MUST** take back the Majority in 2022 if we want to achieve any of our goals for America.

His presidency is the definition of a **POWER GRAB.**

**This is the United States of America — Home of the free, Land of the Brave. Americans have been loud and clear — we must begin putting our country and its values FIRST again.**

This is my goal for 2022. name: Jesse Sullivan
subject: how JB Pritzker caused the Chicago school shutdown
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sullivan for Illinois |
body:
And J.B. Pritzker’s actions have only made it worse! [](http://links.team-sully.com/u/click?_t=76f7546524874789b286c588bf600eda&_m=0b8df29d06ac432fa7843c35dec77bc6&_e=eCsDCfVzbALBDpSasD6sL2hSfPEpsS80eTD3PwNDHjtPU27zlTptFVlC5TsomrRIa-eLVm8JQDipGWyPb3XWnYeQKgutMT1HhXamFapwmm74pEjn6HGKDKiVnKgv5qKK6Vwys63zqJ998V5t2rZOHRn6kuqf9lHpfAeDdgd_roh16GMj9gdGthbHWu-GuDfE0SXJ_KaNPzBHD5fc31raOWFr9VVeap_plyuq_I70F9g9jTkWXytqQvnaXifwndI2E0zNwcirvaQ0hxtmFVJVSJ5EM_FDgpicfOJ6r4l2DESpHJCLxpB_HkH82Adm42fRaaXjwewq5urhznpcoTscqG8z7EIBVSCmYqObV-dyDn-gTIZAEOfu8ukH6v42eNkCJsUJcF8iCONcyOn7J7wZROZD-wdmOuFCzAkksqG-eyKfOhN4PgP6j91zeeAeEHKpbalMSa-LBMwTXirVjq7g4MEBvy1DfK4dtHD7VCDjvMI6dVoiojMNXyDVAUvUnmmN) Team, I am deeply disturbed by what’s happening in Chicago today. And I bet you are, too. **Once again, the Chicago Teachers Union has overridden the preferences of most parents and forced children into remote learning. ** After a year of putting students last, we saw academic performance and mental health outcomes plummet. **_School shutdowns fail our children. _**
We know that we can safely reopen schools.**It's time to put the best interests of our children and families first by keeping schools open.** [** HELP ME RE-OPEN ILLINOIS**](http://links.team-sully.com/u/click?_t=76f7546524874789b286c588bf600eda&_m=0b8df29d06ac432fa7843c35dec77bc6&_e=eCsDCfVzbALBDpSasD6sL2hSfPEpsS80eTD3PwNDHjtPU27zlTptFVlC5TsomrRIa-eLVm8JQDipGWyPb3XWnYeQKgutMT1HhXamFapwmm74pEjn6HGKDKiVnKgv5qKK6Vwys63zqJ998V5t2rZOHRn6kuqf9lHpfAeDdgd_roh16GMj9gdGthbHWu-GuDfE0SXJ_KaNPzBHD5fc31raOWFr9VVeap_plyuq_I70F9g9jTkWXytqQvnaXifwndI2E0zNwcirvaQ0hxtmFVJVSMicBHN5NIRx9EeUlTJzjC2xyE4y7g3rLGvw19lc_MRfgpxPgiRAYWfBiFl_Acq3gDlNxZIkNBpr9ohy9Ke5IyTHrEmmu96sMaIYDJqvlPMkWFMkrdnMiCwCirrmj9TiXtoKIDqYFAQDZKbw1ApSi9KV2RY4pg2H3zMW8kxng5loaCbHkCeEvWqWXDKVelh6lTj_cR85e7aSh8AW0wyOO_zJyXai18NgCko6qGSDjXxq) So why can’t we open our schools? It all goes back to J.B. Pritzker. _Last year, Governor J.B. Pritzker signed a bill that gave the teachers union more power than virtually every government union in the nation. _ And now, our kids are paying the price. **Whether or not you live in Chicago, this is a massive problem.** It is the direct result of a governor who continues to prioritize his own political interests over the needs of working people in our state. **[The solution? Give parents a say over how their children’s education dollars are spent.](http://links.team-sully.com/u/click?_t=76f7546524874789b286c588bf600eda&_m=0b8df29d06ac432fa7843c35dec77bc6&_e=eCsDCfVzbALBDpSasD6sL2hSfPEpsS80eTD3PwNDHjtPU27zlTptFVlC5TsomrRIa-eLVm8JQDipGWyPb3XWnYeQKgutMT1HhXamFapwmm74pEjn6HGKDKiVnKgv5qKK6Vwys63zqJ998V5t2rZOHRn6kuqf9lHpfAeDdgd_roh16GMj9gdGthbHWu-GuDfE0SXJ_KaNPzBHD5fc31raOWFr9VVeap_plyuq_I70F9g9jTkWXytqQvnaXifwndI2E0zNwcirvaQ0hxtmFVJVSJPD0_KOJvam0r9ozpztH_MH8XFTr2xbiCapXsavWh7W8u14xB709DI0DDywyBRAcUrlqa_XpiFwaSt8r5zIVM-cIqsu8umOBncl_E7Ac8BRZRcrJqJUKvz4athum7edQFcnDuHKjYqbufOkwNEoz8WVp2t1ZTkmzlGXn212qUie3VJRR1Zr6n3MQuLJ4wVKjyR59ZPAec5pK0PhQhLG5L-vigfnP3YFa1Wokfb5KzZP) **That’s why I fully support school choice. As your governor, I will make sure that no one**** prevents your children from getting the education they deserve. **Are you ready for parents to have a say in their kids' education? clean_body: And J.B. Pritzker’s actions have only made it worse! Team, I am deeply disturbed by what’s happening in Chicago today. And I bet you are, too. Once again, the Chicago Teachers Union has overridden the preferences of most parents and forced children into remote learning. After a year of putting students last, we saw academic performance and mental health outcomes plummet. School shutdowns fail our children. We know that we can safely reopen schools.It's time to put the best interests of our children and families first by keeping schools open. So why can’t we open our schools? It all goes back to J.B. Pritzker. Last year, Governor J.B. Pritzker signed a bill that gave the teachers union more power than virtually every government union in the nation. And now, our kids are paying the price. Whether or not you live in Chicago, this is a massive problem. It is the direct result of a governor who continues to prioritize his own political interests over the needs of working people in our state. That’s why I fully support school choice. As your governor, I will make sure that no one** prevents your children from getting the education they deserve. Are you ready for parents to have a say in their kids' education? Then join me to defeat JB Pritzker and his special interest friends.** Thank you, Sully | | | | Paid for by Sullivan for Illinois | | 111 E Douglas St, Petersburg, IL 62675 | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | |

name: Tiffany Shedd
subject: Join me at the Arizona for Life March and Rally
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shedd for Attorney General
body:
Friend, The Arizona Life Coalition is hosting a March and Rally for life on Saturday, January 15th, and I am looking forward to joining them to advocate for the unborn and the sanctity of human life. **If you believe as I do that every life is a gift from God, will you join us as well?** Here are the details: Arizona for Life March & Rally Saturday, January 15th 10:30AM-2PM **We will be gathering at 7th Ave and Washington St in downtown Phoenix at 10:30AM to march to the Arizona State Capitol with our rally scheduled to begin at the Capitol at 12:30PM with special guest Evangelist Alveda King.** _[You can learn more about the Arizona Life Coalition and this important event by clicking here.](http://links.sheddforaz.com/u/click?_t=aef90635dd7e4e83bfd7b3a79f893ad5&_m=41214eb57d464120b8b5d8056322ffed&_e=YD3Cf7_-FZKmxHfzDYWhuskVa2fV3P2BkHc8VrsADTHbTmxIneK7nEWgl8Z6-QsyREQwVQDx45YYyWAsZchFtudJqhukW07nfczAFtiV4Lk3Eex5j3OOsHXn6Oqv072IEDzPJgxal96UpRNCIrOCRit7vNDX379_82bE8I0Ep4VAF05NozySYOANrh1enOW3gg8zn6UhU_hHr4Rh5yRwoxbqMGYPWKJt1c6uNzqB42Jq_xh0E2qURcHwk1VyMIQEGvlycQPhxmeQ9oAdaHzcREPLnzMOJ2kz6ZLutE9MpOg%3D)_ ALC is praying to bring together 20,000 supporters of Life to celebrate together to honor and remember the 13,097 children lost to abortion in 2019 and bring a voice to the voiceless. Let’s make it happen! God Bless, Tiffany Shedd Paid for by Shedd for Attorney General.
Authorized by Shedd for Attorney General.

clean_body: Friend, The Arizona Life Coalition is hosting a March and Rally for life on Saturday, January 15th, and I am looking forward to joining them to advocate for the unborn and the sanctity of human life. If you believe as I do that every life is a gift from God, will you join us as well? Here are the details: Arizona for Life March & Rally Saturday, January 15th 10:30AM-2PM We will be gathering at 7th Ave and Washington St in downtown Phoenix at 10:30AM to march to the Arizona State Capitol with our rally scheduled to begin at the Capitol at 12:30PM with special guest Evangelist Alveda King. ALC is praying to bring together 20,000 supporters of Life to celebrate together to honor and remember the 13,097 children lost to abortion in 2019 and bring a voice to the voiceless. Let’s make it happen! God Bless, Tiffany Shedd Paid for by Shedd for Attorney General. Authorized by Shedd for Attorney General.

That's right - NBC News reported on December 22nd that a new poll has our campaign pulling ONE POINT ahead of the Democrat incumbent in Georgia - 49% to 48%!

While this is fantastic news, there are some important points to consider:
1. This poll shows the strength of the campaign we're building, but we're still more than 10 months away from Election Day. A lot can - and will - happen between now and November 8.
2. In some states, you can win an election with a plurality like 49%. But in Georgia, we must get a majority of the votes to win, so we still have hard work to do to get over 50%.
3. We are taking nothing for granted. We feel the momentum building for our campaign, but we know it will take an incredible amount of sweat equity to win this race.

clean_body: Our campaign is taking nothing for granted. We feel the momentum behind our campaign building, but we need your help. Our campaign is taking nothing for granted. We feel the momentum behind our campaign building, but we need your help. | Peter, We wanted to share some good news with you. Please see the headline below: That's right - NBC News reported on December 22nd that a new poll has our campaign pulling ONE POINT ahead of the Democrat incumbent in Georgia - 49% to 48%! While this is fantastic news, there are some important points to consider: 1. This poll shows the strength of the campaign we're building, but we're still more than 10 months away from Election Day. A lot can - and will - happen between now and November 8. 2. In some states, you can win an election with a plurality like 49%. But in Georgia, we must get a majority of the votes to win, so we still have hard work to do to get over 50%. 3. We are taking nothing for granted. We feel the momentum building for our campaign, but we know it will take an incredible amount of sweat equity to win this race. We need 500 donations before midnight tonight to keep pace with this week's goal. If polls are this tight ten months out from Election Day, then we fully expect this race is going to be a grueling fight to the finish. Even NBC News, which is not known for their fair and balanced reporting, acknowledges that this is going to be one of the MOST COMPETITIVE RACES IN THE NATION. We've already seen the Democrats use this poll to motivate their supporters and raise more money, so there is no time to waste. Please donate $3 or more to our campaign right now. Thank you for your support, Herschel Walker Republican Candidate for Senate | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but .

name: John Fetterman
subject: The insurrection reached Pennsylvania
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
I’m not afraid to take on the insurrectionists.
#
Derek,
One year ago today, I got thrown out of the Pennsylvania State Senate chamber. Here’s what happened. 👇
Democratic State Senator Jim Brewster won his re-election fair and square. In fact, the Pennsylvania Secretary of State certified his victory.
On January 5, 2021, Senator Brewster was supposed to be sworn in. **But the Republican leadership in the Pennsylvania State Senate refused to do it.**
_Republicans *literally* removed me from the chamber because I refused to allow a motion that would block a duly elected senator from being sworn into office._
When I reached out to supporters like you after the incident, here’s what I said: _“It’s unclear what will happen at this point, but I am very worried about the direction this is heading.”_
Well, looking back, we can draw a straight line to what happened the very next day on January 6, 2021, when insurrectionists stormed the Capitol at the urging of Donald Trump and people tragically lost their lives.
Derek, the aftermath of the 2020 election was an extraordinarily dangerous time for the country. One year later, the danger to our country is just as present. We still have one party willing to flout our election process and undermine the law just to hold onto power.
**Just this week, we found out that NONE of the GOP frontrunners in this race (including Dr. Oz) are willing to go on the record saying that Joe Biden won the 2020 election or that they would have certified Pennsylvania’s election results.**
Here’s the reality in America in 2022: Maintaining Democratic control of the Senate isn’t just about passing our policies, as vital as that is. _It’s also about protecting our democracy as we know it from the people who want to tear it apart._
Now, here’s my promise to you: Send me to the U.S. Senate, and I will do *exactly* what I did when Republicans threw me out of the state senate chamber. Meaning I’ll do what it takes to make sure our elections are safe for good.
**[I’m NOT afraid to take on the insurrectionists, the enablers, and anyone who attacks our democracy. Help me bring that energy to the halls of the U.S. Senate, and solidify our Democratic majority by chipping in $5 now.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/39958?refcode=ema20220105-4093&t=1&akid=4093%2E434096%2EUcsI6Z)**
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/39958?refcode=em20220105-4093&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=4093%2E434096%2EUcsI6Z)**
Derek, we can’t allow the GOP to dictate the terms of our democracy. But if we’re going to take on Trump allies and special interests and win this election, we can’t let our people-powered fundraising slow down one bit.
Thank you for everything,
John
John Fetterman
Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20220105-4093-footer&t=21&refcode2=4093_434096_UcsI6Z&akid=4093%2E434096%2EUcsI6Z)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=22&akid=4093%2E434096%2EUcsI6Z)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=23&akid=4093%2E434096%2EUcsI6Z)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Rachel=20Tripp?=
subject: Bill McSwain - Highlights from the First GOP Gubernatorial Debate
body:
McSwain excelled on stage Wednesday evening | | | [View this email in your browser](https://us5.campaign-archive.com/?e=b1ec95759b&u=b9af0aef3fa3167622552aedb&id=583f39efe6)
---
| |
---
| **PRESS RELEASE
FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE**
---
**JANUARY 5, 2021
CONTACT: Rachel Tripp
202.738.9089**
---
| |
# Bill McSwain Stands Out as Strong, Decisive, Conservative Leader in First GOP Gubernatorial Debate
**West Chester, Pa.** **\-- **Bill McSwain, Republican candidate for Governor of Pennsylvania, today participated in the first GOP Gubernatorial Debate which took place at Dickinson College. McSwain highlighted his history as a U.S. Marine, former U.S. Attorney appointed by President Trump, and conservative outsider as the keys to his success as Governor.

Throughout the course of the 90-minute debate, McSwain shared his plans for restoring PA's economy, promoting public safety and security, and harnessing the Commonwealth's energy and infrastructure, as well as his approach to governing in the face of COVID-19.

When speaking about the economy, McSwain shared his promise to put the people of Pennsylvania first:

---
|
> _**"****We need change in Pennsylvania. But we will never have change if we have a career politician as Governor. Instead, we need an outsider – someone who owes nothing to the Harrisburg swamp. ****When I’m Governor, we will do things differently. That starts with being a responsible steward of the people’s money. There is no such thing as government money; there is only the people’s money. And the bigger our government, the less money that families have in their pockets. ****My agenda as Governor will be to end this destructive cycle, reduce the size of government, and be an advocate for the hard working families of Pennsylvania." **_
---
| Bill also shared his position on climate change and harnessing PA's unique energy resources:
---
|
> _**"Green New Deal nonsense has real world consequences – and we’re all experiencing them. Sky high gas prices, rising energy prices, dependence on foreign sources of energy. ****We should not be dependent on countries that hate us. ****Fortunately, we have everything we need, right here in Pennsylvania, to be an energy powerhouse. We should harness ALL of our state’s energy resources -- and especially natural gas. That’s how we make gas and energy prices LOWER, not higher." **_
---
| **BACKGROUND: **
Appointed by President Trump, McSwain's record as US Attorney demonstrates his fierce defense of constitutional rights, dedication to upholding law and order, and history of putting criminals and corrupt politicians in jail. Prior to becoming an attorney, Bill served as a scout/sniper platoon commander in the U.S. Marine Corps. He was born in Philadelphia and raised in Chester County, where he lives today with his wife, Stephanie, and their four children. More information on McSwain's background and platform is available [here.](https://freedompapac.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b9af0aef3fa3167622552aedb&id=c7decd8bcb&e=b1ec95759b)
###

name: Ben Shapiro
subject: Don't let conservatives be bullied into submission
body:
Dear Peter, This was state-sponsored **censorship** at its finest. As a public university, SUNY Binghamton administrators have a duty to protect and defend the First Amendment rights of EVERY student to think and speak freely. Instead, leftist administrators at SUNY Binghamton used your tax dollars to shut down free speech by allowing radical leftist activists to bully, harass, and intimidate conservative students and speakers on campus. As someone who's been verbally assaulted and abused for my conservative beliefs my entire life, I WILL NOT stand for it. And now **I 'm urgently asking for your help to protect the First Amendment and hold liberal administrators like the ones at SUNY Binghamton accountable for their unconstitutional actions**. **[Will you help me?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59177687:6DwNs2ECN:m:1:3298722022:0C7EBDFB692F25CF92CBC8AB0CCA5E41:r)** It all started two years ago when a mob of more than 200 leftist activists at SUNY Binghamton University SHUT DOWN a conservative campus lecture. [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59177687:6DwNs2ECN:m:1:3298722022:0C7EBDFB692F25CF92CBC8AB0CCA5E41:r) _The students attempted to host a Young America 's Foundation lecture featuring Dr.**Arthur Laffer** , Ronald Reagan's economic policy advisor, on free markets and conservatism, so that their peers could hear your conservative ideas. _ But, leftist school administrators at SUNY Binghamton didn't like that one bit. On the day of the lecture, SUNY Binghamton administrators put the leftist protesters up in the room right next to the lecture hall--specifically so that they could easily barge in and disrupt Dr. **Laffer** 's speech. Then, the faculty ordered the police to stand down if they got wind of physical violence or threats from the hands of the radical leftist agitators. When the day came, Dr. **Laffer** walked into the room with hundreds of students patiently waiting to hear what he had to say... **Before he could even make it up to the podium, the leftist activists swarmed the lecture hall.****** With their fists in the air and bullhorns on blast, they belligerently screamed and shouted--drowning out Dr. Laffer with left-wing propaganda. [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59177687:6DwNs2ECN:m:1:3298722022:0C7EBDFB692F25CF92CBC8AB0CCA5E41:r) **_Eventually, a few campus police officers showed up to de-escalate the situation. But rather than remove the leftist activists, the campus police escorted Dr. Laffer out of the auditorium and ended the event_**! Worse yet, the SUNY Binghamton faculty then decided to SUSPEND the conservative students who organized the event--instead of punishing radical leftists who disrupted Dr. Laffer. It's bad enough that the students were harassed and intimidated by vile and obnoxious leftist bullies. But the fact that SUNY Binghamton administrators ENABLED THE LEFTISTS in bullying conservative students makes this a clear violation of the student's rights. They silenced conservatives. They empowered leftist agitators. And they broke a litany of their own safety rules and protocols regarding incidents like this one. The good news is that my friends at **Young America 's Foundation** are now suing the SUNY Binghamton administrators for unlawfully denying Young America's Foundation, Dr. Laffer and the SUNY conservative students their First Amendment rights. **But the only way they have a chance of winning the fight for the First Amendment not only at SUNY Binghamton but on campuses across the country is if they gather all the resources necessary to support YAF 's EXPERT team of constitutional lawyers and conservative thought leaders****.** [**That 's why I'm asking you to help Young America's Foundation protect free speech by sending them a tax-deductible gift of $35 or more today. **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59177687:6DwNs2ECN:m:1:3298722022:0C7EBDFB692F25CF92CBC8AB0CCA5E41:r) ** ** You may have heard of Young America's Foundation (YAF) before. As the largest and most effective conservative youth outreach organization in the country - they have a phenomenal track record of defending free speech in schools and on college campuses. I know from experience. A few years ago, YAF was organizing a college lecture tour with me, and one of the stops on the tour was UC Berkeley. **It was clear that Berkeley administrators didn 't want me there.** They denied me and YAF access to a lecture hall to host my speech, despite the fact they had granted access to numerous leftist speakers in the past. Apparently, they believed that my conservative message was "too dangerous" and "controversial." Thankfully, YAF stepped up and sued UC Berkeley for blatantly denying my First Amendment right to free speech and denying the rights of every student who planned on attending. And with the financial support of conservative folks across the country, YAF is winning the fight for free speech and conservative ideas. You see, Young America's Foundation doesn't take a single dime from the federal government. Everything they do to defend free speech and conservative values on hundreds of liberal college campuses across America is thanks to the generous financial support of folks like you. And now that they're standing up to defend the First Amendment across the country, they need your help. [**Will you please send a tax-deductible donation of $35, $50, $75 or more to my friends at Young America 's Foundation and help them defend our First Amendment rights? **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59177687:6DwNs2ECN:m:1:3298722022:0C7EBDFB692F25CF92CBC8AB0CCA5E41:r) **I am so confident in Young America 's Foundation that I've chosen them as my exclusive partner for all of my campus lectures and appearances**. In fact, through YAF I've spoken at 60 colleges and universities! And it's not just me. YAF hosts the most inspiring conservative leaders to introduce your ideas to students in schools. YAF's campus lectures feature**** NFL star and Congressman**Burgess Owens, Newt Gingrich, Stephen Crowder,** and **Dinesh D 'Souza**, **Katie Pavlich** , and many others. These conservative leaders travel across the country to spread your conservative values and beliefs with hundreds of thousands students (and millions more who watch online). That's why YAF's lawsuit against the radical administrators of SUNY Binghamton is so important. One of the most important things they do is prevent leftist college administrators like the ones at SUNY Binghamton from censoring and silencing conservative ideas. And with your urgent help today, they'll win lawsuits like the one against the radical left bureaucrats at SUNY Binghamton and defend every conservative student's right to think and speak freely. [**Can I count on you to contribute $25 or more to YAF today and protect the First Amendment?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59177687:6DwNs2ECN:m:1:3298722022:0C7EBDFB692F25CF92CBC8AB0CCA5E41:r) Sincerely, Ben Shapiro Young America's Foundation [**DONATE**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59177687:6DwNs2ECN:m:1:3298722022:0C7EBDFB692F25CF92CBC8AB0CCA5E41:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59177687:6DwNs2ECN:m:1:3298722022:0C7EBDFB692F25CF92CBC8AB0CCA5E41:r) | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59177688:6DwNs2ECN:m:1:3298722022:0C7EBDFB692F25CF92CBC8AB0CCA5E41:r) | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59177689:6DwNs2ECN:m:1:3298722022:0C7EBDFB692F25CF92CBC8AB0CCA5E41:r) | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59177690:6DwNs2ECN:m:1:3298722022:0C7EBDFB692F25CF92CBC8AB0CCA5E41:r)

As someone who's been verbally assaulted and abused for my conservative beliefs my entire life, I WILL NOT stand for it. And now I 'm urgently asking for your help to protect the First Amendment and hold liberal administrators like the ones at SUNY Binghamton accountable for their unconstitutional actions. It all started two years ago when a mob of more than 200 leftist activists at SUNY Binghamton University SHUT DOWN a conservative campus lecture. The students attempted to host a Young America 's Foundation lecture featuring Dr.Arthur Laffer , Ronald Reagan's economic policy advisor, on free markets and conservatism, so that their peers could hear your conservative ideas. But, leftist school administrators at SUNY Binghamton didn't like that one bit. On the day of the lecture, SUNY Binghamton administrators put the leftist protesters up in the room right next to the lecture hall--specifically so that they could easily barge in and disrupt Dr. Laffer 's speech. Then, the faculty ordered the police to stand down if they got wind of physical violence or threats from the hands of the radical leftist agitators. When the day came, Dr. Laffer walked into the room with hundreds of students patiently waiting to hear what he had to say... Before he could even make it up to the podium, the leftist activists swarmed the lecture hall.** With their fists in the air and bullhorns on blast, they belligerently screamed and shouted--drowning out Dr. Laffer with left-wing propaganda. Eventually, a few campus police officers showed up to de-escalate the situation. But rather than remove the leftist activists, the campus police escorted Dr. Laffer out of the auditorium and ended the event! Worse yet, the SUNY Binghamton faculty then decided to SUSPEND the conservative students who organized the event--instead of punishing radical leftists who disrupted Dr. Laffer. It's bad enough that the students were harassed and intimidated by vile and obnoxious leftist bullies. But the fact that SUNY Binghamton administrators ENABLED THE LEFTISTS in bullying conservative students makes this a clear violation of the student's rights. They silenced conservatives. They empowered leftist agitators. And they broke a litany of their own safety rules and protocols regarding incidents like this one. The good news is that my friends at Young America 's Foundation are now suing the SUNY Binghamton administrators for unlawfully denying Young America's Foundation, Dr. Laffer and the SUNY conservative students their First Amendment rights. But the only way they have a chance of winning the fight for the First Amendment not only at SUNY Binghamton but on campuses across the country is if they gather all the resources necessary to support YAF 's EXPERT team of constitutional lawyers and conservative thought leaders**. You may have heard of Young America's Foundation (YAF) before. As the largest and most effective conservative youth outreach organization in the country - they have a phenomenal track record of defending free speech in schools and on college campuses. I know from experience. A few years ago, YAF was organizing a college lecture tour with me, and one of the stops on the tour was UC Berkeley. It was clear that Berkeley administrators didn 't want me there. They denied me and YAF access to a lecture hall to host my speech, despite the fact they had granted access to numerous leftist speakers in the past. Apparently, they believed that my conservative message was "too dangerous" and "controversial." Thankfully, YAF stepped up and sued UC Berkeley for blatantly denying my First Amendment right to free speech and denying the rights of every student who planned on attending. And with the financial support of conservative folks across the country, YAF is winning the fight for free speech and conservative ideas. You see, Young America's Foundation doesn't take a single dime from the federal government. Everything they do to defend free speech and conservative values on hundreds of liberal college campuses across America is thanks to the generous financial support of folks like you. And now that they're standing up to defend the First Amendment across the country, they need your help. I am so confident in Young America 's Foundation that I've chosen them as my exclusive partner for all of my campus lectures and appearances. In fact, through YAF I've spoken at 60 colleges and universities! And it's not just me. YAF hosts the most inspiring conservative leaders to introduce your ideas to students in schools. YAF's campus lectures feature** NFL star and CongressmanBurgess Owens, Newt Gingrich, Stephen Crowder, and Dinesh D 'Souza, Katie Pavlich , and many others. These conservative leaders travel across the country to spread your conservative values and beliefs with hundreds of thousands students (and millions more who watch online). That's why YAF's lawsuit against the radical administrators of SUNY Binghamton is so important. One of the most important things they do is prevent leftist college administrators like the ones at SUNY Binghamton from censoring and silencing conservative ideas. And with your urgent help today, they'll win lawsuits like the one against the radical left bureaucrats at SUNY Binghamton and defend every conservative student's right to think and speak freely. Sincerely, Ben Shapiro Young America's Foundation | | | | ---|---|--- 1-800-USA-1776 Young America's Foundation National Headquarters 11480 Commerce Park Drive, 6th Floor Reston, VA 20191-1556 The Reagan Ranch Center 217 State Street Santa Barbara, CA 93101 The Ronald Reagan Boyhood Home 816 S. body:
Friends , my opponent's subversion of democracy led to the Jan. 6 insurrection. Wed. Jan. 6, 2021, was one of the biggest threats to our democracy ever. My opponent was part of it and still is. Every voter he discounted deserves answers, and every citizen of Michigan's First District deserves the truth. **My opponent's subversion of democracy led to the Jan. 6 insurrection... Period.** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40402065/324204741/1277889215?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNDFkOTM3My1kZDZlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TiZCjcYQ0JFI21cX-IHf4bTM1rLVjF39UDrR7IFLJLk=) **_Wed. Jan. 6, 2021, was one of the biggest threats to our democracy ever. My opponent was part of it and still is. Every voter he discounted deserves answers, and every citizen of Michigan's First District deserves the truth._** [CONTRIBUTE TO PRESERVE OUR UNION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40402066/324204742/1277889215?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNDFkOTM3My1kZDZlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TiZCjcYQ0JFI21cX-IHf4bTM1rLVjF39UDrR7IFLJLk=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40402067/324204743/1277889215?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNDFkOTM3My1kZDZlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TiZCjcYQ0JFI21cX-IHf4bTM1rLVjF39UDrR7IFLJLk=) [ON-CLICK IMMEDIATE $29 DONATION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40402068/324204744/1277889215?express_lane=true&amount=29&refcode=express_lane_29&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNDFkOTM3My1kZDZlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TiZCjcYQ0JFI21cX-IHf4bTM1rLVjF39UDrR7IFLJLk=) SAULT STE. MARIE, Mich. – The 2022 November midterm election will be like no other. We are not vying for a typical, run-of-the-mill Congressional race. Unseating Michigan's current First District Representative is vital, and it's not just the consequences of his ineffective policies at stake. It's our democracy. I am running for Congress to preserve our union, uphold our constitution, and support the rule of law. Last year, my opponent demonstrated he would not safeguard your vote if he dislikes the outcome of an election. Disgraceful. Our current representative tried to take away your vote in the 2020 election. Three times in the past year, he opposed voting rights and repeatedly defended dishonoring the will of the people. My opponent stood on the floor of our Capitol building and refused to certify every single vote cast in his district. Unacceptable. [**The incumbent representative still does not recognize that the President was duly elected.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40402069/324204745/1411080937?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNDFkOTM3My1kZDZlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TiZCjcYQ0JFI21cX-IHf4bTM1rLVjF39UDrR7IFLJLk=&emci=1ce4bd9e-d36e-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=e41d9373-dd6e-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=15167427) His subversion of democracy led to the Jan. 6 insurrection, and he still pushes the divisive, untruthful narrative that caused the chaos. His dereliction of duty jeopardizes every individual's freedom to have a voice in government, to have their vote counted. The great people of our district have been [**pleading with my opponent**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40402070/324204746/232586556?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNDFkOTM3My1kZDZlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TiZCjcYQ0JFI21cX-IHf4bTM1rLVjF39UDrR7IFLJLk=&emci=1ce4bd9e-d36e-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=e41d9373-dd6e-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=15167427) to provide answers, but he has not been available, accountable, or truthful. Honesty is the most basic expectation of a leader. The beauty of our democracy is that we can disagree, but we must entrust our leaders to base those political disagreements on a foundation of truth, supported by facts. **Here are the facts:** In 2016, our country elected Donald Trump in a fair and free election, and in 2020 we elected Joe Biden. We are a democratic republic, and we need to allow the people's will—and the votes they cast—to guide us. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40402071/324204747/-181161855?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNDFkOTM3My1kZDZlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TiZCjcYQ0JFI21cX-IHf4bTM1rLVjF39UDrR7IFLJLk=&emci=1ce4bd9e-d36e-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=e41d9373-dd6e-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=15167427) **How should we move forward?**
* We must protect our most fundamental democratic institutions — free and fair elections.
* It's critical to prevent political oversight over the electoral process.
* We must end gerrymandering.
* We must end voter exclusion.
* Our nation requires campaign reform. It requires a massive amount of money to be elected. If we continue on this path, our democracy will turn into government by the wealthy for the wealthy.
* It's essential we return to winning an election through voter persuasion to allow electors to compare candidates' policies, characters, and qualifications – and do so based on facts, not fiction.

**The survival of our democracy will depend on:**
* Ending political polarization and party tribalism.
* Eliminating conflict over who belongs as a member of a political community, particularly with race, ethnicity, and national origin.
* Decreasing economic inequality.
* Reducing excessive executive power.

**My opponent's**[**substanceless rhetoric and name-calling**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40402072/324204748/603838865?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNDFkOTM3My1kZDZlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TiZCjcYQ0JFI21cX-IHf4bTM1rLVjF39UDrR7IFLJLk=&emci=1ce4bd9e-d36e-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=e41d9373-dd6e-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=15167427)** are unproductive and unbecoming of a Representative.** As I have often said, I will run on a bedrock of principles—wisdom, justice, kindness, democratic freedom, and equality under the law. The current representative runs on intimidation, division, and meaningless rhetoric. He offers no meaningful solutions and does not advance legislation that addresses national problems. My opponent refuses to compromise to help us move forward together as a nation. If I am so honored to continue my lifetime of service as a Congressman and the people entrust me to replace the incumbent, things will be drastically different. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40402073/324204749/-803653937?v=WzdRG2p28QE&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNDFkOTM3My1kZDZlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TiZCjcYQ0JFI21cX-IHf4bTM1rLVjF39UDrR7IFLJLk=&emci=1ce4bd9e-d36e-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=e41d9373-dd6e-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=15167427) I hope to build relationships like Democratic Rep. Debbie Dingell and Republican Rep. Fred Upton from Michigan, who [**went on national TV**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40402074/324204750/1502097338?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNDFkOTM3My1kZDZlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TiZCjcYQ0JFI21cX-IHf4bTM1rLVjF39UDrR7IFLJLk=&emci=1ce4bd9e-d36e-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=e41d9373-dd6e-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=15167427) calling on Americans to "get back to just remembering how much we have in common" and to work together. We need to overcome the toxic environment in Washington. We must remove our fears and anger and replace them with hope, calmness, and confidence. We must collaborate with civility, dignity, and respectful debate. If my opponent were interested in these leadership values, I wouldn't be working so hard to defeat him, but it's my duty to run for Congress because our current representative does not work well with others, nor does he have the ability to represent _all_ people. We need a Yooper/Northern Michigander who lives in the district, someone who won't just advance fringe party values, but will prioritize rural Michigan values. I intend to bring your voices to the Capitol in order to be an influential and effective member of our government. A Congressperson who has four assumed duties and responsibilities. I urge voters to evaluate the incumbent on how well he did in each of these areas: **Legislative and policy work** — Here are my opponent's voting report cards:
* "F" in [**Foreign Policy**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40402075/324204751/-1320086751?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNDFkOTM3My1kZDZlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TiZCjcYQ0JFI21cX-IHf4bTM1rLVjF39UDrR7IFLJLk=&emci=1ce4bd9e-d36e-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=e41d9373-dd6e-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=15167427)

clean_body: Friends , my opponent's subversion of democracy led to the Jan. 6 insurrection. Wed. Jan. 6, 2021, was one of the biggest threats to our democracy ever. My opponent was part of it and still is. Every voter he discounted deserves answers, and every citizen of Michigan's First District deserves the truth. My opponent's subversion of democracy led to the Jan. 6 insurrection... Period. = Wed. Jan. 6, 2021, was one of the biggest threats to our democracy ever. My opponent was part of it and still is. Every voter he discounted deserves answers, and every citizen of Michigan's First District deserves the truth. = = = SAULT STE. MARIE, Mich. – The 2022 November midterm election will be like no other. We are not vying for a typical, run-of-the-mill Congressional race. Unseating Michigan's current First District Representative is vital, and it's not just the consequences of his ineffective policies at stake. It's our democracy. I am running for Congress to preserve our union, uphold our constitution, and support the rule of law. Last year, my opponent demonstrated he would not safeguard your vote if he dislikes the outcome of an election. Disgraceful. Our current representative tried to take away your vote in the 2020 election. Three times in the past year, he opposed voting rights and repeatedly defended dishonoring the will of the people. My opponent stood on the floor of our Capitol building and refused to certify every single vote cast in his district. Unacceptable. His subversion of democracy led to the Jan. 6 insurrection, and he still pushes the divisive, untruthful narrative that caused the chaos. His dereliction of duty jeopardizes every individual's freedom to have a voice in government, to have their vote counted. The great people of our district have been to provide answers, but he has not been available, accountable, or truthful. Honesty is the most basic expectation of a leader. The beauty of our democracy is that we can disagree, but we must entrust our leaders to base those political disagreements on a foundation of truth, supported by facts. Here are the facts: In 2016, our country elected Donald Trump in a fair and free election, and in 2020 we elected Joe Biden. We are a democratic republic, and we need to allow the people's will—and the votes they cast—to guide us. How should we move forward? We must protect our most fundamental democratic institutions — free and fair elections. It's critical to prevent political oversight over the electoral process. We must end gerrymandering. We must end voter exclusion. Our nation requires campaign reform. It requires a massive amount of money to be elected. If we continue on this path, our democracy will turn into government by the wealthy for the wealthy. It's essential we return to winning an election through voter persuasion to allow electors to compare candidates' policies, characters, and qualifications – and do so based on facts, not fiction. The survival of our democracy will depend on: Ending political polarization and party tribalism. Eliminating conflict over who belongs as a member of a political community, particularly with race, ethnicity, and national origin. Decreasing economic inequality. Reducing excessive executive power. My opponent's are unproductive and unbecoming of a Representative. As I have often said, I will run on a bedrock of principles—wisdom, justice, kindness, democratic freedom, and equality under the law. The current representative runs on intimidation, division, and meaningless rhetoric. He offers no meaningful solutions and does not advance legislation that addresses national problems. My opponent refuses to compromise to help us move forward together as a nation. If I am so honored to continue my lifetime of service as a Congressman and the people entrust me to replace the incumbent, things will be drastically different. I hope to build relationships like Democratic Rep. Debbie Dingell and Republican Rep. Fred Upton from Michigan, who calling on Americans to "get back to just remembering how much we have in common" and to work together. We need to overcome the toxic environment in Washington. We must remove our fears and anger and replace them with hope, calmness, and confidence. We must collaborate with civility, dignity, and respectful debate. If my opponent were interested in these leadership values, I wouldn't be working so hard to defeat him, but it's my duty to run for Congress because our current representative does not work well with others, nor does he have the ability to represent all people. We need a Yooper/Northern Michigander who lives in the district, someone who won't just advance fringe party values, but will prioritize rural Michigan values. I intend to bring your voices to the Capitol in order to be an influential and effective member of our government. A Congressperson who has four assumed duties and responsibilities. name: Tom Brejcha
subject: 9 felonies for exposing Planned Parenthood
body:
I'm writing this letter to you today because, quite frankly, David Daleiden cannot.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zqqhvovhnu1ii75ta1dd5t07m9fo5sgtgshpue5o_rp22sh2s8i66ob4c5hm6o75cjh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq2sjlemo72sjk6ipr7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65sj0c5hr0phkcdp64s3l6do68ppnmao6ac30epq34c3369ie8cj26qqedcj4chrrfkjge9h6cs5icpoe9cr3cup32phlc2qr6ptnclj35c5icpge1db3c3gbac9hmkorash5u)
Dear Friend, I'm writing this letter to you today because, quite frankly, David Daleiden cannot. You may remember David as the undercover journalist who spent 30 months investigating and capturing video evidence of Planned Parenthood 's top leadership --- medical directors, national program directors, even its Senior Director of Medical Services -- **callously negotiating the harvesting and sale of aborted baby body parts.** **And now, he’s been charged with nine bogus felonies.** **[Which is why I’m asking you to make an emergency donation to the DAVID DALEIDEN DEFENSE FUND right away.](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zda2mv5iflf252ji6m8pbgla2jss11bc9j34q3s8_rp22sh2s8i66ob4c5hm6o75cjh2bs)** You see, after David released the shocking videos of the illegal and disgusting actions of abortion executives, Kamala Harris, then California's Attorney General, colluded with Planned Parenthood to file felony charges against David... _**... Kamala Harris even ordered the California Department of Justice to raid David's home and confiscate his unpublished videos.**_ I won't sugarcoat it. If not cleared of these charges, David faces steep fines and years in state penitentiary and the consequences of being a convicted felon. While Kamala Harris --- a bought-and-paid-for ally of the abortion industry --- is sitting one heartbeat away from the presidency. That's the bad news. But here's the good news... David is fighting back. In fact, he's taking another opportunity to drag more of Planned Parenthood's dark criminality into the spotlight with two new federal lawsuits. That's right. The Thomas More Society has filed a federal civil rights lawsuit in California on behalf of David against former California Attorney General and now VicePresident Kamala Harris for prosecuting David in bad faith, twisting and perverting California's anti-eavesdropping law to persecute a citizen journalist because of his political views. Then the Thomas More Society filed a defamation (libel) lawsuit in federal court in New York against Planned Parenthood, which said David created a "fake" and "false" "smear campaign" against Planned Parenthood. In other words, the best defense is a good offense. The truth is we could no longer let David suffer such a trampling of his free speech and due process rights without a counterattack. The timing couldn't be more important. This is a critical opportunity to put Kamala Harris, Planned Parenthood, and the rest of the abortion industry on trial for conspiring to silence David in order to cover-up their illegal activities. **[That's where your emergency donation to the DAVID DALEIDEN DEFENSE FUND comes in --- by giving today you can stand with David in his hour of need.](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zo26ghnssi2mjqrmc9bvnhcr9a3051b076mr2cm0_rp22sh2s8i66ob4c5hm6o75cjh2bs)** The reality is. . . You couldn't be there when David entered the dark underbelly of the abortion industry --- sitting across the table from abortionists haggling over the price of baby body parts with cold-blooded clarity... "I want a Lamborghini." You couldn't be there as David saw with his own eyes the preborn children who had been killed with great precision and delicacy to preserve their organs for maximum profit. You couldn't be there when the videos were released and Kamala Harris and Planned Parenthood conspired to crush David with trumped up legal charges and an armed raid on his home in which they seized laptops, hard-drives, and recording equipment. And you couldn't be there with David (our criminal defense team was there) when he voluntarily appeared in both Texas and California for booking and processing --- fingerprinted and photographed for a mugshot like a common criminal. But, now, this is the reality... there is something you can do. **[You can make an emergency donation to the DAVID DALEIDEN DEFENSE FUND to help vindicate this pro-life hero.](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z5p1ljf5rn35b50tfsaap3ufq1s8p0ecda1j6gfg_rp22sh2s8i66ob4c5hm6o75cjh2bs)** My name is Tom Brejcha. I'm the president and chief counsel of the Thomas More Society --- a not-for-profit law firm underwriting and helping to spearhead David's criminal defense. The Thomas More Society is proud to have defended many renowned pro-life and religious leaders in America's pro-life movement such as Joe, Ann, and Eric Scheidler, the Pro-Life Action League, Shawn Carney and 40 Days for Life, Abby Johnson, the Susan B. Anthony List, David Bereit, Lila Rose and Live Action, Students for Life, Sidewalk Advocates for Life, Created Equal, former Kansas Attorney General Phill Kline, the March for Life, and many more. Because when dark forces like Planned Parenthood unleash their full might to legally, financially, and personally destroy our clients --- **we fight back.** I have to tell you, despite all that David is facing, his spirits remain high. Of course, I've never known anyone in this kind of position who didn't feel an empty pit in his stomach. But David's not giving up. His willingness to fight back is a true profile in Pro-Life courage. Now I'll get right down to it... **We anticipate David's legal defense will cost us more than $6 million. That's right, SIX MILLION DOLLARS.** In addition to the criminal case and the new federal civil rights and defamation lawsuits, we're currently representing David in THREE other cases.
* The civil lawsuit filed by Planned Parenthood where we are appealing the jury's verdict, along with the judge's order permanently banning David from doing any more undercover journalism against Planned Parenthood. Recently, we posted a $700,000 appeal bond to keep Planned Parenthood’s nasty collection agents from harassing him with collection agents and even seizing his belongings. We’re fighting back, but we’ll need your help.

* The civil lawsuit brought by the National Abortion Federation and the "gag order" injunction that still prohibits David from releasing any more of his video evidence exposing Planned Parenthood's illegal fetal tissue business. And now, in light of the Planned Parenthood civil lawsuit, NAF has moved for summary judgment – they want a ruling against David without a trial at all!

* And finally, the civil lawsuit filed by Planned Parenthood personnel in federal court in Seattle, where we just achieved a victory for a second time on appeal, but it appears we may need at least a third victory on appeal before this case ends.

That's why David needs your financial support today. **[And that's why I'm praying you will donate $35 or more to the DAVID DALEIDEN DEFENSE FUND right away.](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zmv2j0ta6remkef4gcm6jcvp4oucf93k6svc53i8_rp22sh2s8i66ob4c5hm6o75cjh2bs)** I won't guess how much you're able to send today. Whether it's $35, $50, $75, $125, $250, $500, $1,000 or more... ... I will only say that time is of the essence. So I do ask that you make your donation as soon as you can. **This truly is a "David versus Goliath" type of battle --- with Kamala Harris, Planned Parenthood, and the radical left arrayed against our "David."** It's a grave injustice that David is the one being hit with felony charges and massive civil penalties while Planned Parenthood (so far, at least) has gone unpunished. By clearing David of these charges... you and I can allow him to continue with his incredibly important lifesaving work. Remember, over 12 million people on YouTube alone watched the shocking footage he captured. Since that time, 26 states --- over half the country -- have moved to strip Planned Parenthood of taxpayer funding. It's no wonder Planned Parenthood and their allies want to destroy David. They'd love to see him rotting away in penitentiary rather than exposing their criminal and inhumane activities. You and I cannot let that happen. **[So please don't delay. clean_body: I'm writing this letter to you today because, quite frankly, David Daleiden cannot. Dear Friend, I'm writing this letter to you today because, quite frankly, David Daleiden cannot. You may remember David as the undercover journalist who spent 30 months investigating and capturing video evidence of Planned Parenthood 's top leadership --- medical directors, national program directors, even its Senior Director of Medical Services -- callously negotiating the harvesting and sale of aborted baby body parts. And now, he’s been charged with nine bogus felonies. You see, after David released the shocking videos of the illegal and disgusting actions of abortion executives, Kamala Harris, then California's Attorney General, colluded with Planned Parenthood to file felony charges against David... ... Kamala Harris even ordered the California Department of Justice to raid David's home and confiscate his unpublished videos. I won't sugarcoat it. If not cleared of these charges, David faces steep fines and years in state penitentiary and the consequences of being a convicted felon. While Kamala Harris --- a bought-and-paid-for ally of the abortion industry --- is sitting one heartbeat away from the presidency. That's the bad news. But here's the good news... David is fighting back. In fact, he's taking another opportunity to drag more of Planned Parenthood's dark criminality into the spotlight with two new federal lawsuits. That's right. The Thomas More Society has filed a federal civil rights lawsuit in California on behalf of David against former California Attorney General and now VicePresident Kamala Harris for prosecuting David in bad faith, twisting and perverting California's anti-eavesdropping law to persecute a citizen journalist because of his political views. Then the Thomas More Society filed a defamation (libel) lawsuit in federal court in New York against Planned Parenthood, which said David created a "fake" and "false" "smear campaign" against Planned Parenthood. In other words, the best defense is a good offense. The truth is we could no longer let David suffer such a trampling of his free speech and due process rights without a counterattack. The timing couldn't be more important. This is a critical opportunity to put Kamala Harris, Planned Parenthood, and the rest of the abortion industry on trial for conspiring to silence David in order to cover-up their illegal activities. The reality is. . . You couldn't be there when David entered the dark underbelly of the abortion industry --- sitting across the table from abortionists haggling over the price of baby body parts with cold-blooded clarity... "I want a Lamborghini." You couldn't be there as David saw with his own eyes the preborn children who had been killed with great precision and delicacy to preserve their organs for maximum profit. You couldn't be there when the videos were released and Kamala Harris and Planned Parenthood conspired to crush David with trumped up legal charges and an armed raid on his home in which they seized laptops, hard-drives, and recording equipment. And you couldn't be there with David (our criminal defense team was there) when he voluntarily appeared in both Texas and California for booking and processing --- fingerprinted and photographed for a mugshot like a common criminal. But, now, this is the reality... there is something you can do. My name is Tom Brejcha. I'm the president and chief counsel of the Thomas More Society --- a not-for-profit law firm underwriting and helping to spearhead David's criminal defense. The Thomas More Society is proud to have defended many renowned pro-life and religious leaders in America's pro-life movement such as Joe, Ann, and Eric Scheidler, the Pro-Life Action League, Shawn Carney and 40 Days for Life, Abby Johnson, the Susan B. Anthony List, David Bereit, Lila Rose and Live Action, Students for Life, Sidewalk Advocates for Life, Created Equal, former Kansas Attorney General Phill Kline, the March for Life, and many more. Because when dark forces like Planned Parenthood unleash their full might to legally, financially, and personally destroy our clients --- we fight back. I have to tell you, despite all that David is facing, his spirits remain high. Of course, I've never known anyone in this kind of position who didn't feel an empty pit in his stomach. But David's not giving up. His willingness to fight back is a true profile in Pro-Life courage. Now I'll get right down to it... We anticipate David's legal defense will cost us more than $6 million. That's right, SIX MILLION DOLLARS. In addition to the criminal case and the new federal civil rights and defamation lawsuits, we're currently representing David in THREE other cases. The civil lawsuit filed by Planned Parenthood where we are appealing the jury's verdict, along with the judge's order permanently banning David from doing any more undercover journalism against Planned Parenthood. Recently, we posted a $700,000 appeal bond to keep Planned Parenthood’s nasty collection agents from harassing him with collection agents and even seizing his belongings. We’re fighting back, but we’ll need your help. The civil lawsuit brought by the National Abortion Federation and the "gag order" injunction that still prohibits David from releasing any more of his video evidence exposing Planned Parenthood's illegal fetal tissue business. And now, in light of the Planned Parenthood civil lawsuit, NAF has moved for summary judgment – they want a ruling against David without a trial at all! And finally, the civil lawsuit filed by Planned Parenthood personnel in federal court in Seattle, where we just achieved a victory for a second time on appeal, but it appears we may need at least a third victory on appeal before this case ends. That's why David needs your financial support today. I won't guess how much you're able to send today. Whether it's $35, $50, $75, $125, $250, $500, $1,000 or more... ... I will only say that time is of the essence. So I do ask that you make your donation as soon as you can. This truly is a "David versus Goliath" type of battle --- with Kamala Harris, Planned Parenthood, and the radical left arrayed against our "David." It's a grave injustice that David is the one being hit with felony charges and massive civil penalties while Planned Parenthood (so far, at least) has gone unpunished. By clearing David of these charges... you and I can allow him to continue with his incredibly important lifesaving work. Remember, over 12 million people on YouTube alone watched the shocking footage he captured. name: Ben Shapiro
subject: Don't let conservatives be bullied into submission
body:
This was state-sponsored censorship at its finest.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z9qpor85q7qsmta5ea90i8qtrecp9lrh4003qht0_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkgqracjkmoq37d1m65qbfctjmkrncst66uqrf91ieoob9crl6uie5sj2uppn1d3jm5o74obme9gj0t366jin2cj3ckqn6p9ieor7ddb46jhm7cr7cjhjaptnq9o74p1m62p6csjk65r61o5kckoe1d9hcjj6cphlcipm4ptiepj3cp5lm9jr1db5e8gq48bi4bh28or1chgm6or0slgm49fg)
Dear Fellow Patriot, This was state-sponsored **censorship** at its finest. As a public university, SUNY Binghamton administrators have a duty to protect and defend the First Amendment rights of EVERY student to think and speak freely. Instead, leftist administrators at SUNY Binghamton used your tax dollars to shut down free speech by allowing radical leftist activists to bully, harass, and intimidate conservative students and speakers on campus. As someone who’s been verbally assaulted and abused for my conservative beliefs my entire life, I WILL NOT stand for it. And now **I’m urgently asking for your help to protect the First Amendment and hold liberal administrators like the ones at SUNY Binghamton accountable for their unconstitutional actions**. **[Will you help me?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z7av6hf9adjacgs746kdtpbmji5e2v08b9mhjp9o_rp22sh2s8i66ob4c5hm6o75c5h2bs)** It all started two years ago when a mob of more than 200 leftist activists at SUNY Binghamton University SHUT DOWN a conservative campus lecture. [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zmfliq5lrs7lq9b7nmrm99ddvcs9ejb6piqqnjm8_rp22sh2s8i66ob4c5hm6o75c5h2bs) _The students attempted to host a Young America’s Foundation lecture featuring Dr.**Arthur Laffer** , Ronald Reagan’s economic policy advisor, on free markets and conservatism, so that their peers could hear your conservative ideas. _ But, leftist school administrators at SUNY Binghamton didn’t like that one bit. On the day of the lecture, SUNY Binghamton administrators put the leftist protesters up in the room right next to the lecture hall—specifically so that they could easily barge in and disrupt Dr. **Laffer** ’s speech. Then, the faculty ordered the police to stand down if they got wind of physical violence or threats from the hands of the radical leftist agitators. When the day came, Dr. **Laffer** walked into the room with hundreds of students patiently waiting to hear what he had to say... **Before he could even make it up to the podium, the leftist activists swarmed the lecture hall.****** With their fists in the air and bullhorns on blast, they belligerently screamed and shouted—drowning out Dr. Laffer with left-wing propaganda. [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zf5ko4d2u253cutd8fbk8q584jgg0n8n280ugqi0_rp22sh2s8i66ob4c5hm6o75c5h2bs) **_Eventually, a few campus police officers showed up to de-escalate the situation. But rather than remove the leftist activists, the campus police escorted Dr. Laffer out of the auditorium and ended the event_**! Worse yet, the SUNY Binghamton faculty then decided to SUSPEND the conservative students who organized the event—instead of punishing radical leftists who disrupted Dr. Laffer. It’s bad enough that the students were harassed and intimidated by vile and obnoxious leftist bullies. But the fact that SUNY Binghamton administrators ENABLED THE LEFTISTS in bullying conservative students makes this a clear violation of the student’s rights. They silenced conservatives. They empowered leftist agitators. And they broke a litany of their own safety rules and protocols regarding incidents like this one. The good news is that my friends at **Young America’s Foundation** are now suing the SUNY Binghamton administrators for unlawfully denying Young America’s Foundation, Dr. Laffer and the SUNY conservative students their First Amendment rights. **But the only way they have a chance of winning the fight for the First Amendment not only at SUNY Binghamton but on campuses across the country is if they gather all the resources necessary to support YAF’s EXPERT team of constitutional lawyers and conservative thought leaders****.** [**That’s why I’m asking you to help Young America’s Foundation protect free speech by sending them a tax-deductible gift of $35 or more today.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z2kkv8jjeth05q0mfbo0mgmbe57r4poo8gf60go8_rp22sh2s8i66ob4c5hm6o75c5h2bs) ** ** You may have heard of Young America’s Foundation (YAF) before. As the largest and most effective conservative youth outreach organization in the country – they have a phenomenal track record of defending free speech in schools and on college campuses. I know from experience. A few years ago, YAF was organizing a college lecture tour with me, and one of the stops on the tour was UC Berkeley. **It was clear that Berkeley administrators didn’t want me there.** They denied me and YAF access to a lecture hall to host my speech, despite the fact they had granted access to numerous leftist speakers in the past. Apparently, they believed that my conservative message was “too dangerous” and “controversial.” Thankfully, YAF stepped up and sued UC Berkeley for blatantly denying my First Amendment right to free speech and denying the rights of every student who planned on attending. And with the financial support of conservative folks across the country, YAF is winning the fight for free speech and conservative ideas. You see, Young America’s Foundation doesn’t take a single dime from the federal government. Everything they do to defend free speech and conservative values on hundreds of liberal college campuses across America is thanks to the generous financial support of folks like you. And now that they’re standing up to defend the First Amendment across the country, they need your help. [**Will you please send a tax-deductible donation of $35, $50, $75 or more to my friends at Young America’s Foundation and help them defend our First Amendment rights?**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ztcrqfb2ga8li1gg0nvvi5kmlbrje76p9sjvvac8_rp22sh2s8i66ob4c5hm6o75c5h2bs) **I am so confident in Young America’s Foundation that I’ve chosen them as my exclusive partner for all of my campus lectures and appearances**. In fact, through YAF I’ve spoken at 60 colleges and universities! And it’s not just me. YAF hosts the most inspiring conservative leaders to introduce your ideas to students in schools. YAF’s campus lectures feature**** NFL star and Congressman**Burgess Owens, Newt Gingrich, Stephen Crowder,** and **Dinesh D’Souza** , **Katie Pavlich** , and many others. These conservative leaders travel across the country to spread your conservative values and beliefs with hundreds of thousands students (and millions more who watch online). That’s why YAF’s lawsuit against the radical administrators of SUNY Binghamton is so important. One of the most important things they do is prevent leftist college administrators like the ones at SUNY Binghamton from censoring and silencing conservative ideas. And with your urgent help today, they’ll win lawsuits like the one against the radical left bureaucrats at SUNY Binghamton and defend every conservative student’s right to think and speak freely. [**Can I count on you to contribute $25 or more to YAF today and protect the First Amendment?**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zp9sivui1pphtjqj9qmfa0jshv9m07lj39q2jsp0_rp22sh2s8i66ob4c5hm6o75c5h2bs) Sincerely, Ben Shapiro Young America’s Foundation [**DONATE**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zmtj9ft7cunq497s3r92un8vi8esaap4jqvrst4o_rp22sh2s8i66ob4c5hm6o75c5h2bs) [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zdvfit810ngj6ou1neueavqlakop82gics02i030_rp22sh2s8i66ob4c5hm6o75c5h2bs) | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z3e7ok3eicuaggmfgore6funmlljdnq83d1sq7d0_rp22sh2s8i66ob4c5hm6o75c5h2bs) | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zh7kkpio4ksdb4mrjg2kk2aa79b63t1irch8bmk0_rp22sh2s8i66ob4c5hm6o75c5h2bs) | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z24sn96aatfdv8rt79rhqnk0qkpmfu30gssvnl6o_rp22sh2s8i66ob4c5hm6o75c5h2bs)

name: Ben Shapiro
subject: Don't let conservatives be bullied into submission
body:
This was state-sponsored censorship at its finest. As a public university, SUNY Binghamton administrators have a duty to pro
| _Sponsored message_ |
---|---|---
Dear Fellow Patriot, This was state-sponsored **censorship** at its finest. As a public university, SUNY Binghamton administrators have a duty to protect and defend the First Amendment rights of EVERY student to think and speak freely. Instead, leftist administrators at SUNY Binghamton used your tax dollars to shut down free speech by allowing radical leftist activists to bully, harass, and intimidate conservative students and speakers on campus. As someone who’s been verbally assaulted and abused for my conservative beliefs my entire life, I WILL NOT stand for it. And now **I’m urgently asking for your help to protect the First Amendment and hold liberal administrators like the ones at SUNY Binghamton accountable for their unconstitutional actions**. **[Will you help me?](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z91h3f7k11336m3h51ovarire16tshurmp44i0ao_rp22sh2s8i66ob4c5jm0ob2cph2bs)** It all started two years ago when a mob of more than 200 leftist activists at SUNY Binghamton University SHUT DOWN a conservative campus lecture. [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zl8sl95jgc5j3drgbdp30c5ed87c7ap8cu3bvjbg_rp22sh2s8i66ob4c5jm0ob2cph2bs) _The students attempted to host a Young America’s Foundation lecture featuring Dr.**Arthur Laffer** , Ronald Reagan’s economic policy advisor, on free markets and conservatism, so that their peers could hear your conservative ideas. _ But, leftist school administrators at SUNY Binghamton didn’t like that one bit. On the day of the lecture, SUNY Binghamton administrators put the leftist protesters up in the room right next to the lecture hall—specifically so that they could easily barge in and disrupt Dr. **Laffer** ’s speech. Then, the faculty ordered the police to stand down if they got wind of physical violence or threats from the hands of the radical leftist agitators. When the day came, Dr. **Laffer** walked into the room with hundreds of students patiently waiting to hear what he had to say... **Before he could even make it up to the podium, the leftist activists swarmed the lecture hall.****** With their fists in the air and bullhorns on blast, they belligerently screamed and shouted—drowning out Dr. Laffer with left-wing propaganda. [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zbnb91ran49abotuivqqk4r4u0qp9fmoshkvcpr0_rp22sh2s8i66ob4c5jm0ob2cph2bs) **_Eventually, a few campus police officers showed up to de-escalate the situation. But rather than remove the leftist activists, the campus police escorted Dr. Laffer out of the auditorium and ended the event_**! Worse yet, the SUNY Binghamton faculty then decided to SUSPEND the conservative students who organized the event—instead of punishing radical leftists who disrupted Dr. Laffer. It’s bad enough that the students were harassed and intimidated by vile and obnoxious leftist bullies. But the fact that SUNY Binghamton administrators ENABLED THE LEFTISTS in bullying conservative students makes this a clear violation of the student’s rights. They silenced conservatives. They empowered leftist agitators. And they broke a litany of their own safety rules and protocols regarding incidents like this one. The good news is that my friends at **Young America’s Foundation** are now suing the SUNY Binghamton administrators for unlawfully denying Young America’s Foundation, Dr. Laffer and the SUNY conservative students their First Amendment rights. **But the only way they have a chance of winning the fight for the First Amendment not only at SUNY Binghamton but on campuses across the country is if they gather all the resources necessary to support YAF’s EXPERT team of constitutional lawyers and conservative thought leaders****.** [**That’s why I’m asking you to help Young America’s Foundation protect free speech by sending them a tax-deductible gift of $35 or more today.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z5ethho4rk345jcisg09rbm94cm61bu3p0qfv5n8_rp22sh2s8i66ob4c5jm0ob2cph2bs) ** ** You may have heard of Young America’s Foundation (YAF) before. As the largest and most effective conservative youth outreach organization in the country – they have a phenomenal track record of defending free speech in schools and on college campuses. I know from experience. A few years ago, YAF was organizing a college lecture tour with me, and one of the stops on the tour was UC Berkeley. **It was clear that Berkeley administrators didn’t want me there.** They denied me and YAF access to a lecture hall to host my speech, despite the fact they had granted access to numerous leftist speakers in the past. Apparently, they believed that my conservative message was “too dangerous” and “controversial.” Thankfully, YAF stepped up and sued UC Berkeley for blatantly denying my First Amendment right to free speech and denying the rights of every student who planned on attending. And with the financial support of conservative folks across the country, YAF is winning the fight for free speech and conservative ideas. You see, Young America’s Foundation doesn’t take a single dime from the federal government. Everything they do to defend free speech and conservative values on hundreds of liberal college campuses across America is thanks to the generous financial support of folks like you. And now that they’re standing up to defend the First Amendment across the country, they need your help. [**Will you please send a tax-deductible donation of $35, $50, $75 or more to my friends at Young America’s Foundation and help them defend our First Amendment rights?**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zrhra03jmhkfjcq7v076td365hm4s49p6580bla8_rp22sh2s8i66ob4c5jm0ob2cph2bs) **I am so confident in Young America’s Foundation that I’ve chosen them as my exclusive partner for all of my campus lectures and appearances**. In fact, through YAF I’ve spoken at 60 colleges and universities! And it’s not just me. YAF hosts the most inspiring conservative leaders to introduce your ideas to students in schools. YAF’s campus lectures feature**** NFL star and Congressman**Burgess Owens, Newt Gingrich, Stephen Crowder,** and **Dinesh D’Souza** , **Katie Pavlich** , and many others. These conservative leaders travel across the country to spread your conservative values and beliefs with hundreds of thousands students (and millions more who watch online). That’s why YAF’s lawsuit against the radical administrators of SUNY Binghamton is so important. One of the most important things they do is prevent leftist college administrators like the ones at SUNY Binghamton from censoring and silencing conservative ideas. And with your urgent help today, they’ll win lawsuits like the one against the radical left bureaucrats at SUNY Binghamton and defend every conservative student’s right to think and speak freely. [**Can I count on you to contribute $25 or more to YAF today and protect the First Amendment?**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zs7uq4fcg4vj22r910tvfmieenqb4piml9qjaogg_rp22sh2s8i66ob4c5jm0ob2cph2bs) Sincerely, Ben Shapiro Young America’s Foundation [**DONATE**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zhnuak8ck11ogmvlks8uch52rv7rnkbcr2msg320_rp22sh2s8i66ob4c5jm0ob2cph2bs) [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z2pbrmafa0tsst7qfhgvih8ftomrrkpgdqkbr7dg_rp22sh2s8i66ob4c5jm0ob2cph2bs) | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zm32bk3rm942ol7qb2qtoecgjahprljlej1fjpe0_rp22sh2s8i66ob4c5jm0ob2cph2bs) | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z909lgfkhrkrrcbu2mj1fhtrkiqjvq46ogq8ppto_rp22sh2s8i66ob4c5jm0ob2cph2bs) | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zhvjuvfraou4irq8eqggj3hq2i844qposs10a5v0_rp22sh2s8i66ob4c5jm0ob2cph2bs)
---|---|---
**[www.yaf.org](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2za40f6ov1prkccg182topf901815ogg8keaeq4s0_rp22sh2s8i66ob4c5jm0ob2cph2bs)**

1-800-USA-1776

Young America's Foundation
National Headquarters
11480 Commerce Park Drive, 6th Floor
Reston, VA 20191-1556

The Reagan Ranch Center
217 State Street
Santa Barbara, CA 93101

The Ronald Reagan Boyhood Home
816 S. Hennepin Avenue
Dixon, IL 61021

**[Privacy Policy](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z3vs43iqrbiltlrm5kdo859gilbnpn52op3aor48_rp22sh2s8i66ob4c5jm0ob2cph2bs)

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314
