name: American Defense News
subject: Reason with precision
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Eucli
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z32pvfepcekpjpcej5bopg38lm499032bqpmmfc0_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkgqracjkmoq37c9l6cqj7djl6eqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbpj4cri6lqrapdkcqpmfcr2mhjb1cdjm1pm6shieopm4cb165ob2t5gscq7acb7mv970sj2cpob4pjgsipm6pti65j3aollm5jr5cr662ob4pj0s2qm6o70mkoj3d9hmlp238h1e8he4933c5i62pr2c9j68oh5u)
This sponsored message from American Defense News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zu93rm8kibdpps0udd9k90tfd1ehig88lv0or0e0_rp22sh2s8i66ob4c5jm4oj6chh2bs)
---
| | Dear Fellow American,
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law.
Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.”
By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly—plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun.
That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.”**
Through**“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,”** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** **** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**
Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because...
Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zh33k6e0bdd5tum9lsosdh4ptba6ir2u121mikag_rp22sh2s8i66ob4c5jm4oj6chh2bs)
---
| | That’s why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.
Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below:
[_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z2ukcrv0h1ho1slle2e5qe2lvpp0lng9ophnkqdo_rp22sh2s8i66ob4c5jm4oj6chh2bs)
Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty.
Warm regards,
Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law. Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.” By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly—plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun. That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic “Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.” Through“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,” you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life. | | Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group. ** You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.** Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because... Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. | | | That’s why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below: Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Friend,

The thing I like most about turning the corner into a new year is that everyone has **a blank slate, a fresh start, and a new beginning.**

Well, I always enjoy making a few resolutions to hold myself accountable. Let me give you mine below.

1\. Eat less, especially sweets.

2\. Stop Pink-Haired Wokers from turning this country softer than a pillow

3\. Do everything in my power to stop my Liberal Left opponents from winning and pushing their Socialist Agenda

I think those are pretty good. Number one will be tough, but two and three **WILL BE** accomplished.

If you’d like to join me in stopping Pink-Haired Wokers and the Left’s Radical Agenda, please rush what you can right now to help my re-election campaign in 2022.

name: Deirdre Gilbert
subject: VOLUNTEER MEETING
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Committee to Elect Gilbert for Governor [Preferences](https://gilbertforgovernor
body:
Friendly reminder for TEAM GILBERT'S weekly meeting on Thursday !! [](https://gilbertforgovernor.cmail19.com/t/y-l-bckjtk-iduiyhurdd-r/)
# * Volunteers Needed*
### **We Need Your Help!**
We are gearing up for the ride of a lifetime and we are going to need all hands on deck. We are currently looking for volunteers to assist us in several areas for the Gilbert for Governor campaign; like knocking on doors, making phone calls, hosting a fundraiser, assisting with digital and online marketing, and scheduling. What's good about this, is you CAN WORK FROM HOME! Just give us a few hours of your time. As you may or may not know Deirdre Gilbert has decided to run as an Independent Candidate. As an independent, she must acquire signatures to get on the ballot in November. We are going to need about 200 Volunteers to assist us with this endeavor. If you want to help us with this, please send an email to info@gilbert4gov.com. We are very excited about those that have already joined us, but we are in need of so much more so that we can WIN this race. Every Thursday we will have online training and/or meetings to discuss the strategies that is needed to run this race and WIN it. Here is the link to join us every Thursday at 7PM (CST). Bring some friends along! Thank you so much for your support!https://us02web.zoom.us/j/82872448465?pwd=czVCUU82bTlxLy8wZjlPMlZuUERLUT09Meeting ID: 828 7244 8465 Passcode: 307107 [](https://gilbertforgovernor.cmail19.com/t/y-l-bckjtk-iduiyhurdd-y/)
## * Registration *

[SIGN UP TODAY!](https://gilbertforgovernor.cmail19.com/t/y-l-bckjtk-iduiyhurdd-j/)

name: Pro Life Update
subject: Lincoln's secret weapon
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Eucli
[View this message in your browser](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z8si5ofdjv9uig7m4t25vl1k8hubu9v38man9soo_rp22sh2s8i66ob4c5jmao72chh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq0sjnm6qb6d9le1oj8cbl6ej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hf1db7clg77dpjmph35dtk6gpr5d3me1o69olk6aqj1cdjmpqm9dplcmr7bc9mmsrt4s3icgr31cj6e9q32tj0s2q6ac70mkom9pj6coqm9cr2c1p7aphmc2pm1ptgmlin49fg)
| This sponsored message from Pro Life Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z5t94t642mnbfd9lk6umkk0llobc5kqn7nciv0i8_rp22sh2s8i66ob4c5jmao72chh2bs)
---|---
| | Dear fellow American,
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law.
Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.”
By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly—plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun.
That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.”**
Through**“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,”** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** **** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**
Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because...
Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zg97mtp0v35a5lchn4fvobsgc9j4dsmjtd6o3qv0_rp22sh2s8i66ob4c5jmao72chh2bs)
---
| | That’s why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.
Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below:
[_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zc106i7qqi3i7i8gih52qm9isjaufc7ftm2mos00_rp22sh2s8i66ob4c5jmao72chh2bs)
Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty.
Warm regards,
Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

body:
What turned into a violent, deadly attack on our Capital was deemed by Ron Johnson as a largely “peaceful protest.” | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40408636/324214634/1691506499?refcode=EM_FR_220106FR_N_AL_90DA_7_G_N_logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODcxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzODZjNTUyOC1mNjZlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fgxXObr8kMELLmV70Ja2kmMCwaowpvi1sAHUqv6e7K8=)
---
Peter,

One year ago, the nation witnessed the worst attack on our democracy in modern history. What turned into a violent, deadly attack on our Capital was deemed by Ron Johnson as a largely “peaceful protest.”

Let’s remember what Johnson said last year about the insurrection: [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40408637/324214635/1691506499?refcode=EM_FR_220106FR_N_AL_90DA_7_G_N_PT&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODcxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzODZjNTUyOC1mNjZlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fgxXObr8kMELLmV70Ja2kmMCwaowpvi1sAHUqv6e7K8=) In an interview last year, Ron Johnson said he “wasn’t concerned” about the predominantly white crowd that stormed the Capitol to overturn the election results. He then went on to say that if the crowd was “tens of thousands of Black Lives Matter and antifa, I might have been a little concerned.”

Let’s be clear, last year’s attack on our Capitol to overturn our election is not “loving this country,” and killing a police officer and seriously injuring dozens more officers while doing so is certainly not “respecting law enforcement.”

Instead of representing the values of Wisconsinites, Ron Johnson has chosen and continues to stand with those that wave confederate flags, kill police officers, and trash our nation’s Capitol while trying to violently overturn our election. We can't have racists and terrorist sympathizers in the U.S. Senate. **Ron Johnson has to go.**

In the wake of January 6, we must elect someone who will defend our country and our ideals. That’s why I’m running to defeat Ron Johnson.

He then went on to say that if the crowd was “tens of thousands of Black Lives Matter and antifa, I might have been a little concerned.” Let’s be clear, last year’s attack on our Capitol to overturn our election is not “loving this country,” and killing a police officer and seriously injuring dozens more officers while doing so is certainly not “respecting law enforcement.” Instead of representing the values of Wisconsinites, Ron Johnson has chosen and continues to stand with those that wave confederate flags, kill police officers, and trash our nation’s Capitol while trying to violently overturn our election. We can't have racists and terrorist sympathizers in the U.S. Senate. Ron Johnson has to go. In the wake of January 6, we must elect someone who will defend our country and our ideals. That’s why I’m running to defeat Ron Johnson. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = Thank you, Alex Lasry ** | | We need to re-think how our economy works, and we need new voices in Washington. Alex Lasry has a fresh perspective and record of actually getting things done. We can beat Ron Johnson by building a grassroots coalition, but it will take all of us. name: Peter Franchot
subject: January 6, One Year On
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/FAWlogo_Blue%404x.png]Dear Peter,
One year ago, we watched in horror as violent insurrectionists stormed the US Capitol to stop the legal certification of the 2020 Presidential election. I felt outrage that day – not just for the desecration of our country’s most hallowed chamber and our rule of law, but for the families who watched these violent actions unfold knowing they were based in a hatred for their communities.
In the days, weeks, and months that followed, I continued to feel outrage – for the heroic officers who tragically lost their lives during that day and in its aftermath, and for those who continue to peddle the dangerous lie that instigated the assault. The recklessness of Donald Trump, and the passivity of his enablers like Mitch McConnell, attacked the very foundations of our Republic. It’s on us to undo the damage.
On this solemn anniversary, we must recommit ourselves towards strengthening American democracy from the grassroots up. We do that by demanding transparency and accountability from government. We do that by speaking truth to power. We do that by expanding our big-tent coalition and embracing the diversity that makes us stronger. And we do that by exercising our sacred right to vote – not just in Presidential or Gubernatorial elections, but in local and off-cycle elections too.
In this important election year, we must remember that our way of life cannot be taken for granted. Democracy itself is on the ballot. It can only survive so long as we fight to keep it. Make your plan to vote.
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/Franchot%20Signature.png]
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/franchot?amount=20.22&refcode=em010622]By Authority: Friends of Peter Franchot; Tom Gentile, Treasurer
Friends of Peter Franchot
P.O. Box 6648
Annapolis, MD 21401
United States

name: Admiral Mike Franken
subject: “a republic, if you can keep it”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michael Franken for Iowa, Inc

Hello,
It was Ben Franklin who, when asked what form of government the constitutional convention had produced, said: “A republic, if you can keep it.”
Donald Trump’s election sealed the deal for me to retire after nearly 4 decades in the U.S. Navy. Having been in uniform for every President since Jimmy Carter, I showed my respect for Mr. Trump with my feet. I was done. It was apparent that the next four years would not go well.
Unfortunately, putting himself before his country culminated a year ago today when Trump and his fellow Republicans planned, cajoled accomplices, then launched a domestic insurrection on the U.S. Capitol. Five lives were lost, and the nation’s innocence, as well. And it ain’t over.
January 6th set a precedent that leadership in a political party will condone political violence. **To this day, GOP members who continue to perpetuate the Big Lie are a direct threat to our democracy.** An opportunity to come clean for my opponent, Senator Chuck Grassley, who voted against Trump’s impeachment and blocked a bipartisan commission to investigate the attack, still has yet to occur.
The Republican party needs to cull its ranks of the active insurrectionists. Every single person involved in the January 6 attack needs to be held accountable for their actions, including sitting members of Congress who participated in the planning and execution of the insurrection.
**I’m running for the U.S. Senate against Senator Chuck Grassley because I place nation over baseless insurrection. It is a decision not entirely unlike the time of Lincoln. One does not serve the nation in military service to watch idly while it is dismembered by the likes of Donald Trump and his accomplices, to include Chuck Grassley.**
Mitch McConnell and his Super PACs are raising boatloads to spend against me. I am the ultimate “hard target” for the Republicans, but to get elected, **I need your help. I’m not taking money from corporate PACs – instead, I’m relying entirely on grassroots donors _like you_.**
[**Please, if you can afford to, donate $5 or more to my campaign right now – every dollar you can before midnight tonight – to help me defeat Chuck Grassley, turn Iowa blue, and protect our Democratic Senate majority.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40409772/324218447/-42398318?refcode=em20220106am-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiM2U5NDBmNS1mODZlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8Go4_IfgyRgxwF5BGXUwqyTIIqjQ7SUBhB9xneo_lLM=)

The very next day, I quit my job and got to work forming a campaign team that had what it takes to flip this seat and send Marjorie Taylor Greene into political retirement for good.** At the age of 18, I joined the Army to help defend and uphold our democracy - so when I saw my Marjorie Taylor Greene and her cronies working to overthrow a free and fair election? I knew that I had my next mission:**Defeating Marjorie Taylor Greene at the ballot box.** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40410149/324219331/-1217423743?refcode=20220106_mf_jan6&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODkwNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMWU5NDBmNS1mODZlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sUcz6D_qFNuFZMv1x0U0H_RI3l9OkdIF6Kqhk45r0Uc=)

Marjorie Taylor Greene only cares about serving herself and her dangerous, radical-right pals like Donald Trump.** [**We can never forget what happened on January 6, 2021 - and we MUST hold their enablers accountable. That starts with defeating Marjorie Taylor Greene at the ballot box. If you’re with me, please chip in $25 or more today to help fund this campaign!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40410150/324219332/-1217423743?refcode=20220106_mf_jan6&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODkwNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMWU5NDBmNS1mODZlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sUcz6D_qFNuFZMv1x0U0H_RI3l9OkdIF6Kqhk45r0Uc=) | ********[**DONATE NOW »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40410151/324219333/-825069922?refcode=20220106_mf_jan6&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODkwNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMWU5NDBmNS1mODZlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sUcz6D_qFNuFZMv1x0U0H_RI3l9OkdIF6Kqhk45r0Uc=)********

At the age of 18, I joined the Army to help defend and uphold our democracy - so when I saw my Marjorie Taylor Greene and her cronies working to overthrow a free and fair election? I knew that I had my next mission:Defeating Marjorie Taylor Greene at the ballot box. = Marcus Flowers served in the U.S. Army. Use of military rank, job titles, photographs in uniform, and images do not imply endorsement by the Department of the Army or Department of Defense. I’ve served this country overseas on multiple continents, and I understand the true meaning of service. Marjorie Taylor Greene only cares about serving herself and her dangerous, radical-right pals like Donald Trump. = | ******=****** With your help, I’ll be able to spread my message to voters in this district far and wide. Together, we can stand up and save our democracy from dangerous actors like Marjorie Taylor Greene. name: Deirdre Gilbert
subject: Will You Help Me Win!
body:
# DONATE TO ELECT INDEPENDENT CANDIDATE DEIRDRE GILBERT FOR GOVERNOR
**RUNNING FOR GOVERNOR OF TEXAS, DEIRDRE GILBERT ABANDONS THE DEMOCRATIC PARTY, BUT NOT THE PEOPLE **** ** Dear Supporter,_Gilbert has chosen to leave the Democratic party and run on the Independent ticket for Texas gubernatorial race._**I think the people are beyond ready to be listened to, and I am bringing their voices to a place where they can finally be heard, and real change can be made. "**-- Deirdre GilbertDALLAS, TEXAS, UNITED STATES, January 5, 2021 \-- [Deirdre Gilbert](https://gilbertforgovernor.cmail20.com/t/y-l-bcktg-iduiyhurdd-r/) was the very first candidate to register for the Texas gubernatorial race as a Democrat. In a recent turn of events, Gilbert has chosen to leave the Democratic party and run on the Independent ticket. "I am not running a political race as much as I'm running a race for humanity," says Deirdre Gilbert amidst news that she will be leaving the democratic party to run as an independent candidate. "I think the people are beyond ready to be listened to, and I am bringing their voices to a place where they can finally be heard, and real change can be made."

Gilbert is an African American woman who has worked tirelessly in her community and is simply fed up with the shenanigans of the political atmosphere. She's worked on the denial of voting rights in local elections within Missouri City and MUD District issues. She has spoken before the Texas Legislature and U.S. Congress in Washington D.C on civil rights. Gilbert has helped shape legislation regarding whistleblowers, medical malpractice, and education. Deirdre Gilbert is not afraid of a battle and is willing to speak up for those who cannot speak for themselves.

While discussing her decision to cross parties, Gilbert referred to a famous quote by George Washington from his farewell address:

"However combinations or associations of the above description may now and then answer popular ends, they are likely, in the course of time and things, to become potent engines, by which cunning, ambitious, and unprincipled men will be enabled to subvert the power of the people and to usurp for themselves the reins of government, destroying afterward the very engines which have lifted them to unjust dominion."

Gilbert added that "people who are going independent are not looking for a third party. They're looking for an end to party politics. There is a mass exiting of people from the political atmosphere. We are in a real fight for existence, a state and world spiraling out of control. It's time for the concern of the weak and vulnerable. It's time to focus on the hungry, the thirsty, the impoverished, the imprisoned, the homeless, the hopeless, and the sick. There is no more time to spare!"

About Deirdre Gilbert
Deirdre Gilbert is running for Texas Governor on the Independent ticket. Gilbert has worked on issues such as the denial of voting rights in local elections within Missouri City and MUD District issues. She has spoken before the Texas Legislature and U.S. Congress in Washington D.C on civil rights, and Gilbert has helped shape legislation regarding whistleblowers, medical malpractice, and education. Deirdre Gilbert is not afraid of a battle and is willing to speak up for those who cannot speak for themselves.

The core of Gilbert's message is Justice for All. To connect with Gilbert, visit her online at [https://gilbert4gov.com](https://gilbertforgovernor.cmail20.com/t/y-l-bcktg-iduiyhurdd-y/). Gilbert can also be followed on Facebook, Twitter, YouTube, and LinkedIn.

Contact Campaign Manager, Candace Joseph
713-256-7907
campaignmanager@gilbert4gov.comAngel Tuccy
Vedette Global
+1 720-257-9263If you wish to contribute, you can donate online via [https://donorbox.org/gilbert-for-governor](https://gilbertforgovernor.cmail20.com/t/y-l-bcktg-iduiyhurdd-j/) . If you know of others that you think would love to help me WIN this campaign, please share this information. Thank you in advance for your support. It is people like you who help to change the world for the better.Thank you,Deirdre Gilbert [](https://gilbertforgovernor.cmail20.com/t/y-l-bcktg-iduiyhurdd-t/)[](https://gilbertforgovernor.cmail20.com/t/y-l-bcktg-iduiyhurdd-i/) | | 9119 Highway 6, Suite 230Missouri City, TX 77459 [www.gilbert4gov.com](https://gilbertforgovernor.cmail20.com/t/y-l-bcktg-iduiyhurdd-d/) [Preferences](https://gilbertforgovernor.updatemyprofile.com/y-bcktg-E305D3C8-iduiyhurdd-u) | [Unsubscribe](https://gilbertforgovernor.cmail20.com/t/y-u-bcktg-iduiyhurdd-o/)
---

name: Herschel Walker
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
Our campaign is taking nothing for granted. We feel the momentum behind our campaign building, but we need your help.
| | [Web Version](https://view.e.lifelibertydirect.com/?qs=d8ef99aed029e8b27ea6bffc2d3c4eaafc99fea604ff29f686b28efe6b92efca4d5fb0e010a53b7d9100bd05fd12743a47a877c17c50998362a209f44da30caa3e7eb59f24d670f9fe6b9f4d1d0b887c)
---
| | | | | | | Herschel Walker for Senate Our campaign is taking nothing for granted. We feel the momentum behind our campaign building, but we need your help. | |
---
Friend,

We wanted to share some good news with you. Please see the headline below:

[](https://click.e.lifelibertydirect.com/?qs=896eea1dde4c2a59615462e445d5acec5163d9427b0085e5cd3c8be2da1369a5015f51eeffcceb58240a8b8da93f4188bcbb927f9784ff1c82d63f49323f2f6c)
That's right - NBC News reported on December 22nd that a new poll has our campaign pulling ONE POINT ahead of the Democrat incumbent in Georgia - 49% to 48%!

While this is fantastic news, there are some important points to consider:
1. This poll shows the strength of the campaign we're building, but we're still more than 10 months away from Election Day. A lot can - and will - happen between now and November 8.
2. In some states, you can win an election with a plurality like 49%. But in Georgia, we must get a majority of the votes to win, so we still have hard work to do to get over 50%.
3. We are taking nothing for granted. We feel the momentum building for our campaign, but we know it will take an incredible amount of sweat equity to win this race.

**[Today we're asking you to consider a gift of $3 or more to our campaign to strike while the iron is hot and flip this Senate seat RED.](https://click.e.lifelibertydirect.com/?qs=896eea1dde4c2a59615462e445d5acec5163d9427b0085e5cd3c8be2da1369a5015f51eeffcceb58240a8b8da93f4188bcbb927f9784ff1c82d63f49323f2f6c)**

Local officials have been leading our country through the pandemic because Donald Trump and Ron Johnson have failed. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40412347/324226249/-1374079767?refcode=EM_FR_220106jan_N_TC_TC_6_NG_N_P1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTM5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOGQ3MTZkZi1mYzZlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fEISGB7yve9VmooYpvExEgW5n4CO_FJeEw-fs56oFrU=) Team, On this day last year, our democracy was changed forever. Last year, following the largest turnout of voters in modern record, we were excited going into January. The people had spoken, and while extremists were speaking out, we thought that respect for tradition and the democratic process would prevail. A lot of us were wrong. Instead, hundreds of people tried to take a secure and fair election result away and instead take control of the proceedings for themselves. A year later, we’re still working on fixing the things that led to the devastation and destruction that almost tore our country apart. One key thing was the immense pressure placed on secretaries of states across the country by the former Trump administration. Some proudly stood their ground and made sure that the voice of the voters would be protected from meddling. **While others, like our own, were happy to meet with satellite figures connected to the Trump administration and discuss the possibility of a “rigged” election.** If this were to ever happen again, Ohioans need to be reassured that their Secretary of State wouldn’t even _consider_ invalidating anyone’s vote. Our Secretaries of State are a part of a system of checks and balances, and it’s up to us to ensure that they won’t sway under any political pressure. [**That’s why we need Chelsea in office fighting for us and protecting our democracy from any attack. Will you make sure that team has the resources to win in November with a $6 donation today?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40412348/324226250/-1374079767?refcode=EM_FR_220106jan_N_TC_TC_6_NG_N_L1&amount=6&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTM5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOGQ3MTZkZi1mYzZlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fEISGB7yve9VmooYpvExEgW5n4CO_FJeEw-fs56oFrU=) Thank you, Team Chelsea | | | Democrat Chelsea Clark is a small business owner, a city councilwoman, a sixth-generation farmer, and a single mom. She's running to be Ohio's Secretary of State because the constitutional right to vote is under attack. Chelsea will fight to make sure that we all have access to vote, that all votes are counted, and that our elections are safe and secure.

Peter,

One year ago, we all watched in disbelief as an armed mob vandalized our Capitol, attacked police officers, and tried to overturn the results of a free and fair election.

In the weeks leading up to that day, Donald Trump continuously spread lies about voter fraud and election security to undermine and sow doubt in our institutions. And on January 6, he incited the insurrection by telling his supporters to stop the 2020 election results from being certified.

**At every level, we must hold those who attacked our democracy, perpetuated the "Big Lie", and sought to delegitimize our election process accountable.** That's why last year I called on Rhode Island Representative Justin Price to resign after he participated in Trump’s Jan 6 rally and then continued to spread baseless conspiracy theories about the attack on the U.S. Capitol.

At every level, we must hold those who attacked our democracy, perpetuated the "Big Lie", and sought to delegitimize our election process accountable. That's why last year I called on Rhode Island Representative Justin Price to resign after he participated in Trump’s Jan 6 rally and then continued to spread baseless conspiracy theories about the attack on the U.S. Capitol. As elected officials, we are duty-bound to defend our democratic system of government, and far too many of our elected officials have fanned the flames of Trump's "Big Lie." Thank you, Seth | | ---|---|--- PAID FOR BY SETH MAGAZINER FOR GOVERNOR VICTORIA ALMEIDA, TREASURER Seth Magaziner for Governor Victoria Almeida, Treasurer PO Box 303 Providence, RI 02901 United States

name: Congresswoman Val Demings
subject: One year since a violent mob attacked the Capitol
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
I was there that day, crouching on the floor of the House gallery to hide from the mob.
| | |
---
Friend –

It's been a year since the insurrection on Jan. 6, 2021. A year since a mob, incited by Donald Trump, descended violently upon our democracy – resulting in death, including five police officers.
I was there that day, following the orders from the Capitol police officers to "get down." I heard the rioters banging on the doors, shouting and yelling. **We were in danger.**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40413100/324229645/-1523637272?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk2056-su-nd&refcode=jtk2056-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4M2U5Yzc4YS1mZTZlLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AxcRIzJ8gYfhhpHWPWB3K1U5SulcC9DbtOD1ipvsvj8=&emci=ff77ad98-b06c-ec11-94f6-0003ffc5857e&emdi=83e9c78a-fe6e-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=20244100)
Although a year has passed, the wounds this act of domestic terrorism inflicted on our nation are still fresh. Accountability and justice are the only path toward healing.
And yet, despite the active role Trump played in the horrors of that day, Marco Rubio and his Republican allies in the Senate voted to acquit him of any responsibility. With this dangerous vote, Rubio made it clear that his allegiance is with far-right extremists, not the American people or the Constitution he took an oath to uphold.
**For the sake of our democracy, there can be no more free passes. The Capitol insurrectionists _must_ be brought to justice. That's why we need to send a clear message that there is an undeniable push for accountability – and I'm counting on your voice:**
| | **Should the people involved in the Capitol insurrection be held accountable?**
---
Deadline for all responses at 11:59 p.m. on January 6.
---

Val Demings

Our grassroots campaign is off to a great start, but in a race as close as this one, I need your help to surge ahead and defend the Senate. I’m relying on grassroots supporters like you, donating to emails like this, to help me defeat Marco Rubio and stop Mitch McConnell from flipping the Senate. Together we’re going to protect voting rights, expand access to affordable health care and fully recover from this pandemic.

subject: General Michael Flynn Is Joining Me Live Tonight!
body:
Today Is The 1 Year Anniversary Of January 6, 2021 Tonight at 7pm CT, I will be hosting a January 6 Livestream on Facebook & YouTube with Special Gue
| | [](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=2381241.1458.1.fab4d56cb91a2612da2b3027a2390bef) |
---
## Today Is The 1 Year Anniversary Of January 6, 2021
---
Tonight at 7pm CT, I will be hosting a January 6 Livestream on [Facebook](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=2381241.1459.1.7d95774e205c19412314530fc8167a35) & [YouTube](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=2381241.1460.1.c9245fc0fc6139095ba2531c38171b95) with Special Guest = **General Michael Flynn**. Last year on this day America changed _FOREVER_. We are going to have a conversation about _what happened_ and _what is happening_ a year later. Pastor **Craig Hagin** of Rhema Church will be co-hosting with me. Other guests include: OKGOP Chairman **John Bennett** , Pastor **Mark Burns** and others. You can watch it live on my [Facebook](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=2381241.1461.1.562f2d9888ab5ab422c747b5e2f0e08f) or [YouTube](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=2381241.1462.1.20226fcac2c9820bbe6ca77a2c1a4b96) pages. If you would like to **join the conversation** and ask a question live you can email us at jackson@jacksonlahmeyer.com and title it "January 6." We will then send you an email with a link for you to join in. Thank you,
Jackson Lahmeyer Follow me on [Facebook](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=2381241.1463.1.41cdebe0d9aa4438d50d5a42591b3fc3), [Instagram](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=2381241.1464.1.d35db5dca35bfc44be3c841bc7fbe774), [Twitter](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=2381241.1465.1.88b6ed720054b3119fd6fecc407f82c4), [Telegram](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=2381241.1466.1.52f5865f29c073173953ae653c528a2b), GETTR & [YouTube](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=2381241.1467.1.65da338dcb20d713bcf2973335699ff5)).
---
| | [ Click Here To Fight To Save America ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=2381241.1468.1.a233f24193838ce39a7d6d3d80a93cd2)
---
---
|
---
Former Vice President Joe Biden declared WAR on the Freedoms we have as Americans.
In September he issued a "mandate" requiring companies with more than 100 employees to force the COVID19 Vaccine upon them.
That is why I decided to fight back with the NO VACCINE MANDATE petition that over 100,000 people have signed at www.jacksonlahmeyer.com/nomandate
I also included a COVID19 Religious Exemption Form that is totally FREE to download. I have signed OVER 50,000 of those exemptions as the Pastor of Sheridan.Church in Tulsa, OK and thousands of people have been able to keep their jobs without getting the jab.
The Religious Exemptions **WORK**.
If your Pastor will not sign the Religious Exemption Form for you, then I will. In order for my signature to carry any weight though I would have to be your pastor and you would need to be a member of Sheridan.Church Online (this does not mean you must leave your home church). Here is a link to view how to become an online member of Sheridan.Church today: [https://www.sheridan.church/join-the-online-family](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=2381241.1469.1.1faa33e8dfb26bb5d869ba6cdcad3f0b)
Once you have become an online member I will contact you and sign a Religious Exemption Form. As the Pastor of Sheridan.Church, I stand behind your religious conviction to not take the COVID19 vaccine.
I write this email though because now the Biden Administration is in discussions about forcing companies under 100 employees to comply with their illegal vaccine mandate.
**WE MUST FIGHT BACK!**
As a Pastor I am able to help you out as an individual but as a US Senator, I will be able to help out our nation collectively.

Team, one year ago, our democracy was shaken to its core. When far-right extremists stormed the Capitol and interrupted the peaceful transition of power that our country had undertaken for decades, they showed us just how powerful lies and half-truths could hurt our country. Now, a year later, we’re still trying to piece together what happened and what it means for us in Central PA. Last month, Scott Perry became the first sitting member of Congress to be called to testify in front of the January 6th House Committee. Before that, he was asked to release his own phone records on that fateful day – _**a request he refused.**_ Since then, we’ve learned a shocking amount about his role in one of our country’s darkest days. **It’s now clear that Scott Perry was one of the most central figures in the attack on our government, and was present at countless backdoor meetings and hushed conversations that led up to that violent day. ** At every step of the near destruction of our democracy, in real time, he was present. But instead of telling us everything he knows and being held accountable, Perry has refused to testify and is ignoring his responsibility to our district and our communities. His refusal to testify shows the contempt he has for his constituents, the Constitution, and the rule of law. Enough is enough. Given everything we now know about his role in the insurrection and attempts to overturn the 2020 election, coupled with his extremism and a decade-long record of failures, we know Scott Perry is no longer fit to serve in public office. [**Now it’s up to us to make sure he will never have the power to steer our country towards its destruction ever again. name: Jasmine
subject: I’m a gay woman, Christian minister, and mom of three running to replace insurrectionist Madison Cawthorn
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jasmine Beach-Ferrara for Congress
body:
|
---
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40414497/324236619/459488397?refcode=jas_headerlogo&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMzQ2Y2E1OC0wMTZmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=75THmUOwK0DzbOPKPcKX6Ju0rH-xz5i21l643amb-MU=)

| | Peter, A year ago, I watched my Republican congressman, Madison Cawthorn, betray our democracy by helping to incite a violent mob on the morning of January 6th – after previously trafficking in conspiracy theories and encouraging supporters to threaten elected officials. He made it clear he isn’t fit to serve in Congress. Now, Cawthorn is attempting to orchestrate an extremist, far-right takeover of North Carolina, and Western NC is ground zero of this effort. We have a responsibility to replace his divisive, toxic brand of politics, because it neither represents who we are in Western North Carolina, nor meets the urgent needs of our district. **I know there’s another path forward for us.** It’s a path that will be built by organizing in every corner of our district, that will bring people together around a common purpose, and that will lead us to victory in November. A year from now, I plan on representing Western North Carolina in Congress by focusing on love, empathy, and doing what’s right. That’s why we are building a campaign that is rooted in organizing. That means meeting people where they are, talking about the issues that mean the most to them, and doing a whole lot of listening. People want real results that improve their lives, not to be used as a launch pad for the political careers and ambitions of people like Madison Cawthorn, or Mark Meadows before him. As an organizer and elected official, I have the experience of addressing pressing issues, winning against the odds, organizing everywhere and delivering for working families. That’s how we’ll win this district, but it will take all of us to do it. clean_body: | = | | Peter, A year ago, I watched my Republican congressman, Madison Cawthorn, betray our democracy by helping to incite a violent mob on the morning of January 6th – after previously trafficking in conspiracy theories and encouraging supporters to threaten elected officials. He made it clear he isn’t fit to serve in Congress. Now, Cawthorn is attempting to orchestrate an extremist, far-right takeover of North Carolina, and Western NC is ground zero of this effort. We have a responsibility to replace his divisive, toxic brand of politics, because it neither represents who we are in Western North Carolina, nor meets the urgent needs of our district. I know there’s another path forward for us. It’s a path that will be built by organizing in every corner of our district, that will bring people together around a common purpose, and that will lead us to victory in November. A year from now, I plan on representing Western North Carolina in Congress by focusing on love, empathy, and doing what’s right. That’s why we are building a campaign that is rooted in organizing. That means meeting people where they are, talking about the issues that mean the most to them, and doing a whole lot of listening. People want real results that improve their lives, not to be used as a launch pad for the political careers and ambitions of people like Madison Cawthorn, or Mark Meadows before him. As an organizer and elected official, I have the experience of addressing pressing issues, winning against the odds, organizing everywhere and delivering for working families. That’s how we’ll win this district, but it will take all of us to do it. = | | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = Thank you for being all in with us, Jasmine | | We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. name: Erin Swauger, NextGen America
subject: The anniversary of the attack on the U.S. Capitol
body:
| | | Tell your senators to pass the Freedom to Vote Act and safeguard our democracy from efforts to subvert free and fair elections.
---
| [Take action](https://click.everyaction.com/k/40414527/324236735/1145513775?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZjQ2Y2E1OC0wMTZmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gFDT6kvzD4GdFeIiN-VzIDSby6lXlFkAsUVbTe0y-70=&emci=f434ebfd-886e-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=cf46ca58-016f-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=6787172) |
|
Friend,
**Today marks one year since the January 6 attack on our country and our democracy.** It also marks one year since I looked out my bedroom window to helicopters circling my neighborhood, dozens of cop cars racing down the street, and emergency alerts bombarding my phone.
Exactly one year ago today, armed, far-right militants stormed the U.S. Capitol and sought to overturn the will of voters. As many watched this unfold on TV, residents of Washington, DC, like myself, watched it occur from the windows of our apartments, only minutes from the Capitol.
While many of us in Washington knew these far-right rioters were coming to our city, none of us knew the horrific scenes that would occur that day. Armed soldiers guarding security perimeters. Pipe bombs in our streets. Our neighborhoods and parks fenced off. In total, seven people died in connection to the insurrection, and many more were injured in the violence.
We watched in fear and horror as these militia members tore through our city and endangered our lives — only to have 147 Republican members of Congress vote to throw out millions of Americans’ ballots mere hours after this attempted insurrection.
**January 6, 2021, was a dire moment for our democracy — and a year later, the threats it revealed have not gone away. **
The Republican Party has had a year to denounce right-wing extremists’ all-out-assault on our democracy. Instead, they’ve fully embraced dangerous disinformation tactics to justify new voter suppression laws and stoke mistrust in our elections.
**That’s why now more than ever, it’s imperative that Democrats in Congress swiftly pass legislation like the Freedom to Vote Act to safeguard the right to vote, prevent political interference in our elections, and restore faith in our democracy. **
Thankfully, the House of Representatives already passed the Freedom to Vote Act in 2021. This year, it’s on Senate Democrats to defend our democracy and deliver for the American people. Can we count on you to speak out?
**[Write to your senators: Bypass the filibuster and protect our fundamental right to vote by passing the Freedom to Vote Act.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/40414528/324236736/-420570166?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZjQ2Y2E1OC0wMTZmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gFDT6kvzD4GdFeIiN-VzIDSby6lXlFkAsUVbTe0y-70=&emci=f434ebfd-886e-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=cf46ca58-016f-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=6787172)**
[Send message](https://click.everyaction.com/k/40414529/324236737/-917963027?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZjQ2Y2E1OC0wMTZmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gFDT6kvzD4GdFeIiN-VzIDSby6lXlFkAsUVbTe0y-70=&emci=f434ebfd-886e-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=cf46ca58-016f-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=6787172 "Send message")

name: Tom Malinowski
subject: Not. Ever. Again.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tom Malinowski for Congress
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40414553/324236764/1660491306?refcode=TM_EM_ST_3MO_220106_1_1&refcode2=c846ca58-016f-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzYzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjODQ2Y2E1OC0wMTZmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gyHJ3Xcb7C_9uDFb_5J3qcZ8V5ms7YTtII4omvj4gFM=&emci=da12a11c-4d6e-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=c846ca58-016f-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=19214294)
---
| | Dear friends,

Today, on the first anniversary of the January 6th insurrection, I’ll be in the US Capitol, reflecting on my memories of that day, and resolving that those who summoned the attack can never be allowed to threaten our democracy again.

As many of you know, I immigrated to America from a communist country, and spent much of my adult life as a human rights activist and diplomat taking on dictatorships like China, Russia, and Saudi Arabia. So I have a particular perspective on what makes our country special, and on why so many people around the world dream of becoming American.

It’s not just because of words like “freedom” or “democracy.” It’s because of an idea embedded in our Constitution — that everyone, no matter how powerful, is supposed to play by the same set of rules. Every American election is an opportunity to show what that means. Unlike in many countries, our winners don’t gain the power to do whatever they please. Our losers accept defeat, knowing their rights will be respected, and they live to fight another day.

So on January 6, 2021, after a tumultuous presidential campaign, I was eager to be in the Capitol to observe what I thought would be a continuation of this tradition, a ceremony marking a peaceful transfer of power from one American leader to another. At 11:21 AM, I was sitting in the House chamber gallery, and tweeted out: “Today is a celebration of democracy. The people have voted. The only power we have as Representatives & Senators under the Constitution we swore to defend is to count the ballots. And we will.”

Just after 2 PM, the mob broke into the Capitol. We saw the Speaker evacuated from the House chamber. We were asked to grab the gas masks from under our seats.

We did not see the battle raging outside, where the massive pro-Trump mob savagely attacked police officers with flag poles, bottles, and chemical sprays. So I wasn’t as afraid as I should have been. Instead, I thought about past moments of danger in my life — a time when I was chased by riot police while observing a demonstration in Bahrain, a trip to Syria when it was being bombed by Bashar Assad, and to Libya during its revolution. I remember thinking how absurd it was to be sitting in the inner sanctum of our democracy in Washington, DC, and experiencing the same kind of adrenaline rush. How could this possibly be happening here?

I was furious at the people who had brought the attack about. Even as we fled, I told everyone I could that at all costs, we had to reclaim the chamber that night; we had to finish the job of certifying the election. Thank goodness we did.

Ever since, Republicans who want us to move on from January 6th have tried to get away with blaming the rioters alone for the attack. That’s like saying that only the hijackers were responsible for 9/11.

The real question is what could have motivated thousands of seemingly ordinary Americans to commit the deviant crime of attacking the U.S. Capitol while brutally assaulting the police officers defending it? Social media companies created the echo chamber in which Trump’s lie about the election reverberated and radicalized the rioters. But the root cause was the lie itself.

Today, most Republicans in Congress either repeat the lie, or are too cowardly to rebut it. Thanks to them, 2/3 of Republican voters believe an American election was stolen. Forty percent believe violence against the government is sometimes justified. In states across the country, these extremists are trying to install officials who would nullify any election their side loses.

On January 6, 2021, we thwarted the attack on the Capitol. On January 6, 2022, the attack on our Constitution continues.

As we defend our democracy, we must remember there is no Constitutional police in America. There is no Constitutional jail. The rules underpinning our system of government, and the peace it preserves, have always been based on our consent. Americans either agree, voluntarily, to abide by those rules, even when we lose an election — or we lose our country.

Congress should codify even stronger rules to make it harder for state legislatures, or Congress itself, to overturn a future election. But even such stronger rules will depend on the willingness of elected officials to abide by them.

That is why the most important thing we can do is insist on an absolute litmus test for anyone seeking elected office in America. They can be Republican or Democrat, conservative or progressive; they can believe whatever they want about government spending or taxes or how much the state can regulate our personal or business lives.

But no one should be entrusted with a position of responsibility in America ever again unless he or she categorically and publicly rejects Trump’s lies about the election, and the violent movement he has mobilized to nullify majority rule.

As Congresswoman Liz Cheney has said, members of her party “can either be loyal to Donald Trump or we can be loyal to the Constitution, but we cannot be both.” Those who choose the former — actively or by acquiescence — are simply not fit to serve in a Constitutional republic. Not now. Not. Ever. Again.

Thank you for all you do for our country. I’ll keep doing all I can to be worthy of your support.

Tom

---
|
---
Tom Malinowski served as a diplomat in the Obama administration, standing up to dictators overseas. Now he's standing up for our democracy as a Congressman representing New Jersey's 7th district.

Folks,

A year ago today, a mob of insurrectionists stormed the U.S. Capitol, seeking to overturn the results of a fair and free election. They were incited by false claims that the 2020 presidential election was stolen, false claims that Gov. Ron DeSantis _refuses_ to denounce. **To this day, he still won’t admit the election was legitimate.**

In my view, this isn’t just disqualifying; it’s downright _dangerous_. **[We need to take threats to our democracy seriously, so I’m asking 10,000 Floridians to join me in calling on Gov. DeSantis to admit that the 2020 election was fair and democratic.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40416084/324243954/-1523529390?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZDg0ZjUyMy0wNDZmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4ilQO-iGTV4oIj4lHvLVCpX5l16Jnamv8cPSQsG0KLo=&emci=ca2808d0-486e-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=1d84f523-046f-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=8807089)**

As the tragic events of January 6th proved, claiming that a legitimate election was rigged isn’t a joke. These partisan lies lead to real-world harm, and there is no room in our state or our country for that kind of rhetoric.

It’s well past time for Gov. DeSantis to put partisanship aside and reject the false claims that the 2020 election was stolen from Donald Trump. By supporting and spreading the Big Lie, he’s empowering the very same hate groups that fueled the insurrection, and I won’t stand for it. Floridians deserve better.

**[Please add your name to my petition demanding that the governor publicly reject the Big Lie.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40416086/324243957/-1523529390?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZDg0ZjUyMy0wNDZmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4ilQO-iGTV4oIj4lHvLVCpX5l16Jnamv8cPSQsG0KLo=&emci=ca2808d0-486e-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=1d84f523-046f-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=8807089)**

Thank you,

Charlie Crist

body:
Peter:

The Silicon Valley cartel erasing President Trump from the internet was just the start.

**After Twitter permanently banned by my account, Facebook locked me out.**

All because I dared to speak the truth about the globalist elites China virus fascism and the deaths related to their supposedly "safe and effective vaccine."

If Big Tech can ban the duly elected President and sitting member of Congress, every America First patriot is under the gun.

This is the only way I can keep communicating with you, and I need to know if you are in my corner.

**[That's why I'm asking you to sign your "Stand with MTG" statement of support](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59437609:Wq0tE-HPN:m:1:2365227053:EBA44810275F832AA1334B561D06D534:r).**

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59437609:Wq0tE-HPN:m:1:2365227053:EBA44810275F832AA1334B561D06D534:r)

Your action will show Big Tech and the D.C. swamp that the America First movement will not bow down or shut up.

**And right now I need to know if you are with me.**

The Big Tech oligarchs fear me because I fight for you.

So, the champagne socialists that run social media muzzled me.

I am now the most censored woman in Washington.

**But that 's only because the swamps know I'm the most dangerous woman in Washington.**

I am not afraid to call out the sleaze, corruption, and backroom deals that shred our fundamental rights.

And I promise you I will never stop fighting.

Our Silicon Valley overlords will not cancel me.

Even if I have to mail a handwritten letter to my supporters, I will never stop speaking the truth.

**[That's why I hope I can count on you in this fight by signing your "Stand with MTG" Statement of Support](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59437609:Wq0tE-HPN:m:1:2365227053:EBA44810275F832AA1334B561D06D534:r).**

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59437609:Wq0tE-HPN:m:1:2365227053:EBA44810275F832AA1334B561D06D534:r)

The arrogant puppet masters should have learned over the course of the last year I won't be bullied.

As soon as I took office, the fake news media, Communist Democrats, and the Never Trumpers kicked me off my committees and tried to expel me from Congress.

Now the hate-America Democrats like Adam Schiff teamed with RINOs Liz Cheney and Adam Kinzinger schemed to seize my records and lock me up.

**The D.C. swamp failed to take me out then.**

And some silly Twitter ban won't work now.

Every time some socialist in Silicon Valley presses the censor button to silence my voice, it makes me more determined, stronger, and effective.

_Why_?

I'm not here for the club.

I'm on here for you - the American people.

That's because elites in the Biden regime, fake news media liars, and Silicon Valley censors just want to abuse and control you.

But they will fail, and the people will win.

That's why it's crucial you **[sign your"Stand with MTG" statement of support](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59437609:Wq0tE-HPN:m:1:2365227053:EBA44810275F832AA1334B561D06D534:r)** right away.

Rep. Marjorie Taylor Greene

P.S. **If Twitter 's censors can blacklist a sitting president and a duly-elected congresswoman, what do you think they can do to you?**

That's why it's critically important that conservatives like you and me stick together - because they can't stop us from speaking the truth!

Friends,

Our democracy faced a grave threat on January 6th, 2021.

A year ago today, my opponent and hundreds of other insurrectionists were at the Capitol causing chaos while we watched in horror.

Thankfully, the results of the 2020 election were rightfully upheld. Our democracy survived.

But we can’t risk that kind of threat again. My opponent has already shown that he does not care about our laws, our institutions, or our way of life. Who knows what kind of damage he would do if he’s elected to the same legislative body that came under attack on this day last year?

**[We can’t afford to give this race anything less than our all. If you can, will you please donate $5 to my campaign today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40416957/324247831/-774467147?refcode=ABD_EM_FR_2022.01.06_b1_oneyear_X_F1_S1_C1__ac&amount=5&utm_campaign=abd_em_fr_2022.01.06_b1_oneyear_x_f1_s1_c1__ac&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ngp&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2M2I1NTk4Ny0wNTZmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=loUSomu-a1MPNb7LgeCvbcSij4klmEIxPYOTlYkpwRk=)** | [GIVE $5 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40416959/324247833/-774467147?refcode=ABD_EM_FR_2022.01.06_b1_oneyear_X_F1_S1_C1__ac&amount=5&utm_campaign=abd_em_fr_2022.01.06_b1_oneyear_x_f1_s1_c1__ac&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ngp&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2M2I1NTk4Ny0wNTZmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=loUSomu-a1MPNb7LgeCvbcSij4klmEIxPYOTlYkpwRk=)

name: Michele Rayner
subject: What happened 1 year ago today is more relevant than ever, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michele For Florida Michele For Florida
body:
|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40417149/324248499/124312502?refcode=em21_emailheader&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MjI4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZDNkYzVkMi0wNTZmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=agvhj7dldowD2AHxXz9N3c8xH3s4eg3n6BuA8-Igw-4=)

Hi Peter,

Honestly, I hate that this is an anniversary. But we have to talk about it.

One year ago today, insurrectionists stormed the Capitol building in Washington, D.C. And a year after this failed coup attempt, countless arrests and charges have been made, and for months, the January 6th Committee in Congress has been investigating those directly involved in inciting the events that unfolded that day.

To no surprise, countless Republicans have been connected to that day – countless Republicans, including former President Donald Trump.

**Here's the thing Peter, what happened 1 year ago today is more relevant than ever.**

With midterm elections happening this year, it's critical that we elect leaders dedicated to strengthening and protecting our democracy – _not dedicated to destroying it._ Because just as we saw on January 6th, and as we've continued to see right here in Florida, Republicans are willing to do anything for their own partisan interests.

Trump may be out of office, but his minions are running campaigns everywhere. They're running to uphold Trump's legacy of violence, anti-democracy, and bigotry. **One of them is Anna Paulina Luna, who's running for Congress right here in the 13th district.**

Peter, this is why we cannot allow folks like Anna Paulina Luna to get elected. The last thing we need is another January 6th. The last thing we need is more hatred and division. _And the absolute last thing we need is another Trump in any level of public office._

Today, we regretfully look back on the attempted coup that happened one year ago. And today, we should recommit to ensuring that something like this can never happen again.

_We do this by getting the far-right out of office._

In solidarity,

Michele [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40417150/324248500/1870454853?refcode=em22_220106_capitolanniv&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MjI4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZDNkYzVkMi0wNTZmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=agvhj7dldowD2AHxXz9N3c8xH3s4eg3n6BuA8-Igw-4=)

* * *

name: Professor Carol Anderson
subject: Your voice is critical in the fight to protect our democracy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fair Fight Action
body:
Today we remember what’s at stake and redouble our efforts to safeguard American democracy

Fair Fight |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40417336/324249322/1793776944?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNmM4NzFlMi0wNTZmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FJhnn_KNBKxTHTnKByouzXVA3fGfUN7rf0Gy53GS8Sg=&emci=9499d15b-fb6e-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=36c871e2-056f-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=1037277)

| | Friend, One year ago today, millions of people across the world watched in horror as anti-democratic conspiracy theorists attempted to overthrow American democracy. Fueled by disinformation and a desire to silence the voices of voters of color, their deadly attack on the U.S. Capitol exposed an illness in our nation that for too long has gone overlooked. While the forces behind the January 6, 2021 invasion of our nation’s Capitol did not emerge overnight, the vigor behind their violence was blatant backlash against the political power demonstrated by voters like you, who turned out in historic numbers to restore democratic ideals to our halls of government. Sadly, the attempted insurrection was only the most recent example in a long pattern of violent voter suppression and election subversion seen throughout our history. These tactics were used together during the Jim Crow era of the 1890s-1960s to prevent Black voters from demonstrating their full electoral power in the South—and they continue today. Over the past year we have seen a resurgence of these necrotic Jim Crow tactics, from threats against election workers to election sabotage efforts at the local level to the more than 580 anti-voter bills that were introduced in state legislatures in 2021 alone. The disease plaguing our nation is born from a desire by those in power to silence and invalidate voters they deem unworthy so they can continue ruling on behalf of the privileged few. While the forces that work to undermine our democracy are behemoth, we must persevere. Only by working together—and reminding ourselves why we are in this fight—can we realize our shared vision of a multi-racial, multi-generational democracy where every eligible voter is able to cast their ballot, have their ballot counted, and make their voice heard. We need you in this fight. And **we need you to use your voice by demanding that your U.S. Senators pass the Freedom to Vote Act** and the **John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act** —immediately. **Let me be clear** : There is no alternative. No other bills currently being considered by Congress provide the necessary protections to safeguard eligible Americans’ freedom to vote and prevent election sabotage at the state level. Together, these two bills represent the first and most critical step toward healing our democracy. Together, we will forge a path forward.
In Solidarity, Professor Carol Anderson
Fair Fight Action Board Member
Chair of African American Studies, Emory University _(for identification purposes only)_ |
---|---|---

clean_body: Today we remember what’s at stake and redouble our efforts to safeguard American democracy Fair Fight | | | Friend, One year ago today, millions of people across the world watched in horror as anti-democratic conspiracy theorists attempted to overthrow American democracy. Fueled by disinformation and a desire to silence the voices of voters of color, their deadly attack on the U.S. Capitol exposed an illness in our nation that for too long has gone overlooked. While the forces behind the January 6, 2021 invasion of our nation’s Capitol did not emerge overnight, the vigor behind their violence was blatant backlash against the political power demonstrated by voters like you, who turned out in historic numbers to restore democratic ideals to our halls of government. Sadly, the attempted insurrection was only the most recent example in a long pattern of violent voter suppression and election subversion seen throughout our history. These tactics were used together during the Jim Crow era of the 1890s-1960s to prevent Black voters from demonstrating their full electoral power in the South—and they continue today. Over the past year we have seen a resurgence of these necrotic Jim Crow tactics, from threats against election workers to election sabotage efforts at the local level to the more than 580 anti-voter bills that were introduced in state legislatures in 2021 alone. The disease plaguing our nation is born from a desire by those in power to silence and invalidate voters they deem unworthy so they can continue ruling on behalf of the privileged few. While the forces that work to undermine our democracy are behemoth, we must persevere. Only by working together—and reminding ourselves why we are in this fight—can we realize our shared vision of a multi-racial, multi-generational democracy where every eligible voter is able to cast their ballot, have their ballot counted, and make their voice heard. We need you in this fight. And we need you to use your voice by demanding that your U.S. Senators pass the Freedom to Vote Act and the John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act —immediately. Let me be clear : There is no alternative. No other bills currently being considered by Congress provide the necessary protections to safeguard eligible Americans’ freedom to vote and prevent election sabotage at the state level. Together, these two bills represent the first and most critical step toward healing our democracy. Together, we will forge a path forward. In Solidarity, Professor Carol Anderson Fair Fight Action Board Member Chair of African American Studies, Emory University (for identification purposes only) | ---|---|--- | 1270 Caroline Street Suite D120-430 Atlanta, GA 30307 ©2021 Fair Fight Action - All rights reserved. Contributions to Fair Fight Action are not tax-deductible. | | Paid for by Fair Fight Action

name: Dr. Jason Martin
subject: The consequences of Jan. 6 are still playing out
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Jason Martin for Tennessee
body:
| | [ ](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/martin-email-jan2022?refcode=fl_email_pt_20220106jan6_DJM_opntl_SLC_hdr)
---
Hey, Peter.
Like so many of us, I watched in horror as the events of January 6 unfolded a year ago.
So many emotions went through my mind — concern for the people who work every day at the Capitol who were put in harm’s way, disgust at the overt displays of white supremacy in our nation’s heart, anger at those who voted to overturn a democratic election and validate what armed insurrectionists tried to do with violence, and sadness at the thought that so many fellow Americans were willing to embrace authoritarianism.
Making matters worse, we are still, to this day, watching the dire consequences of that day play out: Politicians of Bill Lee’s ilk spread daily lies about our elections and our government to keep their supporters engaged and enraged, exposing Americans (from election administrators to school superintendents) to death threats and violence.
These people are leveraging a deliberate disinformation campaign to attack our freedom to vote and introduce hundreds of voter suppression bills to control election outcomes, criminalize election officials for doing their jobs, and give partisan poll watchers the ability to harass and intimidate voters.
So today, one year later, I hope you’ll join me, fellow Tennesseans, and Americans of all races, places, parties, and backgrounds to say: **In America, voters decide the outcome of our elections. No one else has that power — not governors, not Presidents, not Democrats, and certainly not far-right Republicans.**
We also have the power to demand that our Democratic Senators do whatever is necessary to protect our democracy and pass the Freedom to Vote Act and John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act. Nothing less than the fate of our democracy is at stake.
[**Will you sign our petition to demand that the Senate protect democracy at every level of government by passing the Voting Rights Act?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40417483/324250222/319539361?refcode=fl_email_pt_20220106jan6_DJM_opntl_SLC_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZjgzNzA2YS0wNjZmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YJpIYl11-iMSdrQS2QLA0E1CeV1cXiZ9X8tG4OhmpBc=&emci=fd82706a-066f-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=0f83706a-066f-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=9304149)

Dr. Jason Martin

name: Ashey Ehasz
subject: One year ago
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ehasz for Congress
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40417548/324250619/768602810?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220106Insurrection_ae_full_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM5OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMmQ5Y2RjNS0wNjZmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Myy_kbumCYWFve-ew0b2Zo5C9B1G_0SO8MYYG0Bo8eY=)
---
Friend, One year ago today, we witnessed a violent mob storm the U.S. Capitol for the first time since the War of 1812. Members of the crowd built a fake guillotine and spoke of hanging the Vice President and finding sitting members of Congress, many of whom were hiding or running for their lives, all because they believed the 2020 election was stolen from Donald Trump. It was a deadly, disturbing day in American history, and it was incited by the former President and his enablers in Congress and right-wing media. **What did PA-01’s Representative Brian Fitzpatrick do in the days after these insurrectionists wreaked havoc on the Capitol? He sat idly by and refused to vote to impeach Trump for inciting them.** As a combat veteran, I was heartbroken and angry watching this play out on the news. It was the final straw that led me to decide to run for office, because if Fitzpatrick isn’t going to do anything about it, _I sure as hell will._ **Make no mistake: our democracy is still at risk today.** Extreme members of the GOP like Madison Cawthorn and Marjorie Taylor Greene talk about taking up arms and going to civil war, while other Republicans try to downplay the seriousness of what happened on this day last year and continue to roll back Americans’ voting rights. I’ve fought for our country before overseas. I’m ready to fight for it again in Congress on behalf of the people here in Pennsylvania’s 1st district. **[But I need your help to get there. On this first anniversary of Jan. 6, will you chip in $10 or more to help me replace Fitzpatrick and flip this crucial House seat from red to blue so we can stop right wing authoritarianism from destroying our democracy as we know it?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40417549/324250620/768602810?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220106Insurrection_ae_full_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM5OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMmQ5Y2RjNS0wNjZmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Myy_kbumCYWFve-ew0b2Zo5C9B1G_0SO8MYYG0Bo8eY=)** | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

My heart goes out to the brave Capitol and D.C. police who were injured in the line of duty protecting our elected officials on this day one year ago. Let’s do everything in our power to make sure a violent insurrection like this never happens on American soil again.
— Ashley

clean_body: | = Friend, One year ago today, we witnessed a violent mob storm the U.S. Capitol for the first time since the War of 1812. Members of the crowd built a fake guillotine and spoke of hanging the Vice President and finding sitting members of Congress, many of whom were hiding or running for their lives, all because they believed the 2020 election was stolen from Donald Trump. It was a deadly, disturbing day in American history, and it was incited by the former President and his enablers in Congress and right-wing media. What did PA-01’s Representative Brian Fitzpatrick do in the days after these insurrectionists wreaked havoc on the Capitol? He sat idly by and refused to vote to impeach Trump for inciting them. As a combat veteran, I was heartbroken and angry watching this play out on the news. It was the final straw that led me to decide to run for office, because if Fitzpatrick isn’t going to do anything about it, I sure as hell will. Make no mistake: our democracy is still at risk today. Extreme members of the GOP like Madison Cawthorn and Marjorie Taylor Greene talk about taking up arms and going to civil war, while other Republicans try to downplay the seriousness of what happened on this day last year and continue to roll back Americans’ voting rights. I’ve fought for our country before overseas. I’m ready to fight for it again in Congress on behalf of the people here in Pennsylvania’s 1st district. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = | = ---|---|--- = | = | = My heart goes out to the brave Capitol and D.C. police who were injured in the line of duty protecting our elected officials on this day one year ago. name: Christian Collins for Congress
subject: Remove the RINO’s
body:
---
| | | | | |
I'm sick of this two-tiered justice system in America, and the hypocrisy from the left and the RINOs!
Black Lives Matter and ANTIFA activists burned down and looted our cities for months, and hardly even received a slap on the wrist.
Regardless of how small their crime, 40 of our fellow Americans at the Capitol one year ago today have been held in the DC Jail as political prisoners, in inhumane conditions, without being given due process under the law. Who is picking and choosing what justice means?
The double standard is truly unreal.
Not to mention Never-Trump RINOs like Adam Kinzinger and Liz Cheney fueling the Left's fire when it comes to the events that happened one year ago today at our nation's capital, leading the witch hunt "January 6th Commission." clean_body: | | | | | | I'm sick of this two-tiered justice system in America, and the hypocrisy from the left and the RINOs! Black Lives Matter and ANTIFA activists burned down and looted our cities for months, and hardly even received a slap on the wrist. Regardless of how small their crime, 40 of our fellow Americans at the Capitol one year ago today have been held in the DC Jail as political prisoners, in inhumane conditions, without being given due process under the law. Who is picking and choosing what justice means? The double standard is truly unreal. Not to mention Never-Trump RINOs like Adam Kinzinger and Liz Cheney fueling the Left's fire when it comes to the events that happened one year ago today at our nation's capital, leading the witch hunt "January 6th Commission." Their entire goal is to bankrupt, attack, interrogate, and humiliate Donald Trump loyalists because they stood with him during his presidency. == == We need to elect more America First Republicans so we can move on from the days of these RINOs and get actual work done in Washington to protect freedom and revitalize our economy. == == == == == == == For Liberty, Christian Collins == | == | | | | | Christian Collins for Congress | P.O.
