name: Matt Putorti
subject: Elise Stefanik and the 1/6 MAGA mob
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Matt Putorti for Congress
body:
In the past year, Stefanik’s behavior has only gotten more extreme and anti-democratic.

| One year ago today, the MAGA mob, incited by lies spread by Donald Trump, Elise Stefanik, and other extreme Republicans, stormed the Capitol, assaulted police officers, and tried to stop the certification of President Joe Biden’s legitimate victory.

And just hours after the insurrectionists left the building, Elise Stefanik _still_ voted to overturn the results of the free and fair 2020 election.
---
| [DEFEAT STEFANIK ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40424125/324285398/-852028741?refcode=BLU-PUT-20220106-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTEwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YjkzN2U2My0xZjZmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iUYlcFUJy1ACqS0lyxziy4-Ef-B5iBvq12Ap74bBsJc=)
---
In the past year, Stefanik’s behavior has only gotten more extreme and anti-democratic:
* **Stefanik voted against the select committee to investigate the January 6th Capitol insurrection and calls it a “sham.”** Since the committee’s creation, she has repeatedly voted against its efforts to find answers for the American people about what happened on that day.

* **Stefanik claimed Nancy Pelosi was actually responsible for the insurrection.** This pathetic attempt to gaslight the American people with this absurd claim happened on the same day that Capitol Police officers gave emotional testimony before the House about their traumatic experiences.

* **Stefanik’s campaign promoted an event with an insurrectionist.** The far-right traitor has ties to extremist hate groups and attended the rally that led to the insurrection — but in a tweet promoting the campaign event, she called him an “American Patriot.”

Stefanik’s extremism has paid off big time for her personally this year. She replaced Liz Cheney — who refused to bow to Trump — as the third-ranking Republican in the House and has raised millions in campaign cash.

Today, I am taking time to reflect on one of the darkest moments in our democracy’s history. This tragedy should never have happened, and I’m more determined than ever to make sure that Elise Stefanik is held accountable for her role in the events and the aftermath. [_**I hope you are too. Let’s remove her from office.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40424126/324285399/-852028741?refcode=BLU-PUT-20220106-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTEwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YjkzN2U2My0xZjZmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iUYlcFUJy1ACqS0lyxziy4-Ef-B5iBvq12Ap74bBsJc=)

Matt

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40424269/324286210/-1576960734?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzE3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YzkwOGU3Ni0yMDZmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7mTpjGcRc8piw3FHxbgt9kYFnlzpJ_QA2lVJzwCmYRA=)

Folks,

Today marks one year since, for the first time in our history, a group of Americans attacked our seat of government in a deadly insurrection attempt – one that claimed multiple lives, including Capitol Police officers who fought to protect us and our democracy.

On live television, we watched as thousands of Donald Trump's supporters – many armed and clad in tactical gear – heard his call to "show strength" and "fight like hell," and descended upon a joint session of Congress with the aim of interrupting the certification of the 2020 election.

**January 6th will live on as a terrible day in our nation's history.**

But it didn't happen by coincidence – the GOP knew there was no election fraud. We know that Donald Trump incited the attack, then watched it unfold on television and turned away aides begging him to put an end to it. **We know it was all because of one Big Lie.**

name: Hendrell Remus
subject: One Year Ago Today
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndemocraticparty [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndemocraticparty]

Peter,

Today is one year after a sitting president encouraged a violent mob to stop the peaceful transition of power. It was a reminder of how fragile our democracy is and how we must work every day to preserve and strengthen it in everything we do.

Our democracy is the will of the people — it’s who we are at our core as a nation. They may have failed, but those same divisive figures are still sowing discord and disinformation right here at home. The Republicans of the Tennessee State Legislature slash voter protections nearly every time they’re in session, and they’re about to reconvene again next week. They’re trying to rig the game in their favor and subvert our democracy, just like the insurrectionists did last year.

One Tennessee GOP State House member, Terri Lynn Weaver, attended the insurrection, calling it an “epic and historic day,” never apologizing or acknowledging the bruise left on our democracy because of her actions. Our Senators, Marsha Blackburn and Bill Hagerty, promoted the “Big Lie” that our election was stolen for months with zero consequences. This is what we are up against in Tennessee.

We must never let this happen again, and we must bring more people into the process by expanding voting rights so that everyone can easily participate in our free and fair elections. We cannot stop until the right to vote is protected for every single person in the United States — otherwise, we will succumb to authoritarianism.

The Tennessee Democratic Party is committed to protecting voting rights, the bedrock of our democracy, and we always will be. The challenge is monumental, but I know we are up to it because we have you on our side. Thank you for standing with us.

Solidarity,

Hendrell Remus
he/him
Chair, Tennessee Democratic Party

clean_body: [] Peter, Today is one year after a sitting president encouraged a violent mob to stop the peaceful transition of power. It was a reminder of how fragile our democracy is and how we must work every day to preserve and strengthen it in everything we do. Our democracy is the will of the people — it’s who we are at our core as a nation. They may have failed, but those same divisive figures are still sowing discord and disinformation right here at home. The Republicans of the Tennessee State Legislature slash voter protections nearly every time they’re in session, and they’re about to reconvene again next week. They’re trying to rig the game in their favor and subvert our democracy, just like the insurrectionists did last year. One Tennessee GOP State House member, Terri Lynn Weaver, attended the insurrection, calling it an “epic and historic day,” never apologizing or acknowledging the bruise left on our democracy because of her actions. Our Senators, Marsha Blackburn and Bill Hagerty, promoted the “Big Lie” that our election was stolen for months with zero consequences. This is what we are up against in Tennessee. We must never let this happen again, and we must bring more people into the process by expanding voting rights so that everyone can easily participate in our free and fair elections. We cannot stop until the right to vote is protected for every single person in the United States — otherwise, we will succumb to authoritarianism. The Tennessee Democratic Party is committed to protecting voting rights, the bedrock of our democracy, and we always will be. The challenge is monumental, but I know we are up to it because we have you on our side. Thank you for standing with us. Solidarity, Hendrell Remus he/him Chair, Tennessee Democratic Party If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: DONATE $25 [] DONATE $50 [] DONATE $100 [] DONATE $250 [] OTHER AMOUNT [] [] [] [] CAROL V. Friend,

On the anniversary of January 6th, it's still jarring to recall that there was a serious, coordinated attempt to throw out the results of a legitimate election -- right here in the United States.

I was deployed to the Middle East to protect and defend democracy, so I’ve seen how fragile democracies can be.

**Right now, members of the “Trump-Republican” Party are behaving like overt enemies of our constitutional order. They reject election results. They attempt to weaken voting rights. And they spread lies that sow social division.**

I think these people need to be held accountable, but I need to know if it's something that's on your mind as well. Can you take my survey?

name: Derek Kilmer
subject: One year since the insurrection
disclaimer_text: Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer
body:
Peter,

One year ago today, we witnessed one of the darkest days in our nation's history -- a day I won't ever forget. What started as a normal day at work in the Capitol building ended in destruction and loss of life.

Former President Trump incited a deadly insurrection when he refused to accept the results of a free and fair election. He encouraged an armed mob to storm the People's House, vandalize the Capitol building, and attack police officers. What we saw that day wasn't just an attack on a building - it was an attack on our democracy.

Thankfully, Trump and his allies failed. After several hours, order was restored, and Congress got back to work and certified the election. President Biden was sworn in as the 46th president of the United States, and the will of the American people was carried out.

Our democracy prevailed, but we can't forget the insurrection or the anti-democratic extremism that persists in our nation.

President Trump spent his presidency stoking the flames of hatred and extremism, and his "Big Lie" continues to galvanize extremists across the country to hurt our democracy. State politicians spent 2021 trying to roll back voting rights, with state legislatures passing sweeping voter suppression laws across the country. **In fact, last year at least 19 states passed 34 laws restricting access to voting.**

Donald Trump is no longer president, but we still have plenty of work ahead to repair our democracy, stop the roll back of voting rights, and ensure nothing like the insurrection ever happens again. That's why I've sponsored and worked to pass H.R. 1 the For the People Act. It's why I've sponsored and worked to pass the Protecting Our Democracy Act. It's why I've sponsored and worked to pass the John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act. It's why I supported the creation of the House Select Committee to Investigate the January 6th Attack on the US Capitol. And it's why I'm proud that my bill, the Honest Ads Act, was included in the Protecting Our Democracy Act to combat extremism by stopping bad actors from influencing our democracy through online ads purchased with dark money.

Peter, our democracy is worth fighting for, and I know together we can build a more perfect union for all of us.

It's an honor to serve you,

Derek Kilmer

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/v5tkjx6jwD1NbFvrgr4NWhxnKR71vIgTW1T5aW2iZmE=/4c21_HrWGHdko0nje93wQwvi_QgbZpqK0F-aA1iSwfY=) | [](https://act.myngp.com/el/v5tkjx6jwD1NbFvrgr4NWhxnKR71vIgTW1T5aW2iZmE=/vR9O_-EteXTLSDVQOyPuSGMxd-3Mh2gR5oq7RlEWTMM=)

body:
One year ago today I, like many of you, sat in horror as I watched a mob of people attack our Capitol because they refused to accept the results of a free and fair election.

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40424965/324289766/619242359?refcode=abd_em_fr_2021.12.21_bX_logo_x__f1_s1_c1__header&amount=25&utm_campaign=abd_em_fr_2022.01.06_b1_jan6_x_f1_s1__ac&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ngp&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDg2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNmNmNzFkZS0yMjZmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5sVgCuIIzQVBVq6amCMim3Bp1u0fdCPnsn6M_TVkWgM=)

Peter,

One year ago today I, like many of you, sat in horror as I watched a mob of people attack our Capitol because they refused to accept the results of a free and fair election. It remains a shock that to this day, Republicans continue to try and justify the unjustifiable.

Make no mistake about it: Republicans may try to paint this as a protest but **this was an attempted coup whose goal was to terrorize our elected leaders because they didn’t like the results of the 2020 election.**

In the year since this horrific day, many Republicans continue to peddle Trump’s big lie, attempting to sow fear and distrust of our electoral systems.

Truth and transparency are critical elements of our democracy. If Republicans are able to successfully erode those pieces of our elections, this country will descend into anarchy and fascism.

That’s why it’s my goal to stand up for truth and to hold people accountable whenever I see injustice, and that won’t change when I’m in Congress.

**[But Peter, I need your help to get there. If you want a representative who will stand up for the Constitution and democracy, will you make a small donation to my campaign today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40424966/324289767/-1888922884?refcode=ABD_EM_FR_2022.01.06_b1_jan6_X_F1_S1__ac&amount=5&utm_campaign=abd_em_fr_2022.01.06_b1_jan6_x_f1_s1__ac&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ngp&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDg2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNmNmNzFkZS0yMjZmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5sVgCuIIzQVBVq6amCMim3Bp1u0fdCPnsn6M_TVkWgM=)** | [GIVE $5 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40424967/324289768/-1888922884?refcode=ABD_EM_FR_2022.01.06_b1_jan6_X_F1_S1__ac&amount=5&utm_campaign=abd_em_fr_2022.01.06_b1_jan6_x_f1_s1__ac&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ngp&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDg2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNmNmNzFkZS0yMjZmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5sVgCuIIzQVBVq6amCMim3Bp1u0fdCPnsn6M_TVkWgM=)

clean_body: There is much work to be done. | = BREAKING: President Biden and Vice President Harris delivered remarks addressing the anniversary of the January 6th attack on the Capitol. = Peter, despite the GOP’s efforts to dismiss the violent insurrection and rewrite history, President Biden is standing up for our country. The president spoke out on the importance of securing and strengthening our democracy and our institutions, and rejecting the hatred and lies we saw on January 6th. There is still much work to be done. That’s why here at Unite the Country, we are working around the clock to ensure GOP lawmakers who tried to dismantle faith in our elections are defeated in 2022. Protecting our democracy is an all hands on deck effort, and President Biden is counting on all of us to join him in this fight. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = | = ---|---|--- = | = | = Thanks for your support, Unite the Country = = * Unite the Country was formed in 2019 to support Joe Biden’s candidacy for President. Unite the Country is proud to continue to support President Biden’s bold agenda and vision for America, and we will support candidates for public office who have similar foresight and courage. = Paid for by Unite the Country, , and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. name: Team ODP
subject: One year ago, we saw the consequences of the Big Lie -- but they keep on repeating it.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Ohio Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
147 Republican lawmakers voted to overturn a free and fair election -- including 5 Ohio lawmakers: Representatives Jim Jordan, Bill Johnson, Bob Gibbs, Steve Chabot, and Warren Davidson.
| Team,

One year ago today, our Capitol was attacked, fueled by Donald Trump's Big Lie and violent rhetoric. Capitol Police were assaulted and the lives of elected officials were threatened in an attempt to overturn a free and fair election.

And then, just hours after we saw the consequences of the former president's Big Lie, 147 Republican lawmakers voted to overturn a free and fair election -- including 5 Ohio lawmakers: Representatives Jim Jordan, Bill Johnson, Bob Gibbs, Steve Chabot, and Warren Davidson.

Over the last year, we've been building a diverse coalition of candidates, activists, donors, and volunteers who are committed to defeating every lawmaker who voted to destroy our democracy last January as well as those like Josh Mandel who continue to repeat Donald Trump's Big Lie.

[**Now, we want to know if you're with us. Will you defend our democracy by helping us defeat the Republicans who contributed to the January 6 insurrection? Let us know you're in.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40425737/324293513/-1296184610?ms=em22_220106_jan6_adv_gq_act___todp_ettx&refcode=em22_220106_jan6_adv_gq_act___todp_ettx&source=em22_220106_jan6_adv_gq_act___todp_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220106_jan6_adv_gq_act___todp_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=JCHXtXBIlygi458hBVwivCPBt0FKrfgLUdy1%2Bc%2BwDHNqiE7NoyBxBAZdlcV2FvzEWg7Y%2Ft3nCfKoKA2mob6qRgBnO%2F6v0g%2FtmJ5oCD%2F2Z9P%2FIJoyqimoAN138oKl6CWWGmuZAdO4YhzE3md9yppWog%3D%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMTIzOGRhOC0yNTZmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jh11aZt8HcTwTQ52Iq_VjFQPjfmBPmIIC5CPwMO-XZU=&emci=e1faffdd-166f-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=01238da8-256f-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=25291327)

As Ohio Democrats and elected officials in Washington have fought to uncover the truth about who organized, funded, and caused the January 6 insurrection, Republicans like Jim Jordan have fought to obstruct justice at every turn.

Now, they're trying to run out the clock. They're working to erase our majorities in the House and Senate so they can end the investigation and bury the truth for good.

We can't let that happen, and we need your help to stop them. We need you to commit to helping us defeat every Republican who contributed to one of the darkest days in our nation's history and make sure it never happens again.

[**Now, we want to know if you're with us. Will you defend our democracy by helping us defeat the Republicans who contributed to the January 6 insurrection? Let us know you're in.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40425738/324293514/-1296184610?ms=em22_220106_jan6_adv_gq_act___todp_ettx&refcode=em22_220106_jan6_adv_gq_act___todp_ettx&source=em22_220106_jan6_adv_gq_act___todp_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220106_jan6_adv_gq_act___todp_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=JCHXtXBIlygi458hBVwivCPBt0FKrfgLUdy1%2Bc%2BwDHNqiE7NoyBxBAZdlcV2FvzEWg7Y%2Ft3nCfKoKA2mob6qRgBnO%2F6v0g%2FtmJ5oCD%2F2Z9P%2FIJoyqimoAN138oKl6CWWGmuZAdO4YhzE3md9yppWog%3D%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMTIzOGRhOC0yNTZmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jh11aZt8HcTwTQ52Iq_VjFQPjfmBPmIIC5CPwMO-XZU=&emci=e1faffdd-166f-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=01238da8-256f-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=25291327)

clean_body: 147 Republican lawmakers voted to overturn a free and fair election -- including 5 Ohio lawmakers: Representatives Jim Jordan, Bill Johnson, Bob Gibbs, Steve Chabot, and Warren Davidson. | Team, One year ago today, our Capitol was attacked, fueled by Donald Trump's Big Lie and violent rhetoric. Capitol Police were assaulted and the lives of elected officials were threatened in an attempt to overturn a free and fair election. And then, just hours after we saw the consequences of the former president's Big Lie, 147 Republican lawmakers voted to overturn a free and fair election -- including 5 Ohio lawmakers: Representatives Jim Jordan, Bill Johnson, Bob Gibbs, Steve Chabot, and Warren Davidson. Over the last year, we've been building a diverse coalition of candidates, activists, donors, and volunteers who are committed to defeating every lawmaker who voted to destroy our democracy last January as well as those like Josh Mandel who continue to repeat Donald Trump's Big Lie. As Ohio Democrats and elected officials in Washington have fought to uncover the truth about who organized, funded, and caused the January 6 insurrection, Republicans like Jim Jordan have fought to obstruct justice at every turn. Now, they're trying to run out the clock. They're working to erase our majorities in the House and Senate so they can end the investigation and bury the truth for good. We can't let that happen, and we need your help to stop them. We need you to commit to helping us defeat every Republican who contributed to one of the darkest days in our nation's history and make sure it never happens again. Thank you for doing your part, Team ODP | Paid for by the Ohio Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. # Reflecting on the One-Year Anniversary of the January 6th Attack
---
| [ ](https://jessicaforwis.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c27543103b71c2381252057eb&id=2c0655b55e&e=42a933bda9)

| One year ago today, violent insurrectionists stormed the U.S. Capitol in an attempt to overturn the 2020 election, resulting in multiple deaths and hundreds injured. Five officers lost their lives, one during the attack and four by suicide afterward.

We must never forget that this attack was fueled by President Trump and Republicans who continued to push the Big Lie and would rather see our country destroyed than lose a fair election.

Even well after the violent insurrection, [Scott Fitzgerald doubled down on voting against certifying the 2020 election results](https://jessicaforwis.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c27543103b71c2381252057eb&id=712361fe56&e=42a933bda9), pushing incredulous conspiracy theories with the hope to rig future elections.

Unlike Fitzgerald, I actually give a damn about the truth. Conspiracy theories and bogus claims have no home in our government. It's time for a change. [**Please join me and help make that happen.**](https://jessicaforwis.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c27543103b71c2381252057eb&id=8d569e37f5&e=42a933bda9)

—Jessica

name: Trish Gunby
subject: The dangerous legacy of the Jan. 6 Capitol riot
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trish Gunby for Congress [unsubscribe](https://email
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40425974/324294529/368400405?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjAzMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNjU0OWUxMC0yNzZmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IFziMm0TrFyKO-J4UgiJDan2zdMCe6cznpnS5G4dsYI=&emci=646d9687-226f-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=06549e10-276f-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=14943357) Peter, The Capitol riot that took place on January 6, 2020 was a scary day for American politics and the rule of law. It was a scary day for me, too. As Trump supporters overran the Capitol, leaving a wake of destruction and chaos, I was being sworn-in to the Missouri House of Representatives. Similarly, protestors had been gathering outside our chambers all morning, and as word spread of the violence and chaos in D.C., I began to wonder: Are we next? Who can forget the images from that day? Scenes of “Trump 2020” flags flying high as the Capitol Police and D.C. Metro Police were steamrolled, while frantic officers desperately rushed members of Congress to safety. And the images of hatred, like the Confederate flag proudly hoisted inside the Capitol rotunda—something that never happened during the Civil War or at any time prior to January 6, 2020. The men in tactical gear climbing the walls on the building grounds, assaulting police with bear spray aimed in their eyes and mouth, and hunting inside the House and Senate chambers for lawmakers to settle some made-up score. I’m sure I am not alone in thinking that never in my lifetime did I imagine seeing such awful things, much less perpetrated by American citizens who were induced to believe the most pernicious and easily-disproved lie in our political history. The heavy legacy of that day can be felt right now. Far too many people still believe the false conspiracy that there was widespread election fraud committed in the 2020 election. It is a lie that continues to prop up its chief promoter, the twice-impeached and disgraced former President Donald Trump (a man who is so reckless and mendacious he is still banned from Twitter). And many officials in the GOP have found ready use of the 2020 election lie to support their agenda of suppressing votes for their political opponents. This applies particularly to someone like Rep. Ann Wagner, who opposed the independent, bipartisan Commission to investigate the January 6 riot, and voted to protect the treasonous right wing instigator Steve Bannon, who played a key role in organizing the mob. **I vow to fight these lies, stand up and oppose this divisive and destructive agenda, and pour acid truth on the cynical and twisted perspectives that give safe harbor to humanity’s worst impulses.** But to win this fight, it will take every decent person in America speaking out, pushing back, and refusing to tolerate hateful intolerance. In this new year, and on the anniversary of that tragic day last year, let’s resolve to put any other disagreements aside and stand together for these core values. If we don’t, we may end up leaving this incredible nation more dangerous and more divided than ever before—and we owe it to our kids and grandkids to do everything possible to prevent that. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40425975/324294530/-28144942?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjAzMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNjU0OWUxMC0yNzZmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IFziMm0TrFyKO-J4UgiJDan2zdMCe6cznpnS5G4dsYI=&emci=646d9687-226f-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=06549e10-276f-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=14943357) Sincerely, Trish

name: Sarah Godlewski
subject: Looking back on January 6, 2021
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sarah for Wisconsin
body:
One year ago today, an insurrectionist mob violently stormed our nation's Capitol — incited by Donald Trump and fueled by lies from Republicans like Ron Johnson — because they refused to accept the results of the 2020 election. Their goal was to attack our democracy and silence the will of the people. One year ago today, an insurrectionist mob violently stormed our nation's Capitol — incited by Donald Trump and fueled by lies from Republicans like Ron Johnson — because they refused to accept the results of the 2020 election. Their goal was to attack our democracy and silence the will of the people.

Five police officers have died. Countless others were injured. But Ron Johnson has continued to gaslight the American public about this domestic terrorist attack. And now, he’s actively — and openly — working to find new, insidious ways to take over our elections and erode democracy.

Every day since January 6, 2021, Ron Johnson has peddled Trump’s Big Lie, called the violent insurrection “a peaceful protest,” and claimed these domestic terrorists were “people that love this country, that truly respect law enforcement, would never do anything to break the law.”

When asked if his words and actions had anything to do with the attack on our nation's Capitol, Ron Johnson said he had, "no responsibility." Just shameful, even by his standards.

**Let me be clear: Ron Johnson does not belong in the U.S. Senate, and I will fight like hell to make sure he loses in November. The future of our democracy depends on it.**

The road ahead will not be easy, however. Ron Johnson's loyalty has garnered a significant amount of support from Donald Trump and the entire Republican establishment. They know he’s willing to undermine our democracy to make sure they never lose another election.

That’s why, one year later, the fight for our democracy has never been more important. We can hold every Republican who tried to subvert the democratic process accountable. We can restore voting rights and save our democracy from their attacks. And we can ensure that our great experiment can continue for generations. But only if we come together right now.

**[An important part of this fight is defeating Ron Johnson in November. Just like you, I believe in our democracy with all of my heart — and when I’m in the U.S. Senate, I'll do everything I can to protect it. I'd appreciate anything you're able to give to support our efforts in the critical work ahead.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40426120/324295230/1928095881?refcode=em22_220106_jan6fr1_fnd_gq_act___sg_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220106_jan6fr1_fnd_gq_act___sg_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MzIxOGZiNS0yNzZmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jCTBUfjICtSheQWE2OV5KGwuInq6QFokXVAhwSec5c8=)**

Ron Johnson is a disgrace to Wisconsin, a threat to our democracy — and with your help, we can make sure this is his last year in office.

Thank you for reading,

Sarah Godlewski | [Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40426121/324295231/1928095881?refcode=em22_220106_jan6fr1_fnd_gq_act___sg_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220106_jan6fr1_fnd_gq_act___sg_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MzIxOGZiNS0yNzZmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jCTBUfjICtSheQWE2OV5KGwuInq6QFokXVAhwSec5c8=)

clean_body: One year ago today, an insurrectionist mob violently stormed our nation's Capitol — incited by Donald Trump and fueled by lies from Republicans like Ron Johnson — because they refused to accept the results of the 2020 election. Their goal was to attack our democracy and silence the will of the people. One year ago today, an insurrectionist mob violently stormed our nation's Capitol — incited by Donald Trump and fueled by lies from Republicans like Ron Johnson — because they refused to accept the results of the 2020 election. Their goal was to attack our democracy and silence the will of the people. Five police officers have died. Countless others were injured. But Ron Johnson has continued to gaslight the American public about this domestic terrorist attack. And now, he’s actively — and openly — working to find new, insidious ways to take over our elections and erode democracy. Every day since January 6, 2021, Ron Johnson has peddled Trump’s Big Lie, called the violent insurrection “a peaceful protest,” and claimed these domestic terrorists were “people that love this country, that truly respect law enforcement, would never do anything to break the law.” When asked if his words and actions had anything to do with the attack on our nation's Capitol, Ron Johnson said he had, "no responsibility." Just shameful, even by his standards. Let me be clear: Ron Johnson does not belong in the U.S. Senate, and I will fight like hell to make sure he loses in November. The future of our democracy depends on it. The road ahead will not be easy, however. Ron Johnson's loyalty has garnered a significant amount of support from Donald Trump and the entire Republican establishment. They know he’s willing to undermine our democracy to make sure they never lose another election. That’s why, one year later, the fight for our democracy has never been more important. We can hold every Republican who tried to subvert the democratic process accountable. We can restore voting rights and save our democracy from their attacks. And we can ensure that our great experiment can continue for generations. But only if we come together right now. = Ron Johnson is a disgrace to Wisconsin, a threat to our democracy — and with your help, we can make sure this is his last year in office. Thank you for reading, Sarah Godlewski | = Paid for by Sarah for Wisconsin Sarah for Wisconsin PO Box 166 Madison, WI 53701 United States

Paul Gosar enabled these violent insurrectionists by promoting the Big Lie

| Today marks the anniversary of one of the darkest moments in our democracy’s history. The MAGA mob, incited by lies spread by Trump and GOP members of Congress — including Paul Gosar — stormed our nation’s Capitol and left destruction and trauma in their wake in an attempt to overthrow our democratic processes and stop the certification of President Biden’s victory in the 2020 election.

**Paul Gosar enabled these violent insurrectionists by promoting the Big Lie that Joe Biden did not win the 2020 presidential election, and there are even allegations that he was directly involved in the planning of that deadly day.**

Since last January 6th, Gosar has only continued on this path of extremism and was even censured for threatening violence against his colleagues.

With each extreme action Gosar takes, I become more determined to hold Gosar accountable. And I’m glad you are by my side.

Thank you,
Delina

name: Susan Wild
subject: Remembering January 6, 2021
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Susan Wild for Congress
body:
I hope you will stand with me to ensure our story is told.

| Peter,

One year ago today, on January 6th, 2021, a mob of right-wing domestic terrorists stormed the United States Capitol in a Donald Trump-inspired attempt to overturn the results of our free and fair election. I was in the House Gallery that day. >From that spot, I heard gunshots outside the House Chamber. I crouched below the balcony walls alongside Rep. Jason Crow (D-CO) as we hid from the rioters. I made what I thought could be my final call to my children.

On that day, both Democrats and Republicans were terrified. We had no idea what was happening outside the doors of the Chamber, relying on updates from social media and loved ones for information as we slipped on our gas masks, evacuated the building, and sought refuge in a nearby safe room.

**Frankly, seeing Republican lawmakers (some of the same Republicans I saw that day in fear for their lives) now deny the reality of what happened on January 6th — some referring to it as a “normal tourist visit” — only rubs salt in the wound.**

The fear my colleagues and I felt that day, both for our personal safety and for the future of our democracy, left an indelible impact. I am tremendously grateful for the law enforcement officers who ensured our security. Now, it is up to us, the American people, to ensure the events of January 6th are not forgotten and never repeated.

I hope and trust that you will stand with me, as you have always done, to ensure the story of that dark day is told. Tonight, you can watch me on CNN with Anderson Cooper at 8:30 pm ET, along with some of my friends who were also there that day, to reflect on this solemn occasion.

Thank you. As we enter 2022, I wish for you, your family, and our country a year of peace and prosperity.

Sincerely,

Susan
---

name: Herschel Walker
subject: New polling has us up by ONE POINT
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
Our campaign is taking nothing for granted. We feel the momentum behind our campaign building, but we need your help. |
---
Peter,

We wanted to share some good news with you. Please see the headline below:

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59182896:6WXvh2ENF:m:1:3253819041:A8F3AE80823A3B54BA09CF0EE82EABE9:r)
That's right - NBC News reported on December 22nd that a new poll has our campaign pulling ONE POINT ahead of the Democrat incumbent in Georgia - 49% to 48%!

While this is fantastic news, there are some important points to consider:
1. This poll shows the strength of the campaign we're building, but we're still more than 10 months away from Election Day. A lot can - and will - happen between now and November 8.
2. In some states, you can win an election with a plurality like 49%. But in Georgia, we must get a majority of the votes to win, so we still have hard work to do to get over 50%.
3. We are taking nothing for granted. We feel the momentum building for our campaign, but we know it will take an incredible amount of sweat equity to win this race.

**[Today we're asking you to consider a gift of $3 or more to our campaign to strike while the iron is hot and flip this Senate seat RED.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59182896:6WXvh2ENF:m:1:3253819041:A8F3AE80823A3B54BA09CF0EE82EABE9:r)**

name: Val Demings
subject: Trump wants you to forget Jan. 6
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
Friend, the bipartisan investigation into the Jan. 6 riot is uncovering new evidence against Donald Trump every day, and I need you to hear the most important details as this case rapidly evolves:

A year ago today, in his final days in power, Donald Trump repeatedly tried to pressure the Department of Justice into overturning the Georgia election results, and he even asked his advisors about sending the military to the states he lost in an attempt to stay in power.
These plans didn't come to fruition. Instead, his son's girlfriend raised $3 MILLION for the Jan. 6 rally, where Trump told a group of agitated protesters that, "If you don't fight like hell, you're not going to have a country anymore."

We all know what happened next, friend. I'll never forget the moment that Trump supporters stormed the U.S. Capitol and fought their way through Capitol Police officers. I was in the House gallery, ducking for cover and fearing for my life.

This is America, friend, and in this country, we abide by peaceful transitions of power – no matter who wins. No one is above the law, which is exactly what I said when I managed Trump's first impeachment trial. But some far-right Republicans, including Marco Rubio, are trying to let Trump off the hook.

Trump loyalists like Rubio want you to forget that Trump nearly destroyed our democracy. They want you to forget that Trump bribed a foreign official, pressuring him to interfere in the 2020 election. And, they want you to let Trump run for president all over again. I won't let that happen, friend, but I can't overcome Trumpism alone, so I have to ask you:

Do you believe that Donald Trump and his associates should be held accountable for their misdeeds?

https://survey.valdemings.com//trump-accountability-survey?code=jtk2084-su-text&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100

Thank you for helping me bring Trump to justice. Together, I know we have the power to protect our democracy.

Val Demings

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.

Email is an important way for us to keep this team informed about campaign updates. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, you can click here [https://secure.ngpvan.com/ibu2rS35CUKF9kop2dIjsg2] , or click here to unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/de32bacd-a96d-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c/bf1966c3-276f-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZjE5NjZjMy0yNzZmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AH0BxyLSLA-7SYFgjs_jWGa1AVJfgOs_Bw4pCVAwqiQ=&id=123159867 .

Val Demings for U.S. Senate
P. O. Box 536926
Orlando, FL 32853
United States

subject: ‘We’re Ashamed of Nothing’: Matt Gaetz and Marjorie Taylor Greene Honored Insurrectionists With March to Capitol

body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/emailmflowers?refcode=20220103_SMTG_twitterFWD [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/emailmflowers?refcode=20220103_SMTG_twitterFWD]Hi, did you see the email Marcus sent yesterday?
Marjorie Taylor Greene has been permanently banned from Twitter for spreading disinformation about COVID-19 and putting her followers at severe risk.
We welcome her removal from Twitter -- but the next step is to remove her from office. Can you donate $20 or more now to help us do just that? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/emailmflowers?refcode=20220103_SMTG_twitterFWD]
Marcus Flowers is a Veteran, a patriot, and a Democrat -- and he’ll restore honor and integrity to Congress.
Thanks for your support.

From: Marcus Flowers <info@marcusforgeorgia.com>
Subject: Marjorie Taylor Greene was permanently suspended from Twitter
Sent on Sunday, January 2, 2022 at 1:05 p.m.
It’s official: Marjorie Taylor Greene has been permanently suspended from Twitter.
She deserved to be removed from the platform because of her dangerous incitements to violence and reckless spreading of harmful disinformation.
But here’s the thing: Our goal was never to get Marjorie Taylor Greene removed from Twitter. Our goal is to remove her from Congress.
I’m a Veteran, a Democrat, and I believe that the people of Georgia’s 14th District deserve so much better than Marjorie Taylor Greene. That’s why I’m running to unseat her in 2022.
So I have to ask: Will you join me in the fight to remove her from Congress by donating $20 or more to my campaign? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/emailmflowers?refcode=20220103_SMTG_twitterFWD]
DONATE NOW » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/emailmflowers?refcode=20220103_SMTG_twitterFWD]
Marjorie Taylor Greene has been removed from Twitter -- that’s a good thing. But let’s not pretend that was our goal. We have to remove her from office.
Thanks for fighting with me,
Marcus Flowers

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40426719/324299481/-1614289773?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYmNjMTA0Mi0yYjZmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tz1NaXLMeywZpuS276NUn0S77kTS-YOLhqEZWByPz-8=&emci=e026a1a7-596e-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=3bcc1042-2b6f-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=11385749)

Peter,

One year ago today hordes of violent insurrectionists, fueled by the lies of a presidential hopeful to overturn an election, brutally ransacked our Capitol building and attacked the very seat of democracy itself.

We all watched in horror as rioters chanted "stop the steal," and brought out makeshift gallows armed with threats to hang our vice president who was in the building. We witnessed in real-time Capitol police beaten while enraged mobs shattered glass, looted Congressional offices, and permanently desecrated our nation's Capitol.

The horrors of January 6th will be seared in our collective memory for generations. **But, what is perhaps more chilling than recounting the events of Trump's unsuccessful coup, is understanding the increasing likelihood there could be a second, successful one.**

Peter, the day after the horrific attack on our democracy, **147 Republicans (including our very own Mike Garcia) refused to certify a _democratically held election of President Joe Biden._** Plain and simple, a large faction of the Republican congressional leadership – whether out of cowardice or political opportunism – bought into Trump's lie of massive voter fraud and attempted to overrule the will of the people.

**And they will try to do it again.**

**[Anyone who doesn't believe in democracy and rule by the people does not deserve to be in power. Donate what you can to make sure Big Lie Republicans like Mike Garcia are kept out of Congress>>> ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40426720/324299482/1907459259?refcode=em22_220106_Jan6Anniv&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYmNjMTA0Mi0yYjZmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tz1NaXLMeywZpuS276NUn0S77kTS-YOLhqEZWByPz-8=) ** **[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40426721/324299483/1907459259?refcode=em22_220106_Jan6Anniv&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYmNjMTA0Mi0yYjZmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tz1NaXLMeywZpuS276NUn0S77kTS-YOLhqEZWByPz-8=) ** Since January 6th, 2021, Republican party leaders have only doubled down on The Big Lie. They use baseless claims of election fraud to derail voting rights. They censure Republican leaders like Liz Cheney who have the audacity to say Joe Biden was elected freely and fairly.

Even more insidiously, GOP-run state legislatures in Georgia, Michigan, and other key swing states are clearing a potential path to overturn elections by going after the one mechanism that made the insurrection unsuccessful in the first place – state elections boards that certify results.

**We _cannot_ let them succeed. **If last year taught us anything it is that democracy is not a guarantee. It is a delicate institution that only works when the people stand up to use it and protect it.

**[Will you join me and make a stand now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40426722/324299484/1907459259?refcode=em22_220106_Jan6Anniv&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYmNjMTA0Mi0yYjZmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tz1NaXLMeywZpuS276NUn0S77kTS-YOLhqEZWByPz-8=) **

As our nation mourns the tragic events one year ago, let us also reflect on the work that must be done to ensure that democracy _always_ prevails.

– Christy [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40426723/324299485/1907459259?refcode=em22_220106_Jan6Anniv&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYmNjMTA0Mi0yYjZmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tz1NaXLMeywZpuS276NUn0S77kTS-YOLhqEZWByPz-8=) [DONATE MONTHLY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40426724/324299486/1907459259?refcode=em22_220106_Jan6Anniv&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYmNjMTA0Mi0yYjZmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tz1NaXLMeywZpuS276NUn0S77kTS-YOLhqEZWByPz-8=)

# [URGENT: Tell the January 6th Committee to subpoena Donald Trump >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc4d0cfa7-0e6c-4f19-aa63-295fc29a60e9/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

---
| | | One year ago today, Donald Trump incited a violent mob to storm the U.S. Capitol after spreading the Big Lie about the integrity of the 2020 election. But so far he has faced ZERO CONSEQUENCES for his crimes. Enough is enough. We must know the truth about Trump’s level of involvement that day. The only way we can do that is to get the January 6th Committee to subpoena Trump and force him to testify under oath. If Trump refuses to comply, he can be prosecuted. We can’t let him get off scot-free – it's time to prove he’s guilty once and for all. Trump must be held accountable for this attempt to overturn the results of a free and fair election. Our democracy depends on it. [Sign now to tell the January 6th Committee to subpoena Donald Trump >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2a8993f5-db61-4339-a8df-d5738321d906/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

name: American Action News
subject: Restoring free government
body:
Have you ever wondered what caused the rejection of the American Founding and the radical transformation of our government?
| _Sponsored message_ |
---|---|---
| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z96dj2r5iqt27o2thspc7709kn5q89end00204r0_rp22sh2s8i66ob4c5ie9oj2cth2bs)
---
| |
Dear Friend, Have you ever wondered what caused the rejection of the American Founding and the radical transformation of our government? To answer this pressing question, I invite you to enroll in Hillsdale’s free online course, “Constitution 201: The Progressive Rejection of the Founding and the Rise of Bureaucratic Despotism.” Taught by Hillsdale College’s politics faculty, this course invites every liberty-loving American to explore:
* the origins and key early leaders of American Progressivism,
* how Progressivism has altered the structure of the Constitution and the relationship of the American people to their government,
* the new ideas and purposes that animate Progressivism today,
* how this movement away from the American Founding threatens the rights of every American,
* and how we might restore constitutional government in America today.

To activate your free access to this course—and begin learning at your own pace—please click on the secure link below. **** [**https://online.hillsdale.edu/landing/constitution-201**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z8qp8tb2pndt30rf5nj018hojqncdg6oph5tuaeo_rp22sh2s8i66ob4c5ie9oj2cth2bs)**** **** **Now more than ever before it is essential for every citizen to understand the nature of modern Progressivism so that we can intelligently defend free government in America. I hope you will join us in this pursuit.** Warm regards, Kyle Murnen, ‘09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---
American Action News

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[Click here to unsubscribe](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z880lrq1nivrfl41345fl5orkl3cf3rfigs5a3dg_)

name: Gabby Seay
subject: FWD: Did you get Letitia’s message?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James for NY
body:
| |
---
I believe in Letitia James, Peter.
That’s why I took this job. From suing Big Pharma for fueling the opioid crisis to holding the gun lobby accountable for our gun violence epidemic, Letitia has spent every moment as your attorney general fighting for you. And she’s not done fighting yet.
With a long election year ahead, we set the goal to receive 2,022 donations to our 2022 Election Year Fund before midnight tomorrow – but we're still 855 donations short.
**Peter, will you show Letitia that you believe in her too and rush a donation of $15 or more to help her get reelected as your attorney general? ****We can’t afford to miss our first goal of 2022.**

With my attempts to bring justice to New York under attack, I need the support of every last fearless fighter to get across the finish line. **That’s why I set a goal to receive 2,022 donations to fill our 2022 Election Year Fund, but we’re still 1,271 short.**

A year later, our democracy is just as damaged | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yOQozAy4249GfohatM8XLCP7Gyf6bzrkjN8sXh_JjXvDm21fvmGLhqUe-quR3_x0bPZYqqRmKw-ebpnqlyWdsbb4WUxyyDpjjPMxiSxHH8swx6BG86zi0BWct0bOeiJXdUFxdkYsX1cwuWIdK4P9Kr5SwBBGG08cgKjOm1OAaBlWXtls-OcRvLRDuGFOADCGyODnka6VM3VlX9xfJLY1lL_GcdCqgZ5AwTLffqssaNx9oiZU1KOHA38v7WRzzn3k67jsSIRKtU4PcOQc9iot6JIgZAmAEjrF0_EuEq6wonqA/3ih/4tmVKn3_TR-EysA0flNPpw/h0/pRE9qOw_QbZnY9TBejlx5RpQ3fs6Kbzu9T2ffaJlAIU) team, A year ago today, we watched in horror as white supremacists stormed Washington DC, took over the Capitol, and showed us just how fragile our democracy truly is. A year later, our democracy is just as damaged and we're still waiting for accountability for that violent insurrection. Today, we have a Congress that has allowed Republican lawmakers—that actively supported and sided with white nationalist insurrectionists—to remain in office. A Congress that is led by Democratic lawmakers who still haven’t passed legislation to protect the voting rights of Black and brown people. [**In 2022, we can get Congress back on track, demand accountability, and protect our voting rights, but it’s going to have to come from us.****If you agree, chip in $7 to help me build a campaign that can get us there.**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wNcOc6YQXgT3QRvIzDhxESIPXt4kK-C28h1as5_LZZ7t9yejgNlNS-RuQ_6-OBnywz4PPp6JidhGmsnB1QDTR64qca7GmDJ2M6NzqC73sHLyHKmO4LbHyHuPgmNgM7eDR7GYP9t_EHkZ04qsyseoFo-tiPEc0vNMQvMKp9_LJvBMwY6C9PH6pH0J42gVZT1d9hZ7PPFdpzO1n2yc0de8zAe-qko-LmI9BC1zM1UlLAuWu3hK00g177GZP2VxVe50kxmKy9j6DjFGXxtM4GHUf-/3ih/4tmVKn3_TR-EysA0flNPpw/h1/jOYAzXBPTn6EmzuaUAIOR23fpplvmP_iDDRT3FO79iA) [Donate »](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wNcOc6YQXgT3QRvIzDhxESePlwjDdMrShXzJfHGIytaXddLDqPSopZ6mo5ZT22cZmV9Uku_XAeeUFNPOC__CGuQX03YeGvhEYQrovmo14k1e33tfM5-JYQvcP6LMHVhoZOVAE7pqYOhkB2Gg-9_9SBsLbA242e9wKLiEgs8EyS7w25c16LR1683b9wI2Rl6fj0gSEg3Fp2FWfz7xQ7-kbAZzaeQ-yODto2hEB26bZJhb-UN47tkPQ-LnUMp8JL2UTu4BK7GW9I7bSlYGk5WjWe/3ih/4tmVKn3_TR-EysA0flNPpw/h2/ACpL7JxiPzM9dWAbkHplqXmG6haeRoA-Y1EV4VGOZM0) Throughout our history, our nation has failed to deliver on the promises of democracy. The legacies of slavery and Jim Crow have carried on through voter disenfranchisement, gerrymandering, and voter suppression, making the ballot box inaccessible for Black and brown people across the country. So on this January 6, I don’t just want accountability for the people who tried to violently destroy our democracy and overturn an election. I want our Congress to deliver on the promise of democracy once and for all. [**Donate $7 now to help send****a true champion for democracy & accountability to Congress. One who will never stop fighting to make our voices heard.**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wNcOc6YQXgT3QRvIzDhxESd1NqKO3O241A02X7auYSOqouonaRscWkt-GqY8g0YiYPs0AKrezATIZL0yIK2qGDdLc2_yQj0E5npx6NftMJOfOpJV6UjEbc23XGxRYr0CSdM2gRRLgY_RnpGck1aXybNHCnEskC9Bf6Y9d6bPACR-_sn3zE_5n3nKa049Z42_OPWW8I-KnRjocCGgt7d9YQmtml1m_0lHf0YEgAEGSIbA8XQP_w9o4EmuHhL8JYXrlrN9Acif8rkX_V7CVBY4N4/3ih/4tmVKn3_TR-EysA0flNPpw/h3/DynC9zfIKnIh02R-Gtcxy5tIuCvG3gy7qGKtxRWKpaU) It’s the least we deserve. clean_body: A year later, our democracy is just as damaged | | | team, A year ago today, we watched in horror as white supremacists stormed Washington DC, took over the Capitol, and showed us just how fragile our democracy truly is. A year later, our democracy is just as damaged and we're still waiting for accountability for that violent insurrection. Today, we have a Congress that has allowed Republican lawmakers—that actively supported and sided with white nationalist insurrectionists—to remain in office. A Congress that is led by Democratic lawmakers who still haven’t passed legislation to protect the voting rights of Black and brown people. Throughout our history, our nation has failed to deliver on the promises of democracy. The legacies of slavery and Jim Crow have carried on through voter disenfranchisement, gerrymandering, and voter suppression, making the ballot box inaccessible for Black and brown people across the country. So on this January 6, I don’t just want accountability for the people who tried to violently destroy our democracy and overturn an election. I want our Congress to deliver on the promise of democracy once and for all. It’s the least we deserve. name: Jake Duesenberg
subject: Triple Vaxxed Keith Ellison Has COVID
body:
| [ ](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ellison_has_covid&n=1)
---
January 6th, 2021
## Triple Vaxxed Keith Ellison Has COVID
Another mask wearing, triple vaxxed public official tested positive for COVID - Minnesota's embarrassment of an Attorney General, Keith Ellison. According to a tweet, Ellison is overseas and [tested positive](https://www.action4liberty.com/mask_wearing_fully_vaccinated_ag_keith_ellison_tests_positive_for_covid?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ellison_has_covid&n=2) before boarding a plane back to the U.S. Despite getting the booster shot recently, Keith Ellison became another one of the "breakthrough cases" that we were told by lying public health officials were rare. Governor Walz, who also received the booster shot, [recently got COVID](https://www.action4liberty.com/mask_wearing_fully_vaccinated_governor_walz_tested_positive_for_covid?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ellison_has_covid&n=3) as well. Not surprisingly, both Ellison and Walz have changed their talking points about why a person should get the experimental jab. Months ago they encouraged us to "roll up our sleeves" to "stop the spread" of COVID. Now they've abandoned that talking point and tell us to get the vaccine because they reduce the symptoms. Like a good salesman for Big Pharma, Ellison issued a series of tweets last night encouraging everyone to get the jab. [](https://www.action4liberty.com/mask_wearing_fully_vaccinated_ag_keith_ellison_tests_positive_for_covid?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ellison_has_covid&n=4) The DFL Bosses must have forgotten to tell U.S. Senator Tina Smith (DFL-MN) about the shift in talking points. In a [press release on Monday](https://www.action4liberty.com/mask_wearing_fully_vaccinated_ag_keith_ellison_tests_positive_for_covid?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ellison_has_covid&n=5), Smith claimed that a recent federal government push to distribute vaccines will be key in "**slowing the spread of this virus".** Even worse, Joe Biden just reiterated the false "pandemic of the unvaccinated claim" in a video address. Oops! Despite the vaccines ineffectiveness in creating immunity to COVID, Governor Walz and team continue pushing vaccine mandates. Mayo Clinics just terminated thousands of employees for refusing to get the jab. And more evidence is coming out that vaccines are causing serious conditions like myocarditis and even deaths. And what about natural immunity??? **If you are fed up with these crony politicians lying to you and forcing you to get the experimental vaccine,[WATCH THIS VIDEO](https://www.action4liberty.com/caucus?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ellison_has_covid&n=6). Or [support](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_stop_vaccine_mandates?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ellison_has_covid&n=7) our field operations today!** **Jake Duesenberg** **Action 4 Liberty** | [](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_stop_vaccine_mandates?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ellison_has_covid&n=8 "Support Us") [Support Us](https://www.action4liberty.com/donate_stop_vaccine_mandates?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ellison_has_covid&n=8)
---

This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www.action4liberty.com/unsubscribe?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ellison_has_covid&n=9).
You can also keep up with Jake Duesenberg on [Facebook](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nyVoJL5zCIi1gu8lCoYmQrA8P7rhuOjJmdy-IRmglie&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ellison_has_covid&n=10).

name: John Cranley
subject: January 6th was one year ago today. Our democracy is still under threat.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the John Cranley Committee
body:
January 6th still haunts me. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40427093/324302730/-1079159473?refcode=ea.40df0959-2d6f-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ms=ea.40df0959-2d6f-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MGRmMDk1OS0yZDZmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=M3NUh0C9Ib4XV98e736FY8tua07N-Bfj3U_XTNETLRc=&emci=114d7a4e-226f-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=40df0959-2d6f-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=22604289) Friend, I still remember with disturbing clarity watching as rioters stormed the U.S. Capitol a year ago today. We watched a violent attack on our democracy — an attempted coup by Donald Trump’s supporters because they truly believed the Big Lie that the presidential election was stolen. It’s something that’s disturbing to this day. **But a year later, the politicians who spread that lie still haven’t been held accountable for their part in January 6th, and our democracy is still under threat.** Here in Ohio — and in states across the country — right-wing legislators are restricting access to the ballot box and gerrymandering district lines so that the GOP can’t lose. We must defend our democracy, friend. We must ensure that the will of the people is respected in elections to come and that every voter’s voice is heard at the ballot box. **[If you’re with me in the fight for our democracy’s future, please, say you’ll do your part by taking our pledge to vote in 2022 — it’s the best way we can secure the kind of leadership we deserve. Click here to take the pledge>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40427100/324302735/-1079159473?refcode=ea.40df0959-2d6f-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ms=ea.40df0959-2d6f-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MGRmMDk1OS0yZDZmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=M3NUh0C9Ib4XV98e736FY8tua07N-Bfj3U_XTNETLRc=&emci=114d7a4e-226f-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=40df0959-2d6f-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=22604289)**
**[TAKE THE PLEDGE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40427105/324302742/-1079159473?refcode=ea.40df0959-2d6f-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ms=ea.40df0959-2d6f-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MGRmMDk1OS0yZDZmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=M3NUh0C9Ib4XV98e736FY8tua07N-Bfj3U_XTNETLRc=&emci=114d7a4e-226f-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=40df0959-2d6f-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=22604289)** Thanks so much, John
**[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40427106/324302745/-1406512299?amount=25&refcode=ea.40df0959-2d6f-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ms=ea.40df0959-2d6f-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MGRmMDk1OS0yZDZmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=M3NUh0C9Ib4XV98e736FY8tua07N-Bfj3U_XTNETLRc=)**

John Cranley has spent his career working towards creating a fairer, more just world. It's why he founded Ohio’s Innocence Project back in 2003, why he ran for mayor of Cincinnati — the town where he grew up – and why he and his wife, Dena are raising their son to respect the principles of justice, equality, and compassion. **Now, he's running for governor. He's already led a comeback for Cincinnati, and he's ready to lead a comeback for Ohio, too.**

---
Peter, one year ago people across the country watched in shock and horror as a group of radical Americans violently stormed our Capitol Building to stop the certification of the 2020 Presidential Election. And I watched with my family, as my representative, Marjorie Taylor Greene supported this act of treason.

We watched as police officers fought to defend the Capitol, as radical mobs used flag poles as weapons, as they scoured the Halls for sitting members of Congress, as they violently destroyed public property. On this day we saw for the first time in American history – a confederate flag flying inside of our Capitol.

Looking across the living room at my children’s horrified faces, I knew our community deserved better. It was on this day last year that I decided to do something about Marjorie Taylor Greene.

Why did I stand up? Not because of what I saw but because of what I did not see. I did not see Donald Trump calling off his supporters. I did not see Marjorie Taylor Greene and other encouragers of this protest calling out the insurrectionist’s actions. **Instead, we saw our Democracy being threatened by complacency by the far-right, including Marge. **

This was not a protest. This was not an act of patriotism. Simply put, this was an act of terrorism brought forth by Trump, Greene, and others in order to overturn the results of a free and fair election.

Let me make myself very clear. **Unlike Marjorie Taylor Greene, when I am elected I will obey my oath to the American people and to our constitution.** I will stand up in defense of our Country. I will not make excuses for traitors and terrorists.

We cannot afford another January 6th. And we cannot afford another 2 years of Marjorie Taylor Greene. **[Chip in today to show Marjorie Taylor Greene that we are stronger than her hate and her lies.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40427112/324302806/-804235033?refcode=em0106b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODk0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMzg3MTc3YS0yZDZmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kYBdhGnLF9NipYKCCS5AHSHORDh_k5bLXyFK0Ffu30A=)** Our Democracy is stronger than the radical-right.

Please join us in honoring those who fought to protect our Democracy,
Holly McCormack.
****

name: Chris Deluzio
subject: America is worth fighting for
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Deluzio for Congress
body:
Derek,

A year ago, we saw the heart of American democracy attacked in an insurrection, an attempted coup by the radical right.

In an effort to overturn the Presidential election results, right-wing extremists put lawmakers' lives in danger, brutalized Capitol police officers, and damaged our seat of government.

Instead of condemning the violence, Trump and his accomplices stayed silent and failed to take accountability for the insurrectionists. And even today, one year later, they continue to push the Big Lie that the election was stolen, laying the groundwork in states all across the country, including this Commonwealth, to overturn a future election.

As a 17-year old, I first swore the oath to defend our Constitution (the same one so many of them betrayed) when I entered the Naval Academy.

I served to defend our democracy, and I'll be damned if I'm going to give up on this country now.

America is worth fighting for, worth defending. It won't be easy, but democracy only fails if we let it — and I can assure you: quitting isn't in our vocabulary here in western Pennsylvania.

Thank you for being with us in the fight for the future of our democracy.

— Chris Deluzio

Chris Deluzio is a voting rights lawyer and Iraq war veteran running for Congress in Pennsylvania's 17th District. He'll be a champion for our unions, fight to guarantee good healthcare for every American, take on corporate power, and advocate for bold action to protect and strengthen our democracy. This is one of the most competitive districts in the country, and Democrats have to hold it in order to keep their House majority in 2022. Please chip in to help Chris build a strong campaign that can win against the Republican machine.

name: Liz Mathis
subject: A note on the January 6th Capitol attack
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Liz Mathis for Congress
body:
1 year later
Peter,

It’s been a year to date since the January 6th insurrection at the Capitol. This attack was one of the darkest days in American history, fueled by hatred, conspiracies, and a blatant assault on our democracy.

The insurrection caused countless injuries, lasting mental trauma, and several deaths that people are still grieving. Multiple law enforcement officers lost their lives after protecting the Capitol, our Constitution, and our freedom. We cannot forget the events of that solemn day.

This tragic event and Ashley Hinson’s vote against the commission to investigate it were what spurred me to run for office to help uphold our Constitution. It was horrifying to watch members of the Republican Party minimize the impact of their dangerous rhetoric. We need leaders in Congress who will defend our democracy – not excuse the lawless and dangerous behavior of insurrectionists.

Today while you’re going about your day, please take some time to remember and mourn those who have lost their lives protecting our Capitol and our democracy. In memory,

Liz | | Liz Mathis is running to represent Iowa's 2nd Congressional District. To learn more, please visit [LizMathis.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40427213/324303215/-618171382?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTUxNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YzcxMTdlYi0yZDZmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3fpn905-xSaO0oAi_lmRJlXc_cebK8EhhvWkDE7PYV8=&emci=dbd5a90a-0f6f-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=6c7117eb-2d6f-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=6566505)

name: Madison Horn
subject: a-ha moment
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Oklahomans for Madison
body:
| Hey,

One year ago today, we all watched in shock as a violent attack took place at our U.S. Capitol in an attempt to undermine the results of our presidential election.

Look, I've dedicated my career to protecting our national security, researching why coordinated political violence happens and working to combat episodes just like this one.

Being a security expert and watching this moment unfold was a major call-to-action for me and led to my decision to challenge Lankford, whose rhetoric only sparked flames that day.

**Because Oklahomans — and our democracy — deserve better than someone who looks out for himself and his Party rather than the constituents he represents.**

I believe that, like Lincoln said in his famous address all those years ago, the government should be “of the people, by the people, and for the people.”

On the anniversary of January 6, 2021, I'm reflecting on how sacred and fragile our electoral process is. As we move forward, as one country, I am thankful for those brave enough to stand and act with integrity at all cost.

**United, we can protect our democracy and empower the people's will.**

The horrifying events of last January 6th are something we should never forget. That inciting moment for me as a candidate is one that should incite all of us to demand better from our leaders.

Now, let’s get to work!

Madison

clean_body: | Hey, One year ago today, we all watched in shock as a violent attack took place at our U.S. Capitol in an attempt to undermine the results of our presidential election. Look, I've dedicated my career to protecting our national security, researching why coordinated political violence happens and working to combat episodes just like this one. Being a security expert and watching this moment unfold was a major call-to-action for me and led to my decision to challenge Lankford, whose rhetoric only sparked flames that day. Because Oklahomans — and our democracy — deserve better than someone who looks out for himself and his Party rather than the constituents he represents. I believe that, like Lincoln said in his famous address all those years ago, the government should be “of the people, by the people, and for the people.” On the anniversary of January 6, 2021, I'm reflecting on how sacred and fragile our electoral process is. As we move forward, as one country, I am thankful for those brave enough to stand and act with integrity at all cost. United, we can protect our democracy and empower the people's will. The horrifying events of last January 6th are something we should never forget. That inciting moment for me as a candidate is one that should incite all of us to demand better from our leaders. Now, let’s get to work! Madison = | = | = Our country is facing major challenges that demand action from servant leaders to work together to build on America’s legacy. Madison is running for Senate to work towards the promise of the American dream and represent Oklahomans who have been left behind by self-serving politicians. name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: Trump continues to peddle dangerous misinformation
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
We must respond with the urgency necessary. That’s why I’m continuing my call for the Senate to immediately reform the filibuster, pass voting rights legislation, and protect our democracy.
#
Peter,
One year ago today, insurrectionists violently stormed the U.S. Capitol with the intent of overturning a free and fair election. Incited by Donald Trump, it was a planned attack against democracy.
When the House Floor was cleared on January 6th, about 30 of us were left behind, trapped in the gallery as the insurrectionists invaded. I remember fearing for my life and preparing for a fight as they pounded on the doors, only feet from where I hid under the seats. I am grateful that I reached safety later that day, but our democracy is far from safe.
Trump and his Republican allies continue to peddle dangerous misinformation about our elections. They continue to attack our democracy. And they continue to introduce anti-voting bills — including more than 400 nationwide last year. We must respond with the urgency necessary. That’s why I’m continuing my call for the Senate to immediately reform the filibuster, pass voting rights legislation, and protect our democracy.
[**Democrats have the power to secure free and fair elections in our country. Now we must do exactly that in the Senate. Can you join me in the fight to pass historic voting rights legislation through the Senate with a $3 contribution today? Our democracy is on the line.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/9344?refcode=em20220106-934&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=934%2E420207%2EsgTeKu)
**[Contribute](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/9344?refcode=em20220106-934&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=934%2E420207%2EsgTeKu)**
Trump, Josh Hawley, Ted Cruz, and other Republican lawmakers used their large platforms, falsehoods, and propaganda to help incite the insurrection. That’s why we must not forget what happened, why we must continue the investigation into January 6, and why we must hold everyone involved fully accountable.
McConnell and GOP legislators nationwide are trying to restrict voting access and specifically target people of color. At the same time, people are still spreading the Big Lie that the 2020 election was rigged. This is why we must respond quickly by changing the filibuster and immediately passing legislation to protect voting rights, free and fair elections, and our democracy.
[**If you stand with me today in this fight, please consider making a donation towards my continued work to pass voting rights and protect our democracy, Peter.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/9344?refcode=em20220106-934&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=934%2E420207%2EsgTeKu)
I know that if we keep up this work, we will preserve our democracy and justice will prevail.
In solidarity,
Pramila

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20220106-934-footer&t=22&refcode2=934_420207_sgTeKu&akid=934%2E420207%2EsgTeKu)**

name: Roy Cooper
subject: re: January 6th, 2021
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
body:
The lies and extremism that led to the January 6th insurrection and its dangerous aftermath have no place in the United States of America. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40427483/324304375/823540626?refcode=ea.0f383674-2f6f-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ms=ea.0f383674-2f6f-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZjM4MzY3NC0yZjZmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5fZAzBxne_cP7iPIG8-il9m8LXDTBBrvH_v8ATCP8kA=&emci=8ddffeb0-2c6f-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=0f383674-2f6f-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=1049176)
Peter, Today marks the one-year anniversary of one of America’s darkest moments: when armed insurrectionists launched a violent and deadly attack on the U.S. Capitol with the intent of halting the sworn duty of lawmakers to certify the 2020 presidential election. **Despite the existential threat it faced on January 6th, our democracy prevailed** — largely because of the bravery exhibited by the officers of the U.S. Capitol Police and other law enforcement officers. But we also know that those who wanted to topple our democracy haven’t given up, and they have moved their assault to state capitols and legislatures across the country. The lies and extremism that led to the January 6th insurrection and its dangerous aftermath have no place in the United States of America, and elected leaders must help lead the way in standing up for the truth, protecting our democracy, and making sure that it’s the vote of the people that decides all future elections. We must never forget what happened one year ago today, and we must recommit ourselves to the hope and promise of a democratic government. It is up to us to defend it. Thank you, Roy Cooper
* * *
[info@roycooper.com](mailto:info@roycooper.com) | [Privacy Policy](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40427484/324304376/2039383177?refcode=ea.0f383674-2f6f-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ms=ea.0f383674-2f6f-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZjM4MzY3NC0yZjZmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5fZAzBxne_cP7iPIG8-il9m8LXDTBBrvH_v8ATCP8kA=&emci=8ddffeb0-2c6f-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=0f383674-2f6f-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=1049176) Cooper for North Carolina

clean_body: Let’s start things off STRONG! | Authorized by Republican Headquarters Peter, As we start the new year, I’m urging you to accept my offer and join my exclusive Chairman’s Club. I’m opening the Chairman’s Club to new members in 2022, and it’s so very important to me for you to be on the official supporters list. So if you have been thinking of joining, now is the time. | Official Chairman’s Club Invitation EMAIL: SUPPORTER ID: #05966106 DEADLINE: 11:59 PM TONIGHT SUGGESTED GIFT: $10 or more | | | | | | I’m looking forward to seeing you on the list, Peter. Michael Whatley Chairman, North Carolina Republican Party
