| | Dear Friend,
In this time of uncertainty and disruption, we at Hillsdale College aim to find ways to continue doing what we love—teaching the things that will perpetuate civil and religious liberty in America.
Because one of the best things to know is the story of our nation, we have organized a special eight-week study group of one of our most popular online courses, “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope.” In this course, historian Wilfred M. McClay examines the story of America as a land of hope, founded on high principles. And like all of Hillsdale’s online courses, it is offered free of charge.
Those who enroll in this special study group will receive a syllabus that organizes the course into 24 lessons over eight weeks. They will also have the chance to engage with fellow students on a private discussion board to foster the true spirit of a “college” as a means to build friendships by learning together. Students in this study group will also receive exclusive access to a livestream Q & A with Dr. McClay.
This free special study group begins on Tuesday, January 10. To secure your spot today, click on the link below.
**[https://online.hillsdale.edu/study-group/the-great-american-story](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=7a1877a48f604bca84f156f0b5513982&_m=ec92ab6698d2460c9d03582f75db932d&_e=1YoQKl3csSkMfW1AN0ZlbzcDVzD4frgK5J5I10SVap7WIEtoGoaduz8wFpHdPFtlA2DECe_r6Dq1dOpqdYbSSUB3nq3Z6xWFOsHvMNGfm5u7_UjEti_xsqNIjuNIwpQbvMl2qIadT1JT_qN1ygPTdHVhuxejZwt7KL10TrWYQoY-dNvXGUb7oLday7NTW26gAKmWBdviKaAhxUb6O-xbEKf4b6glYS1EZO04rRZ0NBi3ixALbik2PZIvwuzYXv-4eVcCRt9GplCb9BsUwRkMSDjwQNZ8aUqxrFSj2lvHMohDpSknmprbcic_Yq_PKYhE2x0ul3Npqog_saRfQiJgpyyaye6Qp0-I0WTxZ4VbIOU5kzpxB1jF4Uy6e3X3nvLOdlib4Rwvi8Qp1ZJAnPK0bpQeSXOlGGcpwuSPIerGrb6A54xqn0toQQrSBv87zDHCxp7RRZwacvga33bk_NhGVp3PvVfyniyGEjfNqwa82e8%3D)**
Warmest regards,
Kyle Murnen, '09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College

body:
Peter, one year ago today... thousands of America-First Patriots traveled to the Swamp in an effort to peacefully protest the results of the 2020
| [ ](https://em.carraforcongress.com/e3t/Btc/W3+113/d2rBZm04/VV_1-b76bKv0N745Sj3WqtBfW1WCq9G4C_h3lN4313HX3lLBmV1-WJV7CgVzNW49jlLy138YdLW3fKfFs2Mgj22W3ynxdJ2mMSHvW5BdzG77F2MLGW2-C24t4HX28nVF2J6q74YNX4W434qwY4t2QWpV-RCnS8wrVsxW6S6YMy7qdZb4V9Lfy33xLhRhW1r01LP8Kh9pnW6-8yyb1zZmTcVvry6-7_fBRHW1wX87r7Nm2XtW5m_C1P3864xtW7Xkv4x93lDybW7qnvjY3HPmJ9W5vlx_72g41-JW7ztqzS9fwYQ2W4hT48k8_9kHSW85q60f4KZGFFW4C5wY25tBwfp39MY1)

Peter, One year ago today... thousands of America-First Patriots traveled to the Swamp in an effort to peacefully protest the results of the 2020 election. They have since been condemned by the fake news media and criticized by the radical Democrats and spineless RINOs in Congress. Even worse... HUNDREDS of American citizens are currently being imprisoned without trial. January 6th was a Deep State scam, ridiculously overblown, and relentlessly propagandized by the corporate media, aided and abetted by Big Tech and the radical left... Anyone who stole something, damaged something, or committed unprovoked violence should be reasonably prosecuted, however, anyone else deserves their day in court and those who are innocent should be released IMMEDIATELY! These individuals are being held as political prisoners against their will, while the federal government refuses to recognize their Constitutional rights... As a Donald J. Trump-endorsed, America-First conservative, I promise that fighting to free these Americans who are being prosecuted for exercising their rights will be one of the first things I do once elected to Congress. Nancy Pelosi and her puppets want you to think that our supporters are criminals. They want to lock them up and throw away the key! We will not cower to anymore of their baseless threats. [We the people must take a stand before it's too late. Click here to make a donation to my campaign today if you agree that these political prisoners should be free >>>](https://em.carraforcongress.com/e3t/Btc/W3+113/d2rBZm04/VV_1-b76bKv0N745Sj3WqtBfW1WCq9G4C_h3lN4313HX3lLBmV1-WJV7CgJgtW3Pqdvc8hcRwKW40KL4J6h9zZZW5QXlMs4tXRjkW861ccv1y1kTjW5clJ4P7Yt--7W7_Qjzr7R6xBYW5hSDyC4sjR8kN60XxcTRX_6DW3HjwPB1tSZ3ZW2LlLsT3Hbp74W5lkFqV4vTXDkW241GjZ1sH8vtW4n3dx61XJqwRW6dMnf28TC6C5W2R4Y2v5-KVd0W5c4f164KRtmVVHlXFP2JKJ26W2yXVmM136PFqW91QJRD73p_XbN1FXTxpC-x-1W48mnRy8PXMFVN5DGwVW8KDDT3fXz1) LET'S GO BRANDON!

name: Erica Smith
subject: The insurrection
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY Erica Smith for US Senate 2022
body:
[1]Erica Smith

Last year on January 6th, 2021, I was teaching my students, trying to
distract them from the fact that an angry mob was invading the halls of
Congress.

For many of my Black and brown students, the incident was especially
traumatic after what we had watched unfold that summer.

On the other hand, here’s what my Republican opponent, Sandy Smith, was
doing:

[ https://act.ericaforus.com/go/32965?t=1001&akid=748%2E3698%2EDFqCvC ][IMG]

On January 6th, Sandy Smith was at the capitol — proudly showing her
support for Donald Trump, supporting the violence, and participating in
the intimidation.

[ https://act.ericaforus.com/go/32965?t=1002&akid=748%2E3698%2EDFqCvC ]Sandy Smith is an insurrectionist — and that’s just the start. Can you
make a contribution of $5 or more to our campaign today to
help us defeat Sandy Smith and make sure the NC-02 House seat stays blue?

[ https://act.ericaforus.com/go/32971?refcode=em20220106-748&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=748%2E3698%2EDFqCvC ]Donate $5

Here’s more about what we’re up against. Sandy Smith:

* Has already been endorsed by far-right Republicans including Madison
Cawthorn, Paul Gosar, and General Michael Flynn.
* Calls me a “communist” for my commitment to progressive policies that
will support and uplift working people in North Carolina and beyond.
* Opposes both a minimum wage increase and universal healthcare.
* Has #ProTrump #ProWall and #MAGA in her Twitter bio.

It’s absolutely critical that we defeat Sandy Smith and protect this
proudly Democratic district from Republican seat-stealing attempts. If
Sandy Smith wins this seat she would be an immediate threat to our
razor-thin Democratic majority in the House.

But we have an even bigger plan for 2022 that Sandy Smith just can’t
replicate. I know that fighting this race the right way and reaching out
to voters in every community across North Carolina, refusing fossil fuel
and corporate PAC money, and supporting policies — like universal
broadband, universal healthcare, reproductive rights, and bold climate
action — are the only way to win. [ https://act.ericaforus.com/go/32965?t=1022&akid=748%2E3698%2EDFqCvC ]Can you help me get there by
donating $5 today? Every bit helps.

In solidarity,

Erica

Contribute to Erica's campaign:https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-emails?refcode=em20220106-748-footer&t=1023&refcode2=748_3698_DFqCvC&akid=748%2E3698%2EDFqCvC

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Erica for Us, P.O. Box 1236, Gaston, NC 27832.

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.ericaforus.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=748%2E3698%2EDFqCvC

name: Tim Ryan
subject: An attack on our democracy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/46?t=1001&akid=1949%2E3611125%2ElfHwFe ][IMG]

Folks,

One year ago today we survived a horrific attack on our democracy.

GOP extremists, including several of my Republican colleagues, incited the
worst attack on our nation’s capital in over a hundred years. Their
disregard for the rule of law wasn’t just a slap in the face to everything
we value as Americans—it directly endangered the police, staffers, and
workers who keep the U.S. Capitol running.

I’m still mad as hell, folks. The reality is that our democracy is still
under attack.

All of my GOP opponents are desperate for Trump’s endorsement and continue
to push his lie that the 2020 election was stolen. Every single one of
them is dangerous—we can't let them anywhere near the Senate.

Folks, the truth is we need to expand the Senate majority to safeguard
voting rights and protect our democracy. And that starts by winning in
Ohio.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6411?t=1007&akid=1949%2E3611125%2ElfHwFe ]As your next Senator, I will do everything in my power to uphold the
Constitution—no matter what. Will you make a contribution to join me in
this fight?

In solidarity,

Tim

name: Jerry Dickinson
subject: What happened at the Capitol last year was not random
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Dickinson for Congress Committee
body:
| | |
---
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40427636/324305249/-632576040?utm_source=headerlogo&utm_medium=email&refcode=em_20220106-pet-JD-insurrectionann-all&ms=em_20220106-pet-JD-insurrectionann-all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDAwMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhODY4ZTA0NC0zMTZmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=833tqn0rR5W_TIoxH4ZqPgBh1kPmTCsGo2-Xf3iT5Lc=&emci=84eb4a86-0d6f-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=a868e044-316f-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=25561085)
---
| Like so many, on this day last year, I stood in complete shock and disbelief as an extremist right-wing mob stormed our nation's capital. Friend, Like so many, on this day last year, I stood in complete shock and disbelief as an extremist right-wing mob—encouraged and mobilized by President Trump—stormed our nation's capital in an attempt to subvert our democracy. Thanks to the heroism of the Capitol Police and DC Metro Police, their efforts failed. But the insurrection of January 6, 2021 serves as a poignant reminder of the fragility of our democracy, and why we must fight like hell to preserve it. **What happened at the Capitol last year was not random—it was the direct result of a persistent and deliberate campaign by Republicans to delegitimize our electoral system.** The falsehoods of electoral fraud continue to spread as Republican-controlled state legislatures across the country ramp up voter suppression efforts. The calls to overturn free and fair elections, the rampant voter suppression efforts by conservatives, and the blatant gerrymandering we’ve seen for years are all attacks on our Constitution. name: David Palmer
subject: A leadership crisis
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Palmer for Illinois
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40427930/324306574/312490568?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDg2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxODU1YmIyZi0zMzZmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=K9qIUQrMuR_Fh_mCmClVBKc4e9NoEhIJ8nNPJYZIQyA=) | Peter, One year ago, our country faced one of the greatest challenges it has ever seen. A violent, armed mob stormed the very heart of our Democracy. And it was in the name of overturning the will of the people. **Those who attacked the Capitol that day were trying to deny you and me our sacred right to vote and choose our leaders. Thankfully, they didn’t succeed.** On January 6, 2021, there were failures at all levels of our government. But, there were also incredible shows of leadership and bravery from everyday people. People like Officer Goodman who protected our elected officials from the mob. The Capitol and Metropolitan Police who, under incredible circumstances protected the bastion of peace and democracy that is the Capitol building. The custodial staff that made quick work of cleaning up the carnage of the insurrectionists so that Congress could soldier on and fulfill their duty that night. Members of Congress who helped and kept each other safe, without regard for political party. These examples are just a few of many from that day that we should be proud of. But, as we continue to see domestic extremism continue to grow and metastasize across the country, we need strong leaders to bring us through these challenges. **I got into this race to do just that. To be a force for good. To live the tenets of our Constitution. To serve my neighbors.** On this solemn anniversary, I ask that you stand with me in prayer for all those who experienced the horror of that day first hand. **I also ask you to stand with me in prayer for our great Democracy - may its people make it stronger each day in spite of our differences.** Thank you, David Palmer
---

name: Maggie Toulouse Oliver
subject: It almost happened.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Maggie, Robert Lara Treasurer
body:
We are very lucky January 6 didn’t go the other way.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40428015/324307236/1198618133?refcode=EM_C_220106Jan6_H_MTO_90DO_6_NG_N_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZjkyYzlhMC0zMzZmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9jqmCLrkK99pefOesQ3ZNHMCEtSo18d-ZQuC4x9xzcU=&emci=f0ed721a-bb6d-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=4f92c9a0-336f-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=3583156)
Team,

January 6 was a deliberate insurrection. Trump's “Big Lie” not only undermines our elections and threatens our democracy, but it also resulted in police officers, sworn to protect our lives, losing their own.

As the year has unfolded, we’ve discovered through the bipartisan investigation in the U.S. House that Trump and his enablers were even more involved in the insurrection than he let the American people believe.

**Make no mistake: these violent rioters didn't act at random. This was a deliberate attack, spurred on by Trump himself when the ex-president, in a speech full of baseless claims of election fraud, intentionally inflamed a group of extremist followers moments before the attacks.**

Trump's baseless conspiracy theories and flagrant disregard for the American people continue to undermine our democracy and bring the integrity of our election system into question. **The violent January 6 riots were a frightening glimpse of how dangerous Trump's Big Lie can be when misinformation runs rampant.

As Secretary of State of New Mexico, that is precisely why I am fighting so hard for your right to vote. I'm proud that our state has been a proven leader in pro-democracy practices. I remain committed to safeguarding our elections and ensuring that every New Mexican has equal access to the ballot box.**

Thanks for holding up our democracy with me,

Maggie
_New Mexico Secretary of State_

clean_body: We are very lucky January 6 didn’t go the other way. Team, January 6 was a deliberate insurrection. Trump's “Big Lie” not only undermines our elections and threatens our democracy, but it also resulted in police officers, sworn to protect our lives, losing their own. As the year has unfolded, we’ve discovered through the bipartisan investigation in the U.S. House that Trump and his enablers were even more involved in the insurrection than he let the American people believe. Make no mistake: these violent rioters didn't act at random. This was a deliberate attack, spurred on by Trump himself when the ex-president, in a speech full of baseless claims of election fraud, intentionally inflamed a group of extremist followers moments before the attacks. Trump's baseless conspiracy theories and flagrant disregard for the American people continue to undermine our democracy and bring the integrity of our election system into question. The violent January 6 riots were a frightening glimpse of how dangerous Trump's Big Lie can be when misinformation runs rampant. As Secretary of State of New Mexico, that is precisely why I am fighting so hard for your right to vote. I'm proud that our state has been a proven leader in pro-democracy practices. I remain committed to safeguarding our elections and ensuring that every New Mexican has equal access to the ballot box. Thanks for holding up our democracy with me, Maggie New Mexico Secretary of State Maggie Toulouse Oliver serves the state of New Mexico as Secretary of State, where she is dedicated to fighting for clean and fair elections devoid of dark money and outside influence. She's up for re-election in 2022, and we need to start building our grassroots movement to keep her seat safe. Help Maggie protect our elections system and create a stronger democracy! ___ Friends of Maggie PO Box 473 Albuquerque, NM 87103 United States | Paid for by Friends of Maggie, Robert Lara Treasurer. body:
Maryland is at risk of having this dangerous insurrectionist as its leader.

| Peter, today marks one year since one of the darkest days in our nation’s history. A day when a violent mob bearing white supremacist symbols struck at the heart of our democracy.

One year later, this day is a reminder of a defining struggle throughout our nation’s history: **a struggle between those who stoke fear and hate in order to hold power, and those of us fighting for equality and justice.**

That fight for justice is far from over, and the stakes have never been higher as we consider the road ahead in this gubernatorial election. **Not only did one of our extremist Republican opponents attend the Trump rally that led to the deadly Capitol riot on January 6th, but he even arranged buses for the insurrectionists.**

And when the elected officials at the Capitol were at risk of being overtaken by an armed mob, and lives were being taken, Dan Cox tweeted that Vice President Mike Pence was a “traitor.”
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40428077/324307359/-1578209642?refcode=BLU-KING-20220106-1-EM&&&&amount=25&refcode2=5492c9a0-336f-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NDkyYzlhMC0zMzZmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8OK8G_N_FM-SqlE3nmjZXx3u4tKamH_DDyXN8Ws1J_Y=)
**Maryland is at risk of having this dangerous insurrectionist as its leader. We need to do everything we can to defend our democracy and quell destructive QAnon conspiracies, not elect the very people promoting misinformation and threatening our democratic way of life.**

On the first anniversary of this horrific event, I invite you all to take a moment to think about the work that lies ahead. I'm still faithful that, together, we can build a brighter future for our nation where everyone has the opportunity to thrive — **that's what our movement is all about.**

In solidarity,

John King

| | One year ago today, we witnessed the most horrific attack on our government and democracy in recent history. Shocked, afraid, saddened and angry, we saw fellow Americans storm the Capitol Building and attack Congress. I will not mince words- THIS WAS NOT A PROTEST, THIS WAS A MOB! Inflamed and incensed by an already impeached President and directed to Congress for the sole purpose of keeping them from performing their elected duties. They were not there to "voice their feelings".They were not there "to petition the Government for a redress of grievances".They were not there to "witness the next step in a peaceful transfer of power.THEY WERE THERE TO BLOCK DEMOCRACY!
---
| | | [**Donate**](https://www.brenthennrich.com/so/5fNudo16w/c?w=yuD150Fv-SFPSuD1IODE-4VIVQISNmpzHrWuaFpF7eM.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL2JyZW50MjAyMj9yZWZjb2RlPWphbjZ0aCZhbW91bnQ9MTAwIiwiciI6IjRhMGI2OGMyLTE1YWUtNGJhZS1jODk3LWZiOGM2ODg1MjE4MyIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6ImU0Njk0MTZhLTFhZjEtNDQzNi04OWYwLWQ5MzIyMzEzZGQxYSJ9)
---
| | All this chaos happened because a malignant narcissist with a fragile ego was elected to the highest office in the land; a narcissist that could not accept an objective defeat.
So where are we now? One year later and we still see the same dangerous dogma and actions not only endorsed but promoted;promoted by sitting members of Congress, Political Candidates and Local Officials across the Nation We still see the perpetuation of The Big Lie, which began before a single vote was cast in 2020; The Big Lie that the election was "stolen" NO ONE STOLE THIS ELECTION, BUT ON THEY TRIED ON JANUARY 6TH, 2021 As you read this, Republican-led state legislatures and governors are tearing apart the fabric of voting rights. They are arbitrarily closing polling locations, with absurd rationale of making voting easier better- it is extremely clear intention of doing the opposite.
They are adding complicated, unnecessary steps to the requirements for voter registration, absentee/mail-in voting, and the ballots themselves. They are insisting on punitive restrictions on things as basic as distributing bottled water to a voter waiting in a long line; a line which these Republican legislatures are responsible for due to their baffling push to reduce the number of polling locations.
They are attacking early voting and voting on Sundays, with the express purpose of cutting out voters or color or voters who cannot afford to take time off to vote on Election Day.
These legislatures have gerrymandered new, post Census district maps; intentionally creating carved out Republican districts, to dilute the power of Democrat voters ensuring not just unrealistic majorities in the legislature but seeking the same in Congress.
---
| | | [**Donate**](https://www.brenthennrich.com/so/5fNudo16w/c?w=vsWVY6UWzmp7xwcMnVtPZ2VFujOLjwi5ZHQv-Seffgw.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL2JyZW50MjAyMj9yZWZjb2RlPWphbjZ0aCZhbW91bnQ9MTAwIiwiciI6IjJkNmJlYmI0LTEyMTEtNDZhMy1lOGM4LTYxMjM1YzhkMDgwMSIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6ImU0Njk0MTZhLTFhZjEtNDQzNi04OWYwLWQ5MzIyMzEzZGQxYSJ9)
---
| | Perhaps the most disturbing laws these Republican-led legislatures are enacting would allow them to:- Fire local election officials at will;- Strip power from those who oversee elections; and- Throw out election results they do not like and send their own delegates to cast votes for their preferred presidential candidate. All the while, the former (twice-impeached) President and his supporters continue to proclaim with any opportunity they get. (We’re looking at you, Joe Kent) If you believe we barely escaped a catastrophic disaster on January 6, 2021, and will likely face another attempt of the same, then I need your help. I need your support. I need your influence on your friends and family. Finally, I need your donations to keep this campaign going and growing. Help me protect democracy.
---
| | | [**Donate**](https://www.brenthennrich.com/so/5fNudo16w/c?w=BNqdlIBZO026mCuhJSR7yIOkSZ-guaOBebv1AjDSjVY.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL2JyZW50MjAyMj9yZWZjb2RlPWphbjZ0aCZhbW91bnQ9MTAwIiwiciI6IjA1NzE3ODFlLWU4ZDgtNDdmNC0xYWE4LWM2ZTZmNGM3NjM1NyIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6ImU0Njk0MTZhLTFhZjEtNDQzNi04OWYwLWQ5MzIyMzEzZGQxYSJ9)

clean_body: One year ago today, we witnessed the most horrific attack on our government and democracy in recent history. Shocked, afraid, saddened and a | | Can't see this message? | | | | | REMEMBER JAN 6, 2021 AS IT WAS | | | | | | | One year ago today, we witnessed the most horrific attack on our government and democracy in recent history. Shocked, afraid, saddened and angry, we saw fellow Americans storm the Capitol Building and attack Congress. I will not mince words- THIS WAS NOT A PROTEST, THIS WAS A MOB! Inflamed and incensed by an already impeached President and directed to Congress for the sole purpose of keeping them from performing their elected duties. They were not there to "voice their feelings".They were not there "to petition the Government for a redress of grievances".They were not there to "witness the next step in a peaceful transfer of power.THEY WERE THERE TO BLOCK DEMOCRACY! | | | | | All this chaos happened because a malignant narcissist with a fragile ego was elected to the highest office in the land; a narcissist that could not accept an objective defeat. So where are we now? One year later and we still see the same dangerous dogma and actions not only endorsed but promoted;promoted by sitting members of Congress, Political Candidates and Local Officials across the Nation We still see the perpetuation of The Big Lie, which began before a single vote was cast in 2020; The Big Lie that the election was "stolen" NO ONE STOLE THIS ELECTION, BUT ON THEY TRIED ON JANUARY 6TH, 2021 As you read this, Republican-led state legislatures and governors are tearing apart the fabric of voting rights. They are arbitrarily closing polling locations, with absurd rationale of making voting easier better- it is extremely clear intention of doing the opposite. They are adding complicated, unnecessary steps to the requirements for voter registration, absentee/mail-in voting, and the ballots themselves. They are insisting on punitive restrictions on things as basic as distributing bottled water to a voter waiting in a long line; a line which these Republican legislatures are responsible for due to their baffling push to reduce the number of polling locations. They are attacking early voting and voting on Sundays, with the express purpose of cutting out voters or color or voters who cannot afford to take time off to vote on Election Day. These legislatures have gerrymandered new, post Census district maps; intentionally creating carved out Republican districts, to dilute the power of Democrat voters ensuring not just unrealistic majorities in the legislature but seeking the same in Congress. | | | | | Perhaps the most disturbing laws these Republican-led legislatures are enacting would allow them to:- Fire local election officials at will;- Strip power from those who oversee elections; and- Throw out election results they do not like and send their own delegates to cast votes for their preferred presidential candidate. All the while, the former (twice-impeached) President and his supporters continue to proclaim with any opportunity they get. (We’re looking at you, Joe Kent) If you believe we barely escaped a catastrophic disaster on January 6, 2021, and will likely face another attempt of the same, then I need your help. I need your support. I need your influence on your friends and family. Finally, I need your donations to keep this campaign going and growing. 2. In some states, you can win an election with a plurality like 49%. But in Georgia, we must get a majority of the votes to win, so we still have hard work to do to get over 50%.
3. We are taking nothing for granted. We feel the momentum building for our campaign, but we know it will take an incredible amount of sweat equity to win this race.

While this is fantastic news, there are some important points to consider: 1. This poll shows the strength of the campaign we're building, but we're still more than 10 months away from Election Day. A lot can - and will - happen between now and November 8. 2. In some states, you can win an election with a plurality like 49%. But in Georgia, we must get a majority of the votes to win, so we still have hard work to do to get over 50%. 3. We are taking nothing for granted. We feel the momentum building for our campaign, but we know it will take an incredible amount of sweat equity to win this race. We need 500 donations before midnight tonight to keep pace with this week's goal. If polls are this tight ten months out from Election Day, then we fully expect this race is going to be a grueling fight to the finish. Even NBC News, which is not known for their fair and balanced reporting, acknowledges that this is going to be one of the MOST COMPETITIVE RACES IN THE NATION. We've already seen the Democrats use this poll to motivate their supporters and raise more money, so there is no time to waste. Please donate $3 or more to our campaign right now. Thank you for your support, Herschel Walker Republican Candidate for Senate | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but ._

name: Martin Heinrich
subject: A year ago today
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40428486/324309187/-272948131?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZTdmNDA1ZC0zNTZmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eCL_bbI-chsYbumno7Ky_QIs_ub-Oh2TSiQjs892fTI=&emci=08e34b46-1a6f-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=ae7f405d-356f-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=252045)
---
Friends, I was at the U.S. Capitol a year ago today — when Donald Trump’s lies and fraudulent claims about the election incited a violent insurrection. Trump and the insurrectionists’ attack on our democracy shook me — and people across the country and even the world. Multiple people died or took their own lives as a result of that horrific day, including brave Capitol Police officers. Their loved ones and fellow Americans continue to grieve. **But hate did not win that day, and our democracy continued on.** As soon as it was safe, my colleagues and I returned to the Senate floor to certify the undeniable results of the election — Joe Biden was going to be the next President of the United States. In the year since, we have seen some Republicans downplay the events of that violent day in our nation’s history. We’ve watched as Republican-led legislatures across the country have passed law after law to undermine our democracy and the constitutional right to vote. And we’ve seen Senate Republicans exploit the filibuster to block critical voting rights legislation. **But democracy prevailed last January 6th and it will prevail again.** I won’t stop fighting to hold those responsible for this violence accountable, protect and expand voting rights, and make sure a horrific day like this never happens again. Thank you. — Martin
---
| Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate
---
Senator Martin Heinrich is committed to helping New Mexico become a leader in defense, tech, and energy with opportunities in every corner. name: Derek Marshall
subject: It’s our duty to keep democracy alive
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Derek Marshall for Congress
body:
Peter,
Exactly one year ago, our country–and allies across the world–watched in horror as violent, extreme alt-right members violently seized the United States Capitol and carried out an insurrection against our government. At times, it is still hard to believe that this is our reality. **A world where the last President encouraged a riot against our Capitol, endangering the lives of legislators.** A world where hundreds of sitting Republican Members of Congress voted to overturn the certification of the Presidential election results. **A world where the peaceful transition of power so crucial to our democracy is under serious threat. **
Make no mistake, loyal Trump supporters across the nation still believe that President Biden actually “stole” the Presidential election, that Trump is the true President.**The absurdity of their beliefs is matched only by the strength of their conviction, a reality which should scare us all.** Many of these people consider the insurrection a rightful action to take against a corrupt government, instead of a shameless attempt to violently subvert American democracy.
**Perhaps most concerningly, Republican leadership have not denounced these events, but in fact voted in large numbers to ignore and dismiss attempts to investigate this attack.** My opponent, Jay Obernolte, first voted against the certification of the 2020 Presidential election. Then, he voted against the creation of the commission to review and investigate the events of Jan 6th.
**An elected official who is comfortable normalizing extreme threats to American democracy does not deserve to represent California’s diverse 23rd Congressional District.** My race is about challenging the prejudice and corrupt leadership of Republicans like Obernolte who are more interested in protecting their disgraced President than addressing the needs of their constituents.
**I will always believe in the power that individuals have to strengthen and protect our democracy.** We can and should run for office, host moral protests, join Democratic clubs, and truly participate in our democracy. It is only by building people power and holding our elected officials accountable that we will win the long battle against authoritarianism.**Here’s to a better future. **
In solidarity,
**Derek Marshall**
Candidate for U.S. Congress, CA-23

name: John Kasich
subject: Reflecting on January 6, 2021
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kasich for America, not authorized by any
body:
I recorded a short video message for you to share some of my thoughts about what this means for America. [](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=dc4073b4703b4e7f9eb03bc47ea517c3&_e=ZcIrBcosywnvPJKzYA_OefP4F1WEr960JErTbOLcyAAMqfXT6k3F8dz6P5ZUWJOqHmodJ3TbcsaC0rdMakbQ2gDX7KDm38O_R9Sjuz5TOOIqGrycfa0dBRF4NVgZ7SrSXRBrZz3092cSdT5VGTxBvKXBh94l9mRgwrpyCEuKQEUip19gmSJduKowSZrjTEOjh1FjOsNKTU8uuzUh2t_BvzWFY9xvWehW8xwHiXSJlzeZSuCUHox_aLglWlXDnm_hH_-LeygxJ_P2mA4ZxO2Oyg%3D%3D) Peter - January 6, 2021 was a dark day for America - perhaps one of the worst in our nation's history. We watched in horror and disbelief as an angry mob, fueled by our President, stormed the U.S. Capitol building, threatening the lives of our elected officials, law enforcement and trying to stop the certification of a legitimate election. Regardless of your politics, these are the facts and it was a sad day that we will remember for the rest of our lives. I recorded a short video message for you below to share some of my thoughts about what this means for America: [ | | |
---|---|--- ](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=dc4073b4703b4e7f9eb03bc47ea517c3&_e=ZcIrBcosywnvPJKzYA_OeWwN03S35sCUQzcdwHoF6ZV_5Bu9oesEm3XNWlPFtUCgiRuKncqGG8X4puGFHPms-ewtqUjvuenrMHXcwT6avcqZlsM2WTDbSvcJoyEulcvj1PBA9EmNdjlF9A_1MWRmJH59cCnIMgtXTgDwj38c4V58n0i400DyQK2MhCrMMhLeWov-TGs_PgECmadPAPk3IjnxGKi61Idrbcq5LUvNRmxg-rToPUgI6r_I_NmWhTu_mc2oozcSMcYsdn_5TcqUwQ%3D%3D)

clean_body: I recorded a short video message for you to share some of my thoughts about what this means for America. Peter - January 6, 2021 was a dark day for America - perhaps one of the worst in our nation's history. We watched in horror and disbelief as an angry mob, fueled by our President, stormed the U.S. Capitol building, threatening the lives of our elected officials, law enforcement and trying to stop the certification of a legitimate election. Regardless of your politics, these are the facts and it was a sad day that we will remember for the rest of our lives. I recorded a short video message for you below to share some of my thoughts about what this means for America: If you're interested, I also had several conversations about this historical moment and how we can heal our country. You can watch those here: The road won't be easy, but I believe that we will get through this and our country will be stronger in the end. It's up to each of us to resist those who seek to mislead or divide us. We can make a difference and I know that you feel the same way. Thank you for all that you're doing to help save America! -John Paid for by Kasich for America, not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.JohnKasich.com

Today is the first anniversary of the January 6 attack on our Capitol — and our democracy. It’s certainly an emotional day, and my heart breaks for those who continue to heal from the emotional and physical scars inflicted by the violence one year ago.

name: Josh Harder
subject: My thoughts on January 6
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Harder for Congress
body:
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/hjHSZt37_bQo_cKNwq5yXK4ludiagidujI-0HobIAyY=/pIf6mpyCnvVaVaEnfcqNN7ruve-7TciEQLK94i-E74c=?refcode=E13324-20220106-Jan62021-header-GOP-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=22) | Hi Peter, One year ago, a mob of extremists stormed the Capitol hoping to overturn our democratic process. They erected gallows, attacked Capitol Police officers, and chanted "Hang Mike Pence" as they searched the halls for Members of Congress. A few hours later I walked down those hallways to vote to certify the election. I saw with my own eyes the shattered glass and exhausted Capitol Police officers who had spent the day keeping me, my team and our colleagues safe. I didn't know then that we'd go on to lose multiple officers to the wounds and trauma of that day. It still hurts to think about it. And all of this occurred because Donald Trump's ego decided the Big Lie was more important than our democracy. But he didn't do this alone. 147 Republican Members of Congress went right along with his plan, voting against certifying the election while being cheered on by far-right extremists. And here's the scariest thing - in the year since January 6th, 2021, that group of extremists has only gained more traction and support around the country. There are a record number of QAnon supporters running for office, and conspiracy theories are multiplying at an even faster rate. The extremists are getting savvier, and it's working. I had no idea when I ran in 2018 that my time would be spent defending our democracy from misinformation and hatred, but we find ourselves in incredibly challenging times. I write this recognizing I stand on an important precipice - my job is to fight for our ideals and make sure we do not hand control of Congress over to these extremists. On this tragic one-year anniversary, I have never been more motivated to do that job. Today my team and I will be taking some time to reflect on last year's attack. And we'll also take the time to be incredibly grateful we get to do this important work. Thank you for giving us the opportunity to hold this seat and this great responsibility. Please stay safe and healthy. Josh Harder
---
* * *

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/hjHSZt37_bQo_cKNwq5yXK4ludiagidujI-0HobIAyY=/2lXLsxdSZU0x-NLcV2QriObScdGONDyxVSY6PoYh428=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/hjHSZt37_bQo_cKNwq5yXK4ludiagidujI-0HobIAyY=/E7pC1Q4-6O2RG3Ndx4m5xO9ZMQAJEMkzLIRJsUdfWQc=)

name: Matt Castelli
subject: upholding our democracy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Castelli for Congress
body:
| Folks,

16 years ago, I took an oath to support and defend our Constitution against all enemies, foreign and domestic — the same oath each member of Congress takes as they’re sworn into office.

But on January 6th, 2021, Elise Stefanik violated her oath and has continued to do so since then. After she promoted the same “Big Lie” falsehoods that she was fed by Trump’s inner circle, insurrectionists stormed our nation’s Capitol in an attempt to overturn the 2020 election. Instead of standing with her colleagues and restoring faith in our democracy after the attack, Elise Stefanik still voted to block the certification of the 2020 election.

**[That’s why I’m asking you to add your name now and join me in holding those who incited the insurrection accountable for their actions. We need to defend our democracy and prevent events like this from ever happening again.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40428680/324310569/410997701?refcode=MC_EM_PT_3MO_220105_1_1&refcode2=1614b224-386f-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNjE0YjIyNC0zODZmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tgFDFScbeWhh7rW8Ov8tywLNW69l9gkxm5-sQoJS4aU=&emci=665ef3d5-376f-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=1614b224-386f-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=15140246)**

Actions must have consequences and those who acted in the insurrection and those who helped to incite violence must be held accountable.

This was not just a violent attack upon Congress, it was an attack on our democracy, an attack on all of us — and Elise Stefanik has tried to thwart Congress’ attempt to investigate the actions of January 6th to bring those responsible to justice.

**[It’s time we had a leader that puts country before party. Please add your name to hold Elise Stefanik and her colleagues accountable for their actions!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40428687/324310573/410997701?refcode=MC_EM_PT_3MO_220105_1_1&refcode2=1614b224-386f-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNjE0YjIyNC0zODZmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tgFDFScbeWhh7rW8Ov8tywLNW69l9gkxm5-sQoJS4aU=&emci=665ef3d5-376f-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=1614b224-386f-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=15140246)**

After she promoted the same “Big Lie” falsehoods that she was fed by Trump’s inner circle, insurrectionists stormed our nation’s Capitol in an attempt to overturn the 2020 election. name: Personal Note for You (via DCCC)
subject: as of 10am:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc
body:
| | | It's the one-year anniversary of one of the darkest days in our democracy's history.

In a seditious act of terrorism, Donald Trump and his Republicans incited a white supremacist mob to storm our Capitol.

It was despicable to watch.

**But our House Democrats knew Trump must be held accountable for his actions -- so they made sure he 'd go down in history as the only president to be impeached _TWICE._**

****[That moment, and everything that's happened since, have shown just how critical our Majority is - and how important it is that we defend it with everything we have.](https://links.e.dccc.)****

But our fight is far from over.

GOP Leader Kevin McCarthy - the man fighting to replace Nancy Pelosi as Speaker - and his House Republicans have made it clear their true loyalty lies with Donald Trump, not with our democracy.

So if we want to safeguard our democratic institutions and hold insurrectionist Republicans accountable, we MUST protect our Democratic House Majority.

**That 's why we're rushing to you with an urgent request straight from Democratic HQ:**

****[On this one-year anniversary of the January 6 insurrection, can we count on your support to defend our House Majority and prevent these dangerous Republicans from barging back into power?](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/aRwEBe~mEqB-)****
| | _If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

Our success relies on grassroots supporters like you. 99% of our contributions come from grassroots donations, with an average gift of $19. name: ICYMI News
subject: Victor Davis Hanson on DVD
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re lo
| _Sponsored message_ |
---|---|---
This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z31itvmsfsdhch4d8f7kkvp9sq4bappsvbbpiong_rp22sh2s8i66ob4clg62or2c1h2bs) Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z4kt9ksi9diafjasmnmv63g8a61euqrci5sc12j8_rp22sh2s8i66ob4clg62or2c1h2bs) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “**The Second World Wars** ” on DVD: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zg7kndne3oa90j9vapgmh0at85u6hkl1orac44k0_rp22sh2s8i66ob4clg62or2c1h2bs)** Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College

name: Tom Perez
subject: January 6th
body:
One year ago, our democracy suffered a physical attack unlike any we have ever seen. Violent insurrectionists, incited by the former President of the United States, fought to overturn the will of the People.
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40428886/324311470/-999108642?refcode=bpi-email-LaunchEmaillogo&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2N2Y2YWU5MC0zOTZmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=K1UBnGbipw3sCIM8mybjblQ1r6Mm0M4-moVvGXpxNi4=)

Hello,

One year ago, our democracy suffered a physical attack unlike any we have ever seen. Violent insurrectionists, incited by the former President of the United States, fought to overturn the will of the People.
They stormed the U.S. Capitol and besieged statehouses. They placed pipe bombs outside of the DNC and the RNC. They caused devastating destruction to our institutions, inflicted pain on brave first responders, and targeted the dedicated men and women elected by the American people to represent them.
**While Joe Biden is still the President of the United States, and Kamala Harris is Vice President of the United States – just as the People intended — we must remember that the threat to our democracy is ongoing.** Republicans in Washington, and in state and local governments across the nation, are attempting to turn back the clock on voting rights, women's rights, health care, and so much more. They are also working to undermine the very democratic institutions that we hold dear.

**This moment requires each and every one of us to organize, mobilize and, most importantly, vote to preserve our democracy for generations to come.**

Thank you,

Tom
Authority: Tom Perez for Maryland, Stanley J. Botts, Treasurer.
Tom Perez for Maryland
PO BOX 5389
TAKOMA PARK, MD 20913-5389

name: Richard Blumenthal
subject: Today's anniversary and what we're fighting for
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blumenthal for Connecticut
body:
Friend,

One year ago today, on January 6, 2021, our country experienced an assault on the heart of our democracy unlike any other – an armed, violent insurrection at the Capitol incited by then-President of the United States Donald Trump.

I'll never forget the scenes from that day. They still make me sick to my stomach. Mobs swarming the Capitol, violently attacking, overwhelming, and injuring Capitol Police. Desecrating and damaging the building garbed in their red MAGA hats and carrying Trump flags. They hung nooses. Some wore antisemitic clothing. They personally threatened duly elected members of our representative democracy – including Trump's own Vice President. Collectively, they were there to do Trump's bidding: overturn a free and fair election, and usurp our democratic institutions.

But Congress persisted. After the Capitol was cleared, we returned to the Senate and certified Joe Biden as the President of the United States of America. Democracy was severely damaged that day, but, in the end, it won.

In the days and months that followed, the Republican Party did not distance itself from Donald Trump but rather consolidated around him and emboldened his anti-democratic impulses. A majority of Republican members of Congress refused to certify Joe Biden as President. A majority of Republican members of Congress voted against the bipartisan Select Committee to Investigate the January 6th Attack on the United States Capitol to uncover the full truth behind Jan. 6. A majority of Republicans across the country have pushed Trump's Big Lie as a means to institute dangerous voter suppression laws.

Today, on the one-year anniversary of this attack on our system of government, Senate Democrats are fighting to strengthen democracy. With zero Republican support, we are voting to pass legislation to put a stop to Trump-led voter suppression that's already succeeded in passing 34 restrictive voting laws in 19 states.

Voting is the bedrock of our democratic republic – and any so-called public servant who makes it harder to vote does our country and our people no service at all. But the people will win. Democracy will win. That's why, on today's anniversary, I need a showing of Democratic activism unlike any other – I need 25,000 supporters, including you:

If you believe the Senate should protect our democracy by eliminating the filibuster to pass voting rights legislation, click here to add your voice right now.

https://surveys.signforgood.com/blumenthal-0721voting?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk1119-su-nd

We cannot allow Donald Trump and his party to continue their attacks on our democratic institutions. The greatest single thing we can do is guarantee voters' access to the polls. So please, add your name before my 11:59 p.m. deadline.

January 6, 2021 was one of the darkest days our country has ever experienced. But it also reminded us that democracy is fragile. It taught us that words and representation of the American people matter immensely. And today reminds us that we must continue fighting, with everything we have, to protect our democracy. Thank you for doing your part.

Dick

--

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.

To unsubscribe from the Blumenthal for Connecticut email list, please click here:

http://action.richardblumenthal.com/p/salsa/supporter/unsubscribe/public/index.sjs?unsubscribe_page_KEY=550&Email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&email_blast_KEY=1408305

Paid for by Blumenthal for Connecticut

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.

Paid for by Blumenthal for Connecticut

name: Jack Ballard
subject: January 6th
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JACK BALLARD FOR MONTANA
body:
Today we remember the worst attack on our democracy in our nation’s recent history that cost five Capitol police officers their lives and injured mor | | | [](http://links.ballardformontana.com/u/click?_t=01481013522b4e28a72d84f828a757ef&_m=bca6b2627d95448fbd19b95896f3b5fb&_e=53nIcNjC8Swf41atjDRzEMk3wX0rzV2wpQI-het6wa_VW4broPe0QWu86XPNebBKthfrDGwg9AU4eEh3D8uvYsB35_JYhmDiuvlmgi0EfsHStTFouGN0oEtYecZQ9e2Z9TdLQKxOjKaulXi-6RtfAqXl2Xpb0Ulcfsp5t4UTbzclEEc_3LHGEu1vH2KUZ5FhvTgMJUmXGX6u23ca0F56q64kEW5yLR5QuThY4EsVJ2U68GjpFiyt_Viiy6Qvzu8SGR9CkAgt6yv2zYWuSVTVuxS_6bDHQSvn2Bq7S7WrP1xcHJKAgPzGSZ2j1coUzbL1yaxM457zT1gsaTr333riQ8toUJzzI1rh_m3Hq9mWiKxqfWrUP6i6mT-iZBqSZevDoapX61pT3eD3XNVtyzRWfaNqpc58XsLAoo4EgSFC1ciWdDHlRbnjPm65-8zHBftvBuCMWJwopNp7oIikyE2QAkTKwjoVzCusAIlyueFuuwg%3D) Folks, Today we remember the worst attack on our democracy in our nation’s recent history that cost five Capitol police officers their lives and injured more than 80 others. The brave officers and their families are in our thoughts and prayers for their acts of heroism that day defending our nation, its elected representatives and the freedom it stands for. Republican lawmakers like Matt Rosendale who have downplayed the violent, un-democratic nature of this lawless event and trumpeted the former president’s baseless claims of election fraud are themselves a threat to our democracy. Numerous investigations have revealed no voter fraud sufficient to sway the results of the 2020 Presidential election in any state. Matt Rosendale voted against certifying the election, refused to condemn the violent acts, failed to honor the officers who protected him and other officials that day, and has continually refused to support an open and transparent investigation into the events and individuals that instigated such an atrocity in the democratic country we call home. He’s tied to extremist groups that helped plan the attack, including the Oath Keepers. The Rosendale campaign has openly accepted campaign cash from one of the major funders of events linked with the violent insurrection. That’s about as un-American and un-Montanan as it gets. Wishing you the best today. \- Jack Ballard

Jack Ballard grew up on a ranch west of Three Forks homesteaded by his grandfather in 1907. He knows how to fight for Montana and he intends to fight for you and MT-02 in Washington D.C. **[CONTRIBUTE MONTHLY](http://links.ballardformontana.com/u/click?_t=01481013522b4e28a72d84f828a757ef&_m=bca6b2627d95448fbd19b95896f3b5fb&_e=53nIcNjC8Swf41atjDRzEMk3wX0rzV2wpQI-het6wa_VW4broPe0QWu86XPNebBKthfrDGwg9AU4eEh3D8uvYsB35_JYhmDiuvlmgi0EfsHStTFouGN0oEtYecZQ9e2Z9TdLQKxOjKaulXi-6RtfAqXl2Xpb0Ulcfsp5t4UTbzclEEc_3LHGEu1vH2KUZ5FhvTgMJUmXGX6u23ca0F56q64kEW5yLR5QuThY4EsVJ2U68GjpFiyt_Viiy6Qvzu8S9b8vFOy6lM6UG0iUNw_fz0tj_U02WAVQsRZxKwSoTQ2b9deQxGW2xtKGuzyr5V0on92OSk0f85iP9GCPzSb0uQ_kYpQy3qlFAtnWCh9E9ExqJvIVSmqsMot6b7iIl7dc6F1FbozXXY9ZnqToPXZ85ja9nsjbe1nsdkIlMXOLgffxmDelsgNL63pT-I8x7RVZmpRpo4TrWipExpcLJms-3UuSiM-nutlHHEwjwbosXApsKEDmCGkTo971p7ExyIOZ)**** ** PAID FOR BY JACK BALLARD FOR MONTANA.

subject: It’s Up to You!
body:

| |

|

|

| Dear Fellow American,

I urge you to give your support to Judicial Watch in 2022!
And I hope I can count on you to stand on the front lines with us by [supporting our work with a generous tax-deductible gift today.](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57588&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnM=)
Judicial Watch supporters have helped us break critically important ground fighting for the principle that "no one is above the law."
[Giving us your support now](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57588&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnM=), at the very beginning of the year, will have a direct impact on our ability to:
* **_Keep fighting_** to keep our elections honest
* **_Keep fighting_** to expose how our tax dollars are being used to promote Marxist "Critical Race Theory" in public schools and our military
* **_Keep fighting_** to shut down sanctuary cities and secure our borders
* **_Keep fighting_** for accountability in Congress
* **_Keep fighting_** to expose the Fauci Covid scandal and collusion between Big Government and Big Tech to silence conservatives

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: Painfully clear
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren Democrats
body:
Today marks one year since the attempted coup at our nation’s Capitol. I am deeply grateful for the Capitol Police for their heroic acts on that dark day. The American people will always remember the sacrifices they made to protect our democracy. | | | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40429063/324312613/-1964596891?ms=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYjQ2ZmE4MC0zYjZmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zFfpZGRElrDvFUi38GHzVmeaKoDBGIknktAmeHtTgTE=&emci=489a4bd0-386f-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=ab46fa80-3b6f-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=9027908)
---
Today marks one year since the attempted coup at our nation’s Capitol. I am deeply grateful for the Capitol Police for their heroic acts on that dark day. The American people will always remember the sacrifices they made to protect our democracy. But marking this date has another purpose, too. The January 6 insurrection made painfully clear that American democracy is seriously at risk. In November of 2020, American citizens braved a deadly pandemic to cast their ballots. But following that election, the defeated president refused to commit to a peaceful transfer of power. Instead, he falsely sowed doubt about the legitimacy of the election and inflamed his most dangerous supporters to attack this Capitol. His attempts to cling to power through lies and violence were a violation of his oath of office and a grave abuse of power that can never be tolerated in a free and democratic society. We mark this anniversary not only to reflect on that dereliction of duty, but also to call out the ongoing efforts to undermine our democracy. Threats to our democracy are not new. For years, in state after state, Republican legislatures have passed laws making it harder to vote, all on a purely partisan basis with simple majority votes. They have imposed strict voter ID requirements and purged voter rolls to disenfranchise minority voters. They have made it harder to vote by mail and register to vote. They have gerrymandered districts for partisan political gain. Over the past year, these shameless efforts have become even more brazen. Just as the former president was clear that he wanted to overturn the results of the 2020 election, Trump and his allies are entirely transparent about their goal of overturning future elections. Today, Republican opponents of democracy are exploiting every possible avenue to allow their party to maintain control, even if that means overturning the will of the American people. Rather than putting a stop to these attacks on voting rights, the Supreme Court has enabled them. The Roberts Court gutted the core of the Voting Rights Act, which is why Republican legislatures right now can pass anti-voter laws with ease. Last year, they destroyed what was left of the country’s landmark voting rights law, making it nearly impossible to block laws with racially discriminatory effects. They twice overturned key protections against dark money in our elections, and they gave a green light to partisan gerrymandering. **The Senate must not turn a blind eye while the federal judiciary and state legislatures lead an all-out assault against free and fair elections in America. It is clear that Donald Trump’s Republican Party is embracing an increasingly authoritarian movement.** In 2006, the Voting Rights Act was reauthorized unanimously in the U.S. Senate. And yet today, only one Republican supports the Voting Rights Act, and none have endorsed the Freedom to Vote Act. **The Senate filibuster means that Mitch McConnell gets a veto and Congress cannot protect the sacred right to vote unless Republican politicians agree, all while they are actively undermining our democracy in state after state. ** My view on this is simple: We did not swear an oath to protect a procedural rule like the filibuster, which has been the tool of racial segregation and Jim Crow. No, we swore an oath to defend the Constitution. **When the Senate rules stand in the way of voting rights legislation, then those Senate rules must change.** **A year after an insurrection at our nation’s Capitol, we must do more than speak up about the importance of democracy. Now, we must act. It is time to end the filibuster, time to protect voting rights, and time to defend our democracy.** Elizabeth

name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: I knew the price I’d have to pay
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
President Trump knows how much heat I took as his attorney.
_Sponsored message_

But it didn’t matter. I had to do what was right for our country.
| [](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zamhv8idnrgdo4u66hbsdjkkjllmref0mq1254og_rp22sh2s8i66ob4clg66ob2chh2bs)
---
Friend,
---
President Trump knows how much heat I took as his attorney.
---
[](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zbmf1b1bco4d6dpp6dp74l8gadf9g1ds80oed700_rp22sh2s8i66ob4clg66ob2chh2bs)
---
**I knew full well the price I’d have to pay for defending President Trump from the bloodthirsty Deep State.**
---
But it didn’t matter. I could not let the Deep State take down a duly elected president all because he chose to fight for the forgotten citizens of our country.
---
Now, the Deep State is on a vengeful mission to ruin me personally, professionally, and financially -- and I need YOUR help to fight for my freedom.
---
[**Please make a contribution to my Legal Defense Trust -- the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund -- as I continue to fight for my freedom and justice.**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2ze1a099ph5nr168oge14q1f5dip4aci81g24il98_rp22sh2s8i66ob4clg66ob2chh2bs)
---
**[CONTRIBUTE $25](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zn9ppqi2vl3ofvi19dar9efch4tkijf5pv62n9eo_rp22sh2s8i66ob4clg66ob2chh2bs)**
---
**[CONTRIBUTE $50](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zojspirr7umrt2skut90g8jh6felu0i9nba0iv7o_rp22sh2s8i66ob4clg66ob2chh2bs)**
---
**[CONTRIBUTE $75](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zn7c1p70jphfg5fmv4i793guloamm3o3b233an78_rp22sh2s8i66ob4clg66ob2chh2bs)**
---
**[CONTRIBUTE $100](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z51cae1t79k84p34qo0mvuujdu5o0hm3o0lheml0_rp22sh2s8i66ob4clg66ob2chh2bs)**
---
**[CONTRIBUTE $250](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zqkv680faivtoodp25a4gmiq9f3a929o67mpesa0_rp22sh2s8i66ob4clg66ob2chh2bs)**
---
**[CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zu5cjt9rncfdm8skikkm378198mqnslbcl9gorgo_rp22sh2s8i66ob4clg66ob2chh2bs)**
---
**When the FBI launched their dawn raid on my apartment earlier this year, I knew that my freedom was in jeopardy.**
---
As President Trump said, there aren’t many other lawyers out there who would be willing to endure those kinds of threats and intimidation tactics.
---
_But I dove head first into the battle to defend him -- and I don’t regret it for a second._
---
I refused to let the Deep State and their stooges in Congress take down President Trump for crimes he did not commit.
---
Because if they could do it to a sitting president they disagreed with, then what could they one day do to you?
---
As I said, I knew the Deep State would try to ruin me for having the guts to defend President Trump and find him innocent.
---
That’s why I hope grassroots patriots like you will continue to defend me as they try to bury me in legal fees and attacks.
---
[**So please, make a contribution to my Legal Defense Trust -- the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund -- as I continue to fight for my freedom and justice.**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zpp18io0mqo2178478nmulu403fpski0m5hmmu28_rp22sh2s8i66ob4clg66ob2chh2bs)
---
Thank you,
---
[](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zjrcp7qr3kch96aaldmuh15s1t7b7hpdg3re4868_rp22sh2s8i66ob4clg66ob2chh2bs)
---
Rudy Giuliani
Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund
---
**[CONTRIBUTE](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zlr82u524idakrtegt1ud1904bqubimujslot85g_rp22sh2s8i66ob4clg66ob2chh2bs)**
---
Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
---

name: Abby Finkenauer
subject: one year ago today
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abby for Iowa Abby for Iowa
body:
| | |
---
Peter,
It has been one year since a violent mob stormed the Capitol.
One year since I watched the doors of the U.S. House of Representatives – doors I walked through hundreds of times as a congresswoman fighting for Iowans – be barricaded to slow a violent mob intent on destroying our democracy.
One year since my colleagues put on gas masks and hid in their offices, fearing for their lives in a building that should be a beacon of democracy.
One year since the events that would cause five law enforcement personnel to lose their lives.
One year since the consequences of lies about the election and silence in the face of them became all too clear.
**Yet, one year later, there are _still_ no real consequences or accountability for the people responsible for inciting the Jan. 6 insurrection. [If you agree that everyone responsible for inciting the Jan. 6 insurrection should be held responsible, please make your voice heard here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40429437/324314500/-2037558682?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk533-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3Y2NhYjNiNC0zYzZmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nCpG5ZDQpFUCLrP5RAwxdSvm79QoBSWE7FldDP_urxg=&emci=21bca316-826e-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=7ccab3b4-3c6f-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=13784334)**
The Department of Justice and the January 6 House committee have been working hard to prosecute rioters and investigate the events leading up to the insurrection. But despite their commendable efforts, the ringleaders behind this horrific attack on our democracy have so far walked away scot-free.
Meanwhile, so-called "leaders" on the right have continued to defend Trump and his co-conspirators – leaders like my opponent Sen. Grassley (R-IA), who stood in the path of investigations and accountability at every turn. In condoning Trump's conspiracy theories and defending his attempts to undermine the results of our election, they put our democracy at risk.
Until everybody who was behind last year's attack is held accountable, they pose an active threat to our democracy. But we will only be able to hold them accountable, defeat this extremism and protect our democracy with a united grassroots movement. **That's why, on the anniversary of one of the darkest moments for our country, I'm making an important ask of you: Will you defend our democracy by making your voice heard? Simply respond to the question below.**
**Do you believe those responsible for the Jan. 6 attack should be held responsible for their actions?**
| | | [YES](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40429438/324314508/-2037558682?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk533-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3Y2NhYjNiNC0zYzZmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nCpG5ZDQpFUCLrP5RAwxdSvm79QoBSWE7FldDP_urxg=&emci=21bca316-826e-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=7ccab3b4-3c6f-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=13784334)
---
| [NO](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40429439/324314515/-2037558682?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk533-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3Y2NhYjNiNC0zYzZmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nCpG5ZDQpFUCLrP5RAwxdSvm79QoBSWE7FldDP_urxg=&emci=21bca316-826e-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=7ccab3b4-3c6f-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=13784334)
---
Thank you for standing with me in the fight for justice and for our democracy.

With gratitude,

– Abby

name: Val Demings
subject: I will never forget Jan. 6
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
We are going to win, and democracy is going to stand.
| | |
---
It's been a year, friend.
A year since the sitting president of the United States incited an insurrection on our Capitol – the temple of American democracy – a bone-chilling, violent riot that laid siege to overturn a free and fair election; an insurrection in which lives were lost, including five fellow law enforcement officers, and dozens were injured; an attempted coup that continues to cast a dark shadow over our nation.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40429466/324314657/-1224989447?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk2072-su-nd&refcode=jtk2072-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZWNhYjNiNC0zYzZmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=09TdZa_Fb1-aiJaucUKQG31ma7wZPhmsNHvx4cQmAOs=&emci=9af454c9-7f6d-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=7ecab3b4-3c6f-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=20244100)
For as long as I live, friend, I will never forget how the events of Jan. 6 unfolded before my eyes. I was there that day following the orders from the Capitol police officers to 'get down.' We could hear the insurrectionists marching, shouting, banging through the halls. I offered some of my colleagues Scripture as comfort. **I reminded them that "we are going to win and democracy is going to stand."**
Nearly a year later, as the GOP pushes back against investigating the insurrection, the stakes of our democracy are clear as day, friend. **Either we hand our congressional majorities to a party whose elected officials enable Donald Trump and the lies that led to the insurrection – or we fight with everything we have for our democracy, a beacon of light from which opportunity, prosperity and hope are made available for all. **

Together, we can rebuke and defeat the violent extremism of Trump's Republican Party. We can continue with the bold progress Democrats are making for the American people. And we can ensure our country stands for the rule of law and democracy – but not if we don't fight for it.
**For the sake of our democracy, there can be no more free passes. The Capitol insurrectionists must be brought to justice. That's why we need to send a clear message that there is an undeniable push for accountability – and I'm counting on your voice:**
[**Will you sign my petition now to demand the people involved in the Capitol insurrection be held accountable? We cannot and will not stand for those who incited and carried out this violent attack to be let off the hook.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40429467/324314658/-1224989447?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk2072-su-nd&refcode=jtk2072-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZWNhYjNiNC0zYzZmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=09TdZa_Fb1-aiJaucUKQG31ma7wZPhmsNHvx4cQmAOs=&emci=9af454c9-7f6d-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=7ecab3b4-3c6f-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=20244100)
| [SIGN THE PETITION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40429468/324314659/-1224989447?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk2072-su-nd&refcode=jtk2072-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZWNhYjNiNC0zYzZmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=09TdZa_Fb1-aiJaucUKQG31ma7wZPhmsNHvx4cQmAOs=&emci=9af454c9-7f6d-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=7ecab3b4-3c6f-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=20244100)
---

Let me say it again, what I said to my colleagues on that awful day when the strength of our nation was tested: We are going to win, and democracy is going to stand.

Val Demings
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40429469/324314660/1581265324?code=jtk2072-su-nd&refcode=jtk2072-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZWNhYjNiNC0zYzZmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=09TdZa_Fb1-aiJaucUKQG31ma7wZPhmsNHvx4cQmAOs=) **Val Demings here:** I can’t thank you enough for fighting alongside me to flip Florida blue. Florida will determine whether Democrats keep our Senate majority – that’s why Republicans are pouring millions of dollars into this race to crush our movement _and_ keep Florida red _permanently_. Our grassroots campaign is off to a great start, but in a race as close as this one, I need your help to surge ahead and defend the Senate. I’m relying on grassroots supporters like you, donating to emails like this, to help me defeat Marco Rubio and stop Mitch McConnell from flipping the Senate. Will you donate today to help me flip Florida blue? **[Click here to donate now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40429470/324314661/1804727444?code=jtk2072-su-nd&refcode=jtk2072-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZWNhYjNiNC0zYzZmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=09TdZa_Fb1-aiJaucUKQG31ma7wZPhmsNHvx4cQmAOs=)** If you’d like to purchase merchandise to show your support for this campaign, **[please click here to visit my campaign store.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40429471/324314662/-460395862?code=jtk2072-su-nd&refcode=jtk2072-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZWNhYjNiNC0zYzZmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=09TdZa_Fb1-aiJaucUKQG31ma7wZPhmsNHvx4cQmAOs=&emci=9af454c9-7f6d-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=7ecab3b4-3c6f-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=20244100)** Thank you for your continued support. name: Drew Thompson
subject: 1 Week from Launch
body:
89 days from Early Voting [](https://) Peter, We are now just 1 week from Jane's first coalition launch of the election year! Election Day is coming quickly and the start of early voting is even closer. 2022 will be a red wave, with Jane winning the great state of Ohio, and Republicans retaking the U.S. Senate. Our _Parents for Jane_ coalition launch is the first step towards making this a reality, and holding Democrats accountable for their attempt to harness education as a vehicle for indoctrination. You will not want to miss this event with Jane! Food will be provided and the event is free. Just register below! **Parents for Jane Kickoff**

name: Wade Herring
subject: We cannot let the lie win
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wade Herring for Congress
body:
Friend -
One year ago today I watched in horror as our Capitol and our Constitution were trampled upon by a mob of violent insurrectionists and members of Congress. January 6th is a day that will live in infamy – a day that our democracy was directly threatened by lies.
Today, we still have representatives in Congress who continue to spread falsehoods and undermine our elections instead of working to improve the lives of the American people.
I believe in the sanctity of our Constitution and our democracy. I believe that the people of this country deserve representatives who tell the truth and seek to unite.
The promise of this great nation requires us to be vigilant and determined. I am working to keep America’s promise for a better tomorrow, not a yesterday that never was.
When I am elected to Congress, I pledge to put the Constitution, the truth, and the needs of the people first.
In service,
Wade Herring
Click below to learn how January 6th, 2021 impacted Wade’s decision to run for Congress

subject: An attack on our democracy

body:

name: Gwen Moore
subject: A coup from within
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Gwen Moore for Congress
body:
On January 5th, 2021, I got to DC late that night. On January 6th, the House would certify the 2020 election results. Fanatical Trump supporters arrived in DC en masse lured by the promise of overturning our democracy. That morning, Trump fanned the flames by urging people to march to the Capitol and reinstall him as President through violence. As I was getting ready in my tiny DC apartment, Capitol Police evacuated my building due to the bomb scare. The bomb threat began right as the certification was set to start. Capitol Police escorted me to my office in Rayburn through a mob that was growing angrier by the minute. They were all in on overturning the election, and then the acts of domestic terrorism began. We know what happened that day. We know the bravery displayed by Capitol and DC Police and other law enforcement. But the assault on our democracy didn't stop that day. Trump's Republican Party is still waging war on voting and attacking the legitimacy of our institutions. The insurrection will not end until we safeguard voting for future elections from the people radicalized by Donald Trump and the lies that he and the GOP have perpetrated. Our Republic and the very ideas that shape our democracy are at a risk if we stand idly by...we must protect the right to vote – history will remember this moment and will remember what we do next because defending our democracy isn't a partisan issue. Quoting my friend and mentor, the great John Lewis, _"The right to vote is precious, almost sacred. It is the most powerful nonviolent tool or instrument in a democratic society. We must use it."_ Together #WeRepresent -Gwen Moore Proudly representing Wisconsin's Fourth Congressional District Proud Co-Lead of the Violence Against Women Act 100% Pro-Choice Stay Connected! Democrats are running scared. Their agenda is built on fear and scaring people into compliance.

Eric Swalwell, best known as the Democrat member of Congress who slept with a Chinese spy, is peddling outlandish lies. He claims, "if Republicans win in the midterm elections, voting as we know it in this country will be gone." __
