name: Wes Moore
subject: My Washington Post op-ed on Jan. 6
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40429719/324315883/1595534322?refcode=fl_email_na_20220106jan6_wm_60da_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMWMxODdiZi0zZTZmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KTiB1BbB1VUSQO_f1YQ63UCLyHVtPggipk16yPDPsng=)
---
Friend, Today is January 6, 2022: exactly one year from the day we witnessed violent insurrectionists storm the U.S. Capitol in an attempt to subvert our democracy and reject the results of the 2020 presidential election. This is a sobering day in our country’s history, and an important reminder of what’s at stake in our elections: democracy in and of itself. As a veteran who led soldiers in combat in Afghanistan, and as a husband and father who cares deeply about the future of this nation, I believe it is imperative to the continuation of our Great American Experiment that we get to the bottom of who was responsible for this tragic assault on our government, and hold them accountable so that it may never happen again. [**As we reflect on the one-year anniversary of the insurrection, I’ve written a piece in the _Washington Post_ sharing my thoughts on this day and what must come next in order for us to safeguard our democracy and basic principles from further erosion. You can read it here.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40429720/324315884/-1591799484?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMWMxODdiZi0zZTZmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KTiB1BbB1VUSQO_f1YQ63UCLyHVtPggipk16yPDPsng=&emci=0fc187bf-3e6f-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=11c187bf-3e6f-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=24635485) My thoughts are with those who experienced the terrifying events of this day firsthand, especially the loved ones of the Capitol and D.C. police officers whose lives were lost in the aftermath. Despite so much uncertainty, I have hope and confidence that with good leadership, truth, justice, and our democratic principles _will_ prevail. Elevate, Wes
---
| Wes Moore is a combat veteran, a former small business owner, and the former CEO of a leading non-profit. Wes believes no matter where you start in life, you deserve an equal opportunity to succeed. He’s running to become Governor of Maryland and flip this state blue for the first time in 8 years. And we need your help to do it.
---
| [Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40429721/324315885/1595534322?refcode=fl_email_na_20220106jan6_wm_60da_xx_ftr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMWMxODdiZi0zZTZmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KTiB1BbB1VUSQO_f1YQ63UCLyHVtPggipk16yPDPsng=)

name: Dr. Neil Shah For Governor
subject: Antifa Keith Has Covid
body:
| Peter -- As we enter a new year, the lockdown left is continuing to use Covid as an excuse to grow their political power and influence, wreaking havoc on society and the future prospects of our state. After Tim Walz spent hundreds of millions of YOUR dollars to increase ICU capacity in Minnesota, the state continues to ruthlessly force our healthcare professionals out of their jobs. Mayo Clinic has abandoned science and decided to fire it’s unvaccinated staff earlier this week, making the whole situation much worse. Meanwhile in Chicago, teachers unions are once again refusing to let teachers do their jobs and teach in person, effectively abandoning their mission to educate your kids. Unprecedented inflation caused by a grossly abused and mismanaged federal pandemic response has led to historic debt and inflation that your children and your children’s children will be left unwittingly to contend with. Over 15% ($1.2 Billion) of the projected budget surplus is going to be swallowed up by Biden-flation. That money belongs back in your pocket! Triple-vaxxed Keith Ellison comes down with Covid, and urges everyone to get vaccinated to stop the spread. Why won’t they stop parroting the same failed, destructive tactics we’ve been subject to for nearly two years? Surely they must know they’re spreading lies. **There’s only one way out of this mess.** It’s time to clean house. After the abject failure of career politicians to preserve our liberty and govern with reason, we MUST replace them. We need to fire Tim Walz and replace him with credible leadership from the outside, someone who is not a politician and believes in public service rather than climbing the political ladder. YOU are an important part of this change. We cannot win without your help. You have the power to decide who we run against Walz in November. Messing this opportunity up by sending the same failed politicians is NOT an option. Caucusing for Team Shah on February 1st is the most important thing we can do to facilitate a return to normalcy. If you’re new to the process, that’s okay! Our team will give you the guidance you need to make sure you can participate in this all important process. [**Sign up to make a difference today!**](https://electneil.nationbuilder.com/r?u=iUaD1gacZHU3dYzSqkV0rIUT-mZ4lX_Eu1p670u2Bhs&e=d39b8e369eb2bbdd6f36e913aaadeb34&utm_source=electneil&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1_6_22_update&n=1) In other campaign news, check out my most recent appearance with Dan Ball on OAN! [](https://electneil.nationbuilder.com/r?u=iUaD1gacZHU3dYzSqkV0rFBO1Di1PzB0Z12dxeoft-lKE9rsVBnEQ2VR9tOf6SPW6YNsTT7e94tRxepqrW4t9w&e=d39b8e369eb2bbdd6f36e913aaadeb34&utm_source=electneil&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1_6_22_update&n=2) The team will be traveling to Mountain Iron this weekend! If you’re able, please attend the St. Louis County GOP’s dinner. I’d like to meet you! Dr. Neil Shah Conservative Candidate for Governor electneil.com
---
-=-=- Dr. Neil Shah for Governor · 855 Village Center Drive #245, North Oaks, MN 55127-3016, United States

# 2022 is the year of the Oregon Rebound!

Dear Friends,

This year, Oregonians have a great opportunity to elect a Republican governor for the first time in **almost four decades**. Let's make 2022 the beginning of the Oregon Rebound. We can't waste this monumental opportunity to end one-party rule in our state and reverse years of failed progressive policies!

As governor, I'll lead the charge to implement a tax system that benefits innovation and hard work. I'll form a crime reduction task force that reports directly to the governor and insist on accountability for criminal conduct. My Deputy Superintendent of Public Instruction will be tasked with raising academic standards for K-12 students. And implementing a comprehensive plan for getting the unsheltered off our streets and into rehabilitation programs will be a top priority of my administration.

But first, I'll need your help. Being elected the first female Republican governor of Oregon and holding the line against the Democratic supermajorities in the state legislature is no easy task.

**_Will you chip in $25, $50, or $100 today to help send a message to Salem politicians that the Oregon Rebound is coming?_**

Jessica Gomez

subject: One year ago today

body:
The NRA has been planting the seeds of armed insurrection for decades.
#

Friends —
The NRA has been planting the seeds of armed insurrection for decades — and one year ago today, we learned _exactly_ how dangerous their rhetoric can be.
The gun lobby must be held responsible for fueling much of the extremism and domestic terrorism threatening Americans today.
We are fighting to make sure that happens, but we’ll need your help to do it. So we have to ask:
[**Will you make a $3 donation to help us hold the NRA and gun lobby accountable for enabling armed extremism? Pitch in here:**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-jan22?refcode=em220106-1-30&t=1&refcode2=1422_3935704_SWVfFC&akid=1422%2E3935704%2ESWVfFC)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-jan22?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em220106-1-30&t=20&refcode2=1422_3935704_SWVfFC&akid=1422%2E3935704%2ESWVfFC)**

name: Great America Update
subject: Bring Constitution 101 to your home
body:
Today, I’m writing to let you know that we’ve produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our “Constitution 101” course [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6639%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=QmTmEZacXJqOyM2lU8NHNA&sysid=1)
| | | This sponsored message from Great America Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c68433%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=EyfLKhcHG3Tgix%2bqSVxAMA&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American, [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c68433%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=EyfLKhcHG3Tgix%2bqSVxAMA&sysid=1) I hope you’re having a great day so far. Today, I’m writing to let you know that we’ve produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our “Constitution 101” course, and I’d like you to have a copy. The course features Hillsdale College’s world-renowned faculty. It teaches the original design and purpose of the Constitution, the challenges it faced during the Civil War, and how it has been undermined for over a century by progressivism and liberalism. It concludes by setting forth how limited government under the Constitution might be revived. “Constitution 101” is modeled after the course that all Hillsdale students are required to take, and this DVD box set is your opportunity to experience it for yourself. I hope you take advantage of this offer, and I have included a secure link for you here: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/constitution-101-dvd/**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c68434%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=4A2d8tY6PTLlRgOy%2f56kTQ&sysid=1) As you know, Hillsdale takes no government funding, even indirectly in the form of student grants or loans. So, your support is essential to expanding our national educational outreach efforts, like free online courses, designed to restore and defend liberty. As I mentioned above, supplies of the new “Constitution 101” DVD box set are limited, so I hope you’ll reserve your copy today. Sincerely, Bill Gray Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth--Defending Liberty since 1844
---
---

name: Bridie Farrell
subject: January 6th
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bridie Farrell for US
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40429949/324316837/-870670775?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220106jan6_BF_full_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTU5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZThhM2JhMy00MDZmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=c3vNlmdFWQCGreUpdRDzZYJQbRxEYEI8ZyMPX0P10Es=)
---
Friend, 365 days ago, we witnessed a violent attack on the United States Capitol. The attackers had a declared intent to overthrow Congressional leadership, overturn a free and fair election, and lead an insurrection against our government and our way of life. It was an awful moment in history that none of us ever thought we would see. I was raised in a patriotic family with an ethos of country first. That’s how I always felt on the ice as a member of the U.S. National Team as I traveled the globe competing on behalf of America. Today, as we think back to the attack on our Capitol, we all need to remember our patriotism and just how fortunate we are to live in America. Because it is only in America where citizens are truly free to protest their government. **But the January 6th insurrectionists didn’t protest. They rioted, became violent, and threatened all of our freedoms.** And what about our representative, Elise Stefanik? She initially played the whole event down. Since then, she has actually blamed Speaker Nancy Pelosi for the insurrection, even while Pelosi herself was a target of the violence. That’s cynical, it’s wrong, and that falsehood disrespects the common intellect of the American people. We need to be done with these lies and cynical approaches to leadership. Instead, I think we all need to ask ourselves what each of us can do collectively to deliver on the promise of a new patriotism derived from shared American values and shared commitment to country. This is a promise I offer you as a candidate for Congress and is an ethos I will bring to the job of being your representative each day. I also promise that I won’t shy away from holding accountable anyone who runs down our country on this or any issue. No patriot, no American can look at what happened on January 6th as a political game. But Elise does. We are smarter than that. We are better than that. | [DONATE TO OUR CAMPAIGN TO OUST ELISE →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40429950/324316838/-870670775?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220106jan6_BF_full_xx_btn&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTU5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZThhM2JhMy00MDZmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=c3vNlmdFWQCGreUpdRDzZYJQbRxEYEI8ZyMPX0P10Es=)
---
It is time for a change. It is time to elect someone to the job who will treat the voters of this district with some respect. And it is time to have someone representing the North Country who is actually from the North Country, lives our values, and can look back on January 6th as a dangerous insurrection and not a tool for political gain.
January 6th was a sad day, but by collectively recognizing what it actually was can give us strength and hope. We have an opportunity, even an obligation, to deliver a new patriotism to the North Country. Let’s talk with each other. Let’s listen to each other. And let’s remember we are all Americans first.
[**Will you pitch in $10, $25, or $50 to help me beat Elise in November and restore dignity to the North Country’s office in D.C.?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40429951/324316839/-870670775?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220106jan6_BF_full_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTU5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZThhM2JhMy00MDZmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=c3vNlmdFWQCGreUpdRDzZYJQbRxEYEI8ZyMPX0P10Es=)

name: Team DeSantis
subject: Have a second?
body:
Your feedback is critical.
| | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Hm8FWAjuWVu65wFzlbq_doLf2L9ABBQ4P138f0tk0hwpdTc1g55REUbNLPbQrlLWXJhM4jRJBJdltGCl6ip_pnisrTEZS94aRo-lYllsFhiq9WDZzlj1fUaaupix5_bs8kTbfZOvn6-qvaSc37qDGFN2fvF97Z2tZ1lHZR8yM8s=&c=DNZKRRIaBTi2g991tUcfhhneNocqUDpkidnZhI6aTCZ7eU8Geck5bA==&ch=ItAqbJKkn3-_bZatiPUrpXLa2uEf7eTeORbtwoWegm2YghdOzjDwKQ==)
---
| Peter,
Governor DeSantis is the #1 target for the radical Left and Democrats across the country. Why? Because he's putting Florida FIRST and protecting our American values from the Left's insane agenda.
Just this year, Governor DeSantis has: ✅ Held Big Tech accountable ✅ Stood strong AGAINST the Chinese Communist Party ✅ Kept our state OPEN for business and kids in the classroom ✅ Signed anti-rioting legislation ✅ Protected women's sports ✅ Banned Critical Race Theory in schools ✅ Strengthened Election Integrity by banning ballot harvesting and prohibiting Zuckerbucks ✅ Banned Vaccine Passports
And he's just getting started.
So, our team wants to know... # Peter,

One year ago to this day... thousands of American patriots flooded the Washington, DC swamp to demand election integrity and accountability from the corrupt political establishment. From the very start of our campaign, I promised you that protecting conservative values from ideological persecution was a top priority... Today I am proud to announce that I am more than delivering on that promise. I have filed four bills in the Oklahoma Senate since the start of 2022 designed to protect the American people from being imprisoned or forced into poverty for their political beliefs and equip sheriffs in our state with the right resources to fend off further federal overreach: SB 1157 \- Expands unemployment benefits to unvaccinated employees fired from their jobs SB 1166 \- Prohibits feds from transporting January 6 political prisoners through Oklahoma SB 1199 \- Prohibits federal officers from carrying out any gun confiscation measures in Oklahoma SB 1200 \- Requires federal agents to notify the sheriff before operating in their county SB 1201 \- Allows sheriffs to form posses to defend their county in times of emergency, disaster, or federal overreach The radical Biden regime is running rogue, and I refuse to stand by as they violate our Constitutional rights for another year... [Consider making a donation to my campaign today to assure that conservative voices are heard and not silenced by clicking here >>](https://em.dahmforsenate.com/e3t/Btc/W3+113/d2rzSS04/VVK-0v4xF9tpN38PmlF4GFPsW6YVQGc4C_srxN5j5FQc3lLBmV1-WJV7CgHJYW3lWX6b6nH_7WW6GSmDR5DZTVtW1lTBSm4mnb83W68y1Xh3LrvyhW5848Pk4q2W_pVkwJxM8k99JgW9gBFcv97RktKW4CrhJ87wYwHpW1njGQ13vvjM_W4tQzMR3fjGcXVH_p9Q8FSFp9W71JdY95h94BPW5_cWyz8Y_LPYN5XmglxMzmjxW54xxdg7CVyY-MkhgNzvY_8fW31-F0p4F4DnQW70QR5D4ZsrlKW6McwdL6cPPJ3W6_9h867nlDgwVY8cPr9cDvNQW98ZZ3w8KtlqF3gZD1) This is just the start.

name: Self Reliance Central
subject: Learn what’s at stake today
body:
Have you ever wondered what caused the rejection of the American Founding and the radical transformation of our government?
This sponsored message from Self Reliance Central is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | [](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zv9hvvp5420864oqeo64br5e1u9lkvi6h7n3rcs8_rp22sh2s8i66ob4clg61oj6c9h2bs)
---
| |
Dear Friend, Have you ever wondered what caused the rejection of the American Founding and the radical transformation of our government? To answer this pressing question, I invite you to enroll in Hillsdale’s free online course, “Constitution 201: The Progressive Rejection of the Founding and the Rise of Bureaucratic Despotism.” Taught by Hillsdale College’s politics faculty, this course invites every liberty-loving American to explore:
* the origins and key early leaders of American Progressivism,
* how Progressivism has altered the structure of the Constitution and the relationship of the American people to their government,
* the new ideas and purposes that animate Progressivism today,
* how this movement away from the American Founding threatens the rights of every American,
* and how we might restore constitutional government in America today.

To activate your free access to this course—and begin learning at your own pace—please click on the secure link below. **** [**https://online.hillsdale.edu/landing/constitution-201**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z29le81i7n6retitdvvpr2vgits2426r7sgg2vn8_rp22sh2s8i66ob4clg61oj6c9h2bs)**** **** **Now more than ever before it is essential for every citizen to understand the nature of modern Progressivism so that we can intelligently defend free government in America. I hope you will join us in this pursuit.** Warm regards, Kyle Murnen, ‘09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: Our movement in Texas
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

We’re working hard to elect Jessica Cisneros and Greg Casar to Congress,
and election day is just around the corner. Texans have already started
applying for mail-in ballots, and in-person early voting in Texas is just
39 days away.

We have to make sure that we reach voters now, not later. We’ve lost tight
races before because support came in just too late and we didn’t have
enough time to build the momentum needed to win. And with so many people
voting early, it’s critical that we can scale up the size of our outreach
efforts right now, and reach every voter before mail ballots arrive, and
in-person voting begins on February 14th.

Your contributions help fuel the work it's going to take to elect Jessica
Cisneros and Greg Casar, but we’re running out of time to reach voters
before polls open and ballots drop. [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/88725?refcode=em20220106-21349&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=21349%2E1203867%2EswdOND ]Will you contribute
$3 to strengthen our operation on the ground?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/88725?refcode=em20220106-21349&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=21349%2E1203867%2EswdOND ]Contribute $3

For too long, Texans have been represented by members of Congress who have
put the interests of corporations and big donors over the interests of the
people.

In a few weeks, we’ll have a chance to elect Jessica Cisneros and Greg
Casar to join our JD coalition and strengthen the fight for working people
in Congress. That fight gets tougher by the day, as Jessica and Greg work
to win every vote possible.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/88725?refcode=em20220106-21349&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=21349%2E1203867%2EswdOND ]Can you chip in to fuel our work ahead of early voting? We’re counting
on grassroots support to power our organizing in this final push. With
your help, we’ll send two Texas Justice Democrats to Congress.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/88725?refcode=em20220106-21349&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1023&akid=21349%2E1203867%2EswdOND ]Contribute

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1024&akid=21349%2E1203867%2EswdOND ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1025&akid=21349%2E1203867%2EswdOND ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20220106-21349-footer&t=1026&refcode2=21349_1203867_swdOND&akid=21349%2E1203867%2EswdOND

clean_body: [1]Justice Democrats Peter, We’re working hard to elect Jessica Cisneros and Greg Casar to Congress, and election day is just around the corner. Texans have already started applying for mail-in ballots, and in-person early voting in Texas is just 39 days away. We have to make sure that we reach voters now, not later. We’ve lost tight races before because support came in just too late and we didn’t have enough time to build the momentum needed to win. And with so many people voting early, it’s critical that we can scale up the size of our outreach efforts right now, and reach every voter before mail ballots arrive, and in-person voting begins on February 14th. Your contributions help fuel the work it's going to take to elect Jessica Cisneros and Greg Casar, but we’re running out of time to reach voters before polls open and ballots drop. [ ]Will you contribute $3 to strengthen our operation on the ground? [ ]Contribute $3 For too long, Texans have been represented by members of Congress who have put the interests of corporations and big donors over the interests of the people. In a few weeks, we’ll have a chance to elect Jessica Cisneros and Greg Casar to join our JD coalition and strengthen the fight for working people in Congress. That fight gets tougher by the day, as Jessica and Greg work to win every vote possible. [ ]Can you chip in to fuel our work ahead of early voting? We’re counting on grassroots support to power our organizing in this final push. With your help, we’ll send two Texas Justice Democrats to Congress. [ ]Contribute In solidarity, Justice Democrats Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank [ ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong. Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the [ ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department. Contribute to Justice Democrats:

| | Friend, One year ago today we watched in horror as insurrectionists stormed the United States Capitol in an attempt to overthrow the election. The insurrectionists continue to threaten our democracy today and are now attacking the right to vote across the country -- we can't let them win. **We at the Minnesota House DFL Majority reaffirm our commitment to the freedom to vote and a representative democracy for all.** Will you join us? Add your name as a fellow Democracy Defender: [**I 'm a Democracy Defender**](https://act.myngp.com/el/kYUhtiygKakNCMAZjRaB9p2omiUJd1reyXOFIeTWzRg=/KUjtOuJ6eAjizC9OsmMLbYvdU6w6VPT7lrsLWnQ0tSM=) The threat in Minnesota [isn't hypothetical](https://act.myngp.com/el/kYUhtiygKakNCMAZjRaB9p2omiUJd1reyXOFIeTWzRg=/GkT3JvPlfvadkp3cHRD78ABwm3oLWn51IXV0Wg197MA=), some Republicans in the Minnesota House [attended a rally at the Minnesota Capitol last year](https://act.myngp.com/el/kYUhtiygKakNCMAZjRaB9p2omiUJd1reyXOFIeTWzRg=/8w0yZ1e-xwl-udxcn-P9XkSQ-4RIgmJCQUGPKgx1s5w=) and have been [openly supporting](https://act.myngp.com/el/kYUhtiygKakNCMAZjRaB9p2omiUJd1reyXOFIeTWzRg=/1AaprpoErmyAxRrSi3eVSrnAJef26Bez6O4RL89rsJA=) the lie that the free and fair election was stolen. body:
The Biden administration is wildly out of touch with the American people. While hundreds of Americans were stranded on I-95, Kamala Harris thought it was a great time to talk about how Biden’s social
| | | |

Peter,
The Biden administration is wildly out of touch with the American people.
While hundreds of Americans were stranded on I-95, Kamala Harris thought it was a great time to talk about how Biden's socialist infrastructure bill is "getting people moving".
---
[](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001QQHZHoGKTewYC1KKLzzRzRljb_ItHsTUX2eEu4raNIFh4nlgoJ6jRsAtk0a9oHuSJEa6WctHev-sbEIUQN2YEtujSSMMoFCWycDYXDB6a_NIe0H5E1cUhiCAPG153jj3F77L6tKHLgsYgKHNs2NnoGtz1r2f6GJpDxbqbqrP3NccjrsqYcRXIw==&c=whtsy5wkqGIBK5Exh6ipn8C__dn3GA2OOj8PFLHXQQjiIyn-dU3epw==&ch=-t7TqgMYngQkE9HUAzQM7ENgOCcl8_nuCd-HArmCV0lTl346vhweFQ==)
---
It's no surprise that elites like Biden and Harris have no idea about the suffering of American commuters. They fly in private jets and traffic stops for them when they drive.
They didn't even notice the 40-mile traffic jam running near D.C.
[You don't need another go-along-to-get-along politician in Washington D.C. You deserve to be represented by someone who knows what it's like to work hard for a living. Click here to support our campaign >>](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001QQHZHoGKTewYC1KKLzzRzRljb_ItHsTUX2eEu4raNIFh4nlgoJ6jRsAtk0a9oHuSJEa6WctHev-sbEIUQN2YEtujSSMMoFCWycDYXDB6a_NIe0H5E1cUhiCAPG153jj3F77L6tKHLgsYgKHNs2NnoGtz1r2f6GJpDxbqbqrP3NccjrsqYcRXIw==&c=whtsy5wkqGIBK5Exh6ipn8C__dn3GA2OOj8PFLHXQQjiIyn-dU3epw==&ch=-t7TqgMYngQkE9HUAzQM7ENgOCcl8_nuCd-HArmCV0lTl346vhweFQ==)
Democrats spent TRILLIONS on "infrastructure" without considering whether those policies will hurt Americans.
The worst part, Peter, is they burned through taxpayer dollars and have no results to show for it.
The Democrats don't care that their policies are hurting everyday Americans.
I'm a businessman, not a politician. I want to actually save America with real solutions, not provide handouts to the corrupt government elites.
I am running to stop wasteful spending and to protect American workers from the radical Left.
The Senate hangs in the balance. When I win, Kamala Harris will lose control over the Senate. Peter, you can help conservatives take back the Senate.

name: Kirsten Engel
subject: One year later
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Engel for Arizona
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40430315/324319052/-2037180865?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZWQ3YmM2NS00NDZmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kLcykiXuiva1nWyWrGYdM4m3ftApzQAy0jkw7b1VGSw=&emci=b00f174b-166f-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=2ed7bc65-446f-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=12898431)
---
Friend,
A year ago today, rioters emboldened by Donald Trump stormed the US Capitol in an attempt to overturn the election of Joe Biden.
It will forever be one of the darkest days in our nation’s history.
**If we are determined to safeguard our democratic institutions and hold insurrectionists accountable, we must defend our House majority,_and we must defend this seat. _**
Our newest opponent, Kelly Townsend is one of Arizona's biggest proponents of "the Big Lie". Townsend has a history of blaming the January 6 insurrection on "the Left" and even Gov. Ducey, for certifying Arziona's election results. **We simply cannot elect someone who supports the same rhetoric that led to the attack on January 6, to this congressional seat.** But that's now a distinct possibility.
We can never forget the insurrection that occurred on January 6, 2021. It is a reminder that we cannot take our democracy for granted and that we must be ever-vigilant in protecting our voting rights and the basic tenets of our constitutional democracy.
As your next Congresswoman, I pledge to protect and uphold our democracy and our Constitution
****
Thank you,
Kirsten
---

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40430317/324319053/41694283?refcode=X_10621_Jan6thAnniversary&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZWQ3YmM2NS00NDZmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kLcykiXuiva1nWyWrGYdM4m3ftApzQAy0jkw7b1VGSw=)

Hello,
Sometimes I get advice from political pundits to leave criticism of Donald Trump out of my campaign speeches. They worry that by calling out Trump when he’s still so popular among some voters in Iowa could be an election misstep. But I can’t do that. It would be a dereliction of duty.
Donald Trump and his cohorts helped plan and execute an insurrection – a coup – at the highest level of our government. To be silent would be complicit in condoning political violence and the evil outcomes of today’s GOP fringe.
**I’m running against Senator Chuck Grassley, one of Trump’s biggest supporters.** Donald Trump came to Iowa just to hold an event with Grassley and give him his full-throated endorsement. And Grassley took it, swooningly.
The polls show the race will be extremely close: Just 27% of Iowa voters want to reelect Grassley! The challenge is going up against Grassley’s $3 million campaign war chest of corporate PAC and special interest money (not to mention McConnell’s Super PACs).
**Here’s where you come in: I’m counting on grassroots donors like you to give to my campaign today if we’re going to defeat Chuck Grassley and turn Iowa blue.**
[**We still need to raise another $1,830 before midnight tonight to hit our goal. subject: Jan. 6th 2021 was a dark day for our democracy.

body:

---
Peter,

January 6th, 2021 was a dark day for democracy. Since the days of George Washington, our country has prided itself on peaceful transitions of power. **It is the very foundation of our democracy.**

Donald Trump and his GOP allies empowered their supporters to storm the Capitol. All in an attempt to overturn the results of an election.

The entire insurrection was built on Trump’s “Big Lie” — a lie he told his supporters to convince them the election was stolen and delegitimize our election process.

Since then, Trump’s conspiracy theory has only multiplied — with Republican legislatures across the country introducing, and even passing, anti-voting laws. Laws that specifically target Black and brown voters.

So as we remember the events of one year ago today, I’m asking you to join me in the fight to hold the GOP accountable for their actions on, leading up to, and since January 6th. **[Sign our petition demanding the Republicans who encouraged the insurrection be held accountable.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40430460/324319320/-1438237936?partner=Yadira%20Caraveo&refcode=ea.31d7bc65-446f-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ms=ea.31d7bc65-446f-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMWQ3YmM2NS00NDZmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=s1K-9rVtCQ1ippq3m4itytzPCnEdZ85GCfM6Hx4ogiQ=&emci=fd22f974-306f-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=31d7bc65-446f-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=12666102)**
****[SIGN ON](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40430461/324319322/-1438237936?partner=Yadira%20Caraveo&refcode=ea.31d7bc65-446f-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ms=ea.31d7bc65-446f-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMWQ3YmM2NS00NDZmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=s1K-9rVtCQ1ippq3m4itytzPCnEdZ85GCfM6Hx4ogiQ=&emci=fd22f974-306f-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=31d7bc65-446f-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=12666102)****

I’m committed to doing my part — to fight for voting rights and stand up to white supremacy. You can do yours by standing with me.

Thank you,

Dr. Yadira Caraveo

Peter, January 6th, 2021 was a dark day for democracy. Since the days of George Washington, our country has prided itself on peaceful transitions of power. It is the very foundation of our democracy. Donald Trump and his GOP allies empowered their supporters to storm the Capitol. All in an attempt to overturn the results of an election. The entire insurrection was built on Trump’s “Big Lie” — a lie he told his supporters to convince them the election was stolen and delegitimize our election process. Since then, Trump’s conspiracy theory has only multiplied — with Republican legislatures across the country introducing, and even passing, anti-voting laws. Laws that specifically target Black and brown voters. So as we remember the events of one year ago today, I’m asking you to join me in the fight to hold the GOP accountable for their actions on, leading up to, and since January 6th. ** I’m committed to doing my part — to fight for voting rights and stand up to white supremacy. You can do yours by standing with me. Thank you, Dr. Yadira Caraveo | | = = ****Learn more at:** Follow along: | | ---|---|--- | PAID FOR BY CARAVEO FOR CONGRESS CARAVEO FOR CONGRESS PO Box 953, Eastlake, CO 80614 If you would like to receive fewer emails, please . ****If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please.******

name: Karen Bass
subject: What I remember from January 6, 2021
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Karen Bass for Mayor 2022 (ID # 1441328)
body:
Hello,

On January 5, 2021, I told my family and friends not to worry about my safety. Despite the recent threats Donald Trump and his supporters had made against Congress, I knew the U.S. Capitol building was one of the safest and most secure places in the country.

Then, January 6 happened.

The insurrection was a blatant attempt to overthrow our democracy and silence the will of the American people. The violent mob that breached the Capitol endangered the lives of journalists, first responders, staff, lawmakers, and everyday citizens.

Though we confirmed the results of the election early in the morning on January 7, the "Big Lie" continues to have real consequences. In at least 19 states, lawmakers passed legislation that makes it harder for people, especially people of color, to vote.

At the same time, pockets of unrest, violence, and extremism are festering around the country. Every single act of extremism, including voter suppression, is a threat to our democracy and our nation. We absolutely must pass the John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act to restore voter protections and protect civil rights. And we must root out the division that is eroding our democracy and begin to heal.

In solidarity,

Karen

Paid for by Karen Bass for Mayor 2022 (ID # 1441328)

| | **[](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zlDPxDHCSe8GlVxjXZtZRtmEfGB8YWhzh1TFdE2u9VNW6_nhjN6OUqrqYagiS3Glh_93NW4cWJyKOQcMWmQIMCT4AxkTrZQ9srrERjl-6l_H6YfDpt1FEuYSGIovnfgtW62O2q9AQj7fcDGxURsO9a_CSO9PtAUzVpDQeMEIRN2cdoFR_a2AZY-8Do8XgUMVO6xEpYDnOJqMrY5D366IGkh5nVVZutnwgnZ-VCryyRa-P4t9oev2AJZ-QsvE5SOVya5-deRtly7-lQqT2Ri_3400wRe1jYtQGQUME_5xi7oFoNOeu8EbopuUavVvj-NFTVB0GjKRJETDeCDE4sn8UDr8iZx1W0jljKaX0Tcdodbg/3ih/8DoNmX3nRWObiWdIu-84sQ/h1/EgOyLEj6mb3oIlt_X8OJI6HfZyL-8iO9VUDDJzOq8dI)** Folks, It’s hard to believe that a year after one of our history's most visible attacks on our democracy, Republicans are STILL pushing a dangerous narrative that fuels the fire that led to a deadly insurrection at the nation's Capitol. The anniversary of January 6th should remind us of the steadfast duty we all have to safeguard our democracy from those who would like to incite political division for their own gain. Democratic governors are the last line of defense against the GOP’s far-right movement that sparked Jan. 6th, and the first to make progress that defends our democracy — from voting rights to health care. If we don’t step up RIGHT NOW to stop the GOP, we could lose _everything._ We know Governor Sisolak. We know he is determined to fight for a different fate for Nevada. Our movement is about building the unity and compassion that our country needs now more than ever. With less than a year to go until election day, we must recognize elections have consequences, and we’ll continue the work to do everything in our power to ensure we elect leaders who defend our democracy. Peter,

One year ago today, our democracy was scarred forever.
In one of our country's darkest hours, Trump supporters violently stormed the U.S. Capitol in an attempt to overturn the 2020 election. We must never forget the white supremacist flags they flew, the horrifying noose they built, or the five Americans who perished following this tragedy.
It's been clear from the start that we have one person to blame for this shameful attack: Donald Trump. His repeated lies about election fraud and his message to "fight like hell" provoked his supporters to resort to violence – **but he still hasn't been brought to justice one year later.**
Right now, Donald Trump and his associates are doing everything they can to sweep this tragedy under the rug. Nearly every Republican voted against the bipartisan investigation into the attack, and Trump's former chief of staff even refused to answer a subpoena.
**It's up to us to ensure that justice is served, so I urgently need 25,000 concerned Democrats to defend our democracy against Donald Trump before it's too late. I'm counting on you to join me before midnight:**
**Should Donald Trump and his allies be held accountable for inspiring the Jan. 6 insurrection?**

subject: Jan 6th was unspeakable, but this was worse.
body:
Holding the January 6th perpetrators accountable won’t be enough. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40430952/324321573/-573335974?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMWUyMDI4Yy00NzZmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=o1H7_K_21CXtAYkW5-U5u_M-CIplUmpAKOOOsQgO3Ws=)
Friend, I hope you had some time to rest and relax over the New Year. What happened on January 6th is unspeakable. Today is a reminder that our democracy can be taken from us at any time. **What's worse is that 8 GOP senators and 139 GOP Representatives — 147 voted to object or overturn the results of a democratically elected president.** Threats to our democracy have been persistent and will continue. GOP legislatures in states like Texas, have passed laws making it harder to vote, and gerrymandered our state to the point there are no competitive races. In Texas, the GOP successfully purged voter rolls without any evidence of voter fraud, and made it more difficult to vote by mail, all for pure partisan political gain. **This is not the time to give up and let the GOP take over our country. We must hold the GOP accountable.** Join me and let’s make sure we win this race in the brand new Austin district and send an additional Democrat to Congress from Texas to help hold the House in 2022. Donald J. Trump January 6th, 2022
To watch Biden speaking is very hurtful to many people. They're the ones who tried to stop the peaceful transfer with a rigged election. Just look at the numbers. Does anybody really think that Biden beat Obama with the Black population in select Swing State cities, but nowhere else? That he would lose 18 out of 19 bellwether counties, and 27 out of 27 “toss up” House races, but somehow miraculously receive the most votes in American history with no coattails? That he would lose Florida, Ohio, and Iowa and win, even though it has never been done before?

They spread a “web of lies” about me and Russia for 4 years to try to overturn the 2016 election, and now they lie about how they interfered in the 2020 Election, too. Big Tech was used illegally.

Where did all those votes show up from in Georgia, where it was just revealed they sold ballots for $10 a piece, or in Pennsylvania, and Arizona, and Wisconsin. He acts like he's aggrieved, but we're the ones who were aggrieved and America is suffering because of it with poisonous Borders, record Inflation, a humiliating surrender in Afghanistan, $5 a gallon gas and higher, empty stock shelves, and rampant crime. America is a laughingstock stock of the world, and it's all because of the real insurrection, which took place on November 3rd, but this is an election year and MAGA Republicans should get elected and work with me to fix this horror that Joe Biden and the Democrats have brought us.

Never forget the crime of the 2020 Presidential Election. Never give up!

Trump, 45th President of the United States of America | | | ---|---|--- Supporter: Notification Status: Signed Up Donald J. Trump January 6th, 2022 To watch Biden speaking is very hurtful to many people. They're the ones who tried to stop the peaceful transfer with a rigged election. Just look at the numbers. Does anybody really think that Biden beat Obama with the Black population in select Swing State cities, but nowhere else? That he would lose 18 out of 19 bellwether counties, and 27 out of 27 “toss up” House races, but somehow miraculously receive the most votes in American history with no coattails? That he would lose Florida, Ohio, and Iowa and win, even though it has never been done before? They spread a “web of lies” about me and Russia for 4 years to try to overturn the 2016 election, and now they lie about how they interfered in the 2020 Election, too. Big Tech was used illegally. Where did all those votes show up from in Georgia, where it was just revealed they sold ballots for $10 a piece, or in Pennsylvania, and Arizona, and Wisconsin. He acts like he's aggrieved, but we're the ones who were aggrieved and America is suffering because of it with poisonous Borders, record Inflation, a humiliating surrender in Afghanistan, $5 a gallon gas and higher, empty stock shelves, and rampant crime. America is a laughingstock stock of the world, and it's all because of the real insurrection, which took place on November 3rd, but this is an election year and MAGA Republicans should get elected and work with me to fix this horror that Joe Biden and the Democrats have brought us. Never forget the crime of the 2020 Presidential Election. Never give up! | ---|--- Donald J. Trump January 6th, 2022 Biden is working hard to try and deflect the incompetent job he is doing, and has done, on the horrible Afghanistan withdrawal (surrender), the Borders, COVID, Inflation, loss of Energy Independence, and much more. Everything he touches turns to failure. That’s what you get when you have a rigged Election. | ---|--- Donald J. Trump January 6th, 2022 Biden, who is destroying our Nation with insane policies of open Borders, corrupt Elections, disastrous energy policies, unconstitutional mandates, and devastating school closures, used my name today to try to further divide America. This political theater is all just a distraction for the fact Biden has completely and totally failed. Our Country no longer has Borders, has totally and completely lost control of Covid (record numbers!), is no longer Energy Independent, Inflation is rampant, our Military is in chaos, and our exit, or surrender, from Afghanistan was perhaps the most embarrassing day in the long and distinguished history of the United States—and so much more. Why is it that the Unselect Committee of totally partisan political hacks, whose judgment has long ago been made, not discussing the rigged Presidential Election of 2020? It’s because they don’t have the answers or justifications for what happened. They got away with something, and it is leading to our Country’s destruction. They want all conversation concerning the Election “Canceled.” Just look at the numbers, they speak for themselves. They are not justifiable, so the complicit media just calls it the Big Lie, when in actuality the Big Lie was the Election itself. The Democrats want to own this day of January 6th so they can stoke fears and divide America. I say, let them have it because America sees through theirs lies and polarizations. | ---|--- Donald J. Trump January 6th, 2022 Due to inept leadership that gave us open borders, COVID incompetence, loss of energy independence, a military in chaos, rampant inflation, corrupt elections, and lack of world standing, our Nation, perhaps for the first time, has lost its confidence! | ---|--- Donald J. Trump January 5th, 2022 ICYMI: “‘Cover-Up’: House Republicans Demand Nancy Pelosi Answer for ‘Failures’ to Secure Capitol on January 6” Read the full article by Ashley Oliver with Breitbart . | ---|--- Donald J. Trump January 5th, 2022 ICYMI: “Trump leads all Republicans in poll on 2024 presidential election” Read the full article by Mark Moore with the New York Post . | ---|--- Donald J. Trump January 5th, 2022 A great book by Julie Kelly. January 6: How Democrats Used the Capitol Protest to Launch A War on Terror Against the Political Right is a complete exposé of the left's efforts to create violence and then exploit the violence to smear the Republican Party. | ---|--- Donald J. Trump January 5th, 2022 The Biden Administration’s response to COVID is getting worse every day. Joe Biden said, “there is no federal solution” to the pandemic, but he then federalized the distribution of antibodies, and red states are getting the short end of the stick. In my administration, we respected the role of Governors to take care of their own states, and they could request antibodies and therapeutics depending on what they needed. That’s the way our Country is supposed to be run. Now, there’s talk by the Biden Administration again about closing schools and even vaccine mandates for school children. This is an outrage, and MAGA nation should rise up and oppose this egregious federal government overreach. The Democrats are so incredibly mandate happy—there is discussion about a vaccine mandate for school kids this year in Detroit and other Democrat-run places. Our administration did what they said could not be done—vaccines in record time. But we never issued mandates, and I never would! People should be able to choose how they want to govern their own health. The federal government must be reined in and give the people back the freedom to decide whether they want to be vaccinated or not. Joe Biden said he would never issue mandates, but he did it anyway like so many other things. | ---|--- Donald J. Trump January 5th, 2022 What is happening in Chicago with all the school closures is devastating. Democrats are congregating in mass tomorrow to fan the flames of a divide that THEY created, while our kids sit at home watching their futures vanish. It must stop. Educate our children in person or give every dollar spent on education directly to the students so they can get out of these failing government schools! | ---|--- Donald J. But Kyrsten Sinema is once again standing in the way. | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953ylv71NjtRp9uAvapwZeG5Fwod7vf2Q19deFkSzINQB7pYO7Ed0TOwyvjuedJ39zpEnMq3REs_6qpHFEbObeQSefEuosMlyzL6pkt-qavlTwGgZsr_6D6oJWgCgKhVJ_vOmkhci5GBlYVyAVmvKel59Ch_N6HSg4bT4UkrjusDHBD_5BUgCL6y5v2myssyH6-0NK77_ctg1XvYMdw9MpzB7TwrqFAQrgiKsJItYsFH57BnNiyI5GcG52KvBde3uup8JajstMDMqzy6-3kRdxhI7Oi-aPqGImHtExyJCC_l2pZUJ75oKYRWWQkg_EdhXlLFfFYVAsWxbDkFtAEtOIuk0eVm80hT3ZfPtoTqj5oFIyg/3ih/86g09VPEQoKV48EBzJmKvw/h0/Xlxk7fAyQM9DTteLAMMp9OEigsxu7UV3sXqGDmcMxos)
Peter, this just in: According to a new poll, a majority of Arizona voters — 66% — support election reform and are in favor of reforming the Senate filibuster to pass such a bill. That’s two out of every three Arizona voters that support filibuster reform. **So why is Senator Kyrsten Sinema ignoring her constituents and refusing to protect voting rights?** Simple, Peter. She’s bought out by Republican donors and corporate interests, and she’s made it clear, time and again, who she works for in the Senate. **[Arizonans deserve better than this — and we’re speaking up. Will you chip in $3 or whatever you can to the Primary Sinema Project so we can continue building efforts on-the-ground this year to oust Sinema and elect a real Democrat?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wsEvCNw9RRN8fJ6P2o2MeSEHmmbtgjG9VjeJk7nueun2y6lwDbmpogHvORyaHq3LxighHi6Ht1untrZK0egynVDWymc1QdZmUvBm3PffFHKgeUIoixo8ZeeWN8qBUR0HUmvb-0B6kjboF_td8T42OjCrSR-TNoqLVba4Xi1y9EemmqGP6hDx9edE0obfAko_zTMkc0of3hZTxdrjf0lkBlkOuO-Q-7Ue_7s8UqzRAQQF331zHAW4vPcVwDVKgsk-LhH9U-ti4S_gu0BlEzubFTVewRF_tv-cm6Q8v9A6i7LzKNfel9tkMXnz7gEtiDkhhxk-uTMi4mHtAA4FH-p1tsfmAUJ9FvK3DlRhvmIxYyMg/3ih/86g09VPEQoKV48EBzJmKvw/h1/EnQmKEGXVjHF3jkVCLN5uk9Jk839Mzufwe-sPeqKmjI)** **[Contribute $3](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wsEvCNw9RRN8fJ6P2o2MeSEHmmbtgjG9VjeJk7nueun2y6lwDbmpogHvORyaHq3LxZUf4u4W_W9IEQ0tjqgcDeiNzAglZIdE8MfXmmZ4wa415pxaoQgiuTf2nn0_d_nXQM1BMI2jhTqJwhtFsmfPmx9PMt3fOtw7gCwaqzZrLrr5MfmEM0rTnUv6uqTGcxC_nhBenZvuuE22Xc2YxIL8f3NQnrmx30ulI0lmLqVYlcafwtijFJj3_H7fv5SDlsrGPi8yuahVhaRWqDjmRGcP1y5yEgxwgauwwA4fChV6fE6WkeR8Tzb1Dv3wNAuqQEJrrHBg36zm_6ODpr0nTVN5rKD3AUe8SSQ06_TI3vD5joKQ/3ih/86g09VPEQoKV48EBzJmKvw/h2/GKH2o3My605cBU343xVAp2DE-br5vFvFza3oaKwIHzs)** What Sinema doesn’t seem to understand is this: there is no election reform without reforming the filibuster. In fact, there’s no voting rights, protecting abortion access, or raising the minimum wage — all policies that are popular with Arizonans! — without reforming the filibuster. Because of Sinema, serious progress is stalling on the Senate floor. No matter how you look at it, it all comes down to her. clean_body: But Kyrsten Sinema is once again standing in the way. | | | Peter, this just in: According to a new poll, a majority of Arizona voters — 66% — support election reform and are in favor of reforming the Senate filibuster to pass such a bill. That’s two out of every three Arizona voters that support filibuster reform. So why is Senator Kyrsten Sinema ignoring her constituents and refusing to protect voting rights? Simple, Peter. She’s bought out by Republican donors and corporate interests, and she’s made it clear, time and again, who she works for in the Senate. What Sinema doesn’t seem to understand is this: there is no election reform without reforming the filibuster. In fact, there’s no voting rights, protecting abortion access, or raising the minimum wage — all policies that are popular with Arizonans! — without reforming the filibuster. Because of Sinema, serious progress is stalling on the Senate floor. No matter how you look at it, it all comes down to her. It's critical that Sinema reconsider before the Senate goes to a vote before January 17th. — The Primary Sinema Project team | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. | Friends, A year ago today while nearing the end of our time in American Samoa, my heart sank as the nation watched rioters violate our U.S. Capitol during the attempted insurrection. **The violence and the disregard for some of our nation’s most sacred spaces made me question who we are as a country.** I was, however, later inspired to learn of the heroic actions of Capitol police as well as the majority of Congress who came together and ultimately certified the election. **In the end, democracy prevailed on January 6. And I believe democracy will continue to prevail, so long as we elect leaders who are willing to protect it. ** It’s time for a change in leadership from Utah. Utahns are tired of the dysfunction in Congress and leaders interested only in camera time and political gain. It’s time to elect a senator who will bring everyone to the table in unity–which is precisely what I intend to do in the U.S. Senate. I need your help to get there. **Can you donate $22, $100, or $222 to protect democracy?**

name: Bruno Amato
subject: One year ago today
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bruno Amato for Congress
body:
| | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953x-UnXZEV9rwWCU4oSd5EZQK5i5bJ0D_H_09LgcZp5uFE0uIjofAduQty9vNFY-fIJx01XUjbTm2D6OW3zxZqi8wMX-4s00wP75TvOj2Wd4eLhleesxHheD8iCbZK0DSC1W40obCwo8SJ-ZzkNm1jlz0CguZyph_nddukmCXV-XywFKmshEL7QgId82Qib-Z0y3xLZBmlEkm4--L9jwtG70_jHJ6HbZUh8K5Qmndg1xmoypdoYUUX9ZEht3hxOTW7gJqWTU71PvsVjp17hejHb-xf_ZlpkZvIFONj_f-GBO7erPn75oxU0c29xc0VcQJHs/3ih/43HWDDPcQv2UkCUB-SdsjA/h0/RMWmoJjfLAtIMxzXMmeYfw91sEhTTBRNkmGTJAtj6zQ)
---
One year ago today, there was a direct assault on our democracy in an attempt to overthrow a legitimate election. As the majority of our elected officials worked to certify the election and move the process of our democracy forward, a Trump-directed mob descended on the U.S. Capitol.
They attacked the U.S. Capitol Police who bravely tried to hold them back, putting their lives on the line to protect our country. They threatened the lives of members of Congress, of Capitol staff, and threatened the very fabric of our democracy.
One year ago today, I, along with many of you, watched this attack play out in real time. It was one of the most horrifying days our country has witnessed. We came to the very edge of losing our democracy. It was a day that changed all of our lives — including mine.
As a veteran who served to protect our country, I had never imagined this would happen. I thought, in that moment, politics would be put aside and our leaders would unite to stand up against the white supremacist, insurrection mob and the traitors in Congress who aided and abetted the attack. But that sure as hell didn’t happen.
I thought members of the Republican Party would join together, put their own party allegiances aside, and draw the line on an attempt to overthrow the government.
Instead, they united together to protect Trump, protected their traitorous colleagues, downplayed just how close we came to losing our democracy, and have baited and switched every single attempt to bring accountability — Kevin McCarthy included.
Just last week, Republicans blocked the forming of an independent commission to investigate the horrific events of that day.
I couldn’t say it better than U.S. Capitol Police Sergeant Aquilino Gonell, who had to face the mob, has said:
_I feel like they don't have the courage. They demand something from us that they're not willing to do, which is sacrifice their livelihood._
He’s right. We need accountability. We need justice. The Republicans in Congress need to stand up and hold their own colleagues, like the Sedition Caucus and everyone else involved, accountable for their betrayal of our democracy.
I’ll never stop fighting to do my part in making that happen. In solidarity, Bruno

| [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDPAZiEt8wwS6hp5wOIb3CiL3LYIDBfoA-ZFdzBMghaUVu2taY8G0DbdnQYYQ0ze3UDF4CVzCdYl4S3idtNOAN472Su_gTsMzSULZuZIuBGyx2g_Pe-MfpMKo3TG6hbWq07Ph_6vkUuqoTNNTmP2FKM9CwxOrU6W4UJRgcRMbNptStkyjKZd__2whcfbw-peOLh_vNX2zw5FxrfBeR5eaQvw04Rw9MvBUWfUTZilZ01xLETxKMYFpCnJ0VftiXE9kIg/3ih/43HWDDPcQv2UkCUB-SdsjA/h1/fwr_2Duy5vcAQ6xWNJH8rMiv15F2qD-gCotYss4R01c) | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/dSCQfi9FLISmU3ZE3bfPhsIMdFKSaGG0MlwSFX0_NrYgGjYE0lrd4dSfdc3BHj5uNqxvYoIA-ADLZ1E_Pm5gHwV6uPGbWMSRUMtUT2o_DdcV5z1Nl0EkjSuycR0_bxUXfU5i_inuwL1myPJHTmi_VT0PsvjgptVQuYWlxmz8eUunRmJgnpNQbGE1Isp7FyzEhr1Cs6N8wOyfKbrIacCQDDfnQ8Jx_FljtXTQnmWYfphMO5Go_liT4zsskZVnWOuM/3ih/43HWDDPcQv2UkCUB-SdsjA/h2/mWv0fu6cPwtyzGCVS-9E1EN-gWkiE_LhADhZJ-9SUS4)

Bruno has been backed by VoteVets, an organization committed to helping veterans run for office. name: Ron DeSantis
subject: Biden Admits Failure of Central Campaign Promise
body:
[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6647%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=fQB2x%2bvXVfqdtOwNT4YRmQ&sysid=1)
[****](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69565%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=r8aAI2GRu%2bwsvMUfHM6qmw&sysid=1)
Friend,
Throughout the 2020 campaign, Joe Biden demagogued Donald Trump over COVID, blaming Trump for COVID cases while promising that he would “shut down the virus.”
But just recently, his tune changed after seeing his playbook of mandates and restrictions is failing.
Incredibly, Joe Biden told governors from across the country that there “is no federal solution to COVID” and it is now “up to the states to figure things out.”
What a difference a year makes, Friend.
[**HELP ME CONTINUE TO HOLD BIDEN ACCOUNTABLE >>> **](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69566%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=aatMZuH8nd4pcrudnIwx3Q&sysid=1)
Back in August, Biden told me to “get out of the way” if I wouldn’t go along with his administration’s authoritarian, lockdown COVID policies, guided by Dr. Fauci and his (political) “science.”
Now, after months of repeated policy failures and a new variant, Joe Biden has finally admitted that his central campaign promise of “shutting down the virus” was a lie.
[**STAND WITH ME - HOLD BIDEN ACCOUNTABLE!**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69567%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=k3SbZoYdz66Nlpl843U33A&sysid=1)
[**DONATE $50 >>>**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69568%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=C47OC%2f9mdBX1mRqoqnBQFQ&sysid=1)
[**DONATE $30 >>>**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69569%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=EkrQ1hn7%2bKAAPcafCTdrUw&sysid=1)
[**DONATE $25 >>>**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69560%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=eGy8Vq6nl%2bdIPyU105UKqA&sysid=1)
Fortunately, I never caved to Biden’s ineffective and authoritarian government lockdowns and mandates in Florida. Instead, we’ve preserved individual liberty and freedom, kept businesses and schools open, and protected the livelihoods of our workers. And we did all of that while providing information, vaccines, and treatments to Floridians so they could make informed decisions that work best for their families.
When the going got tough, Joe ran back to his basement.
This isn’t leadership. It’s a systemic failure of the entire Biden administration and it deserves to be held accountable AND called out. That's why I'm running for reelection to ensure Biden's lockdowns and mandates never come to Florida.
[**So, can I count on you to step up to the plate to help me hold Biden accountable for his repeated failures by keeping his policies out of Florida? I can’t do this without your continued support - Chip in $50, $30, or $25 now >>> **](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69561%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Dnb8tbmVIbIHofk7N7Jwzg&sysid=1)
Thank you for stepping up and helping us continue the fight.
Sincerely,
Ron DeSantis

clean_body: Friend, Throughout the 2020 campaign, Joe Biden demagogued Donald Trump over COVID, blaming Trump for COVID cases while promising that he would “shut down the virus.” But just recently, his tune changed after seeing his playbook of mandates and restrictions is failing. Incredibly, Joe Biden told governors from across the country that there “is no federal solution to COVID” and it is now “up to the states to figure things out.” What a difference a year makes, Friend. Back in August, Biden told me to “get out of the way” if I wouldn’t go along with his administration’s authoritarian, lockdown COVID policies, guided by Dr. Fauci and his (political) “science.” Now, after months of repeated policy failures and a new variant, Joe Biden has finally admitted that his central campaign promise of “shutting down the virus” was a lie. Fortunately, I never caved to Biden’s ineffective and authoritarian government lockdowns and mandates in Florida. Instead, we’ve preserved individual liberty and freedom, kept businesses and schools open, and protected the livelihoods of our workers. And we did all of that while providing information, vaccines, and treatments to Floridians so they could make informed decisions that work best for their families. When the going got tough, Joe ran back to his basement. This isn’t leadership. It’s a systemic failure of the entire Biden administration and it deserves to be held accountable AND called out. That's why I'm running for reelection to ensure Biden's lockdowns and mandates never come to Florida. Thank you for stepping up and helping us continue the fight. Sincerely, Ron DeSantis "CONTRIBUTE" Paid by Ron DeSantis, Republican, for Governor Ron DeSantis for Governor | 301 W. Platt Street, Suite 345, Tampa, FL 33606 107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314

name: =?utf-8?Q?Amanda?=
subject: Sign the Petition to Get Amanda Makki on the Ballot!
body:
Send in your petition today to put Amanda Makki on the ballot. | |
---
| | |
---
|
### Dear Fellow Patriot,
In just one short year since Joe Biden took office:
* ### We have the worst inflation in over 30 years!
* ### Gas prices have skyrocketed 60 percent in the Tampa Bay Area!
* ### 12 of our largest American cities set new records for murders in 2021!
* ### Over one million illegal aliens have streamed across our border - enough to create the 10th largest city in America!

###
The fastest way to do something about this is to win Republican control of Congress. We can start that right here in Pinellas County by flipping our district**red** and stopping the one-party control of our government.

Twelve Mayors from Madeira Beach to Pinellas Park to Clearwater are supporting me. The widow of our great Republican Congressman Bill Young, Republican groups, and pro-veterans groups have endorsed me.

But what I need most of all is you! I need your vote, your financial support and to secure my position on the ballot, I need your help by signing my petition.

As your nominee for Congress, I will be focused on Election Integrity, securing our borders, and getting people back to work so they are not getting paid to just sit at home.

These issues are not just talking points. After the 2020 election, I went to Wisconsin to work as an attorney alongside President Trump’s lawyers. There is nothing more important than ensuring that our elections are not rigged. I watched as Democrats tried to change the rules – and used Covid as the excuse.

I have also visited the border and have seen the failures of the Biden Presidency firsthand. I toured the border - and saw exactly where illegals are pouring over the border and then coming to Florida - something Kamala Harris and Joe Biden refuse to do! When I am in Congress, I will work to finish building the Trump Wall!

I am determined to retire Nancy Pelosi and flip our seat in Congress but I need your help to get on the ballot.
---
| [Sign the Petition!](https://amandamakki.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e08b08a89872d093efe5d84d&id=117d18b04f&e=c2296cffff "Sign the Petition!")
---
|
### You can mail the ballot to:
Amanda Makki Campaign
P.O. Box 47483
St. Petersburg, FL 33743
###
Or, if you need extras for family and friends, you can visit [www.AmandaMakki.com](https://amandamakki.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e08b08a89872d093efe5d84d&id=1f1a50a525&e=c2296cffff) today to print as many petitions as you need.

Gratefully,
Amanda Makki

---
| [DONATE TODAY!](https://amandamakki.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e08b08a89872d093efe5d84d&id=327e39846c&e=c2296cffff "DONATE TODAY!")

name: Nikki Fried
subject: Remembering January 6th
disclaimer_text: paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
body:
Peter,

On January 6th, 2021, a group of right-wing extremists descended on the U.S. Capitol in a violent attempt to overturn the 2020 election results.

That day was a reminder not only of the danger that radical right-wing politics poses to our country, but of the growing and dire threat to the foundations of our democracy.
One year later, that threat has only grown.

Across the country, politicians like Ron DeSantis are taking extreme measures to harm our democracy and keep us from exercising our right to vote. Every day, they’re pushing our country closer to authoritarianism.

And now, it’s up to us to take action, protect our democracy, and make sure that what happened on January 6th never happens again.

That’s why I used my position as the Commissioner of Agriculture and as the only statewide elected Democrat in Florida to revoke weapons licenses for individuals involved in the treasonous attack on our democracy. And that’s why I’m fully committed to fighting authoritarianism and strengthening our democracy in any way that I can.

I hope you’ll join me in remembering the officers we lost on January 6th, and the loss we, as a nation, have suffered seeing our Capitol and our nation’s founding ideals under attack by our fellow citizens.

Thank you to everyone at the Capitol who put themselves at risk to protect our nation’s most sacred institutions. And thank you to all of you who have spent the past year fighting to hold the perpetrators accountable, strengthen our democracy, and keep our communities safe.

With gratitude,
Nikki

Political advertisement paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
Nikki Fried for Governor
6619 S Dixie Hwy
No. 148
Miami, FL 33143
United States

name: John Fetterman
subject: I don’t care if you’re a Democrat or Republican. Every American should agree on this →
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
I plan to be 100% sedition free. Some of my GOP opponents can’t quite say the same...
#
Derek,
If you were horrified by what you saw on January 6, 2021 understand this 👇
**The GOP is setting the table for 2024 when Donald Trump runs again.**
Just look at what’s happening nation-wide... Republicans are pushing laws in states across the country to suppress the vote and diminish turnout.
In fact, we found out yesterday that *none* of my GOP opponents are willing to go on the record as saying they would have certified PA’s election results, and only one (hint: _not_ Dr. Oz) would admit that Joe Biden beat Donald Trump.
So, with that scary nonsense in mind, what needs to happen one year after January 6? **From my perspective, we MUST eliminate the filibuster + enact groundbreaking and sweeping voting laws IMMEDIATELY.**
Here’s my promise to you: Send me to the US Senate, and I’ll be that 51st vote to abolish the filibuster + hold insurrectionists accountable. 💯
**[If you’re with me, will you make a contribution of $5 or any amount to our campaign and help solidify our Democratic majority?](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/39967?refcode=ema20220106-4105&t=1&akid=4105%2E434096%2EOW3y-g)**
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/39967?refcode=em20220106-4105&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=4105%2E434096%2EOW3y-g)**
Looking back, there’s a clear parallel between the January 6, 2021 insurrection in D.C. and the events of January 5, 2021 in Harrisburg (aka when the PA GOP ejected me from the Senate chamber so they could unlawfully block an incumbent state senator from being sworn in.
Honestly, I don’t care if you’re a Democrat or a Republican. If you’re an American, you know that we can’t let our country devolve into that level of chaos ever again. And Democrat or Republican, I will fight for your right to a free + fair democracy in Washington, just like I have in Pennsylvania.
Thank you for everything,
John
John Fetterman
Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania
P.S. I plan to be 100% sedition-free. Seriously. But some of my Republican opponents can’t quite say the same. **[Would you consider chipping in a few bucks to our campaign today to make sure I have what it takes to beat them in November?](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/39967?refcode=ema20220106-4105&t=21&akid=4105%2E434096%2EOW3y-g)**

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20220106-4105-footer&t=22&refcode2=4105_434096_OW3y-g&akid=4105%2E434096%2EOW3y-g)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)

* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=24&akid=4105%2E434096%2EOW3y-g)

name: Laura Loomer
subject: Held Hostage by the Left
body:
Over the past year, more than 700 Americans in 45 states have been charged in what has been described by the Biden Regime as the biggest criminal investigation in history.
| | | | [](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/GJPP2GBVWtNuEqr8c9892nrg/892FlOUWVPoE4h9b7BNL66FA) | Patriot,

[](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/bguZPS37637IbPDwxYBWIYCQ/892FlOUWVPoE4h9b7BNL66FA) Today is the one year anniversary of January 6th.

Over the past year, more than 700 Americans in 45 states have been charged in what has been described by the Biden Regime as the biggest criminal investigation in history.

All because politicians in Washington were scared of people showing up to demand accountability for the handling of the 2020 elections.

But the real story here is Leftists weaponizing the DOJ and Big Tech to use January 6th as an excuse to arrest hundreds of Americans, silence hundreds of thousands of conservatives on Social Media, and enrage millions of other Leftists with a false narrative about Trump supporters.

| [**STOP THE LEFTIST NARRATIVE**](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/bguZPS37637IbPDwxYBWIYCQ/892FlOUWVPoE4h9b7BNL66FA)
---

The very first victim of the left’s January 6th narrative was Ashli Babbitt, a pro-Trump Air Force veteran, who was shot and killed by a Capitol Police Officer. Her death, and the chaos that played out one year ago today at the Capitol, was then used by Big Tech as justification to ban Donald J Trump while he was a sitting US President.

Big Tech had been chomping at the bit to ban him, and January 6th presented them with the perfect opportunity to do so.

Hundreds of thousands of accounts were banned on various social media platforms in the days and weeks that followed with January 6th being used as the excuse.

Since January 6th, a variety of other excuses have been used by Big Tech to ban conservatives, including what they call “Covid Misinformation”.

The latest prominent conservative to be banned from Twitter was Congresswoman Marjorie Taylor Greene.

Targeted censorship against Conservatives will continue until we take a stand against the Big Tech Mafia. My latest lawsuit will do just that.

[**You can support my lawsuit here.**](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/bguZPS37637IbPDwxYBWIYCQ/892FlOUWVPoE4h9b7BNL66FA)

[**SUPPORT LAURA'S CASE**](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/bguZPS37637IbPDwxYBWIYCQ/892FlOUWVPoE4h9b7BNL66FA)
---

As the “most banned woman in the world”, I’ve filed more cases and have made more headway against Big Tech than any other conservative in the arena.

My last lawsuit led Supreme Court Justice Clarence Thomas to issue a statement regarding the case I filed, in which he said, “ _Today’s digital platforms provide avenues for historically unprecedented amounts of speech, including speech by government actors. Also unprecedented, however, is the concentrated control of so much speech in the hands of a few private parties. We will soon have no choice but to address how our legal doctrines apply to highly concentrated, privately owned information infrastructure such as digital platforms._ ”

And that time is now.

[**Support my latest case against Big Tech today, and help us fight back**](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/bguZPS37637IbPDwxYBWIYCQ/892FlOUWVPoE4h9b7BNL66FA) against Leftists who have been holding the American public hostage with false narratives and techno-fascist control for far too long.

With Respect and Gratitude,

Laura Loomer

[**SUPPORT LAURA'S CASE**](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/bguZPS37637IbPDwxYBWIYCQ/892FlOUWVPoE4h9b7BNL66FA)
---

(C) 2022 Illoominate Media
720 Lucerne Ave, #1465
LAKE WORTH, FL. 33460

[View Web Version](https://libersend.loomered.com/w/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/jNrcjifZkRuM7634SQt2EHxg/892FlOUWVPoE4h9b7BNL66FA)

name: Herschel Walker
subject: It’s a “dead heat”
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
Our campaign is taking nothing for granted. We feel the momentum behind our campaign building, but we need your help. Our campaign is taking nothing for granted. We feel the momentum behind our campaign building, but we need your help. |
---
Fellow American,

We wanted to share some good news with you. Please see the headline below:

[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=ad7363b15ade46aaaf01b3a0baf50762&_e=vChnqmaOH4LQOErZEuxox6Ii28JaOAZpTQn_HHRYeIVPLnLf9PpD3eA7HDmUYW4ISg4qztwmG3YpFN-gX1ktsubHox4xiKRbT2UVAkHJUAAiApacrPdqJxvXt8H502XWcgEG7fj25R7M_HXg9AwSKkuErTKQQlI-qNJveu9X8tRQ9rcoB-Sr2VM-ZLPhrCAlGdpwHPNZEOnavGmGI9s6J_Eq88yQUbM2oBPaCVIYhITZ6wiIw0V2biBfJcJxDr9wBvfzo3m-rtm4wJtTbDGzH56Z2EtpeGXh5USC4OvOG3pdPvBatmbAxyR2K6uqmEL2KIO-hYrq-zWxq-g412ec_mkvdj0UbwH3OXKh_mTunWNW-l3o8QPFlH3khwPB5howsWWbNZf2oHx731QdlnYzPJX-wr2_D8Wd9OVcPIewWzJTpSEcZ4yODoodGzFYhOi_Qm1YusjtLPzPpd-cHdfeBw%3D%3D)
That's right - NBC News reported on December 22nd that a new poll has our campaign pulling ONE POINT ahead of the Democrat incumbent in Georgia - 49% to 48%!

While this is fantastic news, there are some important points to consider:
1. This poll shows the strength of the campaign we're building, but we're still more than 10 months away from Election Day. A lot can - and will - happen between now and November 8.
2. In some states, you can win an election with a plurality like 49%. But in Georgia, we must get a majority of the votes to win, so we still have hard work to do to get over 50%.

clean_body: Our campaign is taking nothing for granted. We feel the momentum behind our campaign building, but we need your help. Our campaign is taking nothing for granted. We feel the momentum behind our campaign building, but we need your help. | Fellow American, We wanted to share some good news with you. Please see the headline below: That's right - NBC News reported on December 22nd that a new poll has our campaign pulling ONE POINT ahead of the Democrat incumbent in Georgia - 49% to 48%! While this is fantastic news, there are some important points to consider: 1. This poll shows the strength of the campaign we're building, but we're still more than 10 months away from Election Day. A lot can - and will - happen between now and November 8. 2. In some states, you can win an election with a plurality like 49%. But in Georgia, we must get a majority of the votes to win, so we still have hard work to do to get over 50%. 3. We are taking nothing for granted. We feel the momentum building for our campaign, but we know it will take an incredible amount of sweat equity to win this race. We need 500 donations before midnight tonight to keep pace with this week's goal. If polls are this tight ten months out from Election Day, then we fully expect this race is going to be a grueling fight to the finish. Even NBC News, which is not known for their fair and balanced reporting, acknowledges that this is going to be one of the MOST COMPETITIVE RACES IN THE NATION. We've already seen the Democrats use this poll to motivate their supporters and raise more money, so there is no time to waste. Please donate $3 or more to our campaign right now. Thank you for your support, Herschel Walker Republican Candidate for Senate | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but ._

Friend,
Throughout the 2020 campaign, Joe Biden demagogued Donald Trump over COVID, blaming Trump for COVID cases while promising that he would "shut down the virus."
But just recently, his tune changed after seeing his playbook of mandates and restrictions is failing.
Incredibly, Joe Biden told governors from across the country that there "is no federal solution to COVID" and it is now "up to the states to figure things out."
What a difference a year makes, Friend.
[**HELP ME CONTINUE TO HOLD BIDEN ACCOUNTABLE >>> **](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zlfcddoe29m2ki3i9o4plb6tmgldu88j1lbi6njo_rp22sh2s8i66ob4cli62pb7c1h2bs)
Back in August, Biden told me to "get out of the way" if I wouldn't go along with his administration's authoritarian, lockdown COVID policies, guided by Dr. Fauci and his (political) "science."
Now, after months of repeated policy failures and a new variant, Joe Biden has finally admitted that his central campaign promise of "shutting down the virus" was a lie.
[**STAND WITH ME - HOLD BIDEN ACCOUNTABLE!**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zg5o0e80s0dlpbk60ptblkadtpv1f1aotspsqqi8_rp22sh2s8i66ob4cli62pb7c1h2bs)
