[**DONATE $30 >>>**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zbfi4cq1ctnicdp1dvnnhoo2mu64g3c8pma6ipm8_rp22sh2s8i66ob4cli62pb7c1h2bs)
[**DONATE $25 >>>**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z67bh0ib03nqc2c0eghfbsqu98t6s9fa0a2svvao_rp22sh2s8i66ob4cli62pb7c1h2bs)
Fortunately, I never caved to Biden's ineffective and authoritarian government lockdowns and mandates in Florida. Instead, we've preserved individual liberty and freedom, kept businesses and schools open, and protected the livelihoods of our workers. And we did all of that while providing information, vaccines, and treatments to Floridians so they could make informed decisions that work best for their families.
When the going got tough, Joe ran back to his basement.
This isn't leadership. It's a systemic failure of the entire Biden administration and it deserves to be held accountable AND called out. That's why I'm running for reelection to ensure Biden's lockdowns and mandates never come to Florida.
[**So, can I count on you to step up to the plate to help me hold Biden accountable for his repeated failures by keeping his policies out of Florida? clean_body: Throughout the 2020 campaign, Joe Biden demagogued Donald Trump over COVID, blaming Trump for COVID cases while promising that h Friend, Throughout the 2020 campaign, Joe Biden demagogued Donald Trump over COVID, blaming Trump for COVID cases while promising that he would "shut down the virus." But just recently, his tune changed after seeing his playbook of mandates and restrictions is failing. Incredibly, Joe Biden told governors from across the country that there "is no federal solution to COVID" and it is now "up to the states to figure things out." What a difference a year makes, Friend. Back in August, Biden told me to "get out of the way" if I wouldn't go along with his administration's authoritarian, lockdown COVID policies, guided by Dr. Fauci and his (political) "science." Now, after months of repeated policy failures and a new variant, Joe Biden has finally admitted that his central campaign promise of "shutting down the virus" was a lie. Fortunately, I never caved to Biden's ineffective and authoritarian government lockdowns and mandates in Florida. Instead, we've preserved individual liberty and freedom, kept businesses and schools open, and protected the livelihoods of our workers. And we did all of that while providing information, vaccines, and treatments to Floridians so they could make informed decisions that work best for their families. When the going got tough, Joe ran back to his basement. This isn't leadership. It's a systemic failure of the entire Biden administration and it deserves to be held accountable AND called out. That's why I'm running for reelection to ensure Biden's lockdowns and mandates never come to Florida. Thank you for stepping up and helping us continue the fight. Sincerely, Ron DeSantis "CONTRIBUTE" Paid by Ron DeSantis, Republican, for Governor Ron DeSantis for Governor | 301 W. I also know exactly where our opponent, Derrick Van Orden, was on that awful day.

We have to fight back. We have to speak for those who cannot speak for themselves. Unborn children deserve the most fundamental human right: The right to live.

**[Save a life, today.](http://links.tedbudd.com/u/click?_t=a2f7882adada427a931a38229f805105&_m=52e8b9dd9989461db0975e963439742b&_e=GX08snn2sPxjNf6nbZT2Wfovix2xLEd6GgPbjO2DVChO4GebuUAnMK0nV9Frr4sSk4TcgUPHFAjDW77VKtd0l8DBSzbysjivqdz3wBcZBc9uEo-aOZylQ8tcYetNuHqUI8eHf1ezI5qvCFkVLsBCT4N01hk7TzP3Q3TIYsdgmlXOluFKciwSr7aJQq7SVQjko2OewYCpwMbW8yz0rleF80z6KtMdtuRQGmLM5e98L8k95O8eoBewrPR5KanhijTXnbpcG-qtaIyLd8o4ZFusRt8EbNBdruIsMZFLnCCYUHvGp423e66jaX2Kybga1iDpg5MEoVX0v8SlTof0_G9qt4EY4DtNV4LIk5F8dvGCbQW8HoI1lqEa-739FA-qY2_x78S94QQmnoAR8LPFw6SI0jsWjHwIXuHHrVr-iSQmepPCGelqas_zgsjScjaBPEeYdOaUPlc9bF1cWNKgibibVUlyD1-mUXVTtBCoB4llnkE%3D)**

body:
Sign on to CONDEMN Trump and all his Republican enablers for their attack on our democracy >>
| | | Exactly one year ago today, in an attempt to overthrow our democratic process, Donald Trump incited a mob of domestic terrorists to storm our Capitol.

Then, instead of holding Trump accountable, his Republicans in Congress fought tooth-and-nail to cover up the truth.

As we look back, it's never been clearer that Trump -- _and the Republicans who have sworn loyalty to him_ \-- have no business holding public office.

[**BEFORE MIDNIGHT: We 're calling on grassroots Democrats everywhere to step up and CONDEMN Trump and his Republican enablers once and for all.**](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/j~)

NAME: dpwillis67@gmail.com
Petition Signature: [PENDING >>](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/6dzecpR84-)
| [Sign Your Name >> ](https://links.e.dccc.)
---

What we witnessed one year ago today repulsed every single one of us at Democratic Headquarters.

And in the days since the January 6 insurrection, Trump and his Republican enablers have worked only to shield themselves from accountability for their despicable actions.

The horrific Capitol attack made it clear that Trump will go down as the most dangerous president in history.

**But please understand: He hasn 't gone anywhere. He still controls the Republican Party, and his enablers in the House are on the verge of retaking power once and for all.**

That's why we cannot let Trump and his Republicans' attacks on our democracy continue for one second longer.

**We must join together like never before to CONDEMN Trump and his Republicans in the strongest way possible.******
| [RIGHT NOW: Sign on to CONDEMN Trump and all his Republican enablers for their attack on our democracy >>](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/wm-)
---

Thank you for your action in this historic moment.

\- All of us at the DCCC
---

Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc.org/contact/) | www.dccc.org | Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
---

We believe that emails are a crucial way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters. However, if you'd just like to receive fewer emails, you can click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/dccc-e-mail-options?m=46208996&r=MTI3NTcwMTg1MDQyNQS2&j=MjE2MDYzODYyMQS2&l=14314890&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com).

We're working hard to make sure we protect our Democratic Majority \-- and to put an end to Republicans' obstruction for good. President Biden can't do it all. We need all hands on deck if we're going to fight back against Republicans and expand our historic Majority. Our success relies on grassroots supporters like you. 99% of our contributions come from grassroots donations, with an average gift of $19. If you'd like to unsubscribe from DCCC emails, click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/dccc-e-mail-options?m=46208996&r=MTI3NTcwMTg1MDQyNQS2&j=MjE2MDYzODYyMQS2&l=14314890&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com). If you'd like to make an online donation, click [here](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dcccactblue?amount=25). Thanks for your support of Democrats!

Contributions or gifts to the DCCC are not tax deductible.

Join us for a demonstration to restore our democracy TONIGHT!

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/6796873db63a/i-am-running-for-congress-8785850?e=356c0699dd)
https://MikeVanSomeren.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a8d3e4f455e56b0d81700f39a&id=05b004dad5&e=356c0699dd
Hi there,

We wanted to make sure you saw Mike’s invitation for you to join us this Thursday, the one-year anniversary of the Capitol Insurrection, for an outdoor demonstration at 5:30 PM outside the Waukesha Dems office.

There will be events all over the country commemorating the anniversary and we hope you can join us for our event in downtown Waukesha. Mike will also be unveiling a plan to help restore our democracy. You can find more information about the event below.

We hope to see you there,

Team Mike Van Someren for Congress.

Please Note: we encourage you to join us for the outdoor program, but attendance for the indoor portion will be restricted due to Covid-19. Masks must be worn by all attendees at all times and social distancing will be enforced as we follow public health guidelines to keep us all safe.
Folks,

January 6th is the one-year anniversary of the darkest day of our democracy’s recent history.

It’s the day that Donald Trump and his allies like Scott Fitzgerald, then a brand-new Congressman whose first substantive vote was to overturn a lawful election, empowered and encouraged a group to storm the United States Capitol in an attempted coup.

That day demonstrated to all of us just how far our fragile democracy has been eroded, and how critical it is that we protect it.

That’s why I’m inviting you to join us on the anniversary of the Capitol Insurrection on Thursday, January 6th at 5:30 PM, at the Waukesha Dems office, as I roll out a comprehensive plan to restore and strengthen our Democracy.

Join us as Mike rolls out his plan on
RESTORING OUR DEMOCRACY
on the anniversary of the insurrection

THURSDAY, JANUARY 6TH
5:30 pm | Outdoor flag waving
6:00 pm | Indoor program*

WAUKESHA DEMS OFFICE 336 Wisconsin Ave, Waukesha, WI 53186 (https://MikeVanSomeren.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a8d3e4f455e56b0d81700f39a&id=f8027b38a9&e=356c0699dd)

* Indoor attendance will be limited to ensure social distancing. All attendees must be vaccinated and remain masked at all times they are indoors.

Our democracy is not set in stone. It’s fragile, and the events of the last four years have brought it dangerously close to its breaking point.

Doing nothing is no longer an option. It’s past time for us to stand up and take our democracy back.

I hope you can join me on the 6th as I roll out my comprehensive plan to do just that.

I’ll see you then,

Mike Van Someren

============================================================

subject: An important note
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tony Cárdenas For Congress P
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40432013/324344088/-1119657662?refcode=header-img&amount=25&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTE2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOTZhYmYyOS01NTZmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EiSo-HXRsclOv-VWdgFoBOA9hysxxHan-dGccyWva9c=)
---
Peter,

On the anniversary of the January 6th insurrection, I wanted to send you a note reflecting on last year’s events.

Make no mistake: what happened was an attempted coup orchestrated and encouraged by Donald Trump and his allies in Congress.

Those who incited violence, encouraged this insurrection, and baselessly lied about the outcome of our lawful presidential election must be held accountable. That is why I was one of the first members of Congress to call for the immediate impeachment and removal of the former President.

Unfortunately, even with all the damning evidence that was presented before the Senate, Republicans refused to listen because they were too concerned about their political careers instead of the future and safety of America.

To the selfless heroes who protected us that day, like Eugene Goodman and the Capitol Police who were on the frontline – thank you. You kept us safe as Trump’s murderous mob stormed the Capitol. In the face of metal rods and bear mace, you remained undeterred in protecting the citadel of our republic. We owe you an unpayable debt.

Speaking the truth has never been more important. We must not be intimidated into submission. I will continue to push for those who participated or orchestrated this insurrection to be held accountable.

Thank you,

Rep. Tony Cárdenas
| | Paid for by Tony Cárdenas For Congress P.O. Box 15320, Washington, DC 20003
www.tonycardenas.com

Democrat Tony Cárdenas is a father, husband, second-generation immigrant, and a champion in Congress for working families. He is a tireless advocate for commonsense policies that will improve the lives of working families.

name: Rand Paul
subject: re: big news!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for Senate |
body:
[](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=ba80ca55b01445d2b0fdc388d91e8738&_e=kFo7iZA-1TCIIG6G6DripIeER5jK6OzZF2xEINGiVvMQuXaTIljxbjITpG1FPrMouV3s_Ij21U4BEFIP3AfEScPQBxvWOCbAkD5SGwHcUJm3dAaz1b60KYBd_g7-xvnnmZ2ZOHxwRNCLLVk37-XjAjfThDJgC__OJREeN8entMZUV7YW3pXEopUK0bpFTRsquRh3ucSuZxBo-ODAliHRTmaxGm-0hL7IUuJfDu1wRIZCoih15vKaozaZJHGJx4Askq65poiQaacQ-T6lV3kITTP2WVkSDcRgXh4Yak5MdTUw-YoULEIDIvqzZh8tdpcH5QE_sP39YBiZiSwwNiuIwYrlg8d26O7Zuodcoudc63gxrMaEH51E2fClvtCGpl9T8nRLzBoTUZ7TENzUVTmZr9Fd7A0nwgauOXc22mVbQo0%3D) | |
---
Peter, in just the last few years, we’ve seen liberal government wreak havoc on our way of life.

From nationwide rioting and violent protests to unconstitutional lockdowns, to mask mandates and record-setting inflation, Americans are facing difficult times.

And an out-of-control, Democrat-led Congress and liberal president in the White House isn’t helping. Instead of providing solutions, they continue to pour billions of taxpayer dollars into pet projects and bad investments.

That’s why today, I’m officially announcing my campaign for reelection to serve the people of Kentucky - and the whole liberty movement - in the Senate for another term.

# [Arizona Crossing Sees 2,404.9% Hike in Illegal Immigrants Over Last Year](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57568&L=26554&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvYXJpem9uYS1jcm9zc2luZy1zZWVzLTI0MDQtOS1oaWtlLWluLWlsbGVnYWwtaW1taWdyYW50cy1vdmVyLWxhc3QteWVhci8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1jb3JydXB0aW9uK2Nocm9uaWNsZXMmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==)
As illegal immigration continues to slam American cities near the Mexican border, one Arizona town in particular is feeling the heat with a ghastly 2,404.9% increase in migrants during the first two months of fiscal year 2022—which started in October—compared to the same period last year. Situated around 10 miles from Mexico on the banks of the Colorado River, Yuma, in southwestern Arizona, began to see an unprecedented influx of illegal aliens in fiscal year 2021 along with the nation’s other Border Patrol sectors. In 2021 eight of the nine crossing stations along the southern border saw triple-digit percentage increases in illegal immigrants over the previous year, according to government figures. Yuma took the prize with an unbelievable 1,200.4% hike in apprehensions at the end of the fiscal year in September.
[Read More](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57568&L=26554&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvYXJpem9uYS1jcm9zc2luZy1zZWVzLTI0MDQtOS1oaWtlLWluLWlsbGVnYWwtaW1taWdyYW50cy1vdmVyLWxhc3QteWVhci8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1jb3JydXB0aW9uK2Nocm9uaWNsZXMmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==)

### [New York’s racialized coronavirus priorities are illegal and warrant DOJ investigation, critics say ](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=57568&L=26555&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvbnktcmFjaWFsaXplZC1jb3ZpZC8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1jb3JydXB0aW9uK2Nocm9uaWNsZXMmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==) Fox News New York is blatantly violating the Constitution and should be investigated by the Department of Justice (DOJ) for prioritizing non-White individuals for certain coronavirus treatments, critics told Fox News.

Tom Fitton, who leads the conservative group Judicial Watch, similarly told Fox News that the Justice Department should investigate the issue as it constitutes a form of illegal discrimination. clean_body: As illegal immigration continues to slam American cities near the Mexican border, one Arizona town in particular is feeling the heat with a ghastly 2,404.9% increase in migrants during the first two months of fiscal year 2022—which started in October—compared to the same period last year. | | | Because no one is above the law! | January 05, 2022 ---|---|--- | | == == As illegal immigration continues to slam American cities near the Mexican border, one Arizona town in particular is feeling the heat with a ghastly 2,404.9% increase in migrants during the first two months of fiscal year 2022—which started in October—compared to the same period last year. Situated around 10 miles from Mexico on the banks of the Colorado River, Yuma, in southwestern Arizona, began to see an unprecedented influx of illegal aliens in fiscal year 2021 along with the nation’s other Border Patrol sectors. In 2021 eight of the nine crossing stations along the southern border saw triple-digit percentage increases in illegal immigrants over the previous year, according to government figures. Yuma took the prize with an unbelievable 1,200.4% hike in apprehensions at the end of the fiscal year in September. == | | | == Fox News New York is blatantly violating the Constitution and should be investigated by the Department of Justice (DOJ) for prioritizing non-White individuals for certain coronavirus treatments, critics told Fox News. Tom Fitton, who leads the conservative group Judicial Watch, similarly told Fox News that the Justice Department should investigate the issue as it constitutes a form of illegal discrimination. == == Judicial Watch AG Garland testified that he based his memorandum off of a letter from the National School Board Association (NSBA) that labeled parents as “domestic terrorists.” The National School Boards Association later issued an apology for the letter. In November, Republicans on the House Judiciary Committee questioned the completeness of Garland’s testimony. == The Washington Times Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton said he was permanently banned from TikTok, the popular social media video platform with China-based ownership. The head of the conservative activist group said he was removed from TikTok without an explanation. = = = = == == | CLIPS | | | | | | Keep our investigators on the job uncovering the truth: | = | | | | ---|---|--- = = = Judicial Watch, Inc. 425 3rd St Sw Ste 800, Washington, DC 20024 202.646.5172 (C)2017-2022, All Rights Reserved = |

body:
Trump refused to tell his supporters to stop attacking the U.S. Capitol
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40432151/324346183/689143012?code=jtk2079-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NzFkZWNkZS01NTZmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CHX5bIjHYvMWC-EvNpnRpSB4NqrmLjdXCTJJwYHETEA=&emci=886cc09a-816d-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=971decde-556f-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=20244100)
---
Friend – one year ago today, my colleagues and I crouched down in the gallery of the House, fearing for the worst. As we put on gas masks, Trump supporters ran through the halls, waving Confederate flags and threatening to hang the vice president.
While my colleagues and I feared for our lives, Republican leaders texted Trump's chief of staff to urge the former president to stop the escalating violence. But Trump refused to tell his supporters to stop attacking the U.S. Capitol. People died as a result, including five Capitol Police officers.
**Now, Trump and his associates are doing everything they can to sweep this tragedy under the rug. Trump's chief of staff is even refusing to cooperate with the congressional bipartisan investigation.**
As a congresswoman, as a former chief of police and as an American, I firmly believe that NO ONE is above the law. That's why I argued the case for Trump's first impeachment in front of the Senate, and that's why I voted to investigate the Jan. 6 riot.
**Today, on Jan. 6, I'm asking you to join me in speaking out to hold Trump accountable, uphold our rule of law and preserve our democracy. If we fail to act during this dark moment, we'll continue to see attacks that undermine our democracy. That's why I'm counting on you today:**
**[Please, before my petition closes at midnight tonight, will you add your name to demand accountability for Donald Trump?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40432152/324346184/689143012?code=jtk2079-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NzFkZWNkZS01NTZmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CHX5bIjHYvMWC-EvNpnRpSB4NqrmLjdXCTJJwYHETEA=&emci=886cc09a-816d-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=971decde-556f-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=20244100)**
| | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40432153/324346185/689143012?code=jtk2079-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NzFkZWNkZS01NTZmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CHX5bIjHYvMWC-EvNpnRpSB4NqrmLjdXCTJJwYHETEA=&emci=886cc09a-816d-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=971decde-556f-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=20244100)

Val Demings

Florida will determine whether Democrats keep our Senate majority – that’s why Republicans are pouring millions of dollars into this race to crush our movement _and_ keep Florida red _permanently_. Our grassroots campaign is off to a great start, but in a race as close as this one, I need your help to surge ahead and defend the Senate. | | Loyal Conservative Patriot, **[I'm proud to endorse Jarome Bell for U.S. Congress in Virginia](https://JaromeBellForCongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=998fb70d47f315dfa6664b71d&id=fd8983974b&e=af4b86f5c6). ** Jarome Bell is a true America First patriot and we need him in Congress yesterday. I worked with Jarome on border issues. He's not messing around and he's ready to deport criminals and seal the border.

Jarome is one of the Republican Party’s best chances at returning honesty to Washington, D.C.,” Gosar said.

Chief Bell is fighting harder than anyone out there to
* fully investigate the November 3rd election,
* to bring awareness to the enemy invasion at the border,
* to eradicate the anti-white racism invading our schools through CRT,
* to end the satanic attacks on our Christian faith, and
* to end medical tyranny, vaccine apartheid, and totalitarian covid controls exploding across our nation.

I give Jarome Bell my complete and unreserved endorsement in his run for U.S. House in Virginia’s 2nd district. A vote for a Jarome is a vote for America First. Thanks to American Patriots like you, Jarome's campaign has gained MASSIVE traction, and he's ready to join me in Congress and take the message of America First to the Democrats and lying media. _But Jarome needs your help now more than ever._ Like every campaign, we don't have the big PAC dollars the RINOs have. Jarome needs to purchase costly television and radio ads to get our message out. **[By contributing to Jarome's campaign today, you are directly helping him to spread the word about his RINO Never-Trumper opponent](https://JaromeBellForCongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=998fb70d47f315dfa6664b71d&id=bd651626aa&e=af4b86f5c6).** **[And Jarome intends to work with President Trump to put America First](https://JaromeBellForCongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=998fb70d47f315dfa6664b71d&id=7e0dcf14e5&e=af4b86f5c6).** We are now in a messaging war down the homestretch. Don’t let the old GOP Establishment message -- the one you voted against when you supported President Trump in 2016 and 2020 -- win out. **[Send Jarome to Congress to help me keep the America First momentum alive by contributing $5, $10, $25, $50, $100, $250, or anything you can afford to Jarome's campaign today](https://JaromeBellForCongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=998fb70d47f315dfa6664b71d&id=f1e59aadab&e=af4b86f5c6).** Thank you in advance for your generosity. Respectfully, **Dr. Paul Gosar** **P.S.** [I'm asking you to contribute to Jarome Bell for U.S. Congress to help him defeat the fully funded by RINO Swamp Creatures in D.C. who have always worked AGAINST the interests of America First](https://JaromeBellForCongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=998fb70d47f315dfa6664b71d&id=f4b5ea0f9c&e=af4b86f5c6).

name: =?utf-8?q?Melanie_D=E2=80=99Arrigo?=
subject: SHARE: Remembering January 6th
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Melanie Darrigo
body:
| | | [Please share this post remembering January 6th on Facebook](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDPAZiEt8wwS6hp5wOIb3CiI-_UQyUi24ehQTGuZUN963kMdPpBvbL5rPYHy0ZBYPmbDfwGrpGAb2WAy25fp13cTiTFnL0rfSTqcQYGxmo73w3D_YJkHJLZdTDvz95UErsOsASRyfgGO4uv5B1yG5NgKac_I32vYAkNTZiJeVjAu9Z-ykMVZEkRywIvQV0dwjHWmTzsV7ixN4GZaUn_Lxvnftv2brird-xewjsf0lWUArXH314t6GueYg4ohcuC-KRxKgqk5sAAP9Od_yjI_MnvKKhMkcPF-8zKKFGbG3m-75epVIwMXPNaueYEVTUl2Dxpq96mG1SWIK--_spCkiiJk/3ih/Hjs2B1mKSlilfmdVwND6TQ/h0/9lX95YqsR0b-pRBgNTaUIH9sA9TaSRnOGisN8u_90Ac) and [Twitter](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/dSCQfi9FLISmU3ZE3bfPhjBs_5FwmSGrHkV7y_EvHZ3KztzkHKVnom9MCIahKWh_siF-iL_V5ARGwsfSkv3OAgZqks4Qr2UMdPtAPTiopqcd-Y6qFKCXeOwlwLxevHecRysSDeSO-nkwtttsxhHzCvWOtUEAI0ox2o_w0v2BRVRNgf-nzcjvDdMGba5sNgvzp-J_YEt_dN7svE7fYhhNRo8OiiQad1iZbSgE3E5uANIzNdChYehsRC4x5hoUiIKCBjNIezsl-TvA0fs9JMKXmrJwOU7FGEO6dNEjndM4EQnno8MonMGLDTsrZGZCX5dl/3ih/Hjs2B1mKSlilfmdVwND6TQ/h1/e3Sve6Gv1IcJgJX_2675CotvOymGDwQubvnoF1bND10).
January 6th of 2021 was a day that many of us won’t forget – a day filled with trauma, fear, nervousness, and shock as we all watched a mob of insurrectionists violently storm our Capitol, attack police officers, terrorize our lawmakers, and threaten our Democracy. The vivid images of crowds in MAGA and riot gear chanting things like “take it back” and “U.S.A.” remain clear in many Americans’ heads.

I clearly remember the feeling of helplessness and anguish as I sat at home with my husband and three children and watched Trump supporters breach the security barriers outside the Capitol in the name of their former President. I listened in despair as President Trump spoke at a press conference just outside the White House, moments before the attack, encouraging his followers to “walk down to the Capitol” to “take back our country” not with “weakness” but “with strength”. His baseless claims about voter fraud and a rigged election fueled the fury of his supporters outside the Capitol and emboldened them to act out in violence with no regard for our Democracy.
But as many of us use the anniversary of this devastating attack to reflect on the past year, our far-right counterparts have already begun to rewrite history. Many of them have baselessly claimed that the entire event was a hoax and premeditated set-up by the FBI or the Democrats. At the same time, some Congressional representatives have refused to support the establishment of a special commission or committee to investigate the insurrection and its participants.
**This attempt to rewrite history can set a dangerous precedent but at this moment, we all have the opportunity to do better. This is not an issue for the left or the right to deal with, but a critical moment for all of us to unite and move forward as a Democracy.**
[Agree with Melanie? Share this post on Facebook](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDPAZiEt8wwS6hp5wOIb3CiI-_UQyUi24ehQTGuZUN963kMdPpBvbL5rPYHy0ZBYPmbDfwGrpGAb2WAy25fp13cTiTFnL0rfSTqcQYGxmo73wBD3V7E3kRRujH6cZjd33yyqu_IzraBxm7YrcQAV57bzqsP598Y-IIp58JO46qwTcb1X_4mAYszGREHyG31fVWTJl8_Kz5sTRvQZ54Z_bNeGdj43DTNbZy-7jLmGgHUUBHIBTy34E1wSUBY8AoRrsw35XiGYZw_uQNeWq5uRfWPcvqshGHNA_XsJ7nLtZUAKz1GRFnT8RZx-w62TC-wLD2a4p-z0P-Wj_Gh-J6Ui90EA/3ih/Hjs2B1mKSlilfmdVwND6TQ/h2/mduSkoIba0CPxPX5pQaBisytOYmW72l_82ETO5pPCcs) and [Twitter](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/dSCQfi9FLISmU3ZE3bfPhjBs_5FwmSGrHkV7y_EvHZ3KztzkHKVnom9MCIahKWh_siF-iL_V5ARGwsfSkv3OAjM89bkDVlKYRRLWb8X_NvSx-rDJk4n0wPsiwlcTT315Vs4u8Q3iRHZYMdWVRMup75wsbfMYw-QQQzK0Btu1d-MdTx4E5ooKfxM9afd_x2qzkA7MKndjVdGomeC-7DeX9POSicQVtSFjB_JBJGaGJ6I7AeTYm5XflbyNd-CEnM9pWqNbLYIUnvQ-XBtr64fF4JHRU4euaJcn8AspAnZ203mc8ATWiuCAdr6q1nxgZocq/3ih/Hjs2B1mKSlilfmdVwND6TQ/h3/rq1abxU_jmzcxPoCCJ4kNck10qP24U_V4P5yQja4KfY).
The reality is that January 6th was just a small glimpse into the world that can erupt if we continue to elect leaders who lead with fear, anger, hatred, and violence as opposed to courage, acceptance, and principle. clean_body: | | | and . January 6th of 2021 was a day that many of us won’t forget – a day filled with trauma, fear, nervousness, and shock as we all watched a mob of insurrectionists violently storm our Capitol, attack police officers, terrorize our lawmakers, and threaten our Democracy. The vivid images of crowds in MAGA and riot gear chanting things like “take it back” and “U.S.A.” remain clear in many Americans’ heads. I clearly remember the feeling of helplessness and anguish as I sat at home with my husband and three children and watched Trump supporters breach the security barriers outside the Capitol in the name of their former President. I listened in despair as President Trump spoke at a press conference just outside the White House, moments before the attack, encouraging his followers to “walk down to the Capitol” to “take back our country” not with “weakness” but “with strength”. His baseless claims about voter fraud and a rigged election fueled the fury of his supporters outside the Capitol and emboldened them to act out in violence with no regard for our Democracy. But as many of us use the anniversary of this devastating attack to reflect on the past year, our far-right counterparts have already begun to rewrite history. Many of them have baselessly claimed that the entire event was a hoax and premeditated set-up by the FBI or the Democrats. At the same time, some Congressional representatives have refused to support the establishment of a special commission or committee to investigate the insurrection and its participants. This attempt to rewrite history can set a dangerous precedent but at this moment, we all have the opportunity to do better. This is not an issue for the left or the right to deal with, but a critical moment for all of us to unite and move forward as a Democracy. and . The reality is that January 6th was just a small glimpse into the world that can erupt if we continue to elect leaders who lead with fear, anger, hatred, and violence as opposed to courage, acceptance, and principle. The insurrection left many right-wing conservatives with their own distorted reality, but it also left everyone else with a taste of the world that would exist if we allow hatred and entitlement to govern our country. If the right people don’t stand up for what is right, our future – and our children’s future – is in jeopardy. I am running to represent New York’s Third Congressional District because as a mom of three, I want to help create a world where unity is part of our core values. I’m running to create a world for them that is defined by love and compassion for our neighbors - even the ones we don’t know and have never met. I’m running because care for our communities looks like paid family leave, free childcare, universal preschool, affordable care for our seniors, and a healthy planet for my children to grow old in. I’m running because our children deserve a world free from the COVID pandemic, just as much as they deserve a world free from the gun violence pandemic. And I’m running because we urgently need to pass voting rights legislation so everyone can have a say in the policies that shape our lives. and . For four years, President Trump fueled the fears of the right with hate speech, unfounded conspiracy theories, and by feeding into racist generalizations of minority groups – yet working-poor families across the country continued to face many of the same hardships that they had been facing for generations. What working families need right now is a leader who is willing to put them first and who will ensure they receive the resources they need to get through this pandemic and beyond. As a lifelong New Yorker, I understand the adversity and inequity that working-poor families face because I’ve lived it. Now, I am running for Congress because together we can create a better, more just, government that works for, not against, our families. We need change and with me, Long Islanders will see that change. and . | is a mother of three and healthcare advocate running for New York's 3rd District on Medicare for All and the Green New Deal. name: Kara Hahn
subject: What our representative did on January 6th

|

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40432285/324350353/922507959?refcode=em21_emailheader&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZWQ1OTY1YS01OTZmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aWikRq2xi2HYl4feQI8TW1omFig-4VcPTnVDqDT57GI=)

Friends,

One year ago today, Americans watched as a mob of Trump supporters turned the simple formality of certifying the results of the 2020 election into a full-blown insurrection, storming the capitol, assaulting and killing police officers, and vandalizing everything in their path.

Donald Trump and his army of enablers are entirely responsible for the events of January 6th, 2021. We witnessed the deadly consequences of unchecked lies and a refusal to accept simple, verifiable truths.

When the dust settled, there was _one_ clear choice for our elected representatives **– to verify the election results and clear away any suspicion of fraud – to carry out the peaceful transfer of power as Congress has done for hundreds of years.**

**Here's what our representative, Lee Zeldin, chose to do instead:** As a member of Congress representing Long Island, Zeldin decided to stand by the insurrectionists and Donald Trump. **As our voice in Congress, he stood in front of the nation and voted against verifying the election results, absurdly citing what he called “evidence-filled issues."**

Zeldin calls himself a patriot, but after watching capitol police officers be beaten, maimed, and even killed defending our democracy, **he continued to fan the flames of disinformation and even voted against the bipartisan commission to investigate the attack.**

When we reflect on the events of January 6th, we need to remember that many of our own leaders were a part of the attack on American democracy. We deserve better than Zeldin, better than any Trump-loving sycophant.

In 2022, it's our mission to flip this seat and defend our democracy from those who care more about maintaining power than healing our nation.

**[Team, if you want to ensure that no one like Zeldin gets to represent our community again, chip in $5 to flip this seat blue with me. Together, we can prevent another craven politician from compromising the values Long Islanders hold dear.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/40432286/324350354/1150476578?refcode=em22_220106_January6th_pm&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZWQ1OTY1YS01OTZmLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDkyM2MiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aWikRq2xi2HYl4feQI8TW1omFig-4VcPTnVDqDT57GI=)**

Thank you,

Kara Hahn

| Kara Hahn is a lifelong Long Islander, social worker, county legislator, and candidate for Congress in NY-01. clean_body: | = Friends, One year ago today, Americans watched as a mob of Trump supporters turned the simple formality of certifying the results of the 2020 election into a full-blown insurrection, storming the capitol, assaulting and killing police officers, and vandalizing everything in their path. Donald Trump and his army of enablers are entirely responsible for the events of January 6th, 2021. We witnessed the deadly consequences of unchecked lies and a refusal to accept simple, verifiable truths. When the dust settled, there was one clear choice for our elected representatives – to verify the election results and clear away any suspicion of fraud – to carry out the peaceful transfer of power as Congress has done for hundreds of years. Here's what our representative, Lee Zeldin, chose to do instead: As a member of Congress representing Long Island, Zeldin decided to stand by the insurrectionists and Donald Trump. As our voice in Congress, he stood in front of the nation and voted against verifying the election results, absurdly citing what he called “evidence-filled issues." Zeldin calls himself a patriot, but after watching capitol police officers be beaten, maimed, and even killed defending our democracy, he continued to fan the flames of disinformation and even voted against the bipartisan commission to investigate the attack. When we reflect on the events of January 6th, we need to remember that many of our own leaders were a part of the attack on American democracy. We deserve better than Zeldin, better than any Trump-loving sycophant. In 2022, it's our mission to flip this seat and defend our democracy from those who care more about maintaining power than healing our nation. = Thank you, Kara Hahn | Kara Hahn is a lifelong Long Islander, social worker, county legislator, and candidate for Congress in NY-01. This open seat is a must win for Democrats to defend our majority in the House and continue driving progress in America, but we can't do it without your help. Make a recurring donation to sustain our movement for the long haul and send Kara to Congress! = = *

name: Mario DeSantis
subject: More like a pandemic potluck (rescheduled for 01/18)
body:
**Hello beautiful people -**
**
**
The worst news _always_ comes at the most inconvenient times, but I'm not sure there's a roadblock large enough to stop our momentum. I tested positive for COVID-19 yesterday (breakthrough) and will be in quarantine through next week. For all our safety, we're rescheduling our Potluck & Politics New Year meeting to Tuesday, January 18 from 6-8 PM. I hope this hasn't caused too much of an inconvenience for you and hope you'll still be able to make it!

For those looking to register, head on over to [DeSantisForCongress.com](http://DeSantisForCongress.com) and sign up for the event at the bottom of our website.

I appreciate your flexibility! Stay safe!

Mario

For those looking to register, head on over to and sign up for the event at the bottom of our website. I appreciate your flexibility! Stay safe! Mario

name: Larry Elder
subject: BIG news
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELDER FOR AMERICA
body:
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59183419:JD94n2EBN:m:1:3253819041:96B9E093CD64E52D26A088D45109A9AB:r)
---
I have big news, Peter - and I wanted you to be among the first to know.

I just launched my new political action committee called **Elder for America PAC!**

_Why am I doing this?_ **Because we have a country to save, and I will not sit on the sidelines.**

[**JOIN LARRY TO SAVE AMERICA MAKE A WEEK 1 CONTRIBUTION -> **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59183419:JD94n2EBN:m:1:3253819041:96B9E093CD64E52D26A088D45109A9AB:r)
Elder for America PAC will engage in public education campaigns, direct voter contact, and fundraising **to help Republicans win key seats in the House and Senate and take back majorities in the 2022 midterms.**

We will also focus on races and policies at the local level that affect public safety and education - two key areas where Americans are being failed.

[**I 'm reaching out because I cannot do this alone. If you're ready to join me in the fight to save America, please be among the first to join my team with a Week 1 contribution of $25 or more to support the mission of Elder for America PAC.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59183419:JD94n2EBN:m:1:3253819041:96B9E093CD64E52D26A088D45109A9AB:r)

[**JOIN LARRY TO SAVE AMERICA MAKE A WEEK 1 CONTRIBUTION -> **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59183419:JD94n2EBN:m:1:3253819041:96B9E093CD64E52D26A088D45109A9AB:r)
The radical left's woke agenda is destroying America. Our major cities look like warzones thanks to 'progressive' district attorneys and other pro-criminal policies.

Our children are being sent to school, not to learn, but to be indoctrinated.

Democrat leadership is hell bent on ruining the economy, either through massive inflation or draconian mandates for workers and employers.

Rather than steadfastly protecting our constitutional rights, they are actively seeking to chip away at them until they no longer exist.

**I for one have had enough** , which is why I am determined to fight for important issues in places where we can make a real difference in the outcome.

[**JOIN LARRY TO SAVE AMERICA MAKE A WEEK 1 CONTRIBUTION -> **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59183419:JD94n2EBN:m:1:3253819041:96B9E093CD64E52D26A088D45109A9AB:r)
Winning back Republican majorities in the House and Senate that can put a stop to the radical and failed agenda being pushed by the leftist politicians in control is the first step to saving our country.

[**But to win this fight and others, I need you on my team. Be among the first to throw your hat in the ring with me by making a Week 1 contribution to Elder for America PAC of $25 or more.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59183419:JD94n2EBN:m:1:3253819041:96B9E093CD64E52D26A088D45109A9AB:r)

**We have a country to save** - and with patriots like you on my team, _I know we can!_

Thanks,

Larry Elder

P.S. We have a long fight ahead of us to save our country, but this is the only chance there is to be a Week 1 supporter of Elder for America PAC. [**Will you stand alongside me in this fight from the beginning?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59183419:JD94n2EBN:m:1:3253819041:96B9E093CD64E52D26A088D45109A9AB:r)
Thanks! -Larry

name: Mia McLeod
subject: Here we go!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mia for South Carolina
body:
Election year is here: | | | Thank you, friend. We hit our End-of-Year goal before the clock struck midnight on New Year’s Eve, which means we’re starting 2022 on the strongest note possible! Now, the real work begins: It’s time to staff up, start organizing our field operations, and launch digital ads to help us show South Carolinians what’s at stake this year. We can either have another four years of McMaster’s “leadership” — more needless deaths due to mismanagement of the pandemic, more communities left behind, and more people leaving our state in search of better opportunities elsewhere. **Or, we can usher in a new era of governance that looks out for the wellbeing of ALL South Carolinians, listens to the facts and science, and builds a state we can all be proud of.** I’m so grateful to have you on this team because I know we won’t be able to defeat Henry McMaster without you. clean_body: Election year is here: | | | Thank you, friend. We hit our End-of-Year goal before the clock struck midnight on New Year’s Eve, which means we’re starting 2022 on the strongest note possible! Now, the real work begins: It’s time to staff up, start organizing our field operations, and launch digital ads to help us show South Carolinians what’s at stake this year. We can either have another four years of McMaster’s “leadership” — more needless deaths due to mismanagement of the pandemic, more communities left behind, and more people leaving our state in search of better opportunities elsewhere. Or, we can usher in a new era of governance that looks out for the wellbeing of ALL South Carolinians, listens to the facts and science, and builds a state we can all be proud of. I’m so grateful to have you on this team because I know we won’t be able to defeat Henry McMaster without you. Thank you, — Mia | | Please, disregard if you are a registered lobbyist. | | | Paid for by Mia for South Carolina | | Sent via . subject: Adam Schiff is right about Kevin McCarthy

body:
He didn’t hold back when he SLAMMED McCarthy for winking at the people who tried to overthrow our democracy.

Nancy Pelosi believes if they can WIN in red states - like Montana - she’ll be able to hold her House majority this election. Normally I wouldn’t be too worried – but the Democrats are raising TENS OF MILLIONS OF DOLLARS and outraising us every step of the way.

name: Jessica Morse
subject: Perspective on January 6th
body:
| | | |
---
Dear Friends,
A year ago today, I watched in horror as our nation’s capital came under siege. Like many of you, I hoped a unity would emerge from the broken glass and rubble of that day. But the gross lack of moral courage among key leaders perpetuated the same lies and propaganda that radicalized our neighbors and brought our democracy under siege. Today, 70 percent of republicans still believe the baseless lie that the 2020 election was stolen. Our nation is in peril.
We do not have the luxury of cynicism to sit on the sidelines and hope for the best. Our democracy will demand profound action from each of us in the years ahead to ensure that the hallowed promise of the Constitution is preserved. In the coming weeks I will share actions we can take to preserve and protect our democracy.
But today, on the anniversary of January 6th, I ask you to ponder the gravity of this date.
I am re-sharing with you an open letter I penned to my Congressman in the days following the attack. Sadly, this letter rings as true today as it did a year ago. I also ask that you take a moment to listen to [**President Biden’s Speech**](https://u16460731.ct.sendgrid.net/ls/click?upn=rf6U8ijtGmaHDE08oAvVWqK-2BKGV5xW-2FmBkAqEoewko399GqzPKTwdb3wttico0cHv5YYhd8PorH-2Fk-2BrPO8iViQ-3D-3DLz-N_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymhuTI2jG3IYR5NWbV52qgmdAiGhBklNQsRXTWl4rWtz6V26ifmsOhc2lTNkdXy-2F5FFomLfxGZOGa3bZcww1pfz6eQ52wAM-2F1sd6TFZE34z27Ud7tltpHHRVJHtsnRQa4zwo8J9pNDSXpSWb5ShqOwa-2FRKzpnhCFyNrPFnp6eucLNfQoF0j8onbWwHTbjSrNCrZtxB9vFOKQihQJ6paDKfuyTtpC0isHUNZJMRWAQRQSiPR6inccS3DeC3k5JeQcYmeg4-2BhgSfzT9-2FUeNAB4rKNT-2BUAxmFNt7Rxjn2iTWi15XAnwMGx3BlRh4ABKkmP2tI3OxpVuWly2VrJyhjlB31RzJufyNvCzfll3JzI1besy51SXidnkCJqdM7xzcrbjvRNQEExITQEF15NX-2FRPYNF9G4JZ6PwoOaBP0pdTjcxSI6bUelFyAfR0angVqeyVXj7FMkxDN1XTJ4DdEFqlfj15vXgBK1mnFGaRj7XxyigEA9m0K-2F5nPMhTwuoZOPPior-2FNs8N0MKVc13OZL8Pj7uwgr3xJhz6dxaSu-2FvIWpsPCDIOb-2FfaxtxmwLQWSYolF5FMDtGXBBndq5anMswnDn6BHJWcFlb1-2BxIa-2BBxRKSn61xv-2BJe8BHu0EZH3kbV8aME0gpBCqNZqTtSpcLaHNnFOR-2FSfuXApB-2B7JeR5nXGRjW9cxD8ejei6RSP6YR-2FH2UIJafgtZIEWcmqhr1iq0weZNhe5u8lW44KIwy2MI4MfqxI5Y9HlDqhS-2BMcXcEUFxa-2BhZPOv1YCXKc8D3NLT7-2F5ENGL0ERdtds62AdRFxHBCegAtrPrbnWPyVw8bEbAv6byN6do-3D) today.
I hope reading this letter strengthens your resolve to take action, as much as it is strengthening my own.
**Perspectives on Unity: An Open letter to my Republican Congressman** By Jessica Morse, January 13th, 2021
Dear Congressman,
Today, as our nation grapples with the fallout from the first violent transfer of power in our long history, your calls for “unity” and “magnanimity” ring hollow as you voted against impeachment and consequences. In the face of unchecked domestic terrorism, Trump lit the fuse, but, Congressman, you helped build the bomb.
This is not a moment for platitudes, this is a moment for action. The only words your constituents need to hear from you are: “forgive me.” You have spent years on talk radio giving legitimacy and voice to Trump’s fascism and enabling white nationalism to take root as your party’s political platform.
You should fall to your knees in front of our Constitution and beg forgiveness. And then show real repentance by shouting these truths to all who follow you: “ The election was legitimate. Trump is a false idol. We must do better.”
As a nation, we should be united in our grief, united in resolve to restore our democracy, and united in our commitment to root out the evil that brought our nation under siege.
Today, you stood on the House floor, with bullet holes in the sacred doors behind you and absolved the President of culpability and perpetuated his propaganda. You quoted Abraham Lincoln, asking us to “Bind up the nation’s wounds.” Yet you voted against impeachment, unwilling to remove the bullet from the wound you wish to bind.
In your official capacity, as a trusted officer of the Constitution, you claimed the American election was rigged and democratic freedoms stolen. What response did you expect from those who trusted you? Did you expect them to mobilize voters? No, they were outraged. And outrage without an outlet festers into radicalization and violence.
According to the Southern Poverty Law Center, there are a dozen registered hate groups in and around our Congressional District. Seven out of the ten counties in our district have or recently had a Sheriff aligned with the Patriot Movement, a right wing association of militias propagating conspiracy theories. Racism and hatred has rooted itself into our community. As our member of Congress, you should have sought briefings about hate groups in your district from the FBI and others that track potential violence in your community. But rather than working to root out violence, you perpetuated the conspiracies and lies that became the rallying cry of domestic terrorists.
This fall, I helped organize a security simulation to anticipate post-election violence for California leaders. Having had a front-row seat to the rise of an insurgency in Iraq, me and many of my friends in the national security community had grown concerned. We pulled together mayors, state law enforcement officials, communications experts, and local law enforcement, to help identify triggers for post-election violence and seek solutions. We identified one foundational trigger for violence: widespread propaganda claiming election fraud. The simple solution: Prepare trusted local voices, from elected leaders to clergy, in communities with militias and hate groups, to show the legitimacy of the election, inoculating communities against the extremist propaganda flooding their information bubbles.
As the person in our community with arguably the largest local platform to reach radicalized groups, you scoffed at your responsibility and became an enthusiastic advocate for propaganda that led to this violence.
You described the lack of security at the capital last week as the consequence of “a lack of imagination.” In reality, the attack on our capital is the consequence of a lack of courage. At every step you have failed to speak truth to power. You embraced propaganda and lies to cement political gains. You gladly followed the path of least resistance to its logical and devastating conclusion.
If you are sincere in your pleas for unity, then join us in unmasking the illusion of Trump, rooting out white nationalism from our communities, and dismantling domestic terrorism and its propaganda machine that ravaged the heart of democracy. It is not imagination that you lack, it is courage.
Some may say that your vote against Impeachment today cements you on the wrong side of history. But in reality, history rarely records cowards. Your name will be filed away in the appendix of history books, your legacy a footnote to be forgotten.
A concerned citizen,
Jessica Morse

---

Seven out of the ten counties in our district have or recently had a Sheriff aligned with the Patriot Movement, a right wing association of militias propagating conspiracy theories. Racism and hatred has rooted itself into our community. As our member of Congress, you should have sought briefings about hate groups in your district from the FBI and others that track potential violence in your community. But rather than working to root out violence, you perpetuated the conspiracies and lies that became the rallying cry of domestic terrorists. This fall, I helped organize a security simulation to anticipate post-election violence for California leaders. Having had a front-row seat to the rise of an insurgency in Iraq, me and many of my friends in the national security community had grown concerned. We pulled together mayors, state law enforcement officials, communications experts, and local law enforcement, to help identify triggers for post-election violence and seek solutions. We identified one foundational trigger for violence: widespread propaganda claiming election fraud. The simple solution: Prepare trusted local voices, from elected leaders to clergy, in communities with militias and hate groups, to show the legitimacy of the election, inoculating communities against the extremist propaganda flooding their information bubbles. As the person in our community with arguably the largest local platform to reach radicalized groups, you scoffed at your responsibility and became an enthusiastic advocate for propaganda that led to this violence. You described the lack of security at the capital last week as the consequence of “a lack of imagination.” In reality, the attack on our capital is the consequence of a lack of courage. At every step you have failed to speak truth to power. You embraced propaganda and lies to cement political gains. You gladly followed the path of least resistance to its logical and devastating conclusion. If you are sincere in your pleas for unity, then join us in unmasking the illusion of Trump, rooting out white nationalism from our communities, and dismantling domestic terrorism and its propaganda machine that ravaged the heart of democracy. It is not imagination that you lack, it is courage. Some may say that your vote against Impeachment today cements you on the wrong side of history. But in reality, history rarely records cowards. Your name will be filed away in the appendix of history books, your legacy a footnote to be forgotten. A concerned citizen, Jessica Morse

subject: 📰New Fox News Op-Ed: Democrats brought us a year of fear in 2021.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Hawley for Senate
body:
In 2022, let us be not afraid and reclaim our American spirit. [](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=1e9cfab0078c49ca90c9374ce94d98ee&_e=3Z7dL8Aj3un7tolXt6HZC7zLGmwR8bRGByaa3aR9J4N1oHpQoEc9qWziB8zWQYeYWZwfAlvdAd6JoG4b9QLKS_NlpR4GdQXorl4bNVKqcxwAjQR4W-FIaAmq-vSWKbHICxrvsvznDQ9kIIHZs-QAuTTgtqT6yqwDo1uHwV3BGgF_nnZJnGdOamBJs-CuXwU9bnGxi-9MDBAb4nJwiB8G5nBu2F-HepFlwzkyxtmJ6b2YyTH0kCXXcuov5dElVVvtCbIoSXs95qS1XE8NN38JBi2lZZKCJpB_lBhSjhHdk0MHqIPNDoiRkDnKqkjd5vHly6MYX6NxvUK-1oALtnLoiDtoAqhKOrnSOmsxsp7ctgYjGW5onruH3i7n8lQ_02V87Xz3VLcy-JRllNe1eD1_sw%3D%3D) | |

Peter,
Democrats spent the last year peddling fear to maintain their control. It's time we reject their fearmongering in 2022.

I penned an op-ed to explain how the democrats have made fear their weapon of choice, and how we can reject it in this new year. Give it a read and share with your friends.
[](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=1e9cfab0078c49ca90c9374ce94d98ee&_e=3Z7dL8Aj3un7tolXt6HZC7zLGmwR8bRGByaa3aR9J4N1oHpQoEc9qWziB8zWQYeYWZwfAlvdAd6JoG4b9QLKS_NlpR4GdQXorl4bNVKqcxwAjQR4W-FIaAmq-vSWKbHICxrvsvznDQ9kIIHZs-QAuTTgtqT6yqwDo1uHwV3BGgF_nnZJnGdOamBJs-CuXwU9KAfZbYgjiWmEOhGVaQ41lj-QtjYTnCMTwi7hBjxOQgKC0hYScftZYgYjBdpz4z0WoGxqYSAmi0QLrLaW85xUtqfx8zPS2iJczOVhQDFp4NIuXAlCpToWSNQQiTrtG9KnZZk5QlXhLwmmRs9hQwYkLNkbJU71vqCAscryMdYtJTiOv3zXyuDye6ImD5Cz3-KiKhEYowilRVncSeD4rzGiWw%3D%3D)
“2021 was a year of fear instigated by Democrats and the Left. 2022 doesn’t have to be. It can be the year we say no to fear and reclaim our heritage as Americans.

The fear campaign started on January 6, following the demonstration in Washington that turned violent after some demonstrators breached the Capitol. But that was only the second most surprising thing about that day. The most surprising outcome—and the day’s true legacy—was the Left’s attempt to use the Capitol unrest to foster a permanent climate of fear and repression.

In the months that followed, they targeted conservatives, silenced parents, and suppressed speech by ordinary people online, all in the name of public safety.”

[_**READ THE REST HERE.**_](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=1e9cfab0078c49ca90c9374ce94d98ee&_e=3Z7dL8Aj3un7tolXt6HZC7zLGmwR8bRGByaa3aR9J4N1oHpQoEc9qWziB8zWQYeYWZwfAlvdAd6JoG4b9QLKS_NlpR4GdQXorl4bNVKqcxwAjQR4W-FIaAmq-vSWKbHICxrvsvznDQ9kIIHZs-QAuTTgtqT6yqwDo1uHwV3BGgF_nnZJnGdOamBJs-CuXwU9INp9UJ00w9f8r6Gh_6g3-o3nfraR3EVJfdxcxVtIdaNytlX0Y9hpY2jb9HO4pVu0kYjZJSI0190kgFWjizNt3FXctzJfgjXt3hno4sGC94WaMurSvRojKyC8XYqpq69_YmZd3VuwyqBX3C208r4pYbuwgV9d9A_IetKzyY2MLo-6GH6ocLBUMpu637GezWAaqqIg2tXknmanPYV3QxSj-w%3D%3D)

clean_body: In 2022, let us be not afraid and reclaim our American spirit. | | Peter, Democrats spent the last year peddling fear to maintain their control. It's time we reject their fearmongering in 2022. I penned an op-ed to explain how the democrats have made fear their weapon of choice, and how we can reject it in this new year. Give it a read and share with your friends. “2021 was a year of fear instigated by Democrats and the Left. 2022 doesn’t have to be. It can be the year we say no to fear and reclaim our heritage as Americans. The fear campaign started on January 6, following the demonstration in Washington that turned violent after some demonstrators breached the Capitol. But that was only the second most surprising thing about that day. The most surprising outcome—and the day’s true legacy—was the Left’s attempt to use the Capitol unrest to foster a permanent climate of fear and repression. In the months that followed, they targeted conservatives, silenced parents, and suppressed speech by ordinary people online, all in the name of public safety.” In Liberty, Josh | | | | | ---|---|---|--- Paid for by Josh Hawley for Senate

They know I can unite white and black, rich and poor, new voter and experienced voter - all with a conservative message that is already resonating across the state of Georgia. Thanks, Herschel Walker Republican for U.S. Senate | | | | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but ._

A year after the insurrection, we need more than just accountability. | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xQsZ_uHW9ME9h2VPudEgVBlT0rAEcoX_uBPlqDgEOfEQIhz_Vu9SFmd68KrwuQ3aKi7nPZoMC1hdvv-aBtd_WQhF_HHr7R5OkEDrc_ZkrefDRWKs0HxxmKWqUrbuSneE59YbvzJ6-_8kq1XBl7RSUvL_-GpvBtHKM6BKp7SA0cHIp0FxAZcDUdBUGdak7SBKZzP-h5KG7XY1UC79JzCmyxR0_qpFAm30yLMveX9jnH5lWXEUM7B5rNSJKisSQz_pfqmsh2x6TW8L4JRftDLUuSpD5UOAhqJliJN_kP8lArkg/3ih/prV5-cYWRXCHM8izOKId4g/h0/tlTPIFe9jpkO1nCaQZtYJTwGtdSCb4wOgF7IlIzob68) Peter, One year ago today, violent insurrectionists stormed the U.S. Capitol, refusing to accept the peaceful transfer of power to a legitimately-elected president. Our right to vote and to free and fair elections are at the heart of our democracy – but sustained efforts against these rights have been unfolding long before January 6th. Violent white supremacy has always threatened our democracy. [****](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xWIurlfE4kaqpZPqSu1iEimVZQ0HZR4SLoXArADHbfSEfkBHgompg2WEhBH31GXw3Z9IuFeawZ3XecKil8ezQh_smV9sxyzlAbSJZoamZt5_aJ5AUgxV6NLwvhFmFAIv4zQ3ENqBlPaCNLJM1f22kuJaVAnSRYIotxcXB9IHFQZtc1ysxpnF4z4eoJZ9sJU1v4QfHxSKFLRB9gB09aQdfQta1ki6DoZ7kOSSHPOF1jqABOGBPXhLDKlXf4Ex8vmUdgMRKvnui1kTFjhZnmP-4kHGwFfDmGzsuql53a2l6hBA/3ih/prV5-cYWRXCHM8izOKId4g/h1/LAmVVpogWycDy3LFGjveTWpw8YMe4nEUmtVKb5ZxT2g) It’s why – despite the promise of democracy – we’ve faced slavery, Jim Crow, poll taxes, gerrymandering, voter suppression, and disenfranchisement. It’s why a president could incite an insurrection without accountability. A year after the insurrection, we need more than accountability. **We need to rebuild our democracy to stand up to white supremacy once and for all.**
And now more than ever, we need leadership that will fight tirelessly so that Black and brown communities can’t get erased by racist gerrymandering; so that we all have the right to vote; and so that voters – not white supremacists – decide the outcome of elections.
Today, I'm reflecting on what happened last January 6th, remembering those who lost their lives, and recommitting to doing all I can to build and defend a multiracial democracy for all of us.
Thank you for being here with me. In solidarity, Odessa Kelly

subject: January 6
disclaimer_text: paid for by Joe Jaworski
body:
One year ago today, Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton, one of President Trump's de facto lawyers, spoke at a rally at the Capitol in support of Trump. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/jaworskifortexas/2022-13458008?e=5d8d80652b)
---
| | [ ](https://jaworskifortexas.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e1f50319ad85f5f9e5c11ac9&id=71b51ed63b&e=5d8d80652b)
---
| | ,

One year ago today, Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton, one of President Trump's de facto lawyers, spoke at a rally at the Capitol in support of Trump. He told them that they must do what they can to support Trump's clearly anti-democratic goal of stealing the election from the people.

**Four hours later the Capitol was breached.**

The rioters scaled marble walls. They smashed windows to gain entry. They carried the Confederate battle flag into the United States Capitol. Capitol Police Officer Brian D. Sicknick was killed by the mob.

Before that, he added fuel to the "Big Lie" with his lawsuit to overturn the election. Since then, he's refused to share emails and texts messages he sent and received on that day. He's refused to disclosed who paid for his travel to Washington, DC that day. And in a decidedly un-Texan, cowardly refusal to take responsibility for his extremely poor judgment, Paxton has claimed the pro-Trump mob that stormed the Capitol was actually antifa rioters.

[](https://jaworskifortexas.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e1f50319ad85f5f9e5c11ac9&id=774729b74a&e=5d8d80652b)

**The simple truth is, Ken Paxton doesn't believe in the rule of law. He believes in what get him and his friends ahead. **

As Americans, we will never forget the events of January 6, but as Texans, we shouldn't forget our Attorney General's leading role in what occurred that day.

Paxton is no longer to be trusted to perform the duties of the Office of the Texas Attorney General. But to end his term, he must defeat him at the polls.

[**Will you contribute to my campaign to beat Ken Paxton and restore ethics and integrity to the AG office?**](https://jaworskifortexas.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e1f50319ad85f5f9e5c11ac9&id=edbe0a686d&e=5d8d80652b)

Many have said that the events of January 6, 2021 were simply "practice" for the main event of stealing the 2024 election. We can't let that happen. **Let's stand together and protect democracy. **

[**Stand with me today by joining Team Jaworski. Together, we can win and restore our democracy as a shining example for the rest of the world.**](https://jaworskifortexas.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e1f50319ad85f5f9e5c11ac9&id=1f317e8e8b&e=5d8d80652b) It's too important to sit on the sidelines for this one. We must win.

Joe

PS. [Read Joe's full editorial on January 6, 2021 in the Houston Chronicle here.](https://jaworskifortexas.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e1f50319ad85f5f9e5c11ac9&id=02a1ff477a&e=5d8d80652b)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Mark=20Finchem?=
subject: New Year’s Resolutions for Our Country
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
body:
Time for renewal |
---
| | [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=2a0909d4c5&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| | Dear ,
My name is Mark FInchem. I am the Trump-endorsed Election Integrity Conservative running for Secretary of State in Arizona to secure our elections. I am the only candidate in the country that has personally worked on and developed groundbreaking watermarking technology for fool-proofing our ballot process!

_And I’m talking currency grade! We can get this done, folks. And we have to._

**That’s why I’m writing you today. To wish you a Happy New Year, and tell you about what I’ve been working on over the holidays:**

**_My New Year’s Resolutions for America._**
---
| **_Resolution #1: Remember what we are fighting for_**
If you’re anything like me, you know how hard it can be to think clearly and precisely when there is so much noise and clutter drowning out what really matters.

I spent a lot of time re-focusing on that over the holiday season, spending time with my family, and reflecting on what I really value in my life.

And when it comes down to it, there are really only three things for me: faith, family, and freedom.

**Now, the first two are personal, but the third is universal.**

_We are blessed beyond measure to have been born into the greatest country of all time, the United States of America, where freedom is a promise that is delivered._

**And recently, that promise is becoming more and more just that: a promise. And less and less something delivered.**

So, for my first New Year’s Resolution for America, let’s refocus on why we are proud to be Americans. Because we are the freest people on earth!

_No amount of doom and gloom can ever let us forget why we’re here in the first place._
**_Resolution #2: Let’s have the most secure elections yet!_**
Wow, this next one is tough, but its definitely doable. I worked all of last year developing waterproofing technology that is currency-grade that will make our elections as secure as the greenback.

**I have spent countless days talking with legislators around the country who want to bring this technology into their ballots and into their states.**

_If we can do this on a nationwide level, I have no doubt that we will have the most secure elections in 2022._

**But here’s the difficult part. We have the technology, now we just need nationwide adoptions. This takes enormous funding for petitions, ads, and getting the word out while the media silences us.**

_But this is very doable. I just can’t do it without your help. Help us get the word out on our currency-grade ballot protection technology!_
**_Resolution #3: Let’s set the stage for the greatest Conservative Renaissance in Decades!_**
This one’s exciting folks. I have a vision here that I just hope and pray will come true. And it will if Republicans around the country work hard enough.

**We are set up for a huge Republican wave that will take back the Congress and the Senate, statewide offices, and in 2024, the White House! If we do this thing right, we could have a huge majority.**

_And with state wide elected officials such as myself, and both legislative houses, and the White House all on the same page, we can set the stage for Conservative legislation and policy that will stand the test of time._

**We will build a huge wall around Conservative policy that can’t just be undone by the next Democrat’s signature. We will build and reinstall Conservative policy into the _BEDROCK_ of America.**

And no Democrat, no liberal, no here-today-gone-tomorrow radical will undermine that which it really means to be an American. To be Free and to love those Freedoms, not to look for every opportunity to throw America under the bus. [These are very attainable New Year’s Resolutions, but I cannot do it without your help! ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=86e395f742&e=44b8c466b0)

**This is the year, this is 2022, and this is what we are fighting for. We can win, but we have big goals ahead of us.**

[**_Please donate as much as you can, $25, $50, $100, $250 or more, to make sure that we have the New Year that Republicans have been dreaming about for decades._**](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=684d6d4f94&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| [Thank you and God bless you!](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=c5df23995c&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=ecbd323dfd&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| Mark Finchem

Arizona House of Representatives – District 11
Republican for Arizona Secretary of State
Conservative
Election Integrity Patriot

P.S. [Please contribute today](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=a8e1069fec&e=44b8c466b0).

PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
---
| |
---
| _Copyright © 2022 Mark Finchem for Secretary of State, All rights reserved._

**Our mailing address is:**
Mark Finchem for Secretary of StatePO Box 69344Oro Valley, AZ 85737
[Add us to your address book](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/vcard?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/profile?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb&e=44b8c466b0&c=6e3ae3dd1b) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb&e=44b8c466b0&c=6e3ae3dd1b).

You see, with the fate of the House majority riding on Texas’ new congressional seat in 2022, Pelosi is pulling out all the stops to try and torpedo our momentum as we officially enter the election year. That’s why our new ad is so important. But as we wrap up production on the ad, we need to ensure we have the funds to make all our initial ad-buys. Otherwise, Pelosi will simply drown us out on the airwaves. With Pelosi and her DCCC sitting on a $131 MILLION war chest to kick off 2022, the ad market becomes a simple calculus... Every dollar we spend placing our new ad not only spreads the reach of our message, it’s also airtime taken away from Pelosi’s lying attack ads. We can’t afford to start out the election year at a disadvantage on TV. I’m counting on you Friend to help us remain competitive in the ad market as Pelosi gears up to spend millions. name: Mark Ronchetti
subject: Did you hear the news?!?!
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Mark Ronchetti for Governor, Anne Perez Treasurer
body:
I’m writing to you today to give you an important update and to THANK YOU! We just voluntarily released our campaign’s fundraising numbers and we CRU Peter, I’m writing to you today to give you an important update and to THANK YOU! We just voluntarily released our campaign’s fundraising numbers and **we CRUSHED our end of the year goal! Since we announced, just two months ago, our campaign has raised $1.2 Million with 96% of those donations coming from New Mexicans like you – _WE DID THIS TOGETHER!_** Governor Michelle Lujan Grisham is relying on special interest funding and out-of-state dark money groups, whereas the backbone of our campaign is hard-working New Mexicans who know we deserve better than what we’re getting from the career politicians and out-of-touch elites who have run this state for so long. Republicans and New Mexicans of all political backgrounds are coalescing behind our campaign because they know I am the principled conservative who is best positioned to win in November. _**In fact, recent statewide polling shows us already tied in the race against Lujan Grisham among general election voters – 46% to 46%. The same poll showed us trouncing Lujan Grisham among Independents 49% to 33%.**_ **And what’s even better... we’re running a smart, lean campaign, keeping our spending low, and ensuring every dollar you contribute is spent wisely. As of today, our cash-on-hand is just over $1,146,000! It’s important to ensure we build our war-chest, so we have the resources to WIN as the election approaches.** ** ** **BUT WE CAN’T STOP NOW!** ** ** **The momentum is on our side, Peter and we can’t slow down.****Now is the time we need to kick it into second gear,_and_** _**we have major deadlines approaching**_******\- we need your help!******
* ******Have you signed our petition********and helped collect additional names to ensure we are on the Primary ballot this June?**[CLICK HERE FOR DOWNLOADABLE PETITON](http://links.markronchetti.com/u/click?_t=b07bd752cdb64edc94e23391776d0f53&_m=052f39b847f34a0f90df16e69716de04&_e=jYOO8eR1BPdwJOaP4Mx8ufr-EXIsows2RbW3M8r5HiHxX--8MTmAnXtwuRIWeY5NCwfZCCUKvytEI2bPjNhjvqeX6HsNYW-9Z0p7F-c0mGY_WhS1t1NXp23N7kL0six4LkYd3uc5VN54tOj730GhKvwRToVEDzIHzxVw37GOLuNBveB65aPa_UM9JviLVmgtzhQM2xcJM2hvVqm10YwLcarixKM5Kge2PK-RGJy5mqP6bHCp11xcDypR--XVUZnezrJ6TcLU0YNyKENvGjcTLROLB8ugGIEJkyB7HDPY_wPd5oOGxOh5mOLEpGj0hCISRJzlsY9Dtn-VOa-LcoU_te447ZGQBjH7n7tb_qZZeZx4sjvhKyAyrV78j6H4DB5c)**and instructions:**

[**Help Mark Make the Ballot**](http://links.markronchetti.com/u/click?_t=b07bd752cdb64edc94e23391776d0f53&_m=052f39b847f34a0f90df16e69716de04&_e=jYOO8eR1BPdwJOaP4Mx8ufr-EXIsows2RbW3M8r5HiGqypg86m59Orv-j51GNMjqhcdCJMvOxGc_ucn90TJ8_U-HA3ryEOWMBTwEJ5-Yjh94gwVgMOtFRyhdSyxukaT9J6fDSqDU6OlcEg5mcBkiJkuFZg-VqTvjw0IYbiIhMMQuAkK5JBAbKk-b6HW8cqPJV0BksDyM_Cm-9ikMyv5K186vUcZF9t9xw1xy38VnKQU-Pp5fB6aIMaIO0Dex3Y8SKlayj1_QCzkGMy-1gc6b_mLcoYIBMXlvHEfiAaxNWpA%3D)
* ******Have you signed up to attend a County Convention********to run as a delegate , or to help elect delegates to the State Republican Pre-Primary Convention? All Republican Gubernatorial candidates will need to receive at least 20% of the vote at the State Convention to make the primary ballot so it’s crucial that our Ronchetti supporters show up to County Conventions to elect Ronchetti delegates – THOSE MEETINGS ARE HAPPENING JAN. 8 – JAN. 16th all across the state! **

[**Sign-up or Find Out More Info**](http://links.markronchetti.com/u/click?_t=b07bd752cdb64edc94e23391776d0f53&_m=052f39b847f34a0f90df16e69716de04&_e=jYOO8eR1BPdwJOaP4Mx8ufr-EXIsows2RbW3M8r5HiFsh26SrLpT7MwNMNYCQ4gMqI0l00QyjOGz0xNIWWNsuRK9FTS6TNb4gbMMehSWavkDNQgbXfvv43F-ZjeiH564Jiz1UkM6efDvBW4XSiP8_CEzgqutkFOiDyo4-onM3h6rfh8F1hN94CVQ-2M1oMAM6BwiIjzqOMXawMUNFR5oRhhOpe-WL-n3wF7HduTrcLCF0Kyl6IRBn1QPdYo-Rn8XCqn5iKaEBeBMvmmK4DMeeg%3D%3D)
* ******Will you****add your name to our volunteer list?********Along with financial resources, we’re going to need all hands-on-deck to make phone calls, knock on doors, collect endorsements, help with mailers, sign distribution and so many other campaign operations. It’s never too early to join Team Ronchetti!**

[**Add My Name to Team Ronchetti’s Volunteer List**](http://links.markronchetti.com/u/click?_t=b07bd752cdb64edc94e23391776d0f53&_m=052f39b847f34a0f90df16e69716de04&_e=jYOO8eR1BPdwJOaP4Mx8ufr-EXIsows2RbW3M8r5HiG2dfJqnU3elHi3KoooavI3QZvoAMvO7eJVA9M7-EQZMugarqDqnKMtzstDlqQjkWmTwuzve_DTKhloUBKC-aQ_00w9OyqyWWEDxmCfD1Qft2fGxaFcWud10KZksz9o1ssQBtTykzHcOabvyW1BEU82yjE9WMALnDxRDs8SNCzCRA7O6c-bl7r2r4tcPVCjgdDLo2N7ubsLBqbJSMTsK64Dk-owFPcREd-h86rr-JPOTA%3D%3D)
* And finally, if you haven’t done so already, **will you take the next step and pitch-in any amount to our campaign, today? **Yes, we’re thrilled with our end of the year fundraising numbers but another month brings another BIG GOAL, and we can’t become complacent! That’s because MLG is raking in campaign cash from every leftwing special interest group she can find and we have to keep our pedal to the medal in order to compete. Please consider signing up for a monthly recurring contribution or giving any amount by clicking the button below:

[**I’ll Pitch-in to Defeat MLG**](http://links.markronchetti.com/u/click?_t=b07bd752cdb64edc94e23391776d0f53&_m=052f39b847f34a0f90df16e69716de04&_e=jYOO8eR1BPdwJOaP4Mx8uc1WOTE-DaolZ51X45xRAVKnFkFW5QGeSQA3DFuZjryoWBcN_9Ew_A0sG69Iu8BtTSUsRjchnx2j7J6c6NIdFfvixLXLRoCi43kg3f5xOBiKb8JqW6i43SFNagciG6enQhpS9M4lC178JAIIuP3EkTrTG-mA0imHL21RJVPFm40Kcc-GXyCbxeGITMXKko1QONqM-r3YCLDO_52A6kKz8viw_LpR_w79oUZmX5Ca9TA-EJXZQJD-DgM8UTh5Ht5wnMBdo2Ja5CH_tHpL5zShgXwQs_s9ogXGmw7r7Ap40ZAwt5ORUkX668h8YPqwqw9Z5VKsKGfZV96NBCDlr4p_iWuJODG57HomatuvS0s3clZLJACM3RrWWBA1ujWL9KTEjHzMacOutff9NMEdN8fa1cJoh4_oBiD8OzBIuvcIrWUSqIrEHvp8lTYVPtHmCdX_aGmo_MnbKd52tQzeGH54NF1PrDWomBodwb6aTnD14zcqpxEHajUk7COOSmFo9zF6tQ%3D%3D) Again, my friend, I am so very grateful for the outpouring of support and encouragement we’ve received over the past two months since we announced. This race has only just now begun, but one thing is clear – I am THE conservative, principled candidate who is best suited to defeat Michelle Lujan Grisham! **THIS IS OUR CHANCE** to elect a governor who will protect our freedoms, fight for law enforcement and commit to make our communities safe again, secure our borders, restore trust in our election systems, build and grow our economy, and improve education for New Mexico’s children. **I’m asking you to click those buttons above and come alongside us because TOGETHER, WE WILL WIN!** I feel your support and prayers every day as I continue to fight the good fight for all of us. Thank you! Mark | |
---

---

name: Team AOC
subject: Democracy is about showing up.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
The fascists who attacked the Capitol and the politicians who enabled them didn’t go away after January 6.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20220106-2727-header&t=1&akid=2727%2E2526796%2EtzeFX2)
One year ago, Republican leaders incited a deadly attack at the Capitol to try to overturn the results of our election.
But the attack on our democracy didn’t end on January 6. In the year since the insurrection at the Capitol, fascism has attacked our school boards, state legislatures, voting laws, and more.
**We can only save our democracy by participating in it, so here are 3 things you can do today to protect our voting rights and fight fascism.**
### _Get to know your local officials and vote_
At least seven insurrectionists who were at the Capitol on January 6 have since won public office.1 They were elected to state legislatures and city councils in Virginia, New Jersey, Massachusetts, and Idaho.
Do you know who represents you in the state legislature? City Council? School Board? Elections Commission? Find out, register to vote, and mark the election date on your calendar. Start by going to [**iwillvote.com**](http://iwillvote.com/).
### _Help protect voting rights_
19 states have passed 33 laws to make it harder to vote.2 And, many election officials who refused to bend to pressure from Trump have been pushed out of power and replaced by people who openly say the last election was fraudulent.
There’s a bill in Congress right now that would address some of these antidemocratic reforms, but Republicans refuse to support it.
[Please call your senators and ask them to support eliminating or reforming the filibuster so that this desperately needed voting rights legislation can pass with the support of the Democratic-majority in the Senate. ](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/call/call-your-senators?source=em20220106-2727-P_OTH_RES_LEG&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=2727%2E2526796%2EtzeFX2)
### _Show up at your local meetings_
With so much national scrutiny, extremist groups went local. There are dozens of new local Proud Boys chapters and other extremist groups in places from Seattle to Philadelphia and beyond.
They are now showing up at school board meetings, public health boards, and PTA’s to protest mask mandates, school curriculum, and more. **So, we need to show up too.**
**Find out when your school board meets publicly and put a reminder on your calendar to check the agenda the day before. If there’s an issue you care about up for debate, show up and tell your fellow parents.**
* * *
To build the future that we want, it requires showing up and participating. A free and fair democracy where the will of the people prevails is required in order to build a government for and by the people – and to achieve our priorities for working people.
All of our actions added together will help to combat the rise of fascism and ensure that our democracy endures.
In solidarity,
Team AOC
**[Call your senators](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/call/call-your-senators?source=em20220106-2727-P_OTH_RES_LEG&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=2727%2E2526796%2EtzeFX2)**
