clean_body: The fascists who attacked the Capitol and the politicians who enabled them didn’t go away after January 6. One year ago, Republican leaders incited a deadly attack at the Capitol to try to overturn the results of our election. But the attack on our democracy didn’t end on January 6. In the year since the insurrection at the Capitol, fascism has attacked our school boards, state legislatures, voting laws, and more. We can only save our democracy by participating in it, so here are 3 things you can do today to protect our voting rights and fight fascism. Get to know your local officials and vote At least seven insurrectionists who were at the Capitol on January 6 have since won public office.1 They were elected to state legislatures and city councils in Virginia, New Jersey, Massachusetts, and Idaho. Do you know who represents you in the state legislature? City Council? School Board? Elections Commission? Find out, register to vote, and mark the election date on your calendar. Start by going to . Help protect voting rights 19 states have passed 33 laws to make it harder to vote.2 And, many election officials who refused to bend to pressure from Trump have been pushed out of power and replaced by people who openly say the last election was fraudulent. There’s a bill in Congress right now that would address some of these antidemocratic reforms, but Republicans refuse to support it. Show up at your local meetings With so much national scrutiny, extremist groups went local. There are dozens of new local Proud Boys chapters and other extremist groups in places from Seattle to Philadelphia and beyond. They are now showing up at school board meetings, public health boards, and PTA’s to protest mask mandates, school curriculum, and more. So, we need to show up too. Find out when your school board meets publicly and put a reminder on your calendar to check the agenda the day before. If there’s an issue you care about up for debate, show up and tell your fellow parents. To build the future that we want, it requires showing up and participating. A free and fair democracy where the will of the people prevails is required in order to build a government for and by the people – and to achieve our priorities for working people. name: Morgan Harper
subject: We need action to prevent another January 6th
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Morgan Harper for Ohio
body:
What happened on January 6th and what we need to do to stop it.
# [](https://act.morganharper.org/go/1512?refcode=em20220106-502-footer-ak&t=2&akid=502%2E90090%2EqYieJ2)
It’s been one year since the violent attack on our Capitol, and Republicans, like my opponents J.D. Vance and Josh Mandel, continue to stoke fear and cater to their far-right base with outrageous lies and extremist rhetoric.
Meanwhile, the GOP punishes any truth-tellers who come forward, and are replacing election officials across the country to try to continue to undermine our democracy.
**[We need to push back. Morgan is working every day to engage voters and strengthen our democracy. Rush a contribution now to show your support.](https://act.morganharper.org/go/19921?t=3&akid=502%2E90090%2EqYieJ2)**
What happened on January 6th was real. **Our democracy was threatened with violence, and now a few politicians are preventing our government from taking action to prevent it from happening again.**
Instead of taking action, Republicans, and Senators like Joe Manchin and Kyrsten Sinema are prioritizing their own power over protecting our democracy. Transformative voting rights legislation has gone nowhere because they prefer obstruction, the filibuster, and enriching their donors, over preventing another January 6th.
This is why it’s not enough to just elect MORE Democrats. We need stronger Democrats who will stand forcefully on the side of people, not their careers.
**[That’s the type of U.S. Senator I’ll be. If you’re with me, chip in now to help me flip this seat blue.](https://act.morganharper.org/go/19921?t=4&akid=502%2E90090%2EqYieJ2)**
**[Contribute $5](https://act.morganharper.org/go/19927?refcode=em20220106-502&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&akid=502%2E90090%2EqYieJ2)**
Thank you,
Morgan Harper

name: JohnFetterman.com
subject: so this happened
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
The stakes couldn’t be higher in this race.
#
So this happened, Derek.
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/40687?refcode=ema20220106-4106&t=1&akid=4106%2E434096%2E2gPF4E)
That’s right. One year after insurrectionists attacked the Capitol, GOP candidates for Senate in Pennsylvania, including Dr. Oz, enabling Trump’s Big Lie about the 2020 election.
These people are running to represent the entire Commonwealth of Pennsylvania in the U.S. Senate, _yet they can’t even admit that PA’s 2020 election results were valid._
We can’t send a seditionist to the U.S. Senate, Derek. In fact, with Trump planning a run in 2024 and the GOP pushing anti-democratic bills in dozens of states, we need the opposite: a leader with a track record of defending democracy.
**[If John is going to beat self-funded, extremist Republicans like Dr. Oz, he’s going to need your help. Will you join our record-breaking grassroots fundraising team right now? Whether you can give $3 or $100 or anything in between, you’re making an impact in one of the most important elections this year.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/40687?refcode=ema20220106-4106&t=2&akid=4106%2E434096%2E2gPF4E)**
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/40687?refcode=em20220106-4106&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=4106%2E434096%2E2gPF4E)**
You don’t have to take us at our word that John will fight back against insurrectionists. He was that fighter in the Pennsylvania legislature when Republicans refused to swear in a legitimately elected Democratic State Senator last January — they *literally* voted to eject John from the chamber.
And when Donald Trump aimed his bogus demands for a “full election audit” at our Commonwealth, John was a leading voice calling out his BS.
**Derek, this race is going to come down to a fighter like John versus a GOP candidate who is STILL lying about Trump’s defeat in 2020.**
But if we’re going to take on opponents and powerful special interests who are hawking the Big Lie, we have to keep up our people-powered fundraising.
**[Will you chip in $5 or anything you can to support our campaign right now? We can flip this seat, beat our GOP opponents, and ensure a Democratic Senate Majority, but the stakes are too high to take anything for granted.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/40687?refcode=ema20220106-4106&t=22&akid=4106%2E434096%2E2gPF4E)**
Keep fighting,
Team Fetterman

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20220106-4106-footer&t=23&refcode2=4106_434096_2gPF4E&akid=4106%2E434096%2E2gPF4E)**

subject: See You at The Golden Rooster this Saturday!

body:
Meet Ed and the Team in Saco - 2:00pm | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/fff6bc8d0e93/see-you-at-the-golden-rooster-this-saturday?e=f8a0a76a2b)

# _Ed Thelander for Congress - District 1, will be at the Golden Rooster this Saturday. Please stop in for a bite to eat and a beverage, and sign Ed's nomination papers to put him on the ballot._

## **Saturday, January 8th, 2022
2 PM to 4 PM
Golden Rooster
236 Main Street, Saco, ME 04072 **
While you are there, please find a member of Team Thelander to collect your signature for the Ballot Petitions, and take home a yard sign and bumper sticker while supplies last.
We need your help spreading the word! Together, let's make sure everyone in your community has a chance to sign and support my run to represent Maine's First Congressional District.

2022 is starting strong! Let's show Maine, and the nation, that we're ready to send common sense, integrity and honesty to the office, and return liberty and economic prosperity to the people.
---
|
Ed Thelander

[](https://thelanderforcongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=035bf0620f01206429344ca39&id=e6b92ab206&e=f8a0a76a2b)

Paid for and Authorized by Committee to Elect Thelander for Congress, Inc. Ed Thelander is a United States Navy veteran. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not constitute or imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

name: Alex Padilla
subject: We need a comprehensive effort to protect our democracy
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate
body:
We must change or eliminate the filibuster for the sake of our democracy
#

Today marks a sober anniversary — 1 year since the deadly insurrection at the U.S. Capitol.
The Big Lie, or the idea that the 2020 election was stolen, is now the foundation upon which the radical right is attempting to implement a complete dismantling of free and fair elections in this country.
We need a comprehensive effort to protect our democracy and ensure nothing like that day happens again — which means taking on GOP obstructionism and passing legislation to protect voting rights nationwide.
[**Sign on if you agree: It’s time to use all avenues _including changing or eliminating the filibuster_ to pass the Freedom to Vote Act and the John Lewis Voting Rights Act.**](https://act.alex-padilla.com/signup/filibuster-em-jan22/?source=em220106-1-45&refcode2=569.159979.F7d_hj&akid=569%2E159979%2EF7d_hj)
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.alex-padilla.com/signup/filibuster-em-jan22/?source=em220106-1-45&refcode2=569.159979.F7d_hj&akid=569%2E159979%2EF7d_hj)**
Here’s what I believe: any eligible American should be able to easily register to vote, _stay_ registered to vote, cast their ballot, and have their ballot counted, without any unnecessary obstacles or barriers.
What a concept!
But Mitch McConnell and Republicans in Congress are using the filibuster to block common-sense legislation to protect our elections and the right to vote.
If we need to change some rules in the Senate to protect voting rights, that’s what we need to do. Because the stakes are too high not to act.
[**Please, join me in calling on my colleagues to put voting rights over outdated Senate rules and eliminate the filibuster to pass the Freedom to Vote Act and the John Lewis Voting Rights Act.**](https://act.alex-padilla.com/signup/filibuster-em-jan22/?source=em220106-1-45&refcode2=569.159979.F7d_hj&akid=569%2E159979%2EF7d_hj)
That is what our nation _needs_ us to do as part of a comprehensive effort to ensure that a deadly insurrection in the nation’s capitol — in order to interrupt a peaceful transition of power — never happens again.
And that is why we must do absolutely everything in our power — including changing or eliminating the filibuster — in order to pass voting rights legislation and save our democracy.
[**Please add your name to my petition calling on the Senate to pass the Freedom to Vote Act and the John Lewis Voting Rights Act, even if we must change or eliminate the filibuster to get it done.**](https://act.alex-padilla.com/signup/filibuster-em-jan22/?source=em220106-1-45&refcode2=569.159979.F7d_hj&akid=569%2E159979%2EF7d_hj)
Thank you for standing with me on this important issue. It’s no exaggeration to say that the future of our democracy depends on passing this critical legislation, and your support in this fight means a great deal.
\- Alex Padilla
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.alex-padilla.com/signup/filibuster-em-jan22/?source=em220106-1-45&refcode2=569.159979.F7d_hj&akid=569%2E159979%2EF7d_hj)**

Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here.](https://act.alex-padilla.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=1&akid=569%2E159979%2EF7d_hj)

name: Charles Booker
subject: We haven’t forgotten, Rand
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
[1]Charles Booker

Peter,

One year ago, we witnessed a violent insurrection waged at the United
States Capitol. The goal: end American democracy as we know it.

It was fueled by hate and racism, lies of a “stolen” election, and a
desperate grab for power. Countless first responders were critically
injured. Six people died.

We refuse to forget the sacrifice of our first responders. We refuse to
forget this attack on our democracy. We must continue calling for justice
until every person, every elected official involved in the attack is held
accountable.

You know who wish we’d forget? Rand Paul.

He’s tried countless times to gaslight us into thinking it was just a
“tourist visit”. To this day, Rand has tried to block a full investigation
into what happened.

I know you know this, but I need you to hear it from me: this was no
tourist visit. And any attempt to minimize the severity of this moment is
an affront to our very democracy.

Why does he want us to forget? Because he was complicit. For months
leading up to the attack, Rand Paul stoked his base, promoting false
narratives of “stolen votes” and fraud — a claim that members of his own
party have even walked back.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/14464?refcode=em20220106-1421&t=1001&akid=1421%2E346206%2EB_H94P ][IMG]

It’s shameful — but it is nothing new,
Peter. For years, Rand Paul has
been working to suppress our votes to keep his own seat.

Kentucky has one of the worst records of voter disenfranchisement in our
country’s history. For too long, massive groups of people, especially
Black and brown communities, have been excluded and discouraged from
voting. As a result, the number of people in Kentucky who don’t vote
outnumber those who do.

We know that a different type of politics is possible — and that’s what
our movement is fighting for. Together, we have the power to replace Rand
Paul and every politician who betrayed our democracy last January.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/14464?refcode=em20220106-1421&t=1021&akid=1421%2E346206%2EB_H94P ]If you’re ready to join me in this work, will you chip in
$5 or anything you can today to our people-powered
campaign? We must send a loud and clear message today to Rand Paul that
this movement remembers and that we are rising up to hold him accountable
at the ballot box on Election Day.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/14464?refcode=em20220106-1421&t=1022&akid=1421%2E346206%2EB_H94P ]Contribute $5

Like most of you, I was relieved when the American people removed Trump
from office and the Biden administration began the work of turning the
tides of our country. Millions of us — many for the first time — voted to
make our voices heard and rise against his corrupt, overtly racist,
destructive agenda.

Despite the fact President Biden won the election by historic numbers —
Rand Paul cried voter fraud and led a dangerous narrative about a stolen
election. Someone who actively works against our democracy doesn’t belong
in the U.S. Senate. Period.

It’s not the first time Rand Paul chose to play political games over
serving the folks he represents. For too long, our Senators have failed
the Kentuckians they’re supposed to represent. From spreading the big lie
that fueled an insurrection to spreading disinformation about COVID-19,
and blocking life-saving policies like a Green New Deal and Medicare for
All — Rand Paul has refused to act in the best interest of our communities
over and over again.

But I know that change is on its way to Kentucky and that together we can
make sure his failed leadership comes to an end.

That’s why I’m running for U.S. Senate to take on Rand Paul so we can
finally elect a leader who will tell the truth and fight for working
people.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/14464?refcode=em20220106-1421&t=1023&akid=1421%2E346206%2EB_H94P ]Will you make a $5 contribution today to support this
work? It’s going to take a massive grassroots movement to defeat an
incumbent like Rand Paul.

Together we can save our Democracy,

Charles Booker

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20220106-1421-footer&t=1024&refcode2=1421_346206_B_H94P&akid=1421%2E346206%2EB_H94P

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1421%2E346206%2EB_H94P

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

But I know that change is on its way to Kentucky and that together we can make sure his failed leadership comes to an end. That’s why I’m running for U.S. Senate to take on Rand Paul so we can finally elect a leader who will tell the truth and fight for working people. [ ]Will you make a $5 contribution today to support this work? It’s going to take a massive grassroots movement to defeat an incumbent like Rand Paul. Together we can save our Democracy, Charles Booker Contribute to Charles Booker:

name: Laura Loomer
subject: This RINO skipped the vote
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Laura Loomer for Congress Inc
body:
As the communist media glorifies January 6th as an “assault on democracy”, I can’t help revisit the inaction and cowardice of my RINO, Do-Nothing opponent, Daniel Webster
| | | [](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/D2t1ZLXnTY5QEVD7630g3Quw/M0GrqEhvRCUQ7WRGBjkMvA)
Patriot,
[](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/D2t1ZLXnTY5QEVD7630g3Quw/M0GrqEhvRCUQ7WRGBjkMvA)
As the communist media glorifies January 6th as an “assault on democracy”, I can’t help but revisit the inaction and cowardice of my RINO, Do-Nothing opponent, Daniel Webster, who did not vote in the House of Representatives when an act for the creation of an independent commission on January 6th was brought to the floor of the House for a vote.

By failing to show up, Daniel Webster committed dereliction of duty, and displayed an astonishing lack of conviction when he refused to take a stand on the events that took place on January 6th.

In 2021, Dan Webster missed over 15% of the votes in Congress. It’s a rare occasion when Webster does decide to show up for work, yet he managed to be present in the Capitol on January 6th, 2021. So, of course, he had to milk the events of the day, and he tweeted that Capitol Hill Police “saved his life” on January 6th 2021.

In the days after January 6th, what did Dan Webster do?

Well, you guessed it . . . Do-Nothing Dan did NOTHING.

He didn’t bother to show up to cast a vote to oppose the second impeachment of President Trump . . . and of course, he didn’t bother to cast a vote to oppose the creation of the January 6th Commission, which has been used as nothing but a witch hunt against Donald Trump and his supporters.

Do-Nothing Dan’s record is clear and he has earned his nickname through his inaction and dereliction of duty . . . [**help me defeat him today**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/D2t1ZLXnTY5QEVD7630g3Quw/M0GrqEhvRCUQ7WRGBjkMvA).

We just finished a record breaking quarter thanks to the donations of thousands of patriots who supported my race, but with only eight months left until the Florida Republican primary, [**I have to raise at least $57k a month to be able to defeat Do-Nothing Dan**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/D2t1ZLXnTY5QEVD7630g3Quw/M0GrqEhvRCUQ7WRGBjkMvA).

[**Will you be one of the first to make a donation this year?**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/D2t1ZLXnTY5QEVD7630g3Quw/M0GrqEhvRCUQ7WRGBjkMvA)

We have Daniel Webster shaking in his shoes, and it’s just a matter of having your continued support so that I can win this race and unseat a do-nothing RINO career politician who has failed his constituents.

I have to inform hundreds of thousands of Republican primary voters about my race and show them that I’m the fighter who will replace Do-Nothing Dan.

Dan Webster has had a chance to serve the voters' interests for over 10 years now, and he has failed miserably.

But I’ll need your help to unseat him, [**so please kick off 2022 strong by supporting my campaign and helping me win**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/D2t1ZLXnTY5QEVD7630g3Quw/M0GrqEhvRCUQ7WRGBjkMvA).

Thank you so much for all that you do.

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

| [**DONATE NOW**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/D2t1ZLXnTY5QEVD7630g3Quw/M0GrqEhvRCUQ7WRGBjkMvA)

name: Patrick Leahy
subject: A horrifying day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Leahy for U
body:
Friend,

A year ago today, a violent mob – incited by our former president – stormed the Capitol in an horrifying attempt to overturn the results of the 2020 election.

It was a terrible day, as we witnessed our fellow Americans attack the very citadel of our democracy while gleefully waving the Confederate battle flag and even sporting Nazi emblems.

Yet, as somber as today feels, we cannot allow this unthinkable event to be buried. It was not a bad dream. As the January 6th attack on the capitol proved, our democracy is fragile. It must be all of our responsibility to protect and care for it.

Earlier today, I spoke on the Senate floor to mark this sorrowful occasion. I took a moment to remember the heroes of the day, including the brave Capitol Police officers, members of the Metropolitan Police Department, many from federal law enforcement agencies who rushed to the Capitol, and also members of the National Guard. Many of them suffered serious injuries and some even lost their lives.

Because of their sacrifice, my colleagues and I were able to reconvene and certify the confirmed results of the election that evening, thus fulfilling our Constitutional duties and completing the transfer of power to President Joe Biden. Our democracy came under assault yet withstood the attack and with the resolve of many our democracy stood strong.

In my remarks, I also called on my colleagues in the Senate to not allow the horrific events of this day to be erased. As we continue to witness the poisonous fallout of that wretched day, we must continue to spotlight the truth of what happened. It is the only way to safeguard our democracy for future generations. Here is a link to my remarks: https://links.e.leahyforvermont.com/els/v2/Z6z3s9XmWdcP/eXd0QWs5UHdSRGZsdTVOVVNBNFNQUExYTURZUkR6MmpDTTBmV3lURDZ3c3gzdnNXZ1JySUlxdnROYWRpNklYdWhERndpSm5sckpQUWlpdkdIQ1NCK01xajJxbXovWHdtN2hBUHF5ZTA1UVE9S0/

Additionally, I will soon be speaking on the Senate floor about the need to take immediate and urgent action to protect voting rights. It is another crucial way in which we can defend our democracy from those who would attack it, whether through violence or the slow erosion of our most important institutions.

For now, let us remember, and let us forever mark this day in history.

Sincerely,

Patrick Leahy
U.S. Senator

name: Ally For Utah
subject: Ally is kicking off her signature-gathering effort!
body:
#AllyForUtah Update | The latest news from the Ally Isom For U.S. Senate Campaign
---
| | | | | | |
---
[ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001fLcQ4niCgeUMPiF8rXr78xBMS_B1gLqKQR86EMrLO3g9ZYX8Mo7VbQZeqpqtk0ynzYQLqfYSXdMnMOq78KitPqzfIHeZOSxYtNTVscj3U2ZQdELjId6znh-Y4Qrj52VpWdH6_-TssepTuPCuT0W5Sg==&c=uQvh-vK_Oj-icbNI7ZppmhHArPsqtuWRl8gfisAcu3bfejVgehLC1A==&ch=X0hgzbjiuI4ZJtHZVpOU6duLpcQTb4H_wlwqicXSOrnVRBXx9hrrMg==)
---
| | Happy new year, friend!
US Senate candidate Ally Isom kicked off the new year with a [signature-gathering effort](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001fLcQ4niCgeUMPiF8rXr78xBMS_B1gLqKQR86EMrLO3g9ZYX8Mo7VbX87TuPSIZTYuFcHFiYU0xcI6VQ7d8v24xrYg2oDFvqWWUvsK5_dUKtw4A6K-md0vJrKgCoyvr4uesiQwd-6fmGtXL8DOL2BVoBngQiYCMuO&c=uQvh-vK_Oj-icbNI7ZppmhHArPsqtuWRl8gfisAcu3bfejVgehLC1A==&ch=X0hgzbjiuI4ZJtHZVpOU6duLpcQTb4H_wlwqicXSOrnVRBXx9hrrMg==) to get her name on June's primary election ballot. Time is ticking, and we need your help! Here's everything you need to know about #TeamAlly's signature-gathering feat.
---
|
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001fLcQ4niCgeUMPiF8rXr78xBMS_B1gLqKQR86EMrLO3g9ZYX8Mo7VbS6-jRNdqKR3xWvVBapiPvyK_fpTpvOjSvOjdCTlh4TcIQ35EB8f0c0DNOiZ9ut8_msGLHw5Lv5nbCqexq3bemVrhLkZzV1MO7Na5VQrFpQmaM-b2wuA_NezYNlihiGftA==&c=uQvh-vK_Oj-icbNI7ZppmhHArPsqtuWRl8gfisAcu3bfejVgehLC1A==&ch=X0hgzbjiuI4ZJtHZVpOU6duLpcQTb4H_wlwqicXSOrnVRBXx9hrrMg==)
---
| The moment has arrived!
[On Monday, Ally officially kicked off ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001fLcQ4niCgeUMPiF8rXr78xBMS_B1gLqKQR86EMrLO3g9ZYX8Mo7VbR0Col_zerCtqkLNJiEap-QOTrLCPdlkdW6PqDDHZ5f4DOOk_pcYZIi8SUGxasWL_YgkqTIaOUR4kiChIHXidbwCfd-4Jsa_MEQWzUvTVdYm8-GALQzXV9o=&c=uQvh-vK_Oj-icbNI7ZppmhHArPsqtuWRl8gfisAcu3bfejVgehLC1A==&ch=X0hgzbjiuI4ZJtHZVpOU6duLpcQTb4H_wlwqicXSOrnVRBXx9hrrMg==)the signature-gathering phase of her US Senate campaign. This means Team Ally has less than 90 DAYS to gather 28,000 signatures from registered Utah Republicans.
---
|
---
| If you'd like to sign Ally's petition to get her name on the ballot, or if you'd like to help others also sign their name on the petition, here are a few things you should know:
* You must sign a physical signature packet from the campaign - it is not possible to sign online, and the signature must match the signature on your voter file. [Click here](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001fLcQ4niCgeUMPiF8rXr78xBMS_B1gLqKQR86EMrLO3g9ZYX8Mo7VbX87TuPSIZTYuFcHFiYU0xcI6VQ7d8v24xrYg2oDFvqWWUvsK5_dUKtw4A6K-md0vJrKgCoyvr4uesiQwd-6fmGtXL8DOL2BVoBngQiYCMuO&c=uQvh-vK_Oj-icbNI7ZppmhHArPsqtuWRl8gfisAcu3bfejVgehLC1A==&ch=X0hgzbjiuI4ZJtHZVpOU6duLpcQTb4H_wlwqicXSOrnVRBXx9hrrMg==) and provide your info to let us know you'd like to sign!
* You must be a registered Republican to sign the petition; check or change your registration [here](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001fLcQ4niCgeUMPiF8rXr78xBMS_B1gLqKQR86EMrLO3g9ZYX8Mo7VbR0Col_zerCtaIDSRJFtjpnCnvNZg8jmI0kNq89NvcmSQtk0t18TDjDORAU1BfiVhInXGrApvPbdQqJ_TIEuEWY=&c=uQvh-vK_Oj-icbNI7ZppmhHArPsqtuWRl8gfisAcu3bfejVgehLC1A==&ch=X0hgzbjiuI4ZJtHZVpOU6duLpcQTb4H_wlwqicXSOrnVRBXx9hrrMg==).
* Signing a campaign's signature packet does NOT mean you are committed to voting for that candidate; it only means you would like their name to appear on the Republican primary ballot.
* Once you sign the petition for Ally, do not sign the signature packet of another candidate, or your signature could be voided.

---
|

Team,

Donald Trump helped incite an insurrection one year ago today. Just days later, he was impeached for it and recommended to be BANNED from holding office ever again.

Now, Trump is trying to BLOCK the crucial investigation into his actions, all while **hinting at _another_ run for office in 2024.**

A second Trump presidency could be _even more catastrophic than the first,_ which is why **we need your response NOW to prove that Americans are ready to stop Trump from reclaiming the White House.**

**We need your response by midnight:**
**Should Donald Trump be BANNED from holding office?**

| | [Yes](https://go.dscc.org/go/6011?ask=5&t=10&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C150%2C250&code=DPE-ND-20220106-TrumpAlert-ImpeachAnniversary-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220106-TrumpAlert-ImpeachAnniversary-ETG-sl1&akid=2486%2E9716520%2EcZcAbJ)

body:
At this very moment last year, at 11:30 PM ET on January 6 of 2021 [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/40432921/324353053/-2023352048?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzkwMTkwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImVlOGVhMjdlLTcyNmYtZWMxMS05NGY2LWM4OTY2NTBkOTIzYyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=_07PAhpF5PM9lrLDELQ_Bj5fdcrezA7YEeGNn-P7v5Y=&emci=36b0313f-756e-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&emdi=ee8ea27e-726f-ec11-94f6-c896650d923c&ceid=16335001) **Hi team,**

**At this very moment last year, at 11:30 PM ET on January 6 of 2021** , the House finalized voting on the confirmation of the 2020 presidential election results. In a win of 303-121 for the popular vote and the incisions of this country, Joe Biden and Kamala Harris were finally fully slated to become the next President and Vice President of the United States.

**Despite this victory, 121 members of the House still chose to uphold the Big Lie.**

The insurrection of January 6 wasn't just made up of Proud Boys and the so-called Oath Keepers. There were elected Republican officials, who even after fearing for their lives on January 6, still voted that same night to reject the results of a fair and free election. **These 121 elected officials are members of the Treason Caucus and the reason why we created Never Again PAC.**

Even one year later, many of the elected officials who made this political violence possible from a position of power have not been held accountable for their disgusting actions. Every generation has an obligation to protect our democracy, and we believe that our time is now.

**[As the one year anniversary of January 6 comes to a close, will you do your part? Your contribution will help us build a war chest to vote the members of the Treason Caucus out of power in the coming elections. Donate whatever you can today>>](https://click.everyaction.com/k/40432922/324353055/1157390272?refcode=em22_220106_J66_fnd_gq_act___D%26I_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220106_J66_fnd_gq_act___D%26I_ettx&utm_medium=email&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzkwMTkwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImVlOGVhMjdlLTcyNmYtZWMxMS05NGY2LWM4OTY2NTBkOTIzYyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=_07PAhpF5PM9lrLDELQ_Bj5fdcrezA7YEeGNn-P7v5Y=)**

Thank you,

David and Ian

---
Friend,

**My loser opponent, the one that we proved to be a Defund the Police Activist last cycle, has announced he is going to try and fool the voters again. This time, he has come out in favor of the socialist takeover being peddled by Bernie Sanders, and Alexandria Ocasio Cortez.**

Max Rose, Bernie Sanders, and Alexandria Ocasio Cortez want to destroy our personal freedoms and tax us into oblivion to pay for their Socialist wish list.

Don’t believe me he? He said so himself on MSNBC just last week when he advocated for **$3.5 TRILLION** to be spent on Bernie’s career wishlist.

Would you rather have higher taxes to pay for the Democrat’s ridiculous spending proposals? Or would you rather have economic freedom and a lower tax burden?

NYC is one of the HIGHEST taxed places in the world, and my phony opponent, Max Rose thinks it would be a good idea to **RAISE TAXES** on the hard-working people of this country.

We need grassroots supporters like you, to step up and reject the tax and spending policies of Max Rose and his radical allies. Rose claims to be a “moderate” but he backs the same ridiculous policies as Socialist AOC.

name: Rabine for Governor
subject: 1/6 Newsletter
body:
From day one of my campaign for Governor, I have made families my top priority.

| [ ](http://rabineforgovernor.nationbuilder.com/?e=97dbce03af6e3b5efee34e9cd7c37776&utm_source=rabineforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1_6_newsletter&n=1) | |
---|---|---
[](https://rabineforgovernor.nationbuilder.com/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYoACmWpbFVl5yir_lA0uM2Gq9g9n79yo2HHshKvg7nExCdQZseeTdqQcxnA0-13oGA&e=97dbce03af6e3b5efee34e9cd7c37776&utm_source=rabineforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1_6_newsletter&n=2) Dear Peter -- From day one of my campaign for Governor, I have made families my top priority. There is a war on families and until we change the leadership of our state, Illinois families will continue to suffer. The latest casualties in the war on families are Chicago Public Schools' parents and students.The pro-Pritzker teachers’ unions have decided they do not want to do in-person learning and so the new semester began with classes being cancelled. We all know the tremendous toll remote learning had on students in the last year, but this does not seem to matter to the teachers’ unions and their political allies. You won’t hear JB Pritzker say much of anything about this situation because he can’t. He, like so many career politicians before him, put their political ambitions ahead of the people they are purportedly elected to serve. Best Regards, Gary Rabine **Will you join our growing movement to defeat JB Pritzker?****** Join Team Rabine to learn how you can be a part of the winning team to defeat JB Pritzker and help turn our state around! | [](https://rabineforgovernor.nationbuilder.com/volunteer?e=97dbce03af6e3b5efee34e9cd7c37776&utm_source=rabineforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1_6_newsletter&n=3 "Join Team Rabine") [Join Team Rabine](https://rabineforgovernor.nationbuilder.com/volunteer?e=97dbce03af6e3b5efee34e9cd7c37776&utm_source=rabineforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1_6_newsletter&n=3)

* * *
### Downers Grove GOP Monthly Meeting (1/13)
Come out and meet Gary from 7-8:30PM!
Located at: Ashyana Banquets, 1620 75th St, Downers Grove
[](https://rabineforgovernor.nationbuilder.com/r?u=47lkNIlA3TPnPj5_qIla_pndsMJrVfDNtBDwzhMoiME&e=97dbce03af6e3b5efee34e9cd7c37776&utm_source=rabineforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1_6_newsletter&n=5 "Event Details Here") [Event Details Here](https://rabineforgovernor.nationbuilder.com/r?u=47lkNIlA3TPnPj5_qIla_pndsMJrVfDNtBDwzhMoiME&e=97dbce03af6e3b5efee34e9cd7c37776&utm_source=rabineforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1_6_newsletter&n=5)
---
### Meet Gary Rabine- Sideouts (1/14)
Join Gary, friends, family, and neighbors for a fun evening to learn about the campaign.
[](https://rabineforgovernor.nationbuilder.com/r?u=BbZD9kwGhy9l8fXrAK06so7wADBv9NBB-jg1bPWufoJ89v_xvPGCyok0SrqYLaN2Db1NvCS5C8M0uJP3MtksNA&e=97dbce03af6e3b5efee34e9cd7c37776&utm_source=rabineforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1_6_newsletter&n=6 "Event Details Here") [Event Details Here](https://rabineforgovernor.nationbuilder.com/r?u=BbZD9kwGhy9l8fXrAK06so7wADBv9NBB-jg1bPWufoJ89v_xvPGCyok0SrqYLaN2Db1NvCS5C8M0uJP3MtksNA&e=97dbce03af6e3b5efee34e9cd7c37776&utm_source=rabineforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1_6_newsletter&n=6)
---
### **Illinois one of the slowest states to recover from pandemic **
December is typically a good month in retail and for many businesses across the nation, this was true.
But not in Illinois.
According to Alignable’s December Road to Recovery Report, the monthly revenues matched or exceeded pre-COVID-19 levels for 43% of U.S. small businesses. In Illinois, only about 32% of small businesses had revenues matching or exceeding pre-COVID sales.
To put this another way, about 68% of Illinois small businesses have not fully recovered from the pandemic.
The slow economic recovery in Illinois directly results from JB Pritzker’s continued failed policies. If we want to get Illinois’ economy going, then we need leaders who will lower taxes, reduce regulations, and end the culture of corruption in Springfield. If we take these steps, we can and will turn Illinois around.
### Illinois residents voting with their feet
Not that we needed any more evidence of the mass exodus out of Illinois, but the end of the year reports from the major moving companies are out and Illinois trails only New Jersey as the state with the most outbound moves.
According to a United Van Lines report, Illinois was No. 2 on a list of outbound states in 2021, with the worst state being the State of New Jersey.
According to the survey, people making $100,000 or more annually made-up 72% of the residents leaving Illinois, up from 67% in 2018.
People are leaving because they are tired of the bad decisions of career politicians. It is time to elect new leaders who will confront this problem instead of continuing to ignore it.
### Illinois’ tax climate one of the country’s worst
A recent report from the Tax Foundation ranks Illinois’ tax climate the 36th worst in the nation.
The score is based on a variety of factors including personal income tax, corporate income tax, sales and property taxes, and unemployment insurance taxes.
The only reason Illinois did not have a lower score was because the state has a flat 4.95% income tax. If voters had approved Governor Pritzker’s progressive income tax during the last election – Illinois’ tax climate would have been even worse.
This is why it is so important to make Governor Pritzker a one-term Governor. He wants to raise taxes that we as taxpayers simply cannot afford. It is bad enough that the tax climate in Illinois is as bad as it is, but a second JP Pritzker term will send Illinois to the bottom of the list. We must work together to make sure we defeat him in November.
* * *

This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://rabineforgovernor.nationbuilder.com/unsubscribe?e=97dbce03af6e3b5efee34e9cd7c37776&utm_source=rabineforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1_6_newsletter&n=11).

Thank you and God bless.

If we take these steps, we can and will turn Illinois around. Illinois residents voting with their feet Not that we needed any more evidence of the mass exodus out of Illinois, but the end of the year reports from the major moving companies are out and Illinois trails only New Jersey as the state with the most outbound moves. According to a United Van Lines report, Illinois was No. 2 on a list of outbound states in 2021, with the worst state being the State of New Jersey. According to the survey, people making $100,000 or more annually made-up 72% of the residents leaving Illinois, up from 67% in 2018. People are leaving because they are tired of the bad decisions of career politicians. It is time to elect new leaders who will confront this problem instead of continuing to ignore it. Illinois’ tax climate one of the country’s worst A recent report from the Tax Foundation ranks Illinois’ tax climate the 36th worst in the nation. The score is based on a variety of factors including personal income tax, corporate income tax, sales and property taxes, and unemployment insurance taxes. The only reason Illinois did not have a lower score was because the state has a flat 4.95% income tax. If voters had approved Governor Pritzker’s progressive income tax during the last election – Illinois’ tax climate would have been even worse. This is why it is so important to make Governor Pritzker a one-term Governor. He wants to raise taxes that we as taxpayers simply cannot afford. It is bad enough that the tax climate in Illinois is as bad as it is, but a second JP Pritzker term will send Illinois to the bottom of the list. We must work together to make sure we defeat him in November. | Paid for by Rabine for Governor | PO Box 59183, Schaumburg, IL 60159 A copy of our report filed with the State Board of Elections is (or will be) available on the Board’s official website (www.elections.il.gov) or for purchase from the State Board of Elections, Springfield, Illinois.

subject: Remembering 1 year ago
body:

Hey Peter, I remember this day one year again. I came in from working lunch out in the drive-through and checked my phone. I was shocked at the news headlines I saw related to the capital and pulled out my computer. Soon, folks were huddled around watching the insurrection live. When I went home, I continued to watch in shock that something like this was happening in America, and in our Capital. As I watch and read news in the days following, I even more firmly decided that I was committed to being part of the change. 365 days later we are still waiting for those involved, especially at higher levels of leadership, to be held accountable for their actions. We need elected officials who will work to hold those who defy the constitution accountable for their actions. January 6, 2021 is a day I look back on as a day that further solidified my resolve to run for office because we need leaders in Washington who will fight for the people, not ones who encourage insurrection. **We must fight for our Democracy and I will be part of that fight.**
---
Together we can win this,
